Name: Lar Cooperativa Agroindustrial
Description:
A Lar Cooperativa Agroindustrial é uma cooperativa brasileira fundada em 1964 no Oeste do Paraná, com a administração central localizada no município de Medianeira. Com faturamento em 2023 de 21,7 bilhões de reais, a Cooperativa é formada por mais de 15 mil associados e emprega mais de 25 mil pessoas. Suas principais atividades são a comercialização de insumos agrícolas, recepção de grãos, industrialização de frangos de corte e suinocultura. 
A área de atuação da Cooperativa abrange o Oeste e Norte do Paraná, Mato Grosso do Sul e Santa Catarina. A estrutura ampla contempla 36 escritórios de atendimento aos produtores rurais, 63 pontos de recepção e armazenagem de grãos (soja, milho e trigo). A Lar Cooperativa também é responsável pela comercialização da produção de seus associados. 
Na avicultura a Lar tem o domínio de toda a cadeia produtiva, desde a produção de ovos férteis, dois incubatórios próprios, mais de 2.000 aviários, que resultam em um abate diário de mais de 1 milhão de aves. Ainda na pecuária a Cooperativa produz ao ano aproximadamente mais de 1 milhão suínos terminados para abate. 
A diversidade dos negócios proporciona a Cooperativa maior estabilidade nos negócios e oferece mais segurança aos produtores rurais. Dentre suas principais características é possível citar a inovação e melhoria contínua, que proporcionam evolução em seus produtos e processos para manter-se atualizada perante o dinamismo global.

Name: Cooperativa Agroindustrial Copagril
Description:
A Cooperativa Agroindustrial Copagril é uma cooperativa brasileira nascida do agro. 
Fundada em 1970 em Marechal Cândido Rondon, região Oeste do Paraná, a empresa tem atuação também nas regiões Sudoeste do Paraná e Sul do Mato Grosso do Sul.
Conta com 1.600 funcionários e mais de 7.000 associados, aos quais comercializa sua produção agrícola, fornece produtos, incentivos e conhecimento técnicos para que estes se profissionalizem e diversifiquem suas atividades agropecuárias.
Sua principal área de atuação está na produção e armazenagem de grãos, como o milho, soja e trigo. Entre suas outras atividades, a Copagril possui uma indústria de pellets e duas fábricas de rações, ambas agregando valor aos produtos dos seus associados.
No varejo, a Cooperativa tem atuação com postos de combustíveis, uma rede de 7 supermercados, 23 lojas agropecuárias, loja de máquinas e implementos agrícolas e comércio de energia solar.
A Copagril tem como missão fomentar a produção de grãos e derivados, de matéria-prima e animal, comercializar alimentos, equipamentos e insumos agrícolas, e gerar valor à sociedade onde atua.
Tem a visão de ser uma empresa sustentável, inovadora e referência no Agronegócio.
Os principais valores sustentados pela Copagril são: Cooperação; o Respeito; a Honestidade; o Atendimento; a Inovação e a Sustentabilidade.
Somo Copagril, somos nascidos do agro, somos o cooperativismo que transforma!

Name: Citra Borneo Indah (CBI Group)
Description:
PT Citra Borneo Indah (CBI) didirikan pada tanggal 6 Mei 1999. Perjalanan panjang yang dimulai sejak tahun 1999 sebagai perusahaan perkebunan kelapa sawit, CBI berkembang dan menjelma menjadi sebuah Group Perusahaan besar yang mendunia. Perjalanan hampir 25 tahun ini, membuat jaringan bisnis CBI semakin kuat dan berkembang di berbagai sektor industri dengan menerapkan model bisnis yang berbasis sinergi dan terdiversifikasi pada lima segmen usaha, terdiri dari :

1. Perkebunan Kelapa Sawit
2. Hilirisasi Industri Kelapa Sawit
3. Kawasan Industri dan Pembangkit Tenaga Listrik
4. Perkapalan
5. Properti & Konstruksi
6. Media Massa
7. Perbankan
8. Peternakan

Kami memberikan dampak positif yang besar terhadap perekonomian dan menciptakan lapangan pekerjaan di Indonesia, khususnya di daerah Kalimantan Tengah. Seiring dengan meluasnya jaringan bisnis CBI, Kami berkomitmen menerapkan prinsip bisnis berkelanjutan, yang berperan penting terhadap kesejahteraan masyarakat dan lingkungan. Setiap langkah yang Kami tempuh diharapkan membawa perubahan bagi perekonomian nasional.

Name: ClassificAgro | Vagas e Talentos no Agro
Description:

Com mais de 56 mil seguidores e um crescimento 100% orgânico, compartilhamos vagas, eventos, notícias e insights que fortalecem o mercado de trabalho agro, impulsionando empregabilidade e desenvolvimento profissional em todos os elos da cadeia produtiva.

Nosso propósito é valorizar as pessoas e os processos que movem o campo, tornando o recrutamento no agro uma experiência mais facilitada, empática e humana.

 Aqui você encontra:
• Vagas e oportunidades no agronegócio (empregos, estágios e trainee)
• Dicas de carreira e desenvolvimento profissional
• Cursos, eventos e capacitações
• Conexão direta com empresas e profissionais 
Mais do que um canal de vagas, o ClassificAgro é um ecossistema de transformação profissional, unindo gestão de pessoas, marketing e propósito. 

Em breve, lançaremos no mercado o PRIMEIRO PORTAL DE RECRUTAMENTO 100% FOCADO NO AGRO. 

AGUARDEM!

Name: JFI Silvicultura
Description:
Desde 1991, a JFI Silvicultura tem como Core Business, prestação de serviços de Silvicultura. Tendo por sua principal missão, realizar a prestação de serviços com Segurança e Qualidade, visando o desenvolvimento & crescimento de forma sustentável, participando efetivamente das melhores políticas que visam compromisso social e econômico.
Estamos presentes em 4 Estados, São Paulo, Mato Grosso do Sul, Paraná e Rio Grande do Sul, Prestando Serviço com excelência para os principais exportadores de Papel e Celulose do mundo e Produção de Painéis, como: Suzano, Klabin, Bracell, CMPC e Eucatex. 
Há mais de 32 anos no mercado, a JFI tem por um dos seus principais valores a Saúde e Bem-estar do seu colaborador, Plantando cerca de 66 mil hectares de florestas por ano, e atuando com um quadro com mais de 3.900 colaboradores.

Name: Belem Bioenergia Brasil
Description: A BELEM BIOENERGIA BRASIL tem nos principais instrumentos de certificação da produção de óleo de palma e biocombustíveis, juntamente com a legislação brasileira, a base de um compromisso de valor inegociável com seus três pilares fundamentais: ambiental, econômico e social.

Name: Netafim Brasil
Description:
Netafim é a maior empresa de irrigação do mundo e líder global de soluções em irrigação, comprometida em combater a escassez de alimentos, água e terra, para um futuro sustentável.

Fundada em 1965, a Netafim foi pioneira na revolução do gotejamento, criando uma evulução na parte de irrigação. Hoje, especializada em soluções de ponta a ponta desde a captura da água até a entrega nas raízes, a Netafim oferece projetos de irrigação por gotejamento subterrâneo e superficial, bem como soluções para cultivo protegido apoiadas por serviços de engenharia, gerenciamento de projetos e financiamento. A Netafim também está liderando o caminho em agricultura digital, irrigação e fertirrigação, integrando monitoramento em tempo real, análise e controle automatizado em um sistema de última geração.

Com 33 subsidiárias, 19 fábricas, 2 fábricas de reciclagem e mais de 5.000 funcionários em todo o mundo, as soluções sob medida de irrigação e fertirrigação da Netafim atingem milhões de agricultores, desde o pequenos produtor até grandes industrias agrícolas, para que produzam mais com menos


PRODUZA MAIS
 - Aumento expressivo da produtividade (+ de 100% em alguns casos)
 - Melhor qualidade do produto colhido
 - Aumento da longevidade em algumas culturas (cana, por exemplo)
 - Produção independente de chuva
 
COM MENOS
 - Economia no consumo de água (- 40% em média)
 - Economia no consumo de insumos (defensivos e fertilizantes)
 - Economia de mão-de-obra
 - Economia de energia elétrica

Name: Sistema Faemg Senar
Description:
O Sistema Faemg Senar (Federação da Agricultura e Pecuária do Estado de Minas Gerais) representa os produtores rurais de todo o estado. A entidade une forças para defender os interesses políticos, econômicos e sociais da categoria, que possui 385 sindicatos, e também desenvolve ações juntamente com o SENAR (Serviço Nacional de Aprendizagem Rural) para capacitar produtores através de cursos de FPR (Formação Profissional Rural) e PS (Promoção Social). Através do SENAR, mais de 200 mil pessoas são atendidas anualmente em todas as regiões do estado.

O Sistema Faemg Senar tem como entidades integrantes:

A Faemg, fundada em 1951, atua nas instâncias governamentais e institucionais, em busca do desenvolvimento do setor; SENAR, fundado em 1993, promove a formação e a capacitação dos trabalhadores, produtores rurais e suas famílias; INAES (Instituto Antonio Ernesto de Salvo), fundado em 2008, estuda os problemas e propõe soluções para a agricultura e pecuária, e os Sindicatos dos Produtores Rurais, representantes da categoria nos municípios.

Mais de 400 mil pequenos, médios e grandes produtores mineiros são beneficiados pelas ações institucionais do Sistema Faemg Senar, parte integrante do Sistema Patronal Rural, que tem como entidade líder a CNA (Confederação da Agricultura e Pecuária do Brasil).

Name: Fex Agro
Description:
A FEX AGRO é uma empresa fundada por profissionais veteranos da cadeia de comercialização de commodities agrícolas. A empresa iniciou suas operações com a estratégia comercial de operar em nichos de mercado não atendidos adequadamente pelos grandes players.  

A FEX AGRO possui ampla experiência na comercialização tanto no mercado doméstico como no mercado externo. 

Atualmente a FEX AGRO opera na comercialização dos seguintes produtos:

Agroinsumos
•	sementes, fertilizantes e corretivos, tratamento de semente, inoculantes,  adjuvantes, foliares e defensivos

Grãos / Barter
•	soja, milho, sorgo, milheto e feijão

Nutrição Animal e Pastagem
•	matérias primas de nutrição animal – caroço e torta de algodão, DDG (dried destillers grain), casca de soja peletizada, farelo de algodão, farelo de amendoim e farelo de soja
•	sementes, fertilizantes, corretivos e herbicidas para pastagem

Barter - modalidade de negócio, onde os defensivos, sementes e fertilizantes são trocados por grãos


Missão, Visão e Valores

Nossa Missão é gerar prosperidade e desenvolvimento ao agronegócio, levando soluções inovadoras de forma eficiente, sustentável e segura

Nossa Visão é ser reconhecida nacionalmente pela excelência e inovação de suas soluções até 2025

Nossos Valores são:
    - Excelência – entregar produtos e serviços de qualidade excepcionais
    - Inovação – abraçar e conduzir mudanças, ser aventureiro, criativo e cabeça aberta, procurando sempre por crescimento e aprendizagem
    - Ética – nunca esquecer da integridade e transparência
    - Empenho – ser apaixonado e determinado focando em resultados quantificáveis
    - Trabalho em Equipe – criar relacionamentos abertos e honestos através da comunicação, gerando um time positivo e com apreço um pelo outro
    - Prosperidade – gerar riqueza para todos os stakeholders

Name: Algar Farming
Description:
A Algar Farming é uma operadora agrícola que atua em diversos segmentos do agronegócio, com parceiros no Brasil e no mundo. Fundada em 2014, preocupa-se em produzir de forma sustentável, com rentabilidade e alta tecnologia. São quatro torres de negócio, Agricultura, Pecuária, Floresta e Transformação de Terras, além de um ecossistema de negócios para produtores e parceiros, a FarmingShow, e a movelaria Pacajá Móveis. 

Com unidades espalhadas pelos estados de Minas Gerais, Mato Grosso do Sul e Pará, a gestão da Algar Farming se orienta pelos princípios de responsabilidade ambiental e social, e se preocupa em plantar o futuro no presente. 

Somos a Algar Farming. Servimos ao planeta.

Name: Salon International de l'Agriculture au Maroc "SIAM"
Description:
Under the High Patronage of His Majesty the King of Morocco, Mohammed VI

The 13th International Agricultural Fair of Morocco (SIAM) will take place in Meknes from Tuesday 24th to Saturday 28th of April 2018.

The SIAM, initiated in 2006 by the Initiative and the Royal Will, continues to benefit from the High Patronage of His Majesty King Mohammed VI.

The previous editions of the exhibition were Inaugurated by His Majesty King Mohammed VI, by His Royal Highness Prince Moulay Rachid, as well as by The Crown Prince Moulay Al Hassan. This special interest for the SIAM, showcase and spearhead of the PMV, illustrates the Royal Attention to the agricultural sector. The agricultural sector is the essential link of the Kingdom economy. It is the actor of rural development, the guardian of the social balance of the country and a guarantee of security for the future of our chidren. The SIAM, through its role of platform for exchanges, connections and exhibitions, participates in the evolution and development of Moroccan agriculture.

Name: LTO Noord
Description:
‘Perspectives for Agricultural Entrepreneurs’ is the motto of LTO Noord, the agricultural and horticultural organisation that defends the collective and individual interests of agricultural entrepreneurs in the nine Dutch provinces north of the country’s major rivers: Groningen, Drenthe, Fryslân, Flevoland, Utrecht, Gelderland, Overijssel, Noord-Holland and Zuid-Holland.
Thanks to its local offices LTO Noord is able to operate in close proximity to its members and with a thorough perception of local conditions. The organisation has two core tasks that complement and reinforce each other. 
The first core task is to promote our members’ collective interests at the local, regional, national and international levels, with the aim of reinforcing the economic and social position of farmers and horticulturists. Our members, our democratic structure and hundreds of expert and result-oriented administrators safeguard LTO Noord’s position as a strong, independent, self-confident and dependable conversation partner for government authorities, market parties and social organisations alike. 
Our second core task is to facilitate the entrepreneurship and craftsmanship of all agriculturists affiliated with the organisation. Thanks to our independent units LTO Noord Projects, LTO Real Estate, LTO Noord Insurance and our strategic alliances with LTO Noord Consultancy, GVK Agro Lawyers and Adure Lawyers, we are able to offer our members a wide range of products and services. 
Together with the Southern Agricultural and Horticultural Organisation (ZLTO) and the Limburg Provincial Agricultural and Horticultural Organisation (LLTB), LTO Noord forms part of the national umbrella organisation LTO Nederland.

Name: Wij.land
Description:
vision

Wij.land stands for a healthy, biodiverse and resilient landscape that creates ecological, economic and social value for society. So that we leave our landscape in a better shape for future generations.

Wij.land restores the balance between agriculture and nature. We do this by helping farmers to shape their business in a future-proof way with passion and craftsmanship.

mission

> We inspire farmers, citizens, policy makers, nature organizations and entrepreneurs to learn and work together; in order to create a better connection between people and nature.
> We are inspired by Commonland's 4-returns philosophy.
> We work together with farmers on the transition to agriculture with a good financial perspective and a positive influence on people & nature; and we remove barriers that stand in the way of this change.
> We help similar organizations with a comparable vision on the landscape.
> We start with the soil as the basis for a sustainable future.

Name: Brazilian Roundtable on Sustainable Livestock
Description:
The Brazilian Roundtable on Sustainable Livestock was created in late 2007 and formally constituted in June 2009. It consists of representatives from different sectors that make up the value chain of cattle production in Brazil. Attended by representatives of industries and industry organizations, associations of farmers, retailers, banks, civil society organizations, research centers and universities.

The goal of the RT is to discuss and formulate, in a transparent manner, principles, standards and common practices to be adopted by the sector, which contribute to the development of a sustainable cattle ranching, socially just, environmentally friend and economically viable. In this context, the involvement of all segments that make up the value chain, and also civil society is fundamental to achieving this goal.

Name: LNB Group

Sustainability ethos is engrained in multiple aspects of the Group’s businesses. 

The Group was founded by Mr. Ramcoowar and Mr. Mugneeram Bangur in 1918. For over a century now, it is privileged to be able to majorly contribute towards India’s social and economic development. Today, under the leadership of the Group Chairman, Mr Laxmi Niwas Bangur and a highly committed and professional senior management team, the Group aims for a global presence starting with Sustainability focused businesses in the East African and Southeast Asian region.

Description:
A Central de Adubos nasceu em 2010, com um objetivo claro: impactar o mercado agro da região do Vale do São Francisco fornecendo adubos de qualidade.

Quando a Central de Adubos foi criada, o foco era apenas a venda de Adubos e ser uma verdadeira central onde os produtores poderiam encontrar uma grande variedade de ADUBOS. Com o passar do tempo e ganhando credibilidade dos nossos clientes  percebemos que eles precisavam de outros produtos, então decidimos agregar e trazer um portfólio mais robusto.

Com a premissa de oferecer soluções de valor agregado aos clientes, a empresa presta atendimento integral aos consumidores, incluindo fornecimento de insumos, acesso a novas tecnologias de produção, consultorias e assistências técnicas personalizadas, visando sempre o aumento da qualidade, produtividade e rentabilidade das culturas.

Name: European Agroforestry Federation (EURAF)
Description:
The European Agroforestry Federation (EURAF) aims at promoting the use of trees on farms as well as any kind of silvopastoralism throughout the different environmental regions of Europe. 

EURAF's Mission is to “ensure that there is at least 10% tree crown cover on grassland and cropland in all European regions by 2040” - and this will be achieved by supporting efforts to develop awareness, education, research, policy-making and investments which foster the use of trees on farms.  

With offices in Montpellier (HQ) and Brussels (EU office), EURAF has more than 500 members and a network of 28 Affiliated Entities in 20 EU countries and 5 outside the EU.  

We work closely with European institutions, policymakers, and agroforestry stakeholders to drive positive change in the agroforestry sector.

Access our Linktree here: https://linktr.ee/agroforestry.eu

Name: Rootical
Description:
Rootical Start-up Studio enables social entrepreneurs in Uganda to build and own their regenerative agri-food businesses. We aim to regenerate not only agriculture but also finance and entrepreneurship. 

Our work is based on 3 pillars: 

 Regenerative agriculture and agroecology as the best paradigms for our future food systems.

 Purpose-driven entrepreneurship to drive both impact and profitability of inclusive business models that address key food system challenges. 

 Steward ownership to change the way our food companies of tomorrow are financed, managed and owned, moving away from extractive capital to true impact investing. 

A start-up studio is a streamlined process to produce startups. The root problems Rootical aims to address are threefold: ecosystems collapse caused by industrial agriculture and food production, staggering unemployment and malnutrition rates on the African continent, and sharply rising economic inequality. Making bio-nutrient dense food accessible for all is a key goal. 

In a 3-step, human-centred systemic venture building process, a cohort of 50 Ugandan social entrepreneurs will:

1 Become food system thinkers, conduct a participatory food system analysis and identify key challenges

2 Develop, test and iterate on solutions and inclusive business models, and; 

3 Build teams and get ready to launch those regenerative start-ups. 

5-6 Start-ups will be co-founded in the start-up studio, to incorporate based on steward ownership principles in the second half of the yearly studio cycle.

We provide purpose-driven entrepreneurs with the access to expertise, funding, tools, and a systemic venture building process to build and own their agri-food companies. 

 Rootical is implemented by Fresh Ventures Studio (NL) and SHONA (UG). DOEN Foundation, Biovision and the French Embassy in Uganda our financing our work.

Description:

But significant measurement challenges have held soil carbon efforts back - until now.

By reducing the cost of soil carbon measurement by 90%+, Yard Stick will dramatically expand the opportunities for evidence-based regenerative practices to simultaneously improve ecosystem health, increase farmer income, and combat climate change.

Name: Farm Safari
Description:
Farm Safari is an ESG-driven Non-governmental organisation transforming rural communities and landscapes through sustainable agriculture and agroforestry. Inspired by the UN Sustainable Development Goals, we empower smallholder and out-grower farmers in Kenya to grow profitable, climate-resilient crops and high carbon-sequestering trees.
We combine indigenous knowledge, modern regenerative techniques, and collaborative partnerships to restore degraded ecosystems, improve rural livelihoods, and build sustainable food and economic systems.
Why This Matters:
Food insecurity, climate change, and economic instability continue to impact smallholder farmers in Kenya. Farm Safari is pioneering a climate-smart, farmer-driven approach that integrates agroforestry, sustainable crop production, and market access to build resilient rural economies.

How We Fit Into Global Priorities:
Farm Safari aligns with the UN’s Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) on Zero Hunger (SDG 2), Climate Action (SDG 13), and Economic Growth (SDG 8) by promoting sustainable agricultural development that enhances food security while restoring ecosystems.

Our Mission & Vision
Mission:
To catalyze environmental restoration and community resilience by equipping farmers with the knowledge, tools, and markets to thrive in regenerative crop and tree-growing systems.
Vision:
We envision a future where farmers are the stewards of the land regenerating ecosystems, breaking cycles of poverty, and securing food sovereignty through nature-positive agriculture.

The Problem We Are Solving
1. Limited Agricultural Knowledge & Climate Challenges
2. Environmental Degradation & Deforestation
3. Market Barriers

The Farm Safari Solution: Integrated Climate-Smart Agriculture
1. Climate-Smart Crop Production & Agroforestry
2. Market-Driven Agriculture
3 . Developing a carbon credit model to reward farmers who restore land through agroforestry.

Esta alternativa se ha vuelto esencial debido a los altos costos de estos ingredientes en la formulación de alimentos balanceados para consumo animal.

 LIPOFEED es la herramienta nutricional clave para reducir costos en la formulación de alimentos balanceados, aumentar los rendimientos productivos de sus animales y, lo más importante, mejorar la rentabilidad de su empresa pecuaria. Nuestra misión es mejorar la competitividad de su negocio en el mercado, ofreciéndole soluciones innovadoras y eficientes para el cuidado y la alimentación de sus animales.

En PREMEZCLAS ENERGETICAS PECUARIAS, no solo nos preocupamos por la calidad de nuestros productos, sino también por el éxito y bienestar de nuestros clientes. Formed in 2014 through the merger of Blanchard Valley Farmers Cooperative and Deshler Farmers Elevator, Legacy Farmers combines over a century of experience with modern innovation.

Led by the visionary leadership of CEO Mark Sunderman, we have built an organizational framework that promotes efficiency, innovation, and sustainable growth. Each division works in synergy, allowing us to deliver tailored solutions to meet the evolving needs of our farmer-members and customers.

Based in Findlay, OH, at the heart of northwest Ohio's agricultural region, our cooperative proudly serves a broad community spanning Allen, Defiance, Hancock, Hardin, Henry, Putnam, Sandusky, Seneca, Wood, and Wyandot counties. While rooted in rural farming, our headquarters is ideally located with access to the amenities of larger cities, making us well-positioned to support both local and regional agribusiness needs.

Name: Michael Fields Agricultural Institute
Description:
Michael Fields Agricultural Institute is a non-profit organization that has focused on soil health and regenerative practices since 1984. With a broad coalition of public and private partners, the Institute supports farmers, food systems and communities in the Upper Midwest and beyond through a range of research, education, and policy programs and initiatives. 

Rooted in our research farm near East Troy, Wisconsin, MFAI facilitates a number of farmer-centered peer networks that coalesce around particular practices, interests, and demographics, such as Wisconsin Women in Conservation, Milwaukee Urban Agriculture Network, WI Grazing Coalition, WI Cover Crop Data Network, and the Staple Crops Cohort. These are all great opportunities for growers and educators to connect. 

MFAI also advances regenerative systems through partnership work around particular projects, like the Soil Health Alliance for Research and Engagement (SHARE), Midwest Hemp Research Collaborative, KernzaCAP, Perennial Crop Supply Chain Partnership, and the Showcasing Agroforestry in SE Wisconsin program. 

In the broad regenerative agriculture ecosystem, MFAI plays a connective role supporting partners at the intersection of primary agronomic research, citizen science, farmer outreach, consumer education, market development, economic analysis, policy advocacy, and issue organizing. 

Every year, MFAI hosts over 50 in-person field days, learning circles, summits, and online live webinars. See Events at michaelfields.org/event-list and visit our YouTube channel @MichaelFieldsAg

The Institute was founded by German immigrants in 1984 as a biodynamic community of soil lovers and a “farm school without walls” in East Troy, though we have gradually expanded our scope. Our work was, and is, to inspire and empower love and care for land through peer connection, on-farm science, educational outreach, and farmer-led advocacy. We’re still here for farmers, planting seeds together for a regenerative future.

Name: TERRAVENE
Women In Ranching
Description:
Women in Ranching is a vibrant community and support network dedicated to those who work with, care for, or feel called to the land. We unite to connect, educate, inspire, and grow as a diverse network of women in agriculture.

We acknowledge that historical and systemic inequities continue to impact women today. Our mission is to create a space where all women can be seen and affirmed in their leadership and stewardship of the land. We are committed to prioritizing diversity, equity, and inclusion in our board, programming, and leadership.

What We Mean by “Women”: Let us be clear, if you identify yourself as a woman, no matter the complexity, we welcome you at Women in Ranching.

#WomenInAgriculture #WomenInRanching #DiversityEquityInclusion #WomenLeadership #LandStewardship #AgriculturalCommunity #SupportWomenFarmers #InclusiveLeadership #EmpowerWomen

Name: Emirob
Description:
EMIROB est une ferme agricole intégrée qui a une forte volonté de diversification qui fait d’elle un espace de culture de maraîchage (légumes et légumineuses) d’élevage (moutons, poules, chèvres et cochons), d’arboriculture (citronniers, papayers, bananiers) et d’aviculture (Poulets de chaire et poules pondeuses) et d’agrotourisme (écotourisme, brunch, camping et excursion au lac rose).

  Vision et Mission
L'Afrique est en pleine mutation, pour faire face aux enjeux de la mondialisation qui engendrent de nouveaux défis et challenges une des solutions majeures est l'agriculture, mais surtout la transformation des produits de l'agriculture. C'est dans cette perspective que la ferme Emi-Rob se positionne afin de saisir cette opportunité et ainsi contribuer à sa manière à bâtir l'Afrique de demain en investissant dans les domaines suivants :
•	Ferme agropastorale
•	Transformation de produits agricoles
•	Commercialisation de produits agricoles
•	Restauration rapide
Trois objectifs sont poursuivis à différentes échéances. À court terme, Améliorer la qualité de vie en offrant des produits de qualité à tous les consommateurs partout dans le monde. À moyen terme, générer des revenus par la vente de nos produits de qualité dans les circuits de distribution. Et enfin à long terme, devenir un des leaders du secteur de l'agro-industrie sur le marché au Sénégal et dans la sous-région.
Nos divers produits sont proposés en petite distribution, en restauration professionnelle, aux structures hôtelières, dans les circuits spécialisés ou encore dans la rue pour satisfaire les besoins et les envies de tous. Nous cherchons à répondre aux besoins actuels et futurs de nos clients en leur offrant des produits fiables, de plaisir, de qualité et de sécurité.

Name: Centre d'études sur les coûts de production en agriculture - CECPA
Description:
Le CECPA est un organisme indépendant à but non lucratif oeuvrant principalement dans les coûts de production d'une multitude de secteurs agricoles, agro-alimentaires, et forestiers. Il fût créé en 2002 par La Financière agricole du Québec (FADQ), le ministère de l'Agriculture, des Pêcheries et de l'Alimentation du Québec (MAPAQ) et l'Union des producteurs agricoles (UPA).

Le CECPA est donc une organisation spécialisée dans le cumul, l’uniformisation et la validation de données techniques, économiques et financières permettant de produire des informations factuelles de qualité, représentatives du secteur bioalimentaire et de l’environnement dans lequel il évolue. Le centre amène une expertise complémentaire aux chercheurs et aux experts du milieu, mais amène surtout une source d’information accessible pour les entreprises qui souhaitent approfondir leurs connaissances et optimiser leurs résultats.

Le CECPA est une organisation efficiente et polyvalente dont l’intégrité et la qualité sont source de confiance.

En somme, le CECPA cumule de l'expérience dans plus d'une vingtaine de productions et secteurs agroalimentaires ce qui en fait un acteur important de l'écosystème bioalimentaire et forestier Québécois.

Name: Forward Farms
Description:
Forward Farms is a beacon for change, born out of a passion for independent farmland and the desire to have a collective, positive impact on the planet through raising livestock. 

With a new line of emerging beef products, we hope to introduce consumers to a groundbreaking concept—Beef Raised 100% Carbon Neutral—and invite farms to join a forward-thinking movement to advance conventional agricultural practices. 

After several years in development, we have found that beef raised on carbon net-zero farms is not only beef that is better for the planet, but also beef that boasts superior taste and tenderness.

Forward Farms promotes regenerative agriculture to restore soil health naturally, while reducing chemical use and supporting biodiversity. This progressive approach advances every step of the cattle raising process and in turn creates farms which have net-zero carbon emissions.

In order to truly move farming forward, it will take all of us making choices that consider our personal health as well as the planet’s.

The latter, wishing to follow in the footsteps of his elders, by working the land to feed the world, launched into agriculture in 2016 with Samba Sory Camara, Mamadou Mountaga Kann by the accompaniment of the incubator "Osez Innover" After 4 years of experience in Kindia in the production of pineapple and eggplant, Ferme Agroverte returns to the sources, more precisely to Mamou Porédaka, to find the lands of its ancestors and thus perpetuate the cultivation of Fonio, Cassava, Maize, Beans, as well as sheep breeding and other services

Name: BEE HEALTHY HONEY
Description:
Stworzyliśmy innowacyjny emiter ultradźwiękowy, który zwalcza warrozę - niebezpiecznego pasożyta u pszczół. Nasz wynalazek jest odpowiedzią na liczne problemy wynikające ze stosowania szkodliwych środków chemicznych przez pszczelarzy. Przewaga emitera polega na tym, iż jest on rozwiązaniem: 
- bezpiecznym,
- etycznym,
- ekonomicznym,
- wygodnym,
- ekologicznym, 
- skutecznym.
Prowadzimy badania naukowe i stale ulepszamy nasze urządzenie.  Jesteśmy zespołem międzypokoleniowym i pragniemy udowodnić, że nie można być ani za młodym, ani za starym na startup. Naszą misją jest doskonalenia pszczelarstwa, aby było ono bezpieczne, etyczne i jakościowe.

Zostaliśmy wyróżnieni przez programy jak: TeenCrunch, Young InCredibles Sebastiana Kulczyka i AKCES NCBR.

Name: InterTropics ︎ Agri-Aquaculture Technologies and Services
Description:
Do you want to invest in aquaculture safely and with high performance?

InterTropics specializes in developing strategic technologies and services for aquabusiness, connecting aquaculture to agribusiness through innovative solutions that reduce risks, optimize processes and increase production efficiency.
Strategic decisions about an aquaculture enterprise require technical knowledge and a long-term vision. Our team supports investors and producers in evaluating projects and assets, ensuring that technical and operational premises are aligned with the best practices in the sector.

We know that the needs of modern aquaculture can only be met with innovative solutions. That is why we use BIM modelling to create more efficient and profitable enterprises. Our approach allows us to evaluate and optimize verticalized and integrated projects with Agribusiness and shared and support facilities.
Our services help reduce investment risks, whether in designing new projects, analysing available technologies, or verifying compliance with existing structures.

Our Solutions:
 GreenRAS – Integration of aquaculture with agriculture for sustainable animal protein production.
 AquaBIM – Intelligent engineering for aquaculture and agriculture, reducing operational risks.
 AquaIOT – coming soon!
 AgroVISION – coming soon!

For both new and ongoing projects, it is worth checking whether your project is on the right track!
 Are the technical requirements being fully met?
 Does the structure allow for efficient execution of processes?
 Does the technology used to extract the best performance from the infrastructure and the team?

If any of these questions have raised doubts, it is time to count on our expertise and find out how we can transform your project! 
 intertropics.tech@gmail.com

#intertropics #agtech #aquaculture #irrigation #agriculture #livestock #ilpf #biogas

Les réflexions communes autour des enjeux de l’élevage permettent de développer les partenariats, d’orienter les projets de recherche des fermes et de conduire des actions de communication et de transfert auprès des éleveurs, des conseillers et des partenaires des filières d’élevage.

Name: ETOILE FARM
Description:
Présentation officielle – Étoile Farm 

Étoile Farm est un projet agricole ambitieux et visionnaire, récemment lancé avec pour objectif de devenir un acteur de référence dans l’agriculture moderne et durable au Sénégal et en Afrique.

Le nom Étoile Farm symbolise notre engagement :

Étoile : la lumière, la guidance et l’excellence. Nous voulons être une référence qui éclaire le chemin de l’agriculture africaine moderne.

Farm : notre cœur de métier, l’agriculture, l’innovation et la production de qualité.

Notre vision est claire : construire une ferme innovante, durable et rentable, capable de répondre aux besoins alimentaires locaux tout en créant de la valeur économique et sociale.

Nos objectifs immédiats :

Identifier et acquérir des terrains adaptés pour nos cultures et installations.

Développer des pratiques agricoles modernes et durables (agriculture de précision, irrigation intelligente, agroforesterie).

Attirer des partenaires et investisseurs pour concrétiser notre projet et accélérer son impact.

Nos ambitions à moyen et long terme :

Produire des cultures de qualité pour les marchés locaux et internationaux.

Créer des emplois et former les jeunes dans l’agriculture moderne.

Contribuer à la souveraineté alimentaire et au développement durable au Sénégal et en Afrique.

Étoile Farm n’est pas seulement une ferme : c’est une vision, un projet et une promesse. Une promesse de qualité, d’innovation et d’excellence pour l’avenir de l’agriculture africaine.

Nossa operação abrange três fazendas estrategicamente dedicadas à produção de grãos, como soja e milho, e à pecuária de corte, setores nos quais garantimos excelência em cada etapa do processo.

Nossa essência está no compromisso com a qualidade e na busca constante por evolução. Investimos no desenvolvimento de nossa equipe, promovendo a qualificação dos nossos colaboradores e incentivando o bem-estar no ambiente de trabalho. Além disso, temos como propósito contribuir ativamente para o fortalecimento da comunidade local, por meio de iniciativas que impulsionem o progresso social e econômico. 
No Grupo Vgrando, acreditamos que o futuro se constrói todos os dias, com responsabilidade, inovação e dedicação. Seguimos comprometidos com a melhoria contínua, sustentados por valores sólidos e um olhar atento ao impacto positivo no campo e na sociedade.

Name: Agrex Group
Description:
At Grupo Agrex, sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. We specialize in producing natural rubber and cultivating tropical fruits, aiming to create innovative solutions that benefit our clients and the environment.

Our Mission

Our mission is to lead the natural rubber and tropical fruit industries towards a sustainable future. We are dedicated to sustainable practices, producing high-quality natural rubber and tropical fruits while minimizing our environmental impact and fostering positive relationships with our employees, customers, and communities.

Our Vision

We envision a world where industrial and agricultural progress go hand in hand with environmental stewardship. By embracing new technologies and improving our processes, we aim to set new sustainability standards in the natural rubber and tropical fruit industries.

Core Values

•Sustainability: We prioritize sustainable practices in all our operations.
•Innovation: We drive progress through innovative products and methods.
•Quality: We ensure our natural rubber and tropical fruits meet high standards.
•Community: We positively impact the communities we serve.

Our Commitment

Grupo Agrex is committed to sustainable production of natural rubber and tropical fruits. We focus on reducing waste, conserving resources, and implementing sustainable practices, ensuring our products are high quality.

Join Us

Join us in building a sustainable future. Whether you are a customer, partner, or community member, together we can make a significant impact. At Grupo Agrex, we are not just producing natural rubber and growing tropical fruits; we are creating a legacy of sustainability and responsibility.

A Agropecuária Água Preta é uma empresa do setor do agronegócio, localizada no município de Cocalinho-MT. 

Fundada em 1993, a empresa tem como foco a pecuária de corte nos ciclos de recria e engorda, com o objetivo de oferecer produtos de qualidade para seus clientes e contribuir para o desenvolvimento sustentável da região.

Com uma história de mais de 30 anos, a Agropecuária Água Preta é uma empresa que se destaca pela qualidade de seus produtos, compromisso com o meio ambiente e responsabilidade social, contribuindo para o desenvolvimento da comunidade local por meio de projetos educacionais e sociais.

Name: acyss
Description:
La sociedad actual está demandando soluciones que permitan asegurar la viabilidad de las generaciones futuras. Términos como energías renovables, huella de carbono, cambio climático y conservación de la biodiversidad son ejes estratégicos de las políticas actuales. Para conseguir materializar los fines perseguidos por estas políticas es esencial una gestión integral, eficiente y responsable de los recursos, así como la aplicación de las mejores prácticas y sistemas.

acyss engloba una gran amplitud de servicios relacionados con temáticas sostenibles, ya sea dentro del campo de la ingeniería, actuaciones, diseño o investigación. Su equipo humano tiene la cualificación y experiencia necesaria para aportar soluciones de valor en cualquiera de estos campos.

Name: Expo Pioneros
Description: Expo Pioneros es un espacio propicio para que el concepto del agronegocio sólido, pleno y genuino se materialice de la mano del aprendizaje, la transmisión de conocimientos, la transferencia de tecnología y la demostración de innovaciones

Name: PureState
Description:
PureState is committed to fostering sustainability through urban forestry and regenerative agriculture. We develop Miyawaki forests, agrotourism experiences, and organic farming projects that enrich biodiversity. Our services include plantation drives, soil health improvement, and eco-product development. We engage communities through training and sustainability workshops. PureState helps create healthier, greener spaces for a better tomorrow. And Also
PureState Agritourism connects nature, culture, and rural life through sustainable farm experiences and eco-friendly tourism. 
We promote education, wellness, and community empowerment while fostering harmony between people and the planet.

Name: Rymer Trees and Hedging
Description:
Rymer Trees is a new and innovative Plant Healthy Certified tree nursery located in Suffolk. Our mission is to create the best cell grown stock available in East Anglia whilst growing in the most sustainable way.
We are the first tree nursery in the UK to commit entirely to peat free, cell grown trees with a focus on UK native species. We are working to produce upwards of 1 million trees per year, growing both speculatively and to contract. 
We are a passionate team, and our directors bring a wealth of experience from backgrounds in Farming, Garden Design, Arboricultural Consultancy and Horticulture.

Name: Federatie van Agro-ecologische Boeren
Description: De Federatie van Agro-ecologische Boeren is een samenwerking van Biovegan, BD-vereniging, Biotuinders, CSA netwerk en Toekomstboeren. We staan voor boeren die telen op een manier waarbij ecologische en maatschappelijke waarden even belangrijk zijn als economische waarden.

Name: REFORESTA SAS
Description: Somos una empresa Agroexportadora orgullosamente Colombiana. Tenemos mas de 15 años de experiencia en el gestión, operación y gerencia de proyectos Agrícolas (Aguacate & Gulupa) y Forestales (Teca, Melina y Pino). Estamos comprometidos con buenas prácticas agrícolas, sociales, ambientales y financieras, que maximicen nuestro impacto en nuestro entorno.

Name: Agrocam
Description: Agrocam produit des œufs à couver, des alvéoles et des poussins d’un jour répondant aux qualités requises les plus strictes et respectant scrupuleusement les standards internationaux.

Name: Empedril S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa líder agrícola-ganadera; producción ganadera que comienza en nuestras pasturas naturales e implantadas, utilizando calendarios sanitarios, selección, y bienestar animal para lograr la mejor carne que se exporta a través de los frigoríficos.
La producción agrícola apunta al mejor rendimiento mediante la aplicación de innovaciones tecnológicas que se reproduce en los mejores granos.

Name: Hishtil South Africa
Description: Hishtil South Africa was established in Mooketsi, Limpopo nearly 15 years ago.  We are a leading vegetable seedling nursery in the country and use cutting edge technology and international expertise to assist our farmers in being the best and most efficient they can be.  We have a branch in Riebeek Wes in the Western Cape and delivery our high quality grafted and un-grafted vegetable seedlings throughout South Africa

Name: Landesbetrieb HessenForst
Description: HessenForst ist einer der großen Forstbetriebe Mitteleuropas. 2001 als Landesbetrieb der hessischen Forstverwaltung gegründet betreut er sowohl die 342.000 ha Staatswald als auch einen Großteil des hessischen Körperschafts- und Privatwaldes. Im Hessischen Waldgesetz sowie in der Satzung für den Landesbetrieb sind die Aufgaben von HessenForst definiert: (1) nachhaltige Pflege und Bewirtschaftung des hessischen Staatswaldes unter erwerbswirtschaftlicher und gemeinwohlorientierter Zielsetzung; (2) Erbringen von Dienstleistungen für den Körperschafts- und Privatwald sowie für weitere Kunden, Bürgerinnen und Bürger und (3) Erfüllung hoheitlicher und sonstiger übertragener staatlicher Aufgaben.

Name: Acenta S.A. Molino San Luis
Description: Con 138 años en el mercado, somos aliados estratégicos para el desarrollo de proyectos productivos que busquen la mejora del rendimiento del campo, con servicios, insumos,  asesoría técnica y plazos acordes al ciclo productivo.

Name: Agroinsumos Arroyito
Description: Agroinsumos Arroyito es una marca comercial de la provincia de Córdoba que desarrolla sus actividades en el sector agrícola ganadero. Ofrece productos y servicios de excelente calidad para que el productor pueda obtener resultados óptimos y rentables.

Name: Tekcan Tohumculuk Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Buğday, Arpa, Çeltik ve Hibrit Ayçiçeği alanında tohum ıslahı ve üretimi konusunda faaliyet gösteren aile firmasıyız.
Ürettiğimiz tüm ürünlerde konusunda uzman ekibi ile %100 müşteri memnuniyetini hedefleyerek firmamız iş yapmaktadır.
Bugüne kadar tüm faaliyetlerinde kalite ve titizliği ön planda tutarak iş yapan firmamız bundan sonrada aynı ilkeler ışığında faaliyetlerini geliştirerek sürdürmeye devam edecektir.

A family company makes Wheat, Barley, Rice and Hybrid Sunflower seed beeding and production business. 
We make our business with our professional team with targeting %100 customer satisfaction.
We increase our business every year as tonage and product portfolio for field crops with experience and attention.

Name: Forêts Partagées
Description:
L'objectif de Forêts Partagées est double : protéger les forêts françaises et favoriser un rapport symbiotique à ces écosystèmes (gagnant-gagnant). 

Pour cela, nous accompagnons toutes les structures qui font de l'acquisition collective de parcelles forestières, en les aidant à mettre en place une gouvernance démocratique efficace, et à pratiquer une sylviculture douce et écologique.

En favorisant la croissance de ces modèles vertueux, nous promouvons une sylviculture au service du territoire, de ses habitant(e)s ainsi que de la biodiversité. Nous oeuvrons sur les dimensions économiques, sociales et environnementales afin que nos bénéficiaires développent une approche systémique et pérenne. 

Les structures que nous aidons prennent la forme de Groupements Forestiers, d'associations, de syndicats de propriétaires, voire mêmes de collectivités locales engagées - mais ils partagent tous la vision d'une gestion forestière durable et juste.

Notre soutien prend la forme de ressources, de formations, d'ateliers de partage, de rencontres, d'outils et de conseil. Nous nous voyons comme les animateurs de cette communauté naissante de structures de "forêts partagées", ainsi que des catalyseurs d'essaimage et de développement.

Name: Terracrua Design
Description: Terracrua Design is a consultancy and planning company that acts professionally in providing specialized services in advising, planning, implementing and managing regenerative agriculture farms & estates.

Name: Qualitasberry
Description: Firmamız 2022 yılında Tarım ve inşaat sektörlerinde yer alan  4 firmanın instriraki ile kurulmuş ve gün geçtikçe üretim ve paketleme konusunda hız kazanmıştır.Güncel olarak 350 da alanda yaban mersini üretimi ve 350 da alanda muz üretimi yapılmaktadır.Bünyemizde yaban mersini paketleme ve soguk hava depolama alanı mevcuttur.

Name: CampoValor
Description: A CampoValor é uma plataforma online que surgiu com o objetivo de preparar os compradores do setor agropecuário a realizar boas negociações com informações mais completas e confiáveis. Baixe nosso aplicativo ou use a plataforma online e venha entrar nessa comunidade que cresce no país inteiro.

Name: Fundacion Nikkei Cetapar
Description:
Cetapar es un centro de transferencia de conocimientos, tecnología e innovación, cuenta con servicios de Investigación y desarrollo de nuevas tecnologías a campo, estudios de diversos tipos de tratamientos, análisis y evaluación de resultados, capacitaciones a productores, profesionales y estudiantes con temas de interés general para el sector agropecuario. 
Además, cuenta con un laboratorio de análisis químicos que trabaja bajo el sistema de gestión de calidad ISO 17025 y para el aseguramiento de calidad de los resultados, participa activamente de ensayos de aptitud a nivel internacional. Actualmente cuenta con ocho áreas que engloban todos los servicios ofrecidos como suelos, fertilizantes, semillas, agroquímicos, agua, bromatología, microbiología y fitopatología.
Por otro lado, el departamento de proyectos se encarga de elaborar, planificar, monitorear y evaluar proyectos, así como también fortalecer las relaciones interinstitucionales y los convenios de vinculación con el entorno tecnológico nacional e internacional. 
La Formación Profesional Agraria es una iniciativa de CETAPAR en conjunto con la Cámara de Comercio e Industria Paraguayo – Alemana y la Asociación de Productores de Soja, Cereales y Oleaginosas del Paraguay (APS), es una método de formación profesional basada en la combinación de prácticas, entre una empresa formadora y un centro de formación profesional con infraestructura y maquinarias, donde el aprendiz recibe el título de Técnico Superior Agrario. 
La fundación presenta anualmente Expo HORTIPAR, la mayor expo feria de tecnología e innovación hortícola del Paraguay, con 2,5 hectáreas de exposición que alberga numerosas empresas nacionales e internacionales del sector hortícola, con la que se promueve la difusión de conocimientos y nuevas prácticas que contribuirán al desarrollo del rubro y del país mediante la mejora continua de la producción, comercialización y consumo.

Name: Fazenda Bodoquena
Description: Há mais de cem anos desenvolvendo tecnologias para pecuária eficiente e em harmonia com o ambiente. Nosso propósito é através da inovação deixar um legado de produção sustentável para futuras gerações.

Name: Bomenland
Description:
Bomenland werkt aan een veerkrachtig en toekomstbestendig landschap door agroforestry grootschalig te integreren in de landbouw. Onze missie is helder: landschapsherstel mogelijk maken met bomen, als integraal onderdeel van vitale boerenbedrijven. 

We doen dit via een strategische clusteraanpak: boeren en landeigenaren in een regio bundelen de krachten en werken samen aan aanplant, onderhoud, verwerking en afzet. Door deze samenwerking ontstaan robuuste agroforestry-systemen die economisch rendabel én ecologisch waardevol zijn. 

Bomenland is hierbij partner in de uitvoering, samen met de boer. We coördineren, verbinden en werken actief mee van A(anplant) tot(af)Z(et). Niet vanaf de zijlijn, maar als onderdeel van het team dat agroforestry echt in de praktijk brengt. 

Zo bouwen we stap voor stap aan een landelijk netwerk van boerenclusters die agroforestry niet alleen toepassen, maar samen de basis leggen voor grootschalig landschapsherstel.

Name: Outland Farm Organics
Description:
Outland Farm Organics is a sustainable, bio-diverse organic ecosystem located in the scenic outskirts of Kerala, India. Our work is inspired by ancient wisdom and aims to promote sustainability.

As the leader in the field, we have been responsible for the design and implementation of the Energy & Sustainable Farming component. We provide technical advisory on irrigation, organic farming, and financing models to benefit our stakeholders and build a strong farming community that uplifts rural and tribal classes.

Our team collaborates with relevant government agencies such as the Indian Institute of Spices Research and INDOCERT to ensure alignment with their priorities and to comply with International Certified Organic Bodies regulations to maintain our certifications.

We have also designed and implemented export strategies and activities, ensuring adherence to all project requirements and preparing all export documents within the required timeframe. Our team is committed to efficient shipping activities that meet the needs of our customers.

Join us on our mission to promote sustainability and uplift rural and tribal communities through organic farming.

Name: Siran
Description: Desde 1942, o SIRAN representa o pioneirismo dos produtores rurais da região de Araçatuba (SP), responsáveis pelo desenvolvimento regional, do estado e do Brasil. Somos referência na prestação de serviços para o produtor rural e em 2022 nos consolidamos como a Central do Agronegócio da Alta Noroeste Paulista, sendo referência em informações, com a chancela de uma marca que há 80 anos defende e fomenta o agronegócio nacional. Além de serviços diversos para o produtor rural, atuamos com a geração de conteúdo informativo e segmentado no setor de agronegócio, para munir o produtor rural de informações de alto nível e auxiliá-los no dia dia dos negócios. Somos hoje mais de 450 associados.

De Vereniging Agrarisch Natuur- en Landschapsbeheer Water, Land & Dijken is een collectief van ruim 500 boeren, 500 vrijwilligers en een groep betrokken burgers. 
Wij zetten ons in voor natuur en biodiversiteit, aantrekkelijk landschap, schoon water, een gezonde bodem en klimaat. Zo realiseren we waardevolle plattelandsnatuur in samenhang met agrarisch ondernemerschap.

Description: Die Forstliche Ausbildungsstätte Ossiach ist ein Bildungszentrum, wo theoretisches und praktisches Wissen über den Wald und zur forstlichen Bewirtschaftung im Rahmen von Kursen, Veranstaltungen, Ausbildungen und Tagesseminaren vermittelt wird.

Name: Forêt Modèle de Provence
Description:
L'association a été créée à l’initiative de la Région SUD en 2013. Elle a pour objet de mettre en œuvre un processus partenarial visant à promouvoir le développement durable des territoires forestiers provençaux, elle fait partie du réseau Méditerranéen et International des Forêts Modèles (créé au Canada en 1992). 

Son plan d'action se divise en 3 grands axes : 
- Recherche et Développement, relance de filières historiques ou lancement de nouvelles filières (arbousier, etc) 
- communication, organisation d'événements, éducation à l'environnement, Concours d'Art et de Design 
- coopération internationale au travers de nombreux projets. 

Tous les détails et actualités sur notre site internet et sur le Portail du chêne-liège.

Name: Groba Feeding Systems
Description: Groba feeding systems BV supplies high quality feeding systems for finishers, sows and piglets. Systems that supply feed and water hygienically and effectively. This enables pigs to growth in a responsible and sustainable way. The design of the feeders minimises spillage and keeps the animals healthy. And helps pig farmers reduce their expenditure. Together, we aim for optimal feed conversion rates.

Name: VK-Oost
Description: De vereniging Vruchtbare Kringloop Oost (VK-Oost) is een lerend netwerk van en voor melkveehouders, akkerbouwers, loonwerkers en andere grondgebruikers in Oost-Nederland. VK-Oost zet zich samen met leden, partners, experts en overheden in voor een beter perspectief en bestaansrecht voor de grondgebonden landbouw op alle grondsoorten in Oost-Nederland. Zij doet dit door proactief in te spelen op de wensen en eisen van de samenleving en de markt. In groepsverband en in projecten wordt nieuwe kennis ontwikkeld en leren boeren van elkaar. Opgedane kennis is direct toepasbaar op het eigen bedrijf. Bij VK-Oost is de verzamelde kringloopdata bij leden een belangrijke pijler.

Name: MOSCHINI FARMS
Description:
Moschini Farms - Aziende Agricole Moschini, dislocate tra il territorio Piacentino e Parmense, dal 1971 di generazione in generazione.

Utilizziamo tecnologie digitali in modo sinergico e interconnesso, che consentono di ottimizzare i processi produttivi agricoli (agricoltura 4.0) migliorandone la qualità e rendendoli più sostenibili dal punto di vista ambientale ed economico.


Con sistemi d’irrigazione pivot altamente automatizzati, macchinari agricoli di ultima generazione, software gestionali, impianti fotovoltaici da 200 KW e biometano in fase di progettazione, le attività principali sono coltivazioni agricole associate ad allevamenti di bovine da latte.

Di recente abbiamo integrato, come attività connesse, le piante da frutto e i liquori artigianali.

Alla base di ogni nostro liquore artigianale c’è un frutto, una radice, una foglia. I periodi di infusione rispettano la loro stagionalità, così da percepirne la freschezza, i profumi e i colori autentici, senza alcun additivo né colorante.

Raccogliamo a mano le bacche di prugnolo, i malli di noce e le foglie di Erba Luigia, coltivate naturalmente. Preferiamo acquistare direttamente dal loro luogo di origine, invece, la "Liquirizia di Calabria DOP“ da agricoltura biologica e il "Limone di Rocca Imperiale IGP“, in quanto sviluppo e qualità sono inestricabilmente connessi alla loro terra. 

La produzione è limitata e ogni bottiglia è numerata, perciò esclusiva.

Name: WOFO - Women in Forestry International
Description:

Name: Rencon Air & Land
Description:
Rencon Air & Land is a leading Australian provider of integrated aerial and ground-based services, delivering innovative and efficient solutions across the forestry, agriculture, and environmental management sectors.
With a strong reputation for reliability, precision, and safety, we specialise in operations such as aerial spraying, forest inventory, firefighting, environmental surveys, and land management. Our experienced team combines cutting-edge drone technology, piloted aircraft, and ground crews to offer scalable, data-driven services tailored to the unique needs of government agencies, forestry corporations, private landowners, and agricultural enterprises.
At the core of Rencon Air & Land is a commitment to sustainability, operational excellence, and delivering results that exceed expectations - no matter how complex or remote the task. We take pride in supporting Australia’s vital natural resource industries through innovation, responsiveness, and a deep understanding of the landscapes we work in.

Name: Stichting Bevordering Studie Diervoeding (BSD)
Description: Stichting BSD motiveert studenten voor studiemodules diervoeding via het aanbieden van beurzen, stages en gastcolleges. De stichting is een initiatief van de diervoedersector in Nederland.

Name: Geurts Champignons
Description:
Wij zijn een echt familiebedrijf
Waar we niet alleen telen, maar het hele proces beheren.

Bij veel kwekerijen wordt alleen geteeld, vervolgens worden de producten opgehaald door een transporteur en naar een andere locatie gebracht voor het verwerken en verpakken. Pas daarna gaan de producten naar de klant. Bij ons zit de schakel tussen het telen en het afleveren aan de klant onder één dak, het verwerken en verpakken gebeurt namelijk hier op de kwekerij zelf.

Name: RISE (Response-Inducing Sustainability Evaluation)
Description:
RISE is an indicator-based method for assessing the sustainability performance of agricultural production at farm level. The purpose of RISE is to globally contribute to enhancing the sustainability of agricultural production, by supporting knowledge-based processes that are founded on voluntary participation, confidentiality and capacity building. RISE users work in agricultural consultancy, education, in development projects and in raw material sourcing. The steps of a RISE analysis are goal and scope definition, farmer selection and contacting, data collection and interpretation, farmer feedback discussion and reporting. HAFL and its partner institutions offer training courses, RISE analyses of single farms and farm groups, as well as RISE user licenses and technical support. The RISE method and software are intellectual property of the Bern University of Applied Sciences/School of Agricultural, Forest and Food Sciences(HAFL).


Informationen auf Deutsch 

RISE ist eine indikatorbasierte Methode zur ganzheitlichen Analyse der Nachhaltigkeit der landwirtschaftlichen Produktion auf Betriebsebene. Der Zweck von RISE ist, weltweit zur Erhöhung der Nachhaltigkeit der landwirtschaftlichen Erzeugung beizutragen. RISE ist als Baustein wissensintensiver Prozesse konzipiert, die auf Freiwilligkeit, Vertrauen und Kapazitätsaufbau setzen. Anwender der Methode sind Mitarbeiter und Mitarbeiterinnen in der landwirtschaftlichen Beratung, Ausbildung, Entwicklungszusammenarbeit und in der Rohstoffbeschaffung. Schritte des RISE-Prozesses sind Vorbereitung, Datenerhebung, Auswertung, Rückmeldung, Diskussion und Berichterstattung. Die HAFL und ihre Partner bieten Trainingskurse, RISE-Analysen von Einzelbetrieben und Betriebsgruppen sowie RISE-Lizenzen an. RISE-Methode und -Software sind geistiges Eigentum der Berner Fachhochschule/ Hochschule für Agrar-,Forst- und Lebensmittelwissenschaften(HAFL).

Name: Black Professionals in Food and Agriculture
Description: Black Professionals in Food and Agriculture was founded in October 2020 for the purpose of promoting the advancement and development of black professionals in the food and agriculture industry. All too often the voices and input of Black policy makers, congressional staffers, and industry representatives are excluded in the development of policies and programs that serve America’s farmers, ranchers, and producers. BPFA is committed to ensuring that those voices have a presence in the room and a seat at the table.

Name: Agrofertas.co  El Marketplace del Agro y las Mascotas
Description:
Más de 200 empresas se apoyan en Agrofertas.co para fortalecer su estrategia en Internet. 

SI su estrategia es apoyar sus canales tradicionales de venta, desde Agrofertas.co pueden recibir solicitudes de cotización directamente y asignarlas a su fuerza de ventas o distribuidores según su estrategia. No somos intermediarios y no interferimos en su proceso de negociación y venta.  

Si su estrategia es fortalecer su gestión de comercio electrónico, pueden recibir solicitudes de cotización y pedidos desde Agrofertas.co y gestionarlos directamente, sin nuestra intervención. 

Si su empresa ofrece servicios, sabemos que las cotizaciones de servicios no son estándar, por ello estamos en capacidad de colocar para cada uno de sus servicios un formulario que les permita prefiltrar las solicitudes de cotización.

En Agrofertas.co queremos ser los aliados de su oferta y su marca en Internet.

Conózcanos y ensáyenos sin ningún compromiso.

Name: Kishan Utthan Swayatt Sahkarita (KUSS)
Description:
Kishan Utthan Swayatt Sahkarita (KUSS) 
An FPO, or Farmer Producer Organization, is a collective effort by farmers to enhance their agricultural practices, productivity, and overall socio-economic well-being. In this case, let's explore an FPO focused on maximizing bay leaf production and cultivating various other fruits and vegetables with the collaboration of 3000 farmers.

The primary objective of this FPO is to empower local farmers, optimize agricultural output, and ensure their economic stability. It operates as a cooperative where individual farmers come together to form a cohesive unit, allowing them to benefit from shared resources, knowledge, and market access.

Bay leaf production is a significant focus of this FPO due to its demand in the culinary industry. By specializing in bay leaf cultivation, the FPO can concentrate resources and expertise on improving the yield and quality of this herb. The organization invests in modern farming techniques, irrigation systems, and pest control measures to maximize bay leaf production.

Collaboration is key to the FPO's success. The 3000 farmers involved in this initiative pool their resources and share the costs of inputs such as seeds, fertilizers, and machinery. This collective approach enables them to negotiate better prices for their produce and reduce individual financial burdens. Moreover, the FPO organizes training programs and workshops to enhance farmers' skills and knowledge, enabling them to make informed decisions about crop management and marketing.

In summary, this Farmer Producer Organization with 3000 dedicated members is an exemplary model of collective farming aimed at maximizing bay leaf production and cultivating various other fruits and vegetables. Through shared resources, knowledge exchange, market access, and sustainable practices, it empowers local farmers, enhances their economic stability, and contributes to the agricultural sector's growth and sustainability.

Tarım-gıda ekosisteminde sürdürülebilirlik için birlikte çalışmaktan mutluluk duyarız.

Kooperatifimiz, yeni teknolojiler ve iş modelleri geliştirerek tarımsal verimliliği artırmayı ve çevresel sürdürülebilirliği teşvik etmeyi amaçlamaktadır.

Toplumumuzun gıda güvencesini sağlamak için çiftçilerimize destek olmayı hedefliyoruz.

Çiftçilerimizin rekabet gücünü artırmak ve çevresel etkileri azaltmak için araştırma ve iş birliği projelerine odaklanmaktayız.

Eğer siz de sürdürülebilir tarım hedeflerimize katılmak ve kooperatifimizin sunduğu desteklerden yararlanmak isterseniz, bize ulaşarak daha fazla bilgi alabilirsiniz.

Name: Lake Hāwea Station
Description:
Lake Hāwea Station is Australasias first certified Carbon positive farm (sequestering 2.5 x more carbon than they emit Toitu 2021) They have limited eco Luxury accomodation in residences which were award Condé Nast Gold award for sustainable Luxury in 2023. The property practices regenerative agriculture and has disrupted traditional animal animal welfare approaches in favour of a animal centric practices. The Station has a communal space for education and sharing learnings (successes and failures) as they attempt to prove that climate positive farming can be sustainable and profitable thus incentivising others to farm for the planet. 

In 2023 The book Meet You at The Main Divide was released by Harper Collins it shares the story of the founders transition from an urban lifestyle back to their rural roots. 


Lake Hawea Station is home to over 300 species including 10 endemic and 8 native birds. We are trying everything we can to ensure farming is part of the climate and biodiversity crisis solution rather than an ongoing contributor to the extinction of species and the planet's demise. We are also interested in solutions to food security.

Lake Hawea Station is 6.500 hectares and is New Zealand’s premier regenerative High Country sheep and beef Station. Situated in the spectacular Queenstown Lakes District. The property enjoys uninterrupted views of the picturesque Lake Hawea to the West and North and alpine, tussock and beech forest ranges to the East.



Links to our Climate Action partners 
- www.CanaryCarbon.co.nz
- https://www.CarbonCrop.nz 
- https://www.CarbonZ.io

The ultimate goal of the station is to move from carbon neutral to carbon positive times ten.

Everyone working at @lakehaweastationlivingconsiders doing so a privilege not because their office is the stunning South Island high country but because they are liberating and legacy-making every day. 

Thanks for your interest in our work with the Station,

Team LHS

Name: ID Water
Description:
ID Water is an agricultural climate technology company focused on the integration of smart aquaculture and smart forestry. We are dedicated to leveraging the concept of NbS (Nature-based Solutions) and have innovated a solution called "MAPS."

Our unique indoor aquaculture model significantly increases production efficiency per unit area while reducing labor costs. Through our in-house developed artificial intelligence, water quality sensors, robot technology, and the inclusion of insurance mechanisms (GAIC - UK Aquaculture Disease Insurance) and solar integration not available to traditional aquaculturists, we have made twenty years of stable aquaculture production possible. We are paving the way for sustainable aquaculture's future.
The wastewater generated by our intelligent shrimp farming facilities is reused for mangrove fertilization, increasing carbon sequestration capacity by over 50% annually. This eliminates extensive mangrove deforestation associated with traditional aquaculture, reduces carbon emissions, and provides consumers with clean, safe, and high-quality aquatic products.
Additionally, we create blue carbon credits to assist large tech companies in achieving their SDGs or environmental, social, and governance goals.

Since it was established in 2017, ID Water has grown into a medium-scale corporation with 60+ employees and a capital size of 220 million NT dollars.

In October 2019, ID water received the top 3 award in the Mass Challenge, which is the largest non-profit business accelerator in the United States.

In December 2021, we became one of the members of Unreasonable Group, which is invested by Barclays, the second largest bank in the UK.

Awards -

- Achieving the top position at HaoShi Bootcamp
- Achieving the top position at SLUSH G-Camp
- Top 3 teams in Mass Challenge
- Member of TACC+ Start-up Accelerator
- Member of the second-largest bank in the UK ‒ 
Barclays Bank’s Unreasonable Impact Accelerator

Name: Land van Kien
Description:
LAND VAN KIEN
Da’s kien leven, werken en genieten.

Onze Jacob Kien had twee eeuwen geleden een droom. Hij droomde om van zijn landgoed Arbeidslust bij Sint-Oedenrode een plek van vrijheid te maken. Een plek waar de mensen na de gedane arbeid samen konden komen. Om te genieten van het mooie, groene Brabantse land en zijn eerlijke streekproducten.  
 
Nu komt de droom opnieuw tot leven. Hier, op dit prachtig gelegen landgoed in de Brainport regio en onderdeel van Van Gogh National Park, verrijst het Land van Kien. Een fijne leef- en beleefomgeving. Waar wij samen leven, werken, genieten, ontspannen en verblijven. Land van Kien dat bruist van initiatieven. Vol inspiratie om zo gezond, zelfvoorzienend en duurzaam mogelijk te leven. In harmonie met elkaar en het land om ons heen. Hier denken, bouwen en ontwikkelen we samen vanuit de historie, de kringloopgedachte en slimme innovaties aan het landschap van de toekomst. In connectie met de natuur en aarde. Een nieuwe Bluezone, waar we in gezondheid meetbaar langer leven. Zo maken we van deze lieflijke plek van akkers, bossen en water het meest innovatieve landschappelijke leefgebied van morgen. 
 
Land van Kien wordt een inspirerende omgeving vol leven, waar iedereen van verschillende generaties een plek vindt. En dat kan ook als je een tijdje een veilige haven nodig hebt om te leren of opnieuw uit te vinden wie je bent en wat je kunt of als dagbesteding. Onze Helden zetten zich met hart en ziel in om je daarin te begeleiden en te helpen. In Land van Kien hebben we aandacht voor ons eigen en elkaars levensgeluk en gezondheid. We dragen zorg voor onze dieren, het land dat we bewerken en de producten die we verbouwen. Met oog voor de natuurrijke omgeving waarin we leven en het versterken de biodiversiteit. We kiezen doelbewust voor een circulaire levenswijze en dragen zo bij aan een verantwoorde toekomst, voor onszelf, onze kinderen en iedereen. Hier zetten we dromen om in daden en willen anderen inspireren ons voorbeeld

Name: Vital Green (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
VGreen is building the missing link between the farm and the market. We’re not disrupting agriculture—we’re repairing it, by putting trust, data, and value back into the hands of those who grow, harvest and process our food.

From price shocks to poorly timed sowing, from guesswork in pricing to planting without real market insight—farmers lose. And it’s not just the crop they lose—it’s time, energy, emotion, and the natural capital of the land. These silent losses compound across seasons, with no safety net.

At VGreen, we’ve specialized in tackling this challenge head-on. Over the years, we’ve scaled across high-impact horticulture crops—chilli, tomato, turmeric, garlic, onion, fenugreek, and many others—where food loss is high, prices fluctuate wildly, and quality standards are non-negotiable.

Our strength lies in building “trust infrastructure”—a system that connects farmers, markets, and processors through reliability, data, and service. 

By aligning productivity, climate resilience, and value chain efficiency, VGreen is rewriting how food moves from farm to market—faster, cleaner, and smarter.

Name: Sveriges Jordägareförbund
Description:

Förbundets medlemmar skapar nytta för människor och miljö genom ett långsiktigt förvaltande av förnyelsebara naturresurser. Vi erbjuder ett helhetsperspektiv på modernt landsbygdsföretagande. Våra medlemmar bedriver lant-, skogs- och vattenbruk i större skala från norr till söder på 1,5 miljoner hektar. 

Genom stärkt landsbygdsföretagande och äganderätt vill vi utveckla näringslivet på den svenska landsbygden.

Name: GroPPure Organic Farm - From Soil to Soul!
Description:
Welcome to GroPPure Organic…
Our Mission:
“GroPure Organic is committed to provide Contamination Free food to society at Affordable Prices and Providing Sustainable Livelihood to Marginal Farmers by using Innovative Practices”

We are dedicated to delivering the essence of nature’s goodness straight to your table. We are committed to provide 100% organic food products to the society. Keeping our philosophy “Soil to Soul” intact, we methodically cultivate crops on our farms, ensuring they are nurtured with care and processed safely before reaching your doorsteps, all at affordable prices so that you can enjoy organic goodness and its benefits.
 
GroPure Organic started with a mission to empower farmers and a vision to provide organic food to society. At GroPure Organic, we’re committed to an Integrated Organic Food Product Mechanism. We cultivate crops using natural methods and eco-friendly harvesting to ensure your health and the environment’s safety. Our mission is to revolutionize organic food production with our experienced team’s dedication to sustainable agriculture. Our endeavour is to bring the prices of organic food as close as possible, to the conventional food and we’ll be able to achieve this as we scale up.
We are the only Company in India which provides direct farm to fork. Grown by us and sold by us.

We initially began by selling to wholesalers but then saw the presence of middlemen in the retail market and its effect on the quality of product. Therefore, we launched our retail brand ‘GroPure Organic’ and started selling directly to customers.

Name: Yvoty Group
Description:
Yvoty, fundada en 2016 como una iniciativa centrada en la ganadería, ha evolucionado rápidamente hacia un actor clave en el sector agrícola y ganadero. Su incursión en la agricultura en 2019 marcó un hito significativo, al iniciar una campaña arrocera en un extenso lote en Yahape, Corrientes. Los resultados excepcionales de ese año impulsaron un crecimiento acelerado, con incrementos anuales de más del 100% en áreas de siembra.

Actualmente, Yvoty se prepara para la campaña 24-25 con planes ambiciosos de sembrar 5.300 hectáreas de arroz de diversas variedades, apuntando tanto al mercado nacional como internacional. Su visión a futuro incluye la sistematización de más de 20.000 hectáreas, con un enfoque en prácticas agrícolas sostenibles y eficiencia operativa.

En el ámbito ganadero, Yvoty se distingue por la cría de terneros de razas Bradford y Brangus colorado, y está en proceso de expandir sus operaciones con mejoras en la pastura y la implementación de un sistema de engorde a corral.

En cuanto a infraestructura, la planta de secado y acopio de Yvoty es impresionante: cuenta con la capacidad de secar 680 toneladas diarias y almacenar hasta 6.000 toneladas en silos de chapa. Equipada con tecnología avanzada de secadoras a gas de la industria JMG, Yvoty cumple con las más estrictas normativas de calidad, permitiéndoles exportar granos secos a mercados exigentes como Europa, Estados Unidos y Londres.

Con un compromiso firme hacia la excelencia y el crecimiento sostenible, Yvoty se posiciona como un líder innovador en la producción agropecuaria, contribuyendo al desarrollo económico regional y proyectando un futuro prometedor en el panorama agrícola internacional.

Name: GreenTech  Soluciones Eficientes
Description:
Con sede en Pamplona pero con presencia también en País Vasco y La Rioja, en Greentech ofrecemos soluciones eficientes para empresas.
Utilizamos sistemas disrruptivos, altamente tecnológicos y basados en la Sostenibilidad: consiguiendo empresas más competitivas y sostenibles. Formamos parte de la economía circular, aplicada a algo tan esencial como el agua.

Con presencia en Navarra, País Vasco y La Rioja, comunidades en las que ofrecemos auditorías energéticas y proyectos completos con los que sacar el mayor rendimiento posible a tu negocio o empresa.

En Greentech trabajamos con un equipo altamente cualificado en ingeniería industrial y diferentes opciones de financiación con las que adaptarnos a todo tipo de empresas.

¿Algunos ejemplos de lo que conseguimos con nuestro trabajo? Un notable descenso de la factura eléctrica, hasta un 95% de ahorro en el uso del agua o la independencia total de suministros eléctricos… nuestros clientes ya no dependen de cortes de luz o problemas externos.

El mundo está cambiando hacia un entorno más sostenible, más comprometido con el medio ambiente y esto, empieza en nuestro día a día, en nuestros hogares y empresas, en cada uno de nosotros. Hacer un uso eficaz y responsable de los recursos ya es una realidad, y está al alcance de todos.

Name: Somerse Velden
Description:
Op de velden van onze voormalige melkveehouderij, totaal 18 hectare in eigendom, bouwen wij als gezin aan een toekomstbestendig landbouwbedrijf. We transformeren ‘gangbare’ landbouwgrond stapsgewijs naar een ecologisch én economisch rendabel systeem waarin landbouw, voedselproductie en natuurontwikkeling elkaar versterken. Dit doen we in meerjarige teeltsystemen, volgens de principes van de natuur. Voedsel produceren op een manier die het ecosysteem van een natuurlijk bos nabootst, met aandacht voor biodiversiteit en een gezonde bodem. Door te werken met diverse gewassen en structuren vergroten we weerbaarheid en verminderen we de afhankelijkheid van externe inputs.

Met nuchtere blik én geloof dat het anders kan, hebben we besloten niet alleen te praten, maar vooral te doen. Onze diverse expertises en krachten hebben we gebundeld om regeneratieve voedselproductie mogelijk te maken in de praktijk: schaalbaar, rendabel en gericht op de lange termijn.

www.somersevelden.nl
