Name: Kerbest
Description:
Grupo Kerbest empresa familiar de origen abulense dedicada a la producción en el sector agropecuario porcino desde 1996. 
La empresa no ha dejado de evolucionar y afrontar nuevos retos buscando en todo momento situarse en la vanguardia de su sector, adaptada a los cambios sociales, tecnológicos, medioambientales y legislativos.
Como buque insignia del grupo, en lo que a la producción se refiere contamos con el multiplicador Genético GRANGENIA, una granja construida en el año 2016 y referente por la integración de I+D, máximos standards de bienestar animal, bioseguridad así como la reducción y
minoración de emisiones de gases de efecto invernadero.
Como propósito del grupo y dentro de los objetivos de responsabilidad social del mismo, Fundación Kerbest, una Fundación corporativa destinada a desarrollar proyectos de acción social en el territorio. 
La Formación como garante de creación de Empleo. Hemos impulsado y colaboramos activamente en el centro de Capacitación y experiencias Agrarias de Ávila
MEDIO AMBIENTE:  A través de la implantación y desarrollo de un Proyecto Clima de reducción de emisiones GEI en planta de NDN en Grangenia. 
I+D+i: Hemos sentado las bases para el desarrollo de un nuevo modelo de gestión y organización de granja  con relevancia desde el diseño y su concepción de I+D, de mitigación de la huella de carbono y parámetros de sostenibilidad social, desarrollo y gestión medioambiental.

Name: Tecnopuc Celeiro Hub
Description: O Celeiro AgFood Hub, vertical de negócios em agro e foodtech do Tecnopuc, tem como objetivo integrar empresas, pesquisadores e investidores para superar desafios dos setores. A iniciativa busca impulsionar parcerias, fomentar novos negócios e fortalecer a cultura da inovação no agronegócio e foodtech. Integrado ao ambiente dinâmico e colaborativo do Tecnopuc, o Celeiro AgFood Hub reflete o compromisso do Parque em atuar como um catalisador de impacto, por meio da inovação, da articulação de parcerias e da conexão entre diferentes setores da sociedade.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: COAMIG Agroindustrial Cooperativa
Description: A Coamig é uma cooperativa com 55 anos de muita história. Pensando sempre no produtor, fazemos não só a captação do leite como também o abastecimento de insumos para o propriedade e o acompanhamento geral dos Cooperados. Somos fortes, somos Fortim, somos Coamig!

Name: Albanwise Environment
Description: Specialists in environmental land management, creating dynamic and inspiring landscapes; from the creation of large scale wetlands to the provision of wild bird seed plots. Creating a tailored service to our clients across the UK.

Name: Nieuwe Bodem
Description: Nieuwe Bodem is een duurzaam agrobosbouwbedrijf dat werkt aan nieuwe en kortere verbindingen tussen bodem, boer en bord. Bij ons adopteer je een walnotenboom, een hazelaar of voedselbosgewas. De opbrengst van de boom is voor jou. Doordat diverse gewassen en bomen door elkaar staan, raakt de grond niet uitgeput en is er geen verlies aan biodiversiteit.

Name: Grupo Alcides Tozzo
Description: O Grupo Alcidez Tozzo foi fundado em 1948 e hoje é composto pelas empresas Tozzo Madeiras, Agroflorestal Tozzo, Fazenda Jacaré e Fazenda Bocaina. Está situado em Passos Maia/SC, Chapecó/SC, Campo Grande/MS e Cuiabá/MT, atuando nos ramos da pecuária, agricultura (soja), florestal (pinus) e madeireira (painéis e beneficiados).

Name: Fazenda São Paulo
Description:
A Fazenda São Paulo iniciou sua história no início da década de 80, constituindo um importante grupo empresarial do agronegócio, com perfil inovador e influente em todas as suas atividades. Suas unidades de produção são localizadas nas cidades de Oliveira e Riachinho, em Minas Gerais, totalizando uma área de mais de 10 mil hectares.

Suas ações são voltadas para o mercado nacional e internacional. Com um moderno sistema de gestão, diversificação e capacidade de gerar emprego e renda, a Fazenda São Paulo conta com mão de obra qualificada em todos os setores.

Ao todo, a Fazenda gera, aproximadamente, 1000 empregos diretos e permanentes. Durante a safra de café, mais 300 postos temporários são criados.

Desde o início, a Fazenda São Paulo tem uma forte convicção de sua responsabilidade social com as pessoas que nela trabalham, residem e com as comunidades vizinhas.

A Fazenda oferece cursos de capacitação e treinamentos nas diversas áreas de atuação de seus colaboradores. Também promove ações voltadas à Segurança do Trabalho e Qualidade de Vida.

Buscando maior viabilidade e opções para os colaboradores, possui parcerias com médicos, dentistas e farmácias da região. Possui creche em horário integral que assiste aos filhos das moradoras e realiza atividades de recreação e educação direcionadas às crianças, o que proporciona mais tranquilidade aos pais enquanto trabalham.

Name: 4P Agronomics LLP
Description:
4 P Agronomics is Limited Liability Partnership Firm.
It is an Agriculture Sector Start Up promoted by Mr. Sarvesh Upadhyay a Corporate Executive turned Agripreneur.
The vision of the 4PA is to promote investment and use of technology in the filed of Agriculture.
To augment this vision 4PA will be undertaking scientific cultivation of high investment cash crops including Medicinal and Aromatic Plants through its unique Farm Management Service (FMS) Model
4PA will over a course of next five years invest and build capacity in the field of Direct Farm Procurement, Storage, Processing and Marketing of said commodities. 
4PA will actively partner with farmers to enhance their earning with the unique and win win FMS Model.

Name: Agro Chain
Description: Biz əkinçilik, heyvandarlıq, balıqçılıq və meşəçilik də daxil olmaqla müxtəlif sektorlarda ixtisaslaşan kənd təsərrüfatı şirkətiyik. Bizim komandamız müştərilərimizin ehtiyaclarına uyğunlaşdırılmış innovativ və yaradıcı həllər təqdim edir.

Name: BoerenNatuur Fryslân
Description:
BoerenNatuur Fryslân zet zich in voor een biodivers agrarisch landschap, met daarbij oog voor het verdienmodel van de boer. 

De nieuwe organisatie BoerenNatuur Fryslân (BNF) is vanaf 1 januari 2024 actief. Dit is een samensmelting van stichtingen Kollektivenberied Fryslân (KBF) en Living Lab Fryslân (LLF) (incl. de Landbouw Adviespool (LAP).

BNF vormt de schil om de 7 Friese agrarische collectieven die de beheeractiviteiten binnen het Agrarisch Natuur- en Landschapsbeheer (ANLb) coördineren van ruim 2000 Friese boeren.

Name: APFC - Associação dos Produtores Florestais de Coruche
Description:
A APFC disponibiliza aos seus Associados uma grande diversidade de serviços nomeadamente:
•	Amostra da Qualidade da Cortiça
Este serviço permite um conhecimento das cortiças de cada produtor, em função da qualidade e calibre, criando uma base sólida para a comercialização das mesmas e melhorando substancialmente a capacidade de negociação do produtor.
•	Amostragem da Qualidade da Pinha
O Serviço de Avaliação do Rendimento da Pinha em miolo de pinhão, é disponibilizado de forma a apoiar a decisão de comercialização da pinha.
•	Apoio ao investimento
•	Certificação Florestal
O Grupo APFCertifica, é um sistema de certificação florestal de grupo no âmbito do Forest Stewardship Council  (FSC) desenvolvido pela APFC, que tem como objetivo a certificação da gestão florestal das explorações dos seus associados.
•	Defesa da Floresta Contra Incêndios
•	Inventário e Planeamento Florestal
Os PGF são instrumentos de ordenamento florestal das explorações. Regulam, no tempo e no espaço, as intervenções de natureza cultural e ou de exploração e visam a produção sustentada dos bens ou serviços originados em espaços florestais.
•	Materiais Florestais de Reprodução
Semente de Sobreiro Certificada e Garfos de Pinheiro Manso
•	Sistema de Informação Geográfica (SIG)
O SIG da APFC agrega toda a informação relativa aos seus associados de uma forma integrada e facilitadora da consulta e visualização da mesma. Esta ferramenta permite ainda facilitar todo o trabalho no âmbito dos inventários florestais associados à elaboração dos planos de gestão florestal e na determinação do valor provável da cortiça no mato.
•	Produção de material cartográfico de apoio à gestão florestal
Com base na informação cartográfica adquirida e disponível é possível a produção de material cartográfico de apoio à gestão, nomeadamente no âmbito de candidaturas a projetos de investimento, execução dos PGF e Certificação Florestal.
•	ZIF - Zonas de Intervenção Florestal
•	Serviço de Aconselhamento Florestal

Name: Centro Regional Ceres
Description: Buscamos la sostenibilidad de la agricultura y los territorios rurales.

Name: PT. Anugerah Hipbone Sejahtera
Description:
PT. Anugerah Hipbone Sejahtera (PT. AHS) merupakan bagian dari Surya Group Holding. Kegiatan usaha utama kami adalah budidaya pohon kelapa sawit serta didalamnya terintegrasi dengan beberapa usaha seperti peternakan sapi dan kebun buah. Grup mayoritas bergerak di bidang konstruksi dan tambang serta pabrik rokok, kosmetik dan pengolahan limbah. Operasi kami berlokasi di Katingan, Kalimantan Tengah wilayah yang cocok untuk industri kelapa sawit. 

PT. AHS berkomitmen terhadap pengembangan minyak sawit berkelanjutan, berpedoman pada Kebijakan Keberlanjutan, dan mematuhi persyaratan wajib Minyak Sawit Berkelanjutan Indonesia dan merupakan anggota Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil yang diakui secara internasional.

Name: Integrity Soils
Description: Integrity Soils is an agroecological education company. We provide leadership, education and coaching in the field of agroecology and regenerative agriculture.

Name: Brasil Agribusiness
Description:
O Brasil Agribusiness é um hub de comunicação, conteúdo, negócios e entretenimento do Agro.

Somos um projeto  inovador que reúne todo o ecossistema e gera conhecimento, conexões e experiências para seus players. 

Estamos ativos no mundo presencial e online, nos mais variados formatos.

Name: Vitelia Voeders
Description:
Vitelia Voeders, onderdeel van Coöperatie Vitelia, produceert en verkoopt hoogwaardig veevoer. Dit doet zij voor leden en klanten in de veehouderij en specifiek voor de  pluimvee-, varkens- en rundveesector. Voer is van onschatbare waarde voor de gezondheid van dieren en heeft veel invloed op de smaak van het eindproduct. Het is onze dagelijkse passie om kwalitatief hoogwaardig voer te produceren voor een optimaal rendement. Onze missie is het om leden en klanten een continu en duurzaam voordeel te leveren. Om dit te kunnen borgen zet Vitelia Voeders actief in op innovatie, kennis en jong talent in de sector.

Vitelia Voeders maakt diervoeders die nauw aansluiten bij de specifieke behoeften van de dieren in elke fase van hun leven. 

Om dit kwalitatieve veevoer te produceren maken wij gebruik van een moderne grondstoffen op- en overslag faciliteit aan de maas en hebben wij 2 productielocaties. Aanvullend in de dienstverlening worden de (ruwe) grondstoffen vanuit de eigen overslag ook rechtstreeks beleverd bij klanten. 

Alle locaties bevinden zich in Noord-Limburg. Een strategische locatie waarmee wij onze klanten in de veehouderij door heel Nederland snel en efficiënt kunnen bedienen.

Name: Mastera
Description:
We are an Innovation Ecosystem, transforming data into solutions applicable to the field through a Platform that facilitates access to new technologies and accelerates the development of agribusiness.

We are ESG Commitment!

Name: Ferma lu' Mircea
Description:
Aici vei găsi printre cei mai gustoși pui pe care i-ai gustat vreodată :) și nici ouăle nu sunt rele :))

În primăvara lui 2023, Mircea era foarte mulțumit de viața lui și căuta activ modalități de a o complica. Așa a apărut prima serie de pui, mai mult o joacă, să vadă dacă încă știe să îi crească, așa cum învățase în copilărie. Majoritatea puilor i-a dat cadou pe la cunoscuți, care nu mai mâncaseră asemenea bucate de multă vreme. Treptat, la insistențele tot mai multora, Mircea s-a apucat serios de treabă. Așa a apărut o microfermă hobby cu pui, găini ouătoare, căprițe și alte orătănii.

Acum găsești la Ferma lu' Mircea pui gata de pus la cuptor, pui porționați pentru mămici contra cronometru, pui dezosați pentru grătar și ouă. 

Puii sunt crescuți de la vârsta de 3 săptămâni pe iarbă, în aer liber, văd soarele și scurmă prin iarbă după delicatese. Nu sunt bio sau organici, dar trăiesc corect.

Pentru moment se pot livra doar congelați. Livrarea se face în București (sectoarele 1, 2 și 6), județele Ilfov (oriunde în zonele de Nord și Vest ale capitalei), Giurgiu (în proximitatea A1, oriunde între Corbii Mari și București) și Dâmbovița (oriunde între Titu, Tărtășești și București). Mai mult, te încurajez să vizitezi ferma, pentru a-ți face o idee despre cum a fost produsă hrana ta. Pentru familiile cu copii mici se oferă GRATUIT o serie de scărpinat ieduțe :)

Name: GANSO Ganadería Sostenible
Description: GANSO es una organización creada por Climate Focus y CIAT, cuya misión es apoyar la transformación del campo en Colombia hacia una producción sostenible, baja en emisiones y con cero deforestación. Brindamos soluciones para actores del sector agrícola y ganadero para que aprovechen su potencial de forma sostenible.

Name: CITTEC FOREST
Description:
CITTEC (Center for Research and Technology Transfer of the Eucalyptus and Corymbia genera) was established as a strategic alliance between two major companies: Agropecuaria Popayán, S.A., a Guatemalan company with over 35 years of experience in horticulture and more than a century of agricultural tradition, and GrandBay Corp, a leading multi-Latin company in the production, conversion, and commercialization of personal care and household products, especially tissue paper (toilet paper, napkins, paper towels, among others), and the owner of DEFORSA – Desarrollos Forestales San Carlos S.A.

With more than 20 years of applied research and genetic improvement in both genera, CITTEC aims to transfer the most advanced genetic materials available in the market to its clients quickly and efficiently.
Each improvement program, whether for Eucalyptus or Corymbia, is developed with specialized approaches tailored to the needs of each industry. The goal of this alliance is to capitalize on the experience and expertise of both companies in successfully transforming different productive sectors.
Our hybrids are oriented toward key forestry industries such as biomass, pulp and paper, industrial timber, among others. Currently, CITTEC has a portfolio of over 400 Eucalyptus and Corymbia hybrids, supported by an ambitious program that aims, on one hand, to provide the industry with the best genetic materials and, on the other, to maintain a continuous line of research and permanent improvement.
In summary, CITTEC is established as a reference center for the licensing and transfer of high-quality forest hybrids, offering innovative, high-value solutions to the global forestry industry

Name: VKON
Description:
Wij zijn VKON. Een onafhankelijk onderzoeks- en innovatiecentrum met focus op een toekomstbestendige melkvee- en varkenshouderij waar diergezondheid en dierwelzijn centraal staat. 

Onze missie vandaag de dag? 
Samen met boeren en partners inspireren en motiveren tot, en bouwen aan een dierwaardige, duurzame veehouderij waar vandaag en morgen met veel plezier en passie wordt gewerkt: in de sociaal economische positie van iedere veehouder wordt (handelings)perspectief geboden door kennisontwikkeling, kennisdeling en kennisimplementatie.

Hoe wij dit doen?
•	We inspireren en zetten de transitie in beweging
Samen met boeren concrete stappen zetten en focussen op perspectief. Dit doen we door kennis te ontwikkelen, kennis te delen en kennis te implementeren in de praktijk. 

•	We brengen kennis, innovatie en praktijk bij elkaar
Onze medewerkers, met voeten in de klei, werken samen met veehouders aan actuele vraagstukken die spelen in de sector. Dit gebeurt vraag-gestuurd, veehouders kunnen altijd aankloppen met hun vraagstukken en ideeën. Door innovatieve projecten te initiëren en ondersteunen brengen we kennis, innovatie en praktijk bij elkaar en bieden we nieuwe inzichten en handelingsperspectieven.

•	We organiseren verbinding
Met ons uitgebreide netwerk van kennis en expertise, met gespecialiseerde partners in verschillende gebieden en verbinden praktijk, wetenschap en overheden. Daarbij werken we samen met boeren, dierenartsenpraktijken, onderzoeksinstituten, onderwijsinstellingen, overheden, ontwikkelaars en adviseurs in de Agro & Food sector.

Name: Netwerk Praktijkbedrijven
Description:
In Netwerk Praktijkbedrijven zijn ruim 100 melkveebedrijven aan de slag met het reduceren van hun ammoniak- en methaanemissies. Gedurende vier jaar combineren zij praktijkonderzoek en een integrale aanpak om een pakket samen te stellen van haalbare maatregelen die op beide doelen effect hebben.

Het project is een initiatief van LTO Noord, Wageningen University & Research en het ministerie van LNV.

Name: Agro Glese Gestão Fiscal e Tributária
Description:
Fornecemos serviços especializados para ajudar as empresas e produtores rurais a gerenciar de maneira eficaz e eficiente suas obrigações fiscais e tributárias, a fim de:

Minimizar o risco de penalidades e multas;
Maximizar a eficiência fiscal e os resultados financeiros;
Identificar oportunidades para reduzir os custos fiscais
Implementar estratégias tributárias eficazes, como um planejamento tributário;
Monitorar as mudanças na legislação fiscal, a fim de garantir a conformidade com as obrigações fiscais atuais e futuras;
Auditoria, por meio de um minucioso compliance, poderosa ferramenta de gerenciamento para monitorar, planejar e controlar os tributos.

Produtores rurais e suas particularidades financeiras e tributárias:
LCDPR, Funrural, ITR, contratos de arrendamento e parceria, administração financeira, emissão de Nota Fiscal Eletrônica, planejamento tributário (economia) e Imposto de Renda.

Contamos com profissionais de alto desempenho e competência, atuando há mais de 17 anos na área tributária.

A gestão tributária é imprescindível em qualquer negócio. Sem ela, não há o desempenho econômico, além da vulnerabilidade a não conformidade, o que resulta em autuações fiscais. 

Quer saber como sua empresa está perante aos tributos e se existe oportunidade de créditos? Fazemos o diagnóstico gratuitamente. Entre em contato conosco.

Name: Kaly Group
Description:
KALY is developing a sustainable, low-cost supply chain for farmed seaweed in Europe that includes production, value-added processing, and product development.  From our home base on the beautiful Isle of Skye, we are methodically building the backbone of an entire industry in conjunction with partners from industry, academia, and government.  

The many exciting applications for farmed seaweed - along with the ecosystem services in the sea and implications for land use ashore that seaweed farming can deliver - are only meaningful provided that vast quantities of biomass are produced and processed at a competitive price point.  Moving down the cost curve, achieving economies of scale, and developing proprietary technology and processes is the name of the game for KALY.
 
Additionally, KALY is focused on the advancement of marine natural capital as an investable asset class through initial market enablement exercises and stakeholder engagement leading to live project development for the replenishment of depleted marine species that serve as healthy ecosystem engineers.
 
KALY is focused on building social license through delivering economic opportunity to coastal communities whose livelihoods depend on the seas. Without their agreement, KALY will not be able to scale its activities and transform the way society uses the oceans.

Name: LandYield
Description:
LandYield allows private forest landowners to earn revenue, improve the value of their land, and enhance biodiversity while protecting their land and legacy. 

We’re committed to sustainable forest practices and environmental stewardship. Let’s work together to leave a positive imprint on the planet and maintain the beauty of the land for the generations to come. 

To learn more about our carbon sequestration program or how to enroll your land, please visit www.landyield.com. 
LandYield aims to connect all family forest owners to the carbon markets, allowing revenue generation while preserving forests and positively impacting our environment.

Our user-friendly online enrollment, regular quarterly payouts, and state-of-the-art remote sensing-based monitoring ensure a steady revenue stream for participating landowners.

LandYield is committed to sustainable forest practices and environmental stewardship, aiming to leave a positive imprint on our planet and help owners maintain the beauty and biodiversity of forests for future generations.

Find out more at www.landyield.com

Name: Plataforma de Asesores AKIS
Description:
The Agricultural Knowledge and Innovation System, AKIS, is the combined organisation and flow of knowledge between people, organisations and institutions that use and generate knowledge for use in agriculture and related fields. The AKIS Advisors Platform brings together and connects these actors in a digital resource that aims to become a reference for the whole sector. With a multi-stakeholder and collaborative approach and in line with the sustainability objectives of the CAP 2023-2027 and the Spanish CAP Strategic Plan 2023-2027 (PEPAC), the aim of AKIS is to ensure that agricultural knowledge and innovations in the sector are available to all those who use them.

Are you an agri-food advisor?

Name: agrifoodTEF España
Description:
Para fomentar una producción de alimentos sostenible y eficiente, agrifoodTEF ofrece a los innovadores las herramientas de validación necesarias para convertir sus mejores ideas en productos exitosos en el mercado.

 Construido como una red de instalaciones físicas y digitales en toda Europa, este proyecto ofrece servicios que ayudan a evaluar y validar soluciones de IA y robótica de terceros en condiciones reales, maximizando el impacto de la digitalización en el sector agrícola.
Este proyecto ha recibido cofinanciación del Programa Europa Digital de la Unión Europea bajo el acuerdo de subvención  Nº 101100622.

Name: Veeteelt
Description:
Veeteelt is het vakblad dat melkveehouders op de hoogte houdt van ontwikkelingen op hun vakgebied en hen versterkt in hun vakmanschap.

Het blad Veeteelt informeert ondernemende melkveehouders in Nederland en Vlaanderen op vaktechnisch terrein, waardoor zij het rendement van hun bedrijf kunnen verhogen. Veeteelt is een uitgave van rundveeverbeteringsorganisatie CRV BV, in opdracht van Coöperatie Koninklijke CRV u.a.
Op deze Facebookpagina maakt Veeteelt contact met de lezers. Laat ons weten wat jullie vinden van Veeteelt. Suggesties voor artikelen of reportages zijn altijd welkom. Ook is het mogelijk hier ervaringen met elkaar te delen. En natuurlijk zijn mooie koeienfoto’s altijd welkom.
We gaan er vanuit dat iedereen die een bericht achterlaat op deze pagina, zich aan de fatsoensnormen houdt. Ongepaste bijdrages en ongevraagde commerciële bijdrages worden verwijderd.
Leden van de Coöperatie CRV ontvangen Veeteelt als onderdeel van hun lidmaatschap. Daarnaast is het voor overige belangstellenden mogelijk een abonnement te nemen op Veeteelt. Het abonnement voor 12 nummers per jaar kost in Nederland en Vlaanderen € 87,00 per jaar (tarief 2022), abonnees in overige landen betalen € 152,00.
Voor opgave van abonnement kunt u deze pagina invullen (http://veeteelt.nl/service/abonneren/veeteelt) of mailen met klantenservice.nl@crv4all.com (Nederland en overige landen) of klantenservice.be@crv4all.com (Vlaanderen).
Tarieven zijn exclusief 9 procent btw.

Name: Apoio Agroflorestal
Description:
Somos uma empresa de base Agroflorestal com foco em organizar, orientar e executar projetos de Reflorestamentos Comerciais e Restauração Ecológica. Temos o compromisso com a sustentabilidade, a inovação e a prosperidade, sempre em harmonia com a natureza em benefício de nossos parceiros e clientes.
Há 15 anos no mercado, nos especializamos em toda a cadeia produtiva florestal. Com um histórico robusto de envolvimento em mais de 25.000 hectares por meio de assessoria e gestão de excelência.
Nossa liderança e histórico de bom relacionamento e parceria com empresas do setor, universidades e institutos faz com que sejamos reconhecidos pela alta credibilidade junto a produtores rurais e investidores rurais.

Name: Baraúna Soluções Biológicas

Name: Monitor Group
Description:
The Monitor Group stands out as a leading manufacturer and supplier of high-quality electric fence energizers, insulators, electroplastic wires for rural electric fences, battery chargers, electronic prods, fence energy meters, and essential accessories for rural management. We are committed to excellence by using top-notch raw materials, one of the pillars that has solidified our reputation in the market and propelled us to conquer new territories.

Monitor Agricultural Products takes pride in having a robust quality management system, ensuring that our products meet the highest standards. We are certified by the ISO 9001:2015 standard, reinforcing our commitment to customer satisfaction and the continuous pursuit of excellence in every aspect of our operations.

Name: AGROCOSTA

Nuestro actual portafolio de frutas incluye productos que lideran las exportaciones peruanas como Avocados, Mangos, Granadas, Mandarinas, Uvas, Arandanos y Jengibre

Name: Biohuis | Vereniging van biologische boeren en tuinders
Description:
Het Biohuis is de vereniging van biologische boeren en boerinnen. Wij versterken, verbinden, inspireren en beschermen de biologische sector. Daarbij ligt de nadruk op marktontwikkeling, belangenbehartiging (waaronder het verbeteren van de regelgeving) en kennisontwikkeling.  Voorbeelden van onderwerpen zijn mestbeleid, dierenwelzijn, gebruik van biologisch voer, GGO, bodemvruchtbaarheid, biodiversiteit, waterkwaliteit en alle andere zaken die de biologische sector bindt.

Binnen het Biohuis kunnen biologische boeren en tuinders met elkaar van gedachten wisselen en zich samen sterk maken voor de sector. In het Biohuis treffen we elkaar en delen we onze passie voor het biologische boerenvak.

Samenwerking in de keten
Via Bionext werken we samen met de andere schakels in de voedselketen. Biohuis draagt financieel bij aan Bionext waardoor medewerkers van Bionext uitvoerend werk kunnen doen voor Biohuis, waaronder belangenbehartiging. Bionext wordt bestuurd door de boeren van Biohuis, de handel en verwerkers van BioNederland en de Biowinkelvereniging.

Wie zijn lid van Biohuis?
Zonder dragende organisaties geen Biohuis! Automatisch lid van Biohuis zijn de Natuurweide, Vereniging Biologische Varkenshouders (VBV), Biologische Pluimveehouders Vereniging, Prisma (fruittelers), De Groene Geit, NL Vereniging van Professionele Melkschapenhouders, Biowad, BioTuinders, BDEKO, LTO Noord (de biologische leden),  ZLTO (de biologische leden),  LLTB (de biologische leden), Biobol en de Vereniging van biologische boeren Zuid West. Alle genoemde akkerbouworganisaties hebben zich in 2023 ook verenigd in Bioplant.

Description:

Nuestra estructura está conformada por diversas unidades de negocio que nos permiten seguir creciendo:

Además, nuestras á𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗴𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶ó𝗻 𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗽𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗮 de Administración, Finanzas, IT y RRHH trabajan de manera integrada para asegurar el éxito de todas las unidades de negocio.

Name: Agroforestry Gelderland
Description:
AgroForestry netwerk Gelderland (AFG) is een lerend netwerk

banden met de provinciale netwerken elders in het land en werkt

(EURAF) en de Stichting Agroforestry Nederland.
Het AgroForestry netwerk Gelderland organiseert sinds 2020
informatieavonden en excursies. Het netwerk voorziet niet
alleen agrariërs, maar ook overheden en andere stakeholders van
informatie en advies.
De interesse vanuit de sector groeit. Al 200 grondeigenaren en
gebiedspartijen hebben informatie en advies ingewonnen bij AFG.
Met gesprekken op locatie wordt op bedrijfsniveau gewerkt aan
toekomstperspectief voor agrariërs. Het advies is op maat en
passend bij het bedrijf en de ondernemer.
Onder begeleiding van het netwerk hebben tussen 2020 en 2023
zo’n vijftig agrariërs een herontwerp van hun bedrijf gemaakt.
Een deel van de ondernemers is al gestart met het aanplanten
van bomen. Zij worden langjarig ondersteund door projectleider
Dyon Temming en het team van deskundigen op het gebied van
agroforestry.
Er is de komende jaren ruimte voor de begeleiding van meer
ondernemers, ook uit de akkerbouw en de fruitteelt.
ondersteunt ondernemers bij agroforestry

Name: Wuchi Wami Limited
Description:
Wuchi Wami packages, brands, markets and distributes local 
raw and organic Honey. The honey is sourced from the wild 
Miombo forests of North Western Zambia. It is processed through its 
registered cooperative that has 2,500 farmers participating in 
training and sustainable beekeeping through an out-growers 
scheme model. It cuts across north western with 500 farmers 
fully trained, equipped with modern beehives, PPE and buckets. 
They use modern beehives made from easy to plant pine, 
preserving the miombo trees that are destroyed in the traditional 
beehive production. Deforestation is further reduced by providing 
an alternative income source for women and men engaged in 
charcoal burning. The model provides an alternative income to 
women from charcoal burning. 
Wuchi Wami processes, brands and distributes this locally 
produced raw, organic and unpasteurised honey by an outgrowers scheme registered under Kwasha indimi cooperative 
in Mwinilunga. This honey is then distributed to their clients 
through the chain stores country wide.

Name: Forest and Land Owners Association of Lithuania (FOAL)
Description:
Lithuanian Forest and Land Owners Association (LMSA) is a national public organization representing private forest owners in Lithuania operating since 1993. Our mission is to unite forest owners and organizations serving private forestry into an association capable of coordinating activities, representing association members and defending their legitimate interests.
LMSA successfully represents and defends private forestry at both national and international levels. During more than 20 years of activity, LMSA has grown into a public organization with more than 6,500 members, which has been accepted into its ranks by the Confederation of European Private Forest Owners (CEPF), European Landowners Organization (ELO), International Family Forest Alliance (IFFA), supported by Denmark, Sweden and associations uniting forest owners of other countries. LMSA is a member of the Lithuanian Chamber of Agriculture, the Lithuanian Association of Independent Wood Surveyors, the Lithuanian Business Confederation, and a participant in the round table of the forest owners' associations of the Baltic Sea countries. Recently, cooperation has been actively developed with the Lithuanian Agricultural Advisory Service, the Lithuanian Biomass Energy Association "Litbioma", the Lithuanian Heat Suppliers Association,
Constructive and immediate cooperation of LMSA with the Seimas of the Republic of Lithuania, the Government, the Ministry of Environment, which oversees forestry in Lithuania, as well as the Ministry of Agriculture and the National Payment Agency attached to it, which administers EU support for rural development, allows us to achieve excellent results in the formation of a correct private forestry policy in Lithuania.

Name: D Mais Brasil
Description:
A D+BRASIL é uma empresa que segue uma tradição de mais de 30 anos na industrialização e distribuição de produtos alimentícios. Com uma história marcada pelo trabalho duro e dedicação, a empresa tem se destacado na sua área de atuação, aprimorando continuamente seus processos e oferecendo produtos de qualidade para seus clientes.

Com o objetivo de suprir as necessidades do mercado interno e externo, a D+BRASIL iniciou suas atividades com a industrialização de frutas em calda, como abacaxi e figo, e posteriormente agregou outros produtos, como café e farináceos. Com equipe altamente capacitada e tecnologias de ponta, a empresa segue rigorosos padrões de qualidade e segurança alimentar, garantindo que todos os seus produtos sejam saudáveis e seguros para consumo.

A D+BRASIL tem como prioridade o crescimento da empresa de maneira sólida, contínua e acelerada, buscando sempre atender cada vez melhor seus clientes, funcionários e parceiros. Com produtos de alta qualidade e seriedade, a empresa tem conquistado o mercado e atualmente está presente em mais de 3000 pontos de vendas em todo território nacional.

Com um olhar para o futuro, a D+BRASIL tem como desafio diário desenvolver constantemente e visar a construção de um amanhã melhor. Com muito empreendedorismo, garra e dedicação, a empresa se compromete a sempre fazer o melhor e oferecer produtos alimentícios de alta qualidade e segurança, contribuindo para uma alimentação saudável e equilibrada. Além disso, a empresa tem um forte compromisso com o meio ambiente e a sustentabilidade, buscando sempre reduzir o impacto ambiental de suas atividades.

Name: Nationaal Voedselberaad
Description:
De voedsel- en landbouwtransitie draait vooral om het herstellen van de verbinding tussen voedselsystemen en ecosystemen. Wij zien dat regionale voedselinitiatieven bewijzen dat verandering mogelijk is. Regionaal kunnen we verbindingen herstellen tussen boeren en burgers, betere afstemming van vraag en aanbod realiseren en zeggenschap over ons voedsel versterken. Wat we zien is een positieve opwaartse spiraal: van kleine initiatieven van onderop naar groeiende lokale, regionale en nationale netwerken.                                         De uitdaging is om al deze initiatieven te verbinden tot een gezamenlijke, krachtige beweging, geworteld in diversiteit, die al die plekken voedt, nieuwe samenwerking inspireert en een vruchtbare voedingsbodem legt voor een verbindend landbouw- en voedselsysteem.

Wie we zijn
Wij zijn een nationale verbindingsbeweging van lokale en regionale voedselinitiatieven en samenwerkingsverbanden. Wij werken vanuit het principe van een ecosysteem/mycelium waarin iedereen vanuit de eigen rol bijdraagt. Zonder ons te committeren aan een bepaalde term of een bepaald begrip, stellen we vragen die reflectie stimuleren om van daaruit een breed gedragen beweging op te bouwen. Het initiatief om te verbinden in een Nationaal Voedselberaad is ontstaan vanuit Voedsel Anders, Stadslandbouw Nederland, Ons Eten Den Haag en de WUR en wordt mede mogelijk gemaakt door de EU (SoilValues) en de Nationale Wetenschapsagenda. 

Wat we doen
Wij werken aan het herstellen van verbindingen in ons voedsel- en landbouwsysteem: tussen burger, boer en gemeenschap, tussen bodem, voedsel, natuur en gezondheid, tussen duurzaamheid en economie en tussen praktijk, onderzoek en beleid. Samen leren we van elkaars ‘het kan wel’, bundelen we krachten en vergroten we onze impact. 
De essentie van wat wij doen ligt in het zichtbaar maken van vele praktijkvoorbeelden, wat zij gemeenschappelijk hebben en hun maatschappelijke kracht doorvertalen naar beleidsmogelijkheden.

Name: Hub del Norte
Description:
We are a Savory Network hub, providing holistic management training, advisory and support to farmers, ranchers and everyday people in addition to EOV monitoring to verify soil regeneration, serving northern Spain and the Pyrenees.

Changing the way our local and global food systems function is no longer a discussion for the future, but a must for slowing down and reversing climate change as well as repopulating rural areas that are slowly dying.

In line with "it's not the cow, it's the how", it's our management decisions that create the realities we live in, at home and in our daily lives. By using holistic management, we can make decisions that are true to our values and how we want the world we live in to be. They can guide us to live in harmony with natural processes instead of fighting against them, to create communities based on shared values and economies centred on creating long lasting value rather than a quick buck.

We're here to support people in learning how to use those decision making tools to bring quality of life and values back to the centre of their lives rather than allowing short-term decisions, fear and trends makes the decisions for us. So whether you're a producer seeking to enhance your soil, reduce your use of inputs and create a land-based business that will carry on for generations, or a family seeking to create a life centred on values and quality over quantity, or anything in between, we're here to help you—in Castellano, Euskera, Catalá, Français or English.

Name: Naqawa Agriculture - نقاوة الزراعية
Description:
Welcome to Naqawa Agricultural, a trailblazer in the farming industry with a focus on automated and sustainable farming practices. We specialize in cutting-edge technologies such as hydroponics systems, automated agriculture systems, and renewable energy resources. Our journey began in 2023 in Saudi Arabia, inspired by the visionary goals of the Saudi Vision 2030.

At Naqawa, we bring together global expertise and a commitment to sustainable development. Our mission is to revolutionize the way food is grown and produced, ensuring a more efficient and environmentally friendly approach to agriculture. Through our advanced automated farming systems, we aim to optimize crop yields while minimizing resource consumption.

Our hydroponics systems utilize state-of-the-art techniques to cultivate plants without soil, allowing for precise control over nutrient delivery and water usage. By harnessing the power of automation, we streamline the farming process, reducing manual labor and increasing productivity. Additionally, we integrate renewable energy resources to power our operations, further reducing our ecological footprint.

With Naqawa Agricultural, you can trust that every step of our farming process is carefully designed to prioritize sustainability and efficiency. We are committed to playing our part in building a greener future by providing innovative solutions that meet the demands of a growing population while preserving our planet's resources.

Join us on this transformative journey as we pave the way for a new era of agriculture. Experience the power of automation, sustainable practices, and global expertise with Naqawa Agricultural. Together, let's cultivate a brighter and more sustainable future for generations to come.

Name: AGRIMEDIC GLOBAL
Description:
Agrimedic: Leading the Way in Sustainable Agriculture
Established in 2023 as a subsidiary of Agrimedic Global, Agrimedic is at the forefront of transforming agriculture. With a focus on sustainability and innovation, we are proud to be the exclusive partner, bringing the revolutionary Plantos Verde to local farmers, landscapers, and growers.
Our Mission
Our mission is to revolutionize agriculture by providing 100% certified organic solutions that enhance productivity, improve crop quality, and protect the environment. We are dedicated to empowering our customers with eco-conscious products that deliver tangible results, fostering a sustainable future for agriculture.
Plantos Verde: A Breakthrough in Organic Plant Support
Developed by Dr. Peter Ost and patented globally, Plantos Verde is a micromineral ionized plant-support product that harnesses nanotechnology to deliver essential nutrients directly to plants. Inspired by the natural process where minerals from Sahara Desert sandstorms nourish the Amazon rainforest, it boosts photosynthesis, strengthens plant defenses against pests, and promotes healthier growth—all while being purely organic and sustainable.
Key Features:  
Boosts Photosynthesis: Delivers CO₂ directly to plants, optimizing chlorophyll production and energy synthesis.  

Certified Organic: Complies with EC (No. 834/2007 and 888/2008) and NOP regulations; registered under Act 36 of 1947 (B4598).  

Key Benefits of Plantos Verde
Unmatched Yield Increases
Elevated Sucrose Content
Superior Resilience
Earlier Harvests, thus better use of investments and soil
Sustainability at Heart
Robust Plant and Soil Health

Name: FiLoLéG Filière Locale de Légumineuses à Graines
Description:
FiLoLéG (Filière Locale de Légumineuses à Graines pour l’alimentation humaine) est un projet multi-partenarial visant à ce que la région Hauts-de-France soit une région productrice et consommatrice de Légumineuses à Graines en 2030.

Il a pour ambition d’une part de mettre en place un espace d’échange et de concertation entre acteurs, permettant de faciliter l’émergence et la structuration de filières à destination de l’alimentation humaine, et d’autre part de réaliser des études et analyse techniques, agronomiques, économiques, etc. répondant aux besoins des acteurs.

Le projet a démarré depuis 2022 et est organisé en quatre actions : 
1- Structurer et animer un réseau d'acteurs professionnels,
2- Centraliser la connaissance disponible en région et plus largement pour alimenter les études et analyses réalisées, 
3- Faciliter les transactions entre acteurs,

Name: Mediterranean Youth Task Force
Description:
The Mediterranean Youth Task Force is the youth-branch of the Silva Mediterranea secretariat of the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO). 

It is a self-led group of engaged young people up to 35 years old who are either from or living in the Mediterranean region. Participants are students, researchers, young professionals or those with active roles in the forest sector of the Mediterranean region.  

The overall goal of the MYTF is to facilitate youth engagement in Mediterranean forestry issues. 

The Mediterranean Youth Task Force has three main objectives:  
participate, organize and promote knowledge-sharing and capacity-building activities in the areas of work of the Silva Mediterranea Secretariat, its five active working groups and other forestry youth networks; 
promote spaces for exchange and dialogue, not only among youth, but also with decision-makers in the forestry sector of the region; and 
propose, lead and adhere to innovative actions in the forest sector of the Mediterranean, promoting youth action and participation.

Name: Vivagric
Description:
Vivagric: Empowering sustainable agriculture for a brighter future.

We are a modern technology-driven agribusiness company that is committed to growing premium organic crops, fruits, tree plantations, poultry, fish, livestock, dairy, beverages, and processed foods using mechanized farming methods.

We believe that sustainable agriculture is the key to a brighter future for our planet and our communities. That's why we are committed to using the latest technologies and practices to produce high-quality food in a way that is good for the environment and good for the people who produce it.

Our mechanized farming methods allow us to produce food more efficiently and with less environmental impact. We use renewable energy sources to power our operations, and we implement practices such as crop rotation and cover cropping to help protect our soil and water resources.

We also believe that it is important to provide our employees with good wages and benefits, and to create a safe and supportive work environment. We are committed to creating a sustainable food system that benefits everyone involved.

Here are some of the specific ways that Vivagric is working to empower sustainable agriculture:

We are using modern technology to improve our farming practices. For example, we use drones to monitor our crops for pests and diseases and precision agriculture techniques to apply fertilizer and water more efficiently.

We are growing premium organic crops and livestock. Organic farming is a more sustainable way to produce food, as it avoids the use of synthetic pesticides and fertilizers.

We are using mechanized farming methods to reduce our environmental impact. Mechanized farming allows us to produce more food with less land and water and less pollution.

We are committed to being a leader in sustainable agriculture. We believe that we can play a vital role in creating a brighter future for our planet and our communities.

Cultivating a sustainable future for all.

Name: ANW Deutschland
Description:
Die ANW ist ein Zusammenschluss von Waldbesitzern, Forstleuten, Wissenschaftlern und Waldinteressierten. Schon seit 1950 verfolgen wir das Ziel eines möglichst stabilen Ökosystems Wald mit seinen Lebensgemeinschaften. Die vom Menschen beeinflussbaren Belastungen dieses Ökosystems sollen so weit wie möglich begrenzt werden, damit die Leistungen von stabilem Wald nachhaltig für Eigentum und Gesellschaft bereitgestellt werden können.
Der von uns angestrebte strukturreiche und gemischte „Dauerwald“ erfüllt diese Anforderungen optimal. Hierzu bedarf es einer stetigen strukturfördernden bzw. erhaltenden Bewirtschaftung.
Wir wollen einerseits mit seinem Produkt „Holz“ Geld verdienen, gleichzeitig aber im Einklang mit einer intakten Naturausstattung andere, ggf. zu honorierende gesellschaftliche Ansprüche wie z.B. sauberes Trinkwasser oder gesundheitsfördernden Erholungsraum befriedigen.

Name: Hade Dinamis Sejahtera
Description:
PT. Hade Dinamis Sejahtera traces its roots back to 1947, when Oen Boen Liong founded a cattle and horse trading business in Melolo, East Sumba, Indonesia. In 1963, his son Eric Hartono expanded into international markets by exporting local cattle to Hong Kong. When export regulations changed in 1975 to protect the domestic supply, the company strategically shifted to focus on supplying the Jabodetabek market.

In the early 1990s, under the leadership of the third generation, Hendrik Hartono, the company was formally established as PT. Hade Dinamis Sejahtera. Hendrik introduced a major strategic pivot by importing high-quality cattle from Australia to meet growing domestic demand and ensure a consistent supply.

Today, PT. Hade Dinamis Sejahtera proudly serves customers across Indonesia, with a primary focus on the Java region. The company supplies premium cattle while upholding a strong commitment to quality, reliability, and contributing to the growth of Indonesia’s cattle industry.

Name: OLIVE OIL AL ANDALUS PREMIUM ARTISANAL ORGANIC  GOURMET NO. 1 IN THE WORLD
Description:
AL ANDALUS PREMIUM OLIVE OIL Contacto CEO: +34646884510 WhatsApp

**Al-Andalus Premium Olive Oil The Essence of Andalusian Tradition**

Immerse yourself in the rich heritage of Al-Andalus with our Premium Olive Oil, a liquid gem that encapsulates centuries of olive-growing tradition and excellence from the Andalusian region. This oil is not just a condiment; it is a sensory experience that celebrates the intimate connection between the land and the olive tree, offering unparalleled quality in every drop.

**Unmatched Origin and Quality**

Sourced from the fertile valleys and sunny hills of Andalusia, our olive oil is extracted from the finest hand-picked olives at their peak ripeness. Grown in a privileged natural environment, these olives are the result of sustainable and environmentally friendly agricultural practices, ensuring a pure and highest-quality final product.

**Production Process**

Al-Andalus Premium Olive Oil is crafted through a cold extraction process, preserving all the flavors, aromas, and nutritional properties of the fruit. This artisanal and meticulous method ensures that each bottle contains extra virgin olive oil from the first press, with low acidity and a superior organoleptic profile.

**Organoleptic Characteristics**

Our oil is distinguished by its golden color with green reflections, a sign of its freshness and purity. On the nose, it unveils an intense fruity aroma with notes of freshly cut grass, tomato, and almond. On the palate, it exhibits a perfect balance between bitterness and spiciness, with a persistent and pleasant aftertaste that evokes the essence of the Andalusian landscape.

**Culinary Versatility**

Al-Andalus Premium Olive Oil is a versatile ally in the kitchen. Ideal for dressing salads, marinating meats and fish, and enhancing the flavor of both traditional and contemporary dishes. Its sensory richness makes it the perfect ingredient for chefs and gourmet enthusiasts, elevating every recipe to a gourmet experience.

Name: PT Perkebunan Sumatera Utara (Perseroda)
Description:
PT Perkebunan Sumatera Utara (Persero) merupakan salah satu badan usaha milik daerah Provinsi Sumatera Utara, didirikan berdasarkan Peraturan Daerah Tingkat I Sumatera Utara Nomor 16 Tahun 1979 dengan bentuk badan hukum yang pertama sekali berupa Perusahaan Daerah (PD). Kemudian disempurnakan dengan Peraturan Daerah Nomor 24 tahun 1985 yang disahkan dengan Keputusan Menteri Dalam Negeri Nomor 539.22-1434 tanggal 16 Oktober 1985 dan diundangkan dalam lembaran daerah Provinsi Sumatera Utara tanggal 29 Januari 1986. Dalam rangka mengantisipasi era globalisasi (perdagangan bebas) dan turut serta membantu Pemerintah dalam menggerakkan ekonomi kerakyatan, dipandang perlu meningkatkan peran dan fungsi Perusahaan Daerah Perkebunan Sumatera Utara sehingga mampu menarik minat investor baru untuk turut serta dalam penyertaan modal. Berdasarkan pertimbangan tersebut, bentuk badan hukum perusahaan dirubah dari PD. Perkebunan Sumatera Utara menjadi PT. Perkebunan Sumatera Utara, berdasarkan Peraturan Daerah No. 4 Tahun 2004 tanggal 17 Juni 2004 tentang Perubahan Bentuk Badan Hukum Perusahaan Daerah Perkebunan menjadi Perseroan Terbatas (PT) Perkebunan Sumatera Utara dengan Akta Pendirian Perseroan Terbatas No. 98 tanggal 29 Agustus 2005 yang telah disahkan oleh Menteri Hukum dan HAM Republik Indonesia No. C-14712 HT.01.01 TH 2006 tanggal 18 Mei 2006 dan telah diumumkan dalam Berita Negara Republik Indonesia No. 63 tanggal 8 Agustus 2006, Tambahan Berita Negara No.8420/2006 tanggal 24 Juli 2006. Anggaran Dasar Perusahaan mengalami perubahan sesuai dengan UU No. 40 tahun 2007 tentang perseroan terbatas, dengan Akta Penegasan Berita Acara Rapat Umum Luar Biasa Pemegang Saham PT. Perkebunan Sumatera Utara No. 10 tanggal 26 Nopember 2008 yang dibuat dihadapan Notaris Alina Hanum, SH di Medan.

B. Maksud dan Tujuan Perusahaan
Maksud dan tujuan pendirian perusahaan seperti yang dinyatakan pada akte pendirian perusahaan adalah berusaha dalam bidang pertanian, industri dan perdagangan.

Aus diesen und zahlreichen weiteren Gründen setzt sich die Plattform Erneuerbare Antriebsenergie für die Land- und Forstwirtschaft dafür ein, dass der gezielte, quantitativ limitierte Einsatz von klimafreundlichen Dieselalternativen innerhalb des land- und forstwirtschaftlichen Berufsstandes, der Landmaschinenindustrie sowie in der Politik, Öffentlichkeit und Gesellschaft akzeptiert wird.

Name: ORIGINE
Description:
ORIGINE est une société qui a pour objectif de cultiver des algues marines en bassins à terre, selon un procédé innovant, contrôlé et respectueux de l’environnement.

En maitrisant tous les paramètres de culture, nous souhaitons produire des macroalgues de haute qualité, toute l’année, pour assurer un approvisionnement fiable et régulier aux acteurs du Marché.
Par une approche durable, nous répondons ainsi à une demande croissante et exponentielle de cet or bleu, tout en diminuant la pression de récolte sur le milieu naturel.

Dans les produits alimentaires, cosmétiques et en pharmacie, les algues marines sont partout ! Elles constituent l’une des ressources les plus riches, vertueuses et prometteuses afin de répondre aux besoins grandissants de nos sociétés. 
Elles peuvent également être une alternative aux cultures terrestres, ne nécessitent pas d’eau douce pour se développer, et sont de véritables puits-carbone.

Et pourtant, aujourd’hui, en France, elles sont trop peu exploitées !

Au sein d’ORIGINE, nous nous engageons donc chaque jour pour développer, optimiser et pérenniser les processus de production de nos algues, en minimisant notre empreinte écologique et en contribuant à la préservation des écosystèmes marins.

Vous souhaitez participer à un projet innovant, respectueux de l'environnement et sur un secteur en pleine croissance ?
ORIGINE vous offre l'opportunité de contribuer à un avenir durable tout en valorisant les ressources marines de manière responsable.

Name: Soil in Formation, PBC
Description:
At Soil In Formation (SIF), we are transforming how the world can interact with, understand and regenerate soil health. Our mission is to revitalize global soils by democratizing soil health measurement through the development of innovative SIF sensor technology and our global contextual soil health data platform. SIF sensors use electrochemical technology advanced through biomedical research for unparalleled accuracy. Unlike other solutions, our technology is highly affordable, scalable and exceptionally accurate by gold standards, making advanced soil health monitoring accessible to all.  Farmers and others will now have the data needed to drive economically sound and regenerative practices, and receive contextual total carbon (both organic and inorganic) and water retention capabilities in addition to other soil metrics for their land. SIF enables core environmental measurement for all soil health parameters - in field and in real-time, with no technician needed.

This real-time auditability provides stakeholders with precise, up-to-date information, ensuring informed decisions and transparency. By fostering healthier soils, we’re strengthening the carbon cycle and retention, increasing biodiversity, enhancing agricultural efficiency, and protecting clean water and health.

Despite soil’s vast potential, the lack of quality MRV systems has limited our understanding and utilization of this crucial resource. With SIF, you’re not just measuring soil—you’re unlocking the immense potential of the earth beneath your feet. Join us in pioneering a future where soil health drives global prosperity and ecological balance.
