Our Space: 
Nestled deep within the Western Ghats lies our first and flagship project, the Dancing Frog Habitat - a project that is as enchanting as its name. Named after the captivating Dancing Frog, known for their unique breeding behaviours, this ancient forest is a sanctuary of biodiversity. 70 acres of thriving ecosystem, supports a diverse range of species  from birds to a myriad of insects, plant and fungi life. 

Our Collective:
Accompanying the Habitat is the Dancing Frog Collective, a group of dedicated individuals who invest in the land, embracing their roles in protecting and nurturing this ecological treasure. 
The collective operates in harmony with their landscape, ensuring their presence supports and enhances the natural environment. Members are not only investors but active participants in a larger conversation narrative.

Name: Agromel S.R.L.
Description: Agromel S.R.L. Inició sus operaciones en septiembre de 2007 como importador y comercializador de insumos veterinarios, actualmente somos un poderoso referente en el rubro con una variedad de líneas específicas para bovinos, porcinos, ovinos y aves.

Name: Camp Altiplano
Description: Camp Altiplano is the first Ecosystem Restoration Communities project established in the south of Spain. it's an aexperimental 5 hectares plot dedicated to restoring soil, water and biodiversity within an agroecological system. Since its inception in 2017, it has welcomed and worked along with countless volunteers, sharing the hands-on experience of land restoration and spreading the seeds of knowledge worldwide.

Name: Nutriagtech
Description:
We offer strategic support services for the strengthening and growth of Agribusiness and the Aimal Nutrition area through customized technical solutions.
 Our proposals are aligned with business strategies and market potential, providing assertiveness, celerity and competitiveness to our clients.

Name: Silverdale Academy | Silverdale Farm
Description: The programs offered by The Silverdale Academy are a culmination of wide-ranging formal education and training resources and contributions from many visionary industry leaders looking to improve industry participant training and knowledge.

Name: Geographic Vision
Description: Geomatic Solutions

Name: DIDJA FERME SARL
Description:
Elevage et production de poulet, pisciculture, agriculture, transformation agroalimentaire.
Vente de poussins, vente d'aliments complet et sécurisé pour volailles, vente de poissons fumés. 
Formation et suivi des producteurs en production de poulet, pisciculture, agriculture, transformation de produits agroalimentaires...

Name: La Ferme de Creangoff
Description: La Ferme de Creangoff, créée en 2022, est une entreprise agricole en cours de création. Dotée de deux ateliers : maraichage et arboriculture, l'entreprise a pour objectif d'axer son développement sur les trois piliers du développement durable. L'intégration de l'écologie passe par la mise en pratique de méthode agroforestière. Les produits sont destinés à la consommation locale. L'entreprise doit permettre le dégagement d'un salaire en N+3 et de deux salaires en N+5.

Name: Deluxe Ranch
Description:
We share memories!

With the farmer who need quality stud sheep and goats.

With the butcher who need quality meat 

With a hotel or eateries who need to provide deep African cuisines

With the households who needs to top up their fridges, or on their special days. Be it lobola/marooro days, kusungira/ kuripa Ngozi or it is just a family gathering where goat or sheep is needed

We share moments with religious institutions or people on their sacred days. It could be Easter, Ramadan and Eid Al-Fitr, Eid Al-Adha etc

Name: Norandino
Description:
Somos una organización empresarial líder en responsabilidad social, económica y ambiental. Con transparencia y competitividad contribuimos al fortalecimiento y al mejoramiento de las organizaciones y familias asociadas, logrando promover el desarrollo regional. Participamos del comercio justo con productos orgánicos como café, cacao y panela. Además brindamos apoyo técnico permanente a nuestros socios y socias.

Asimismo, brindamos los mejores servicios de proceso y comercialización. Además, contamos con la mejor logística, asesoría, exportación y promoción de productos que se cultivan en la costa, sierra y selva del norte peruano.

Name: Agroforestry & Woodlot Extension Society
Description:
Promoting responsible woodlot and agroforestry management in the prairie provinces.

The future is leafy. 

Mission
AWES exists to increase awareness of the economic, social and environmental values of agroforestry and woodlots in the agricultural landscape. AWES promotes responsible woodlot and agroforestry management by providing support and extension services to landowners, land stewards and others who influence land use practices in Alberta.

Vision
To provide forestry and agroforestry based solutions, products and services that are increasingly used to enhance the social, economic and environmental values for private and public lands in Alberta.

Name: Sustayn Group
Description:
Sustayn Group, together with its partners, are building Europe’s regenerative biomass infrastructure.

We develop, own, and operate industrial-scale Miscanthus plantations across the EU, delivering a stable, low-carbon feedstock for construction, packaging, energy, and advanced bio-products.

Our model combines:
- Long-term land partnerships with farmers, landowners, and communities
- Vertical integration from propagation to processing
- Trusted technology partners with decades of operational experience
- Alignment with EU frameworks (RED III, EUDR, EU Taxonomy) to ensure compliance and bankability

By scaling Miscanthus, a perennial, non-invasive grass that regenerates soils and sequesters carbon, Sustayn Group enables industries to replace fossil-based and deforestation-linked raw materials with sustainable, local alternatives.

Our mission: To create lasting value for investors, partners, and communities by making Miscanthus the backbone of Europe’s bio-based economy.

Name: árbolesQhablan
Description: árbolesQhablan es una empresa pionera en la medición directa y en tiempo real del impacto ambiental de los árboles mediante sensores IoT. Nuestro sistema cuantifica la captura de carbono y otras variables ambientales, proporcionando datos precisos y transparentes para empresas y comunidades comprometidas con la sostenibilidad y la conservación del medio ambiente. Trabajamos para hacer visible y accesible la comunicación con los árboles, promoviendo un futuro más verde y consciente.

Name: Developpe
Description:
DEVELOPPE est une entreprise spécialisée dans l’ingénierie de développement. L’intelligence territoriale, l’agroalimentaire, la formation et le conseil sont ses principaux axes d'interventions.
Elle a acquis une expertise dans l'élaboration et le déploiement de politique RSE/RSO ainsi que dans la mise en pratique des principes de bonne gouvernance.

Name: Fédération des producteurs forestiers du Québec
Description: La Fédération des producteurs forestiers du Québec (FPFQ) est l’organisation provinciale qui travaille à la promotion des intérêts de 162 900 propriétaires forestiers de tous les milieux sociaux, dont 30 000 sont enregistrés comme producteurs forestiers. L’action régionalisée de ses 13 syndicats et offices affiliés vise la protection et la mise en valeur des forêts privées québécoises, le soutien aux propriétaires forestiers, ainsi qu’une commercialisation ordonnée du bois en provenance de ces territoires.

Name: Planteva farms Inc.
Description: Planteva Farms, led by CEO Robert Hecht and founder Bryce Nagels, combines deep agricultural expertise with innovative solutions. Partnered with technology experts like PlantVation AB, we focus on improving agricultural quality and yield through advanced techniques and a commitment to sustainability.

Name: REFTAGRI
Description:
REFTAGRI est une entreprise ambitieuse et à la pointe des nouvelles technologies mondiales dans les domaines de l’irrigation, de l’énergie solaire et des drones agricoles. Elle intervient partout au Maroc et en Afrique, offrant aux agriculteurs et aux professionnels des solutions innovantes, durables et performantes.

 Irrigation intelligente : Des systèmes de micro-irrigation pour une gestion optimisée de l’eau.
 Énergie solaire : Des installations photovoltaïques pour une agriculture plus autonome et durable.
 Drones agricoles : Surveillance et traitement des cultures avec des technologies de pointe.

Notre force s'incarne en l'engagement constant envers l’innovation et l’adoption des meilleures pratiques technologiques pour répondre aux défis de demain.

Name: Mombuca Agro
Description:
A Mombuca Agro é parte da SPM Holding, sendo a unidade de negócio focada em agribusiness. Atuamos no mercado brasileiro, investindo em áreas de grande potencial produtivo, com operações nos estados de São Paulo, Mato Grosso do Sul e Maranhão.  

Temos como objetivo, ajudar a suprir a demanda crescente de alimento e energia limpa. Trabalhamos com o entendimento que o Brasil tem uma vocação natural para a produção agropecuária, e assim usamos a tecnologia como indutor do equilíbrio produção/ sustentabilidade.

Promovemos a valorização real do ativo terra e captamos ganhos recorrentes, provenientes da operação agrícola. Somos comprometidos com a transformação, para melhor, da produção de alimentos e energia renovável. 

Somos focados em garantir a construção de um futuro sustentável através das gerações, buscando sempre o desenvolvimento socioeconômico das regiões em que atuamos. 

Trabalhamos para proteger, desenvolver e expandir o legado empresarial, atuando como semente transformadora nas boas práticas dos negócios.

Name: SMART FOODS AGRO
Description:
Smart Food Agro est une entreprise agro-industrielle spécialisée dans la production de poussin d’un jour, l’élevage en série de poulet de chair, l’accompagnement et la formation certifiante des projet avicole 
- création de couvoir 
- création de ferme avicole 
- fabrication de couveuse automatique et dynamique 
- vente de matériels d’élevage.

Name: Mallata
Description: Mallata is a shelter where you can find information about agroecology, food sovereignty, rural development, extensive livestock farming, and the environment… A space to share this knowledge and let it transhumate to other “mallatas.”

Name: Kilimo Smart Initiative
Description:
We advance climate resilience by empowering rural residents, especially women and youth, with knowledge and practical solutions in climate adaptation, mitigation, and sustainable agriculture.

Our projects focus on building local capacity, fostering innovative climate-smart practices, and driving community-led action plans. Through collaboration with educational institutions, local authorities, and partners, we create lasting environmental and social impact in Tanzania and beyond.

Join us in nurturing the next generation of climate leaders and championing sustainable development from the ground up.

Name: Topcalf
Description: Topcalf is the specialist in calf housing. With more than 65 years of experience in calf housing, the company is ready to help dairy farmers and their animals. With an eye for current and future legislation at home and abroad, together with their dealer network, they actively consider the best options. We stand for optimal animal welfare, strong animal health, healthy barn climate, sustainable design and maximum ease of work. Whether individual or group housing, indoor or outdoor - there is a suitable solution for every situation.

Name: Farm Innovations S.A.
Description: Farm Innovations udostępnia hodowcom bydła mlecznego i mięsnego aplikację Stado.pl, która stanowi odpowiedź na zapotrzebowanie współczesnego sektora rolniczego. Jej celem jest wsparcie rolników w efektywnym zarządzaniu gospodarstwem.

Name: The Farming Buddha
Description:
Tamper-proof and Traceable from our cow to your cup, The Farming Buddha brings hormone-free, zero-antibiotic, raw milk from local farms with real-time daily test results. Milked today. Delivered today.

The Farming Buddha is an integrated digital platform where farmers list their hormone-free, free-range, non-homogenized, unpasteurized, raw milk with zero-antibiotic residue milked every morning at 4 AM. 

Farming Budhha's IoT-based blockchain technology makes the entire journey of your milk tamper-proof and traceable from cow to cup.  Daily test reports with multiple parameters are made available in real-time before the milk reaches your door each morning.  Your health is a non negotiable priority for The Farming Buddha.

Name: Centre MAMPUYA
Description: Le Centre Mampuya soutenu par l'ONG MAMPUYA est l’endroit idéal pour se former, pour échanger, développer des idées créatives, retrouver la tranquillité et découvrir un paysage à l’exotisme particulier.

Name: Natuurlijk Berghof
Description:
Natuurlijk Berghof is een kleine organisatie van vijf personen die de handen ineengeslagen hebben om hun droom werkelijkheid te laten worden, een voedselbos ontwikkelen. In 2023 gaat de schop de grond in en worden de eerste jonge bomen aangeplant.

De komende jaren bouwt Natuurlijk Berghof aan een duurzaam, veerkrachtig en toekomstbestendig bedrijf dat in voedsel voorziet, een gezond ecosysteem creëert en mensen inspireert om zorgvuldig om te gaan met onze kwetsbare planeet.

Voor 2035 stelt Natuurlijk Berghof zich ten doel een landbouwsysteem te ontwikkelen op basis van een verscheidenheid aan meerjarige gewassen, dat aantoonbaar rendabel is voor natuur, boer én samenleving.

Name: Het Boerenlandgoed
Description: Het Boerenlandgoed combineert fiscale oplossingen van de Natuurschoonwet 1928 met de duurzame economische verwaarding van natuur en landschap. Hierdoor wordt het voor agrarische bedrijven en grondeigenaren mogelijk om een financieel draagkrachtige invulling te geven aan de transitie van het landelijk gebied.

Name: Vivero Pocochay Ltda.
Description:
Somos una empresa productora de plantas ornamentales para el mercado chileno.

Nuestra pasión es hacer las cosas bien hechas, con responsabilidad social, y siguiendo todos los estándares de calidad y normas que rige el mercado nacional e internacional.
Nos importa vender calidad y tener siempre las mejores plantas disponibles de los mercados internacionales para ser ofrecidos en Chile.

Nuestros principales productos son plantas de bajo requerimiento para jardines y corredores biológicos, rosales, plantas de interior, entre otros.

Nuestros clientes son las grandes tiendas de retail, depósitos de plantas, comerciantes, paisajistas, municipalidades y otros entes oficiales que adquieren plantas ornamentales.
Hace más de 12 años somos proveedores de Easy- Cencosud.
Trabajamos con grandes paisajistas como Cristóbal Elgueta Marinovic y Macarena Calvo; Nicolás Sánchez.

Nos es muy importante el aporte que hagamos a nuestro país al paisajismo, la recuperación y ampliación de áreas verdes, parques, etc.

Propagamos y hacemos crecer nuestras plantas con los mejores materiales genéticos del mundo que están disponibles para nuestro país y estamos permanentemente en contacto con los breeders internacionales para así tener acceso a lo mejor del mercado. 

De las plantas nativas o endémicas hemos desarrollado una línea que se pueden usar masivamente en proyectos y estamos abiertos a sugerencias de nuevos clientes para desarrollar producciones a pedido según la región.

Name: MACKINNON Servicios Agropecuarios SPA
Description:
Te invitamos a conocer nuestros servicios profesionales al área agrícola (asesría en riego, nutrición vegetal, capacitaciones al personal), producción animal y soluciones para plantas de proceso pesqueras y acuícolas.
Te brindamos asesoramiento personalizado, trabajamos directamente en tu proyecto agrícola o de producción animal para optimizar el rendimiento de tu negocio. Podemos transformar tus desafíos en oportunidades para mejorar aún más.
Podemos ayudarte en el rendimiento de tus procesos, poniendo a tu disposición nuestros conocimientos y experiencia para ayudarte a escoger alternativas para mejorar la calidad e inocuidad de tus productos, entregando más confianza a tus clientes.

Misión: 

Generar máxima satisfacción en nuestros clientes de la industria silvoagropecuaria a través una asesoría de primer nivel con un alto compromiso por la calidad y el cuidado del medio ambiente.

Visión:

Ser protagonistas de un cambio de paradigma en la industria silvoagropecuaria, generando relaciones sinérgicas, humanas con nuestros clientes y proveedores con una mirada de futuro acorde al contexto de cambio climático que estamos viviendo.

Name: Alta Genetics Nederland
Description: We bouwen langdurige relaties op door waarde te creëren voor onze klanten. We verbeteren de winstgevendheid van individuele veestapels door betrouwbare genetica en hoogwaardige producten en services te leveren op het gebied van vruchtbaarheid, gezondheid en management.

Name: Yapılcanlar Grup
Description:
1986 yılından bu yana Aksaray’da tarım, süt üretim hayvancılığı ve enerji sektörlerinde öncü bir rol üstlenen Yapılcanlar Grup, modern ve sürdürülebilir çözümler sunarak sektörde fark yaratmaktadır. Hayvancılık alanında, verimliliği ve hayvan refahını en üst seviyede tutan robot sağım sistemi ile çalışmalarımızı sürdürmekteyiz. Hastalıktan ari bir işletme olarak, hijyen ve sağlık standartlarına son derece önem veriyoruz. Türkiye genelinde sadece 26 adet bulunan Damızlık Düve Yetiştirme Merkezi’nden biri olarak, Aksaray’da bu alanda tek olmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz.

Ayrıca, enerji sektöründe yaptığımız yatırımlarla çevreye duyarlılığımızı da ön planda tutuyoruz. İşletmemizde kullanılan biyogaz ve güneş enerjisi sistemleri (GES), hem çevreye olan etkilerimizi minimize etmekte hem de enerji maliyetlerimizi düşürerek sürdürülebilir bir işletme modeli sunmaktadır. Biyogaz sistemimiz, organik atıkları değerlendirip enerjiye dönüştürerek çevreye katkı sağlarken; GES ile yenilenebilir enerji kaynaklarına olan bağlılığımızı ortaya koyuyoruz.

Yapılcanlar Grup olarak, doğaya ve insana saygı temelinde; tarımda, hayvancılıkta ve enerji sektöründe yenilikçi çözümler geliştirmeye ve ülkemizin kalkınmasına katkıda bulunmaya devam ediyoruz.

Name: Boerenperspectief Overijssel
Description:
BoerenPerspectief biedt agrarisch ondernemers in Overijssel begeleiding bij het verkennen van je toekomst. Met een vast aanspreekpunt helpen we als klankbord om ambities te toetsen, perspectief te creëren en realistische keuzes te maken. 

Hierbij kun je denken aan de volgende 7 thema's: 
Spiegelen of ambities realistisch zijn
Bedrijfsontwikkeling & Toekomstvisie
Persoonlijke Vraagstukken
Duurzame Landbouw & Energietransitie
Bedrijfsverbreding & Nieuwe Verdienmodellen
Bedrijfsovername & Familiale Samenwerking  
Bedrijfsverplaatsing & -beëindiging.

Name: Bloomin forests
Description:
Bloomin Forests is a specialist cell-grown tree nursery dedicated to supporting woodland creation, hedgerow planting and landscape projects across the UK.

In addition to our cell-grown plants we also grow a range of ornamental container grown shrubs and instant hedging units. 

With a focus on sustainability, consistency and expert horticultural care, we take pride in growing strong, healthy plants ready to thrive in the landscape.

We hold up to date certifications across our business and are also registered under the Plant Healthy Scheme.

Name: Sow Value
Description: Somos a startup que veio para revolucionar o mercado agro.

Name: Symbi0se
Description: Ferme urbaine associant l'aquaculture et l'hydroponie pour proposer des aliments sains, locaux et écologiques distribués dans un rayon de 2km.

Name: Green Deal Voedselbossen
Description: Voedselbossen zijn een vrij nieuw fenomeen in Nederland. Dat vraagt om ruimte, meer praktijkervaring en soms om aanpassing van wet- en regelgeving. Daarom hebben overheden, beleidsmakers, koplopers en faciliterende partijen via een  Green Deal Voedselbossen afspraken met elkaar gemaakt om het areaal voedselbossen te vergroten.

Name: Bon Bagay Foundation
Description:
Volg de ontwikkelingen van Stichting Bon Bagay in Haiti. 
Wij helpen met de duurzame ontwikkeling van de lokale bevolking, door het aanleggen van voedselbossen. We combineren in een voedselbos de bosbouw met akkerbouw (agroforestry) waardoor we ook landerosie en klimaatverandering tegen gaan. De herbebossing met een voedselbos zorgt voor een zelfredzaam bestaan van de bevolking doordat ze de oogstopbrengsten kunnen verkopen.

Name: Colmeia Yagro
Description: Presente nos estados de Minas Gerais e Tocantins, atua na produção e comercialização de grãos e proteína animal.

Name: Funder Honduras
Description: La Fundación para el Desarrollo Empresarial Rural (FUNDER), es una institución hondureña privada, con personalidad jurídica y patrimonio propio, apolítica, sin fines de lucro, que presta sus servicios sin discriminación alguna por motivos de raza, sexo, ideología política, religión o cualquier otra causa.

Name: Elite Equine Group
Description:
At Elite Equine Products, we believe our customers deserve the very best. All our products have been trialed and tested by the most experienced riders and horses, right around the world.  
The Elite Equine Products team is committed to providing the equine industry with the highest possible quality, customer service and care. Our entire equine range undergoes rigorous quality control testing to ensure it meets the highest internationally recognised quality standards.

Name: Bosgroep Oost-Vlaanderen
Description: Zowel particulieren als overheden kunnen bij ons terecht met alle vragen over bosbeheer en bebossing. Ons team bestaat uit ervaren bosbeheerders die de stiel en sector door en door kennen. In Oost-Vlaanderen zijn er 2500 leden. Samen met hen beheren we meer dan 7600 hectare bos.

Name: Agreste - serviços agro-florestais
Description:
A Agreste foi fundada em fevereiro de 2003, com o objetivo de dar resposta às necessidades da região da Beira Baixa, na prestação de serviços nas áreas agrícola e florestal.
Atualmente, a Agreste está sedeada em Souto da Casa – Fundão, conta com mais de 50 colaboradores e dispõe de uma vasta gama de maquinaria, procurando dar resposta a todos os desafios e alargar a oferta de serviços a nível nacional.
Desenvolvendo trabalho para entidades públicas e privadas, a Agreste adquiriu uma vasta experiência, na elaboração, acompanhamento e execução física de povoamentos florestais e agrícolas, bem como na silvicultura e na defesa da floresta contra incêndios.
Desde 2014, a Agreste aposta também na compra e venda de madeira, produção e comercialização de biomassa, sendo já uma referência no seu setor de atividade, mantem sempre uma posição firme e de responsabilidade para com a floresta sustentável. 
Acreditamos que o sucesso a longo prazo só é possível quando equilibramos a produção eficiente com práticas que protejam, restauram e respeitam os ecossistemas. Por isso, adotamos as melhores técnicas agrícolas e florestais, sempre em harmonia com a natureza, promovendo biodiversidade e o desenvolvimento sustentável das comunidades locais.
Location: Souto da Casa, Fundão - Castelo Branco

Name: Tamim integrated Farms
Description:
TIF (Tamim Integrated farms) is a functional subdivision of Tamim Group under direct supervision of Tamim agro industries limited. In Bangladesh more than 50% of all chickens raised for meat (broilers) are raised by farmers who doesn’t have the proper skills and guidance of it. These brave and independent farmers and their thrust of development is the main reason of the modern day’s contractual farming structure. Which is credited with not only saving farming operations in what once was a struggling industry, but has actually helped farms thrive. The integrator - farmer relationship based business model of the chicken industry and a performance-based structure has already begun to decentralize the industry from dealers who are actually the the middleman in the business.

Tamim Integrated farms is one of the fastest growing subdivision of Tamim Group under direct supervision of Tamim agro industries limited’s 16 years of experience Tamim Integrated farms quickly became recognized, collaborated and relied on its relationships with farming communities and stood for the economic viability and independence of family farms. Currently we actively engage with and support contract farmers by mitigating economic risk by up to 97% and through technology and knowledge transfer.  

We provide our contract farmers the chickens, the feed, veterinarian care and technical advice, while our poultry farmer provides the day-to-day care of the birds, land and housing on which they’re raised. Farmers are paid based on their performance in raising the healthiest chickens, as per the guidelines in our contract, which also strictly prohibit the use of added hormones and steroids.

Name: Dendral-Tech
Description: En Dendral-Tech cooperamos con la disminución de costos y mejora de la producción agrícola, integrando sensores digitales y química de suelo en un paquete tecnológico único. Hacemos más eficiente y cuidadoso el uso del suelo y el agua de riego, dos recursos que por "obvios" suelen ser poco entendidos y sub gestionados.

Name: Univers des agronomes
Description:
Univers des Agronomes est une startup mise en place par un groupe de personnes de profils différents. Elle s’inscrit dans une dynamique de miroir du monde agricole. En effet, la startup univers des Agronomes emblave tout ce qui est activités innovantes et vulgarisatrices, Permettant aux parties prenantes du monde Agricole de s’identifier aussi bien au niveau national qu’international. Après les indépendances, l’Etat du Sénégal avait mis en place des structures d’encadrement (la BNDS, l’ONCAD, la SODEVA, la SISCOMA devenue SISMAR, la SIES, la FMDR...) pour la prise en charge des besoins de financement et d’accompagnement du monde rural. Dès 1981, une Nouvelle Politique Agricole (N P A) a été mise en place, donnant naissance aux Sections Villageoises (SV), aux groupements d’intérêts économiques (GIE), à la CNCAS devenue LBA....  Réussite ou échec ? La réponse serait ambigüe dans la mesure où leurs travaux se font dans l’ombre . Ainsi , cette frange du monde Agricole a besoin de pôle de développement comme la startup univers des Agronomes qui se dresse sur le cheminement d’illumination de travaux , de personnels, d’innovations et de  découvertes agricoles. Toujours dans cette dynamique de vulgarisation, la startup univers des Agronomes se veut bien d’organiser des foires Nationales et internationales pour donner aux acteurs agricoles l’opportunité d’exposer leurs découvertes surtout dans les recherches variétale . 

À travers ses différentes activés, la startup Univers des Agronomes , en toute fiabilité met à la disposition de la population des publications hebdomadaires de dossiers des différentes franges du domaine Agricole via une émission dédiée les paroles de l'expert. une émission qui permettra au monde agricole d'obtenir une agriculture fructueuse et viable, qui respecte le mieux l'environnement .

Name: AGRI360.FARM
Description:
Agri360, a BVG Group Enterprise, is a Digital Agriculture platform powered by Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies streamlining Agri-Food Supply Chains by bringing together stakeholders across the value chain covering Agri Inputs and
Output, food processors, traders and exports.
Agri360 has access to more than 3lakh farmers and farmland of more than 5lakh acres of land via BVG ecosystem & FPO Connect.

Name: Click Agro
Description: We are a strartup focused on the digital trade of Agro products with business model B2B and B2C.

Name: Smart Carbon Farming
Description:
Many of today’s standard farming practices deplete the very soil they rely on, but carbon farming offers promising solutions. The approach rewards farmers that store carbon and/or reduce emissions, promoting healthier farming methods like regenerative agriculture that restore soil, rather than degrade it. 

With a growing population and more than half the world’s agricultural land already degraded, there may not be enough soil to support global food production within 50 years, making carbon farming key to achieving an economically resilient farming ecosystem in North West Europe and beyond. 

For carbon farming to work as a business model, accurate measurement and verification of stored carbon is key - but currently very costly and difficult. Further barriers related to policy, governance, and access to practical solutions can make it difficult for farmers to explore and implement carbon farming.

The Smart Carbon Farming project connects 11 partners across 5 countries to drive an inclusive agricultural transition by customising and testing monitoring solutions, aligning policy, research and innovation, and training farmers on the uptake of carbon farming practices.

Name: SEMEX PK BB Doo
Description:
Osnovna delatnost naše kompanije je uvoz i distribucija semena bikova.
Prva smo srpska distributerska kuća u oblasti prometa genetskog materijala u govedarstvu. Farmeri koji su prepoznali i prihvatili kvalitet koji nudimo, su značajni proizvođači mleka u našoj zemlji. Zahvaljujući saradnji sa renomiranim svetskim firmama u holštajn rasi, AltaGenetics i Swissgenetics, odgajivačka filozofija bazirana na visokoj proizvodnji, zdravlju i dugovečnosti krava, dopunjena je izgrađenim poverenjem na osnovu dobijenih proizvodnih rezultata i odlične fertilnosti semena.
Naša ponuda obuhvata seme bikova Holštajn (crni i crveni), Simentalske (Nemački i Švajcarski), Brown Swiss i tovnih rasa (Hereford, Limuzin, Belgijsko plavo i Šarole). Prateći nove trendove u govedarstvu, nudimo i seksirano seme bikova holštajn i simentalske rase. Seme je odlične fertilnosti i vrhunskog genetskog kvaliteta. Svi bikovi su pozitivno testirani po svetskim standardima. Zdravstvenu ispravnost garantuju rezultati analiza akreditovanih laboratorija.
Semex PK BB nudi proizvođačima izradu genetskog plana i plana osemenjavanja koristeći softver Alta GPS.
Dolazimo kod proizvođača, detaljno obilazimo Vaša stada i ocenjujemo krave. Od Vaše matične službe uzimamo podatke o poreklu i zajedno sa Vama definišemo odgajivačke ciljeve. Na osnovu ovih podataka izrađujemo selekcijski plan i plan osemenjavanja za Vašu farmu. Jedino takvim, sveobuhvatnim pristupom moguće je ostvariti najveći genetski napredak, a istovremeno izbeći visok procenat srodstva. Naš stručni tim se satoji od dva doktora veterinarske medicine i 3 inženjera stočarstva sa dugogodišnjim iskustvom rada na farmama.
Nudeći Vam seme vrhunskog kvaliteta i pomoć u farmskom menadžmentu, SEMEX PK BB je Vaš siguran partner u čitavom proizvodnom ciklusu – od osemenjavanja, preko zdravog teleta i junice do krave visoke proizvodnje.

Name: Agricola Siemel Limitada
Description:
Sobre Nosotros

Nuestra Empresa nace el 1985 cuando Don Anacleto Angelini decide desarrollar una empresa Agropecuaria a través de Inversiones Siemel S.A. Agrícola Siemel, se dedica  a la Producción, Procesamiento y exportación de Frutos Secos y frescos. Además, contamos con una destacada operación ganadera y producción de quesos de oveja en la Patagonia chilena.

Ubicados en Buin, poseemos 560 hectáreas dedicadas al cultivo de ciruelas, cerezas y almendras, aprovechando condiciones excepcionales de clima y suelo.  Tambien, contamos con una Planta con tecnología de punta que nos ha permitido procesar nuestra producción de ciruelas y de terceros con eficiencia y calidad reconocida por el mercado internacional.

Nuestra unidad productiva pecuaria, Estancia Baño Nuevo, se encuentra en la Región de Aysén y abarca cerca de 50 mil hectáreas. Allí nos dedicamos a la producción de carne bovina y ovina, lana y quesos de oveja Boladero, destacándonos por un modelo de producción sustentable y eficiente.

Priorizamos la calidad en cada etapa de nuestra cadena productiva, asegurando el abastecimiento de frutos secos en los mercados globales y ofreciendo soluciones completas a nuestros clientes.

Name: ROOTERA
Description:
Türkiye tarım sektöründe profesyonellik, verimlilik ve sürdürülebilirliği ön plana çıkararak akılcı yönetim anlayışını yaygınlaştırmak için yola çıktık. ROOTERA olarak, kendi arazilerimizde üretim yapıyor, sözleşmeli tarım modelleriyle güvenilir ürün tedariki sağlıyor ve yatırımcılar ile üreticilere profesyonel yönetim ve danışmanlık hizmetleri sunuyoruz.

 Üretiyoruz
Kendi bahçelerimizde ve sözleşmeli üreticilerimizle yüksek kaliteli tarımsal ürünler yetiştiriyoruz. Rejeneratif ve sürdürülebilir tarım uygulamalarıyla toprağın verimliliğini artırıyor, kimyasal kullanımını en aza indiren yöntemleri benimsiyoruz.
 Yönetiyoruz
Tarımsal yatırım yapmak isteyen kişi ve kurumlara stratejik danışmanlık, bahçe yönetimi, finansman ve yatırım süreçlerinde rehberlik sağlıyoruz. Arazi seçiminden bahçe kurulumuna, bahçe yönetiminden satış ve pazarlamaya kadar tüm süreçlerde üreticilere ve yatırımcılara destek oluyoruz.
 Eğitiyoruz & Güçlendiriyoruz
Tarım sektöründe bilgi paylaşımını ve profesyonel yönetim anlayışını yaygınlaştırmak amacıyla eğitimler, seminerler ve organizasyonlar düzenliyoruz. Bilgiye dayalı karar alma kültürünü teşvik ediyor, çiftçileri ve yatırımcıları daha bilinçli hale getirmeyi hedefliyoruz.
 Sürdürülebilir Bir Gelecek İçin Çalışıyoruz
İklim değişikliği, toprak erozyonu ve doğal kaynakların tükenmesi gibi küresel sorunlara karşı proaktif çözümler geliştiriyoruz.

Neden ROOTERA?
 Rejeneratif ve sürdürülebilir tarım uygulamalarıyla uzun vadeli verimlilik sağlıyoruz.
 Tarımsal kararları veriye dayalı analiz ve fizibilite çalışmalarıyla destekliyoruz.
 Küresel tarım modellerini analiz ederek, yerel tarımı dünya standartlarına taşıyoruz.
 Deneyimli tarım uzmanları, finans ve yatırım danışmanlarıyla güçlü bir ekip sunuyoruz.

Tarımın Geleceğini Birlikte İnşa Edelim!
ROOTERA ile sürdürülebilir ve verimli tarımın bir parçası olun.

Name: Biohof Ruhlengut
Description:
Die Familie Treis lebt und arbeitet auf einem denkmalgeschützten Bio-Bauernhof Ruhlengut, welcher im schönen Fuldatal in Nordhessen liegt. Mit viel Engagement wirtschaften Tim und Judith nach Bioland-Richtlinien, erzeugen gute Lebensmittel und betreiben aktiv Natur- und Ressourcenschutz.

Der außergewöhnliche Name „Ruhlengut“ findet sich übrigens in der Neumorscher Chronik und bezieht sich auf ein Vorwerk des Klosters Haydau, von dem die Flächen des Hofes ursprünglich stammten.

Derzeit bewirtschaften der Hof 45 ha Ackerfläche und 12 ha Wald. Die Fruchtfolge besteht aus den Gliedern Kleegras (2 Jahre), Weizen oder Kartoffeln, Triticale/Wintererbsen, Ackerbohnen, Gerste und Hafer. Außerdem wird Gemüse für Großküchen wie die Mensen des Studierendenwerkes der Universität Kassel sowie zur Selbsternte angebaut. Auch Zwischenfrüchte sind ein wichtiger Bestandteil der Fruchtfolge des Biohofes Ruhlengut.

Name: Voedselnetwerk Achterhoek
Description:
Het Nederlandse platteland staat onder grote druk. Om onze leefomgeving gezond te houden zijn grote stappen nodig op gebied van stikstofreductie, verduurzaming, natuurinclusief werken. Een hele opgave voor de maatschappij, maar dagelijks voelbaar voor boeren. 

Tien Achterhoekse boeren willen deze opgave anders aanvliegen. In het project ‘Bouwen aan een regionaal voedselnetwerk Achterhoek’ zetten ze de eerste stappen. Ieder op zijn eigen manier, maar allemaal met hetzelfde doel. 

Ze streven naar een nieuw ‘voedsellandschap’ in de Achterhoek, waarin boeren sámen met burgers, consumenten, bedrijven en overheden op weg gaan naar een toekomstbestendige landbouw. In zo’n landschap gaan mensen de samenhang tussen voedsel en hun leefomgeving weer zien en waarderen. En kunnen boeren gezond voedsel produceren en zorg dragen voor het landschap vanuit een financieel gezond bedrijf.

Dit project wordt mogelijk gemaakt door het Europees Landbouwfonds voor Plattelandsontwikkeling: Europa investeert in zijn platteland.

NOSSA HISTÓRIA:



        A Associação Rural de Lajeado foi fundada em 24 de setembro de 1938 no Vale do Taquari, município de Lajeado/RS. O objetivo principal era o associativismo visando o desenvolvimento da agricultura familiar na região, cuja principal característica é o grande número de pequenas propriedades. Na década de 70, com a modernização da agricultura, a Associação Rural cresceu e se desenvolveu, trazendo novas oportunidades aos seus associados no ramo da agricultura e pecuária, bem como uma loja com uma grande diversidade de produtos para o lar e serviços. No ano de 2004, os associados da Associação Rural, fundaram uma cooperativa, a Cooperativa Rural dos Vales, cujo objetivo foi buscar alternativa para a armazenagem da produção de grãos.

    No ano de 2017 viu-se uma oportunidade de melhorar o associativismo, sempre presente nesta entidade. Transformou-se a Associação Rural em cooperativa, a ARLA Cooperativa, incorporando a Cooperativa Rural, formando uma empresa mais solida e robusta que hoje congrega aproximadamente 2.000 cooperados e 170 colaboradores.

Name: LIFE Scrubsnet
Description: Much of Europe’s biodiversity is closely linked to traditional and extensive agricultural practices. Agricultural ecosystems represent 38% of the total area of the Natura 2000 network, most of which has been shaped by extensive farming systems. A very good example of this type of habitat is the Dehesas/Montados (habitats 6310, 9330, 9430), southwest of the Iberian Peninsula (about 4 million hectares in Spain and Portugal), but also present in Italy. Its conservation status has been repeatedly diagnosed as unfavourable, mainly due to the effects of livestock intensification which is manifested in its ageing forests. The intensive management practices have profound consequences on the ecological processes that guarantee long-term habitat persistence, tree regeneration is prevented and soil function is depleted. Furthermore, additional factors are nowadays compromising woodland survival, including dissemination of exotic pathogens, increased drought, etc. Together these threats pose a challenge to the management of these systems that could result in dramatic social, economic, landscape and biodiversity consequences.

Name: MUNTEC  E.I.R.L
Description:
En MUNTEC trabajamos para asegurar uno de los recursos más valiosos del planeta: el agua. Somos una empresa peruana especializada en el diseño, fabricación, instalación y mantenimiento de soluciones hídricas basadas en geosintéticos de última generación, adaptadas a las necesidades de cada cliente.

Nuestra propuesta no es estándar. Creemos en la innovación aplicada: analizamos cada proyecto, diseñamos alternativas personalizadas y acompañamos a nuestros clientes en todo el proceso, desde la asesoría inicial hasta el soporte postventa.

 Productos:

Tanques australianos y geotanques para almacenamiento seguro de agua.

Flexitanques y bandejas antiderrame en HDPE.

Biodigestores tubulares para gestión de residuos.

Toldos industriales y accesorios HDPE.

 Servicios:

Instalación y encapsulado de reservorios con geomembrana HDPE.

Soporte y mantenimiento preventivo y correctivo de sistemas de almacenamiento.

Venta y alquiler de equipos de termofusión.

Soluciones a medida para sectores con requerimientos especiales.

 Clientes principales:

Agroindustria: empresas exportadoras y agricultores que buscan garantizar campañas productivas con agua segura.

Acuicultura: productores pequeños e industriales que requieren altos estándares sanitarios.

Minería y construcción civil: proyectos con exigencias técnicas y ambientales elevadas.

Estado: municipios y gobiernos regionales con programas de seguridad hídrica.

Nuestro factor diferencial es claro: innovación, confiabilidad y personalización. No solo entregamos un producto, construimos relaciones de confianza que impactan en la eficiencia, sostenibilidad y productividad de nuestros clientes.

En MUNTEC estamos convencidos de que una buena gestión hídrica impulsa el desarrollo económico y protege el medioambiente. Por eso, trabajamos cada día para ser más que un proveedor: un socio estratégico en soluciones con geosintéticos.

¿Qué hacemos?
Nos enfocamos en la revegetación de áreas degradadas por la industria petrolera con especies nativas, con la intención de alcanzar una mayor estabilidad en los ecosistemas alterados.
Desarrollamos fórmulas nutricionales para diferentes cultivos y etapas de desarrollo.
Nos dedicamos a la producción de plantines de especies hortícolas, aromáticas, florales y medicinales y al cultivo de especies hortícolas en sistemas hidropónicos (floating y NFT).

Name: Herenboeren De Groote Modderkolk Loenen - Veluwe, Gelderland
Description:
Herenboeren Groote Modderkolk, een coöperatie waarvan de leden uit de regio Loenen, Apeldoorn, Eerbeek, Twello en gemeente Rheden komen. Wij runnen samen een duurzaam kleinschalig gemengd boerenbedrijf met varkens, kippen en koeien, diervoer, fruit en vollegrondsgroenten. Een boer is aangesteld voor de dagelijkse werkzaamheden op het bedrijf.

Waarom? Voedsel is een primaire levensbehoefte en wij willen gezond en lekker eten voor een goede prijs. Wij willen erop kunnen vertrouwen dat ons eten eerlijk is geproduceerd, met respect voor de boer, de dieren en de natuur.

We willen weten waar ons voedsel vandaan komt. Daarom zijn we in het najaar van 2018 met elkaar een eigen Herenboerderij gestart. We vinden het gewoon fantastisch als je eten vlakbij je eigen huis wordt geproduceerd? Wat is er leuker dan op je eigen boerderij je boodschappen gaan doen?

Als je wilt dat dingen moeten veranderen, dan kun je maar beter zelf het initiatief nemen. En dat doen wij. Met groot enthousiasme en in het volste vertrouwen dat het ons gaat lukken; Samen Duurzaam Voedsel Produceren.

*Assistência Técnica Agrícola: Suporte especializado para optimizar o desempenho das culturas e garantir o melhor uso dos recursos disponíveis.

*Montagem de Sistemas de Rega: Projetos personalizados para sistemas de irrigação eficientes e sustentáveis, atendendo às necessidades específicas de cada cultivo.

*Montagem de Estufas: Instalação e manutenção de estufas para cultivo protegido, proporcionando condições ideais para a produção agrícola.

*Avicultura e Assistência Técnica: Consultoria e suporte especializado para o setor avícola, garantindo a saúde e produtividade das aves.

*Consultoria Agrícola: Análise detalhada do ambiente agrícola para oferecer soluções que melhorem a produção e a rentabilidade dos negócios rurais.

*Controle de Pragas: Estratégias integradas e eficazes para o controle de pragas e doenças, protegendo as plantações e garantindo a saúde do solo.

*Jardinagem: Serviços de manutenção e criação de espaços verdes, com projetos de paisagismo e cuidados para transformar e valorizar ambientes.

*Análise de Mercado: Estudo do mercado agrícola para identificar tendências, oportunidades e desafios, ajudando os clientes a tomar decisões informadas.

*Estabelecimento de Campos Agrícolas: Planejamento e implementação de campos agrícolas, desde a escolha das melhores culturas até o desenvolvimento de toda a infraestrutura necessária.

Com uma equipe qualificada e apaixonada pelo setor, buscamos sempre oferecer soluções de alta qualidade e inovação, promovendo o crescimento sustentável e o sucesso de nossos clientes no campo

Name: Agrolyfe
Description:
Access to secured, arable farmland is a major challenge for many smallholder farmers, even for large scale farming enterprises. It is a gap that if plugged, can transform a challenge into massive opportunities in the agro-allied sector.

This reality is of the of the key drivers of the Agrolyfe Initiative. 

AgroLyfe is designed to enable disadvantaged farmers, agricultural professionals and enthusiasts to thrive in farming by providing arable, secure and purpose-built farmlands for the possibility of achieving sustainable food security in Nigeria first; with an extension to the rest of Africa.


It leverages farming and real estate to connect farmers with easy access to arable and secure purpose-built farm lands for rental period of a year with opportunities to renew their land rental duration.


WHY AGROLYFE?

The platform is created on the concept of expanding the opportunities in agriculture for the benefit of interested stakeholders. That is, you can earn from agriculture without being a farmer.

This schemed simply leverages farming and real estate to generate steady rental income for customers through farmland acquisition & rental. It is designed to create earnings for people by leveraging the abundance & value appreciation of land.


Simply put, "Buy Land, Rent Out to Farmers for Farming, and Earn Rental Income every 3 months.”


i. It gives the benefit of earning a stable, steady and secured consistent rental income, every 3 months.


ii. It gives opportunities to interested stakeholders to earn from agriculture, without necessarily farming.

iii. It gives farmers access to large, arable farmlands to scale up their farming activities and overall output.

Radwa Agro is a pioneering agricultural enterprise transforming the landscapes of Saudi Arabia into thriving centers of sustainable food production. Rooted in the heart of Tayma, we are building one of the Kingdom’s most advanced integrated agri-business projects — a self-sufficient farming ecosystem that delivers fresh poultry, eggs, vegetables, and fruits to households and institutions across the nation.

Our mission is to drive food security and agricultural innovation in alignment with Saudi Vision 2030, reducing reliance on imports and contributing to a resilient, locally-driven food supply chain. Through cutting-edge technologies in closed-system poultry housing, intelligent greenhouses, water recycling, and renewable energy, we are redefining what is possible in desert agriculture.

From deep-well water extraction and modern infrastructure to smart energy and sustainable land use, every aspect of Radwa Agro is designed to serve both today’s nutritional needs and tomorrow’s environmental goals.

We are proud to partner with global agricultural leaders, local talent, and visionary thinkers to set new standards in agribusiness across the region.

Radwa Agro — Cultivating a Greener Future for Saudi Arabia.

Name: Companhia de Promoção Agrícola - CPA/CAMPO
The Ocean Ranch
Description:
The Ocean Ranch integrates regenerative aquaculture, agroforestry, and ecological water treatment producing seafood, fishmeal, and forest products with significant social and environmental impact. 

By reforesting land, repurposing for aquaculture and agroforestry, and utilizing native species we create a circular economy recycling ammonia pollution to regenerative products while improving water quality in the waterways and restoring biodiversity. This circular economy creates an integrated agriculture solution that is 80 times more profitable than destructive extensive livestock and mono-crop agriculture common in the region. Personnel who manage operations serve as protectors and stewards of the forest. 

Regenerative fishmeal provides for zero FIFO (fish-in to fish-out) aquaculture production allowing for the continued expansion of the aquaculture industry without additional stress on wild fisheries.

Founded on the principles of circular economy and 0 FIFO, we are the first regenerative aquaculture technology to utilize ecological water treatment and native Amazon species to produce shrimp and fish with positive social and environmental impact. The integration of aquaculture, agroforestry, and ecological water treatment produces significant yields of low-cost and nutritious products at global scale.

Por último, gracias a nuestro centro de clasificación y nuestra flota de transportes, somos capaces de controlar todo el proceso productivo desde que el huevo es puesto en nuestras instalaciones hasta que llega al almacén final, permitiéndonos tener una trazabilidad constante del producto. Contamos con una amplia variedad de producto: huevo campero, suelo, ecológico, codorniz y ovoproductos.
Además, colaboramos con tres bancos de alimentos de la Fundación Padre Ángel y con la ONG Colectivo Azálvaro que se dedica a la alimentación de aves carroñeras.

Name: Agricultura Pecuária e Comércio Palmares
Description:
Há quase três décadas, a Agricultura Palmares começou sua jornada sob a liderança visionária de João Guedes Pereira (in memorian). Hoje, honramos seu legado ao manter nosso compromisso com a excelência e a sustentabilidade no setor agrícola.
Nosso principal foco está no cultivo de cana-de-açúcar, soja e na criação de gado para corte. Essas atividades não apenas nos permitem oferecer produtos de alta qualidade, mas também contribuem para o desenvolvimento econômico e social das regiões onde operamos.
Além disso, temos o orgulho de possuir certificações reconhecidas, incluindo o TOP CANA, BONSUCRO e Elos-Raízen nível 4, que atestam nosso compromisso com práticas sustentáveis em toda a nossa cadeia de produção. Também somos certificados pelo SISBOV, demonstrando nosso comprometimento com a qualidade e a rastreabilidade em nossa produção de gado.
Com sede em Matão e filiais estrategicamente localizadas em Riolândia/SP, Orindiúva/SP, Paulo de Faria/SP e Palestina/SP, estamos comprometidos em atender às demandas do mercado de forma eficiente e sustentável.
Na Agricultura Palmares, unimos tradição e inovação para garantir um futuro próspero para nossa empresa, nossos colaboradores e as comunidades que servimos. Junte-se a nós nessa jornada rumo a um mundo agrícola mais resiliente e responsável!

Name: WP Consultoria Agropecuária

A WP é uma empresa de consultoria e assessoria às atividades agropecuárias com foco no desenvolvimento rural sustentável através do acesso ao crédito rural.

Sabemos que o agronegócio, assim como qualquer empresa requer planejamento, estrutura adequada e excelência operacional. Temos ciência que não é fácil gerir o seu negócio e cuidar de toda a burocracia dentro da atividade rural. Por isso, ter ao seu lado um parceiro de credibilidade, que te auxilie na busca de estratégias afim de alavancar os resultados dentro da atividade com melhor custo-benefício para que o produtor e empresário rural foque no que é mais importante, que é PRODUZIR ALIMENTOS!

Somos credenciados nos principais bancos e instituições financeiras que operam com o crédito rural, sendo eles o Banco do Brasil, Banco do Nordeste, Caixa Econômica Federal, SICOOB, SICREDI, BANESTES.

Name: EMPA
Description:
The European Mollusc Producers Association (E.M.P.A.) brings together national or regional associations and bodies representing mollusc producers within the European Union, through a production of over 500 milions tons and worth 1170 million euros, and more than 50% of the European aquaculture production.  

With members from six European Countries, - Spain, France, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Italy and Ireland - the E.M.P.A.
plays a crucial role in the European shellfish industry, representing 90% of the companies or operators involved in the production and marketing of shellfish in Europe. 

The EMPA is a member of the Aquaculture Advisory Council (AAC) and the Market Advisory Council (MAC).
The Association is currently chaired by Mr Addy Risseeuw from the Netherland Producers Association.

Name: Paicines Ranch
Description: Located in central California's San Benito County, Paicines Ranch is a historic 7,600-acre ranch that works to regenerate ecosystems by growing healthy soil, nutrient-dense food and vibrant, diverse communities. Using the practices of regenerative agriculture, the ranch team manages this diverse landscape in partnership with nature and livestock to produce 100% grass-fed-and-finished lamb and beef, and pastured pork and turkey. They also grow organic forage crops, as well as organic winegrapes in their polyculture vineyard that is designed to be managed by sheep. Over the years, the ranch has become a renowned destination for learning about regenerative agriculture through their practices, programs and educational workshops while also serving as a treasured location for weddings, retreats, and events.

Name: Junges Netzwerk Forst
Description:
Das Junge Netzwerk Forst (JNF) versteht sich als Treffpunkt der Forstnachwuchskräfte in Deutschland und ist die Nachwuchsorganisation des Deutschen Forstvereins e.V.

„Junge Themen“ sollen diskutiert und Impulse gegeben werden. Die nachwachsende Förstergeneration soll vernetzt, zusammengebracht und miteinander bekannt gemacht werden.

Das Netzwerk steht für eine ehrliche und offene Diskussionskultur innerhalb und außerhalb des Forstvereins und ist Plattform für den Zukunftsdialog der Forstbranche. Politisch unabhängig, besitzartenübergreifend und über Landesgrenzen hinweg widmet sich das JNF forstfachlichen, branchentypischen und karriereorientierten Themen.

Mitglieder und Interessierte werden aufgefordert, sich mit Ideen und Tatkraft einzubringen und die Weiterentwicklung durch einen kontinuierlichen, kritischen aber konstruktiven Dialog zu sichern – ganz im Sinne der nachwachsenden Forstgeneration. 

Junges Netzwerk Forst - "Weil der Wald Nachwuchs braucht!"

Name: AYU LEGADO
Description:
Um sonho que sonhamos juntos e que tantas pessoas também sonham, mesmo sem saber. Um sonho que pulsa, guardado no coração de cada ser humano, aguardando o dia em que a humanidade estará totalmente alinhada com esse pulsar.

O sonho de ver certos valores vitais deixarem de ser palavras e ideias e serem colocados em prática. Não apenas por uma organização, mas por muitas. E muitas. E mais. E, um dia, todas. Porque são esses os valores capazes de resultar em uma vida mais sustentável e equilibrada. E que fazem de nós uma verdadeira humanidade. Que vive em paz, harmonia e prosperidade.

Name: AIDA, Asociación Interprofesional para el Desarrollo Agrario
Description:
La Asociación Interprofesional para el Desarrollo Agrario (AIDA) es una asociación sin ánimo de lucro, abierta a todos los profesionales del sector técnico, social y económico agrario. La Asociación no persigue fines lucrativos ni políticos, sino de interés social y técnico en el campo agrario.

La Asociación se creó el 5 de octubre de 1967, aunque no es hasta 1973 cuando adopta el nombre de Asociación Interprofesional para el Desarrollo Agrario. En su origen era la Asociación de Técnicos Diplomados por el Centro de Investigación y Desarrollo Agrario del Ebro (CIDADE). Nace con la finalidad de crear un medio para facilitar la difusión y el intercambio de conocimientos, para dar ayuda profesional entre los asociados, así como contribuir al avance científico y técnico del sector agrario.

En la actualidad se mantienen estos fines, consiguiendo esta difusión a través de la organización periódica de Jornadas, Jornadas sobre Producción Animal los años impares y Jornadas sobre Producción Vegetal los años pares, donde se presentan comunicaciones y los profesionales comparten sus conocimientos e inquietudes.

AIDA edita la revista ITEA-Información Técnica Económica Agraria, que aparece indexada en las bases de datos de revistas científicas más importantes (SCI Expanded, Journal Citation Reports/Science Editions, ICYT, CABI y Scopus) y que en la actualidad se encuentra accesible en open-access.

En la actualidad la Asociación cuenta con unos 300 socios

Name: The Consortium of African Youth in Agriculture and Climate Change (CAYACC)
Description:
The Consortium of African Youth in Agriculture and Climate Change (CAYACC) is a unifying youth network that aims to link young people in the grassroots with policy at the national, regional and continental level. CAYACC envisions a unified and inclusive network of youth in agriculture and climate change, while enabling a more sustainable youth engagement in these sectors.

The formation of CAYACC was inspired by the coming together of three youth organizations, who convened a three-day pre-UN Food Systems Summit dialogue in June 2021. These youth-led organization, were Young Professionals for Agricultural Development (YPARD), Comprehensive Africa Agriculture Development Program Youth Network (CYN), and Africa Youth Initiative on Climate Change (AYICC). CAYACC plays a coordination role among its members and partners, to build consensus on policy issues and co-create interventions that would ensure policy trickles down to the youth in the grassroots levels. CAYACC strives to amplify the voices of African youth and empower them to act for a more sustainable future.

Name: Working Lands for Wildlife
Description:
The Working Lands for Wildlife (WLFW) partnership supports the USDA Natural Resources Conservation Service’s premier approach for conserving America’s working lands to benefit people, wildlife, and rural communities.
The Working Lands for Wildlife model started  in 2010 with a funny, ground-dwelling bird that lives in the West's sprawling sagebrush country.

Today, the successful conservation approach is putting Farm Bill resources to work for wildlife by implementing science-backed conservation that improves agricultural and forest productivity AND enhance wildlife habitat.

Description:

Name: Regenerativt Jordbrug
Description:
Regenerativt jordbrug arbejder for at bringe dansk landbrug i samklang med det økosystem, som mennesker og produktion er en del af.

Vejen dertil indebærer at øge biodiversitet i kulturlandskabet, kulstofbinding, mikroliv i jorden og dyr på græs — Regenerativt Jordbrug.

Vi stræber efter at revolutionere landbruget ved at fremme regenerativt jordbrug i Danmark. Vi arbejder for at:

1) Modvirke klima- og biodiversitetskrisen: Vi udforsker og implementerer regenerative metoder, der bidrager til en bæredygtig fremtid.

2) Støtte Jordbrugere: Vi tilbyder faglig, praktisk og social støtte til regenerative jordbrugere gennem rådgivning, erfa-grupper og uddannelsesmuligheder.

3) Udbrede faglig viden: Vi sikrer, at offentligheden og demokratiet har adgang til nødvendige oplysninger om biologi, agronomi og økonomi for bedre beslutningstagning.

4) Styrke politisk støtte: Vi fremmer politiske initiativer, der understøtter og udvikler mulighederne for regenerativt jordbrug.

5) Dele Forskning og Teknologi: Vi indsamler, udvikler og formidler forskning, litteratur og teknologi inden for regenerativt jordbrug.

Description:

São mais de duas décadas proporcionando uma alimentação mais saudável para os brasileiros, investindo pesadamente na produção sustentável de pintinhos caipiras, que produzem carne de frango ou ovos mais saborosos e nutritivos, possibilitando o acesso do brasileiro a uma alimentação mais natural, tão importante no equilíbrio da saúde, ao mesmo tempo em que gerando riquezas para o Brasil, por meio da ampliação da agricultura familiar e da renda no interior do país.

Name: Domaine de Graux
Description:
Welcome to Domaine de Graux! We are an agro-ecologic farm in Tournai, in the province of Hainaut, Belgium.
 
We grow crops, produce vegetables and raise animals, all while applying agro-ecology principles which means we try to be as nature-friendly as possible.
 
We are working on proving regenerative, organic farming at scale. On proving it creates better soil, more nutritious food, and more resiliency for farmers.
 
Moreover, our purpose is to share knowledge, push the boundaries of research, and inspire and support farmers as they shift from conventional to more sustainable methods.
 
Lastly, we are also a place where people can come and connect with nature and the food system. We welcome private and professional events on our farm, from small and cosy to large and creative. 
 
Follow our page to get updates on what we're excited about!

Name: Nationale Bomenbank B.V.
Description:
Nationale Bomenbank is al meer dan 50 jaar uw betrouwbare uitvoeringspartner voor alles wat met bomen te maken heeft. Wij bieden een compleet dienstenpakket: van verplanting en groeiplaatsverbetering tot boomverzorging, beheersing van de eikenprocessierups, levering, aanplant en nazorg. Onze betrokken boomspecialisten staan garant voor kwaliteit, vakmanschap en een duurzame aanpak. Samen met onze klanten werken we aan een gezond bomenbestand. Zo dragen we actief bij aan onze visie: met bomen bijdragen aan een klimaatadaptieve leefomgeving.

Vanuit onze visie is Nationale Bomenbank ervan overtuigd, dat:
- er een blijvende maatschappelijke waardering voor bomen zal zijn;
de waarde van een boom in een stedelijke omgeving bestaat uit economische, ecologische, esthetische, functionele en psychologische aspecten
- bomen daarom een belangrijke bijdrage leveren aan het welzijn van de mens en voor een leefbaar milieu onmisbaar zijn in de dynamiek van een stedelijke omgeving.

Samen met onze klanten werken aan een gezond bomenbestand. Wij willen ons in de markt onderscheiden door ons vakmanschap, dat is opgebouwd uit meer dan 50 jaar specialisme, onze servicegerichtheid om altijd een passende oplossing te bieden. Onze missie: Bomen laten leven!

Onze kernwaarden

Kwaliteit: als boomspecialist streven wij naar een hoge kwaliteit.

Betrouwbaarheid: betrouwbaarheid is bepalend voor de relatie met onze stakeholders. Wij streven naar een cultuur van integriteit, menselijkheid, wederzijds respect, helderheid en zakelijkheid.

Betrokkenheid: onze betrokkenheid uit zich in het streven naar een optimale samenwerking met onze klanten, medewerkers, leveranciers en andere relaties. Bovendien voelen wij ons met onze omgeving verbonden en willen wij op maatschappelijk verantwoorde wijze ondernemen.

www.nationalebomenbank.nl

Name: Datamars Latam
Description:
Bem-vindo à Datamars!
Somos uma empresa global focada em trazer soluções tecnológicas para manejo pecuário com um legado de mais de 30 anos. Nossa família de marcas atuantes na America Latina inclui ZTags, Tru-Test, Speedrite, Simcro e Terko assim como a nossa divisão de microchip para pets e pequenos animais, Petlink e AnimalId. 
Com base na nossa história como uma empresa de identificação por radiofrequência (RFID) e soluções tecnológicas, reunimos produtos de alta tecnologias comprovadas atraves de longos estudos e testes em campo para colocar informações poderosas nas mãos dos nossos clientes para que possam tomar decisões com base em dados e alcançar um sucesso mensurável hoje e planejar seus objetivos futuros. 
A Datamars ajuda os pecuaristas a serem produtivos de forma mais sustentável utilizando a tecnologia a favor do campo e na sua linha Pet ajuda os donos de animais de estimação a manterem seus pets seguros e comprovadamente identificados. 
Em mundo que está cada vez mais sob pressão para produzir mais, com menos, as nossas soluções ajudam os clientes a fazer o melhor uso dos recursos escassos, como água, ração e terra, para contribuir para uma produção mais sustentável. E, como organização, adotamos uma abordagem ativa para compreender, monitorar e melhorar claramente o impacto que temos nas comunidades e no ambiente.

Name: Nederlandse Fruittelers Organisatie (NFO)
Description: De Nederlandse Fruittelers Organisatie (NFO) is de organisatie van en voor de professionele, Nederlandse fruittelers. De NFO behartigt de belangen van fruitteeltondernemers met als bijzondere aandachtspunten: gewasbescherming, sociaaleconomische kwesties, marktgerelateerde onderwerpen en kennis en innovatie. Daarnaast ondersteunt de organisatie de fruittelers op diverse vlakken zoals het verhogen van de kennis en ondernemerschap. Tevens geeft de NFO tweewekelijks het vakblad Fruitteelt uit en voorziet haar leden wekelijks van diverse nieuwsbrieven. Circa 80 procent van de beroepsmatige fruittelers is aangesloten bij de NFO.

Name: BLUE BI AGROTECH
Description:
Descubra como a inteligência pode revolucionar o agronegócio! Na Blue BI Agritech, acreditamos no poder dos dados para impulsionar a produtividade e a sustentabilidade do setor agrícola. Por meio de soluções personalizadas em Business Intelligence, integramos informações de diferentes fontes, como sensores IoT, sistemas de gestão e dados de mercado, para transformar desafios em oportunidades.

Otimize cada etapa da sua produção! Com nossas plataformas inteligentes, ajudamos produtores, cooperativas e empresas do agronegócio a monitorar suas operações em tempo real, prever tendências de mercado e tomar decisões mais estratégicas. Imagine ter um panorama completo da sua safra, estoques e comercialização ao alcance de um clique — isso é o que entregamos.

Simplifique a gestão de dados agrícolas! Sabemos que, no campo, o tempo é um recurso valioso. Por isso, nossas ferramentas são projetadas para oferecer insights claros e ações práticas, desde o planejamento de safras até a análise de desempenho. Além disso, nossos dashboards intuitivos tornam a gestão de dados acessível para todos, mesmo para quem não é especialista em tecnologia.

Faça parte da transformação digital do agro! Unindo tecnologia, inovação e conhecimento do setor, a Blue BI Agritech é parceira de quem busca aumentar a eficiência, reduzir custos e alcançar novos patamares de competitividade. Já ajudamos diversos clientes a colher resultados impressionantes, e estamos prontos para fazer o mesmo pela sua empresa.

Quer saber como podemos transformar o seu negócio? Entre em contato conosco hoje mesmo e descubra como a Blue BI Agritech pode ser a peça-chave para o sucesso da sua operação no campo. Acesse nosso site ou envie uma mensagem para começar essa jornada de inteligência e inovação!

Name: VK Agro Farm
Description: We VK Agro Farm believe in sharing Agriculture innovations and research findings that can enrich one's knowledge in organic farming the real strength of our beautiful country Bharat. VK Agro Farm exactly trying to serves that purpose of good health better eco system. Sharing modern farming technologies as well as Climate Smart Agricultural Innovations with pure and natural processes. Fell free to share your innovations,ideas, suggestions or from other sources with us.

Name: Re-Genus
Description:
Re-Genus has a range of natural, regenerative fertilisers, growing media and natural crop nutrition which work to bring life back to soils and boost the health and resilience of crops. 

We sell branded products as well as ingredients to other manufacturers who want to add fungi and other natural inputs to their fertilisers and growing media.

By applying Re-Genus products, growers can reduce the carbon emissions in both in fertiliser production and in its use. These products bring nature back to the soil and protect surrounding water courses and ecosystems from synthetic chemicals. 

We work with companies in Agriculture, Forestry and Horticulture. We mainly sell our products in the UK but are actively looking for contract manufacturers, partners and customers globally.

We also manufacture and supply top quality, peat-free and coir-free potting materials, Ellepots, coated seeds, seedlings, mulch using our core ingredients. 

We bring the beneficial microbiome back to soils for healthier, more resilient crops and ecosystems.

Our materials are 99% sourced from within the UK. We up-cycle residues from the food, beverage and forestry industries to create a circular economy.

Name: ReForest
Description:
REFOREST (Agroforestry at the forefront of farming sustainability in multifunctional landscapes in Europe), a Horizon Europe project funded under EU’s Land, ocean and water for climate Action, aims to promote agroforestry as a land use type allowing food production while maintaining ecological sustainability. 
The principles underlying REFOREST are those of innovation, knowledge exchange and creating novel solutions to empower farmers in Europe and associated countries to deliver on multiple objectives: food production, carbon capture, and biodiversity development. 

Bringing together 14 partners from 10 European countries with multidisciplinary expertise, REFOREST has the fundamental aim to use existing knowledge of temperate agroforestry systems to co-create solutions to key barriers that hinder wider adoption of this land use type by farmers in the EU and associated countries. The strategic objective is to enhance agroforestry and the sustainability of food production by internalising the value of carbon and biodiversity in farming business models. The project will use an open science approach to represent the real-world ecological, economic and social potential and limitations of agroforestry within decision-making, verification, and financial support tools.

Name: Agroforestry Partners
Description: Agroforestry Partners provides a turnkey financing solution to enable agroforestry conversion for farmers and landowners, while providing an uncorrelated, attractive nature-based investment opportunity for investors. We aim to fix the carbon cycle and improve climate health one acre at a time.

Name: Koperwiek
Description: Koperwiek is een biologische regeneratieve kwekerij voor agroforestry, voedselbossen en eetbare tuinen. Gekweekt met respect voor natuur vanuit de gezonde bodem.

Name: Cooperativa Agrícola, Ganadera y Forestal "La Aguada" Ltda

Name: agrifoodTEF
Description:
AgrifoodTEF aims at boosting the development of European AI, data and robotics solutions by stimulating the uptake of AI powered solutions in the agri-food sector. 

Built as a European network of physical and digital facilities, AgrifoodTEF will maximise the impact on the agri-food's competitiveness and its main players by providing services that help assess and validate third party AI and Robotics solutions in real-world conditions, aiming to maximise the impact of digitalisation in the agricultural sector.

Name: Biogenic Group

Created in 2000, from the beginning we have focused on developing natural products that can partially or completely replace the use of antibiotics, promoting sustainable agricultural production. With 20 years of experience in the market, we are made up of qualified professionals with extensive experience, knowledge and relationships, and we seek to produce the best results for the success of our clients.

Name: Pluriton

We believe in a healthy future for the generations of today and tomorrow. Every day, we create the foundations of a BRIGHT NEW LIFE.

Description:
A MTB Consultoria é uma empresa de assessoria e consultoria que atua em todo o Brasil desde 2004.
A sólida e ampla qualificação do corpo técnico da empresa lhe confere agilidade no desenvolvimento de soluções eficazes e éticas para várias áreas de atuação, incluindo indústrias, importadores, exportadores e comerciantes de fertilizantes minerais e orgânicos, corretivos, inoculantes, remineralizadores, biofertilizantes, condicionadores de solo e substratos, bem como laboratórios e prestadores de serviço de armazenagem, acondicionamento e geradores de material secundário para o segmento de insumos agrícolas
A empresa tem como diferenciais a agilidade no retorno, o profissionalismo e a competência da equipe na solução rápida de questões burocráticas junto aos órgãos reguladores do país, com a expertise de dar pleno atendimento à legislação sem perda de produtividade ou engessamento das atividades.
Location: Carmo do Rio Claro , Minas Gerais

Name: Nuffield Brasil
Description:
Nuffield is an international, non-profit institution established in the United Kingdom 70 years ago, designed to contribute to the development of the people who drive agribusiness and, consequently, to the advancement of this sector that is vital to society. To fulfill its mission, Nuffield seeks to connect forward-thinking individuals across multiple countries. Its main instrument for keeping this global network active and growing is its practical research program.
Each year (from July to October), a selection process is opened for agribusiness professionals, and the most outstanding candidates become “new Nuffield Scholars.” With financial support from Nuffield partners, these professionals take part in global conferences and travel the world — both in groups and individually — to learn about challenges and best practices in agriculture across different countries, always with the support of more than 1,700 Nuffield Scholars spread across over 15 countries.
The formal program lasts two years, during which each Scholar balances their professional activities with the development of a research project that is relevant to their region or country. They must also publish their insights and conclusions in an open report and present them at events. After completing the program, Scholars remain active in the network, engaging with peers from other countries and supporting new participants.
The purpose is clear: to contribute to the development of a sector that forms the foundation of society. Nuffield understands that achieving this requires leaders — women and men — who are technically prepared and, above all, open-minded and open-hearted.

Name: National Farmers Union (USA)
Description:
National Farmers Union (NFU) works to protect and enhance the economic well-being and quality of life for family farmers, ranchers and rural communities through the principles of education, cooperation, and legislation

We represent farmers and ranchers in all states, with organized divisions in 33 states. We advocate for grassroots policy positions developed by our membership and adopted at our national convention.

We envision a world in which farm families and their communities are respected, valued, and enjoy economic prosperity and social justice.
