Do you have any questions? 
We would like to talk.

Name: Hy-Line South Africa (Pty) Ltd
Description: Global market leader in the development and marketing of egg layer genetic stock. Founded in 1936 by Henry A. Wallace, Hy-Line International was the first poultry breeding company to apply the principles of hybridization to commercial layer breeding. Today, Hy-Line International continues to be a pioneer as the first company with its own in-house molecular genetics team leading the industry in applying DNA-based technology to its breeding and genetics program. Hy-Line produces and sells brown, tint, and white egg stock to more than 120 countries worldwide and is the most extensive selling layer in the American egg industry and around the world. We supply brown and white egg stock to the South African market and neighboring countries.

Name: Agéo Agropecuária
Description: Somos uma empresa tradicional com mais de meio século de experiência em agronegócio. Somos reconhecidos nacionalmente pela criação, desenvolvimento e melhoramento genético da raça Bonivos.  Pensando na expansão e diversificação da nossa empresa, atuamos também com a produção e comercialização de Gramas. Realizamos nosso trabalho com muito amor e dedicação para que todos nossos clientes fiquem ainda mais satisfeitos.

Name: Leverage Fresh Limited
Description:
Leverage Fresh Limited is a forward-thinking agricultural company dedicated to bridging the gap between farm and table by transforming the way fruits and vegetables are grown, harvested, and distributed. 

We combine expertise in farming techniques with a deep commitment to sustainability, social responsibility, and innovation. We believe in fostering a skilled agricultural workforce through comprehensive training programs and promoting sustainable practices that benefit both people and the planet. Leverage Fresh Limited is not just an agricultural company; we are a catalyst for positive change in the food industry.

Name: Red PAC
Description:
El Plan Estratégico de la Política Agraria Común (PAC) de España 2023-2027 (PEPAC) integra bajo un mismo paraguas las políticas agrarias y de desarrollo rural. Por este motivo, la anterior Red Rural Nacional (RRN) ha evolucionado a Red PAC.

Así, la Red PAC, como plataforma dependiente del Ministerio de Agricultura, Pesca y Alimentación, se constituye como el punto de encuentro que conecta a todas las personas y entidades relacionadas con el medio rural y con la actividad agraria, con la finalidad de: 
- Difundir y velar por el cumplimiento de los objetivos del PEPAC
- Sensibilizar a la población sobre la importancia que el medio rural y el sector agrario tienen para nuestro presente y futuro

En este sentido, la Red PAC continúa con los principios de actuación y la metodología de trabajo colaborativo en red de la antigua Red Rural Nacional, pero amplía su ámbito de actuación y se convierte en una red abierta sin membresía. La Red PAC se constituye en base al Reglamento Europeo de Planes Estratégicos (R (UE) 2021/2115). En el ámbito estatal, se define en el PEPAC, así como en su Real Decreto de Gobernanza (RD 1046/2022). 
OBJETIVOS DE LA RED PAC
1. Aumentar la participación de las partes implicadas en la ejecución del Plan Estratégico de la PAC (PEPAC).
2. Acompañar a las administraciones en la ejecución exitosa del PEPAC y en la transición hacia una política basada en el logro de los objetivos.
3. Fomentar la innovación en el sector agroganadero y en el desarrollo rural, apoyar el aprendizaje entre iguales y la trasferencia de conocimientos.
4. Informar sobre la PAC y sus oportunidades de financiación.
5. Favorecer el intercambio de experiencias y la creación de conocimiento.
6. Contribuir al seguimiento y evaluación del PEPAC.
7. Contribuir a la difusión de los resultados del PEPAC.

Name: De BosBoerderij
Description:
We believe that for a resilient food system, nature and agriculture must come together. Therefore we need an agricultural method which fully restores soil and landscapes. Syntropic agriculture is one such method, and is based on a combination of techniques to speed-up ecosystem recovery.

 Syntropic agriculture is more than 'Nature-inclusive' farming and focusses on restoring nature (soil, biodiversity and ecosystems). Humans play a crucial role in this recovery: they plant, prune, weed, pick and harvest. It is a complex agroforestry system based on succession and active management. In such a system, many consumed (annual) crops, such as tomatoes, pumpkins and lettuce, play a role. But perennial crops, shrubs and trees with economic and ecological functions are also important. Plants are planted close to eachother, which ensures a biodiverse, resilient, robust and natural production system.

Syntropic agriculture is very knowledge and labour-intensive and has not yet been commercially tested in the Netherlands. Because syntropic agriculture has so much potential - in terms of ecology, health and social connection - de BosBoerderij (*the Forest Farm* in Dutch) will set up various syntropic farms in the coming years.

We test economic models of different farm designs in practice. We are farmers ourselves and manage the plots. We connect with the existing (international) community of experts, conduct research and train future syntropic farmers. We do this through collaboration and by offering (partly paid) apprenticeships, so that people can really learn syntropic agriculture by working in the field.

We harvest products that have been grown in a nature-restorative way. In this way we offer locally produced sustainable ingredients for small and medium-sized food companies in the Netherlands.

Name: Oregon Agricultural Trust
Description:
OAT is an agricultural land trust that works collaboratively around the state to safeguard Oregon’s farm and ranch lands and the rural communities that depend upon them. We permanently protect agricultural land, help it stay in production, educate our community, and help advocate for farmland preservation.

OAT preserves ag land mainly through donation and purchase of working land easements — voluntary agreements between a land trust and a landowner to remove development rights that interfere with farming and ranching. We also educate farmers, ranchers, attorneys, and the public about why and how to preserve farmland and plan for succession. We work with our peers to increase ag land preservation statewide. And we collaborate on advocacy.

Name: Mamaland
Description: Mamaland is a Mota-Engil Group company that aims to promote ecological regeneration and sustainable development through innovative practices. Focussed on agroforestry, reforestation and ecosystem conservation, Mamaland develops projects in which it works to regenerate the environment, creating a positive impact on local communities.

Name: Sementes São Mateus
Description:
A Sementes São Mateus é uma empresa especializada na produção e comercialização de sementes forrageiras de alta qualidade.

Com sede em Piracanjuba-GO e centros de distribuição estrategicamente localizados, garantimos agilidade na entrega!

Somos associados à Unipasto (Associação para o Fomento à Pesquisa de Melhoramento de Forrageiras) e parceiros da Embrapa, disponibilizando aos nossos clientes as mais novas variedades de sementes forrageiras desenvolvidas com tecnologia de ponta.

Nosso compromisso é levar ao campo inovação, qualidade e confiança, contribuindo para a produtividade e sustentabilidade do agronegócio brasileiro.

Name: Organic Farmers Association
Description:
Organic Farmers Association works to provide a strong and unified national voice for domestic certified organic producers. We strive to build and support a farmer-led national organic farmer movement and national policy platform by: Developing and advocating policies that benefit organic farmers; strengthening and supporting the capacity of organic farmers and farm organizations; supporting collaboration and leadership among state, regional and national organic farmer organizations; and collaborating with other organic organizations

OFA is farmer-led and controlled, making sure that farmers drive the organization’s policy positions and provide an authentic voice for organic farmers in Washington, D.C. OFA envisions a future where organic agriculture is the basis of a viable U.S. food and agricultural policy and production system. 

Since our founding in 2016, OFA has developed a strong policy platform that captures the policy priorities of organic farmers. Our annual grassroots policy development process keeps our policy work current and focused on what farmers need most.

To learn more about our work, please visit: https://organicfarmersassociation.org/policy/

Name: Regenerate Outcomes
Description:

Baseline and measure changes in soil carbon to generate verified carbon credits which you can retain or sell for additional income. 

No cost to join. No cost to leave.

Name: Nutrix | Nutrição & Saúde Animal
Description:
A Nutrix possui 25 anos de expertise no segmento de consultoria especializada para o agronegócio, com foco em nutrição animal.

Nossas soluções de consultoria para produtores e indústrias do setor englobam uma abordagem multidisciplinar, integrando a expertise de nossos técnicos com a colaboração estratégica de laboratórios parceiros, professores e técnicos de reconhecida competência em suas respectivas áreas de atuação.

Our core belief revolves around empowering our partners and clients with the knowledge and skills they need to make informed decisions and adapt to the ever-evolving dynamics of the agricultural market.

Desenvolvemos soluções tecnológicas para o Agronegócio.

Description:

Incrementa la visibilidad de tus productos publicándolos en agroanuncios.pe!

Name: Farmers for Climate Solutions - Fermiers pour la transition climatique
Description: Farmers for Climate Solutions is a national farmer-led coalition that advances pragmatic solutions to support farmers in making the transition to low emissions, high resilience approaches to agriculture.

Name: Royal De Boer barn equipment
Description: Royal de Boer offers a complete solution in barn equipment. By using the expertise we accumulated over the years in developing barn designs en efficient barn layouts, we can make sure both cow and owner feel at home. We don't work alone, but we work as a team, cooperating with the dairy farmer and the Royal de Boer dealer. We are not satisfied until all cows feel at home in their barn.

Name: LOHMANN Deutschland
Description:
LOHMANN Deutschland: Der leistungsstärkste Vermehrungsbetrieb, der Küken und Junghennen der LOHMANN-Rassen an anspruchsvolle Kunden im nord- und ostdeutschen Raum liefert.

Alles fängt bei den Elterntieren an: Mit ihnen werden unter hygienischen Bedingungen Bruteier produziert, aus denen in den angegliederten Brütereien Eintagsküken schlüpfen. Diese werden von uns und ausgewählten Partnerbetrieben zu legereifen Junghennen aufgezogen. Durch die Wahl einer passenden Aufzucht, kombiniert mit dem für Sie besten Impfprogramm, schaffen wir die Basis für Ihren Erfolg.

Wir wollen jeden Tag aufs Neue nachhaltig und partnerschaftlich mit Unternehmern im Legehennen-Sektor zusammenarbeiten. Hiermit soll nicht nur unsere Zukunft, sondern vor allem auch die des Eiermarkts gesichert werden. Dies gewährleisten wir durch moderne Aufzuchtstandorte, eigene tierärztliche Betreuung, lückenlose Rückverfolgbarkeit und zuverlässige Beratung unseres Außendienstes.

Mit verschiedenen Genetiken können unsere Kunden den Markt rentabel und effizient bedienen: Für jeden Markt das richtige Ei.

Name: by Broersen
Description:
Welkom by Broersen! Vanaf 2017 zijn De Kneppeltuin en Broersen Asperges samen verder gegaan onder de naam by Broersen.
Op ons familiebedrijf worden vanaf begin mei tot eind september aardbeien en asperges geteeld en verkocht. Ons bedrijf is gevestigd in Warmenhuizen, vlakbij Alkmaar en Schagen (Noord-Holland). Naast onze eigen geteelde aardbeien en asperges bieden we ook verwante en andere lokale versproducten aan in onze boerderijwinkel. In onze zelfpluktuin kunt u zelf vele soorten kleinfruit en snijbloemen plukken en kunt u genieten van de rust en ruimte.

Wij zien u graag by Broersen! 

Openingstijden 
Ma t/m za: 9.00 – 17.00 uur
Zo:gesloten

De asperges zijn van begin april tot 24 juni verkrijgbaar in de boerderijwinkel.
Heerlijke aardbeien verkopen wij van half april tot eind september.
Buiten de openingstijden om zijn de asperges en aardbeien in de verkoopautomaat verkrijgbaar.


Ruud&Ilse
Ruud & Ilse zijn al meer dan 10 jaar bezig met de teelt en verkoop van aardbeien. Hierbij is Ruud van de teelt en hij is voornamelijk in de kas te vinden. Ilse is het gezicht van de winkel en regelt het personeel.

Sem&Kay
De broers Sem en Kay zijn vanaf 2013 samen begonnen met de teelt van groene asperges. Vanaf 2017 is de teelt van witte asperges erbij gekomen en vanaf 2018 zullen de witte asperges voor het eerst ook in de winkel verkrijgbaar zijn. Sem focust zich op meest innovatieve en duurzame teelt en Kay regelt de afzet naar onder andere de horeca onder de naam Horeca Asperges.

Name: National Grazing Lands Coalition
Description: The NatGLC is dedicated to providing voluntarily ecologically and economically sound management of all grazing lands for their adaptive uses and multiple benefits to the environment and society through science-based technical assistance, research and education.

Name: ANALAC - Colombian National Dairy Farmers Association
Description:
We are the National Dairy Farmers Association  - Analac. Since 1956 we are the union that represents the interests of Colombian milk producers. We take part in discussions and work processes with the government and national instances in which public policies are established and investments for our sector are defined.

Analac is made up of independent milk producers and producer groups represented through local, regional, and national dairy breed associations, cooperatives, and federations. Our board of directors is led by producers who work day by day in the production of milk and know the challenges and opportunities of our sector.

Analac's work

Analac has various responsibilities that have been entrusted by dairy farmers across the country over time. Among them are the following:

1. Facilitate and manage the communication between producers and the government. By doing so, we have been able to work on providing valuable tools and proposals as inputs to define the regulations that apply in our sector, propose and motivate the investment of public resources to move ahead in our national dairy policy, among others.

2. Represent producers in the National Dairy Council, an instance in which the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development is advised in the definition of sectoral public policy and in the creation and adaptation of programs to strengthen our value chain's sustainable development.

3. Participate purposefully and technically in the boards of directors of the National Livestock Fund and the Milk and Meat Price Stabilization Fund.

4. Promote different spaces for the discussion, planning and co-creation of regional and national actions among producers.

5. Connect producers with different offers, programs and opportunities that public and private entities generate for our value chain.

Name: NUESTROSUELO S.A.
Description:
NUESTROSUELO
Investigación & Rentabilidad
Profesionales con más de 20 años de experiencia a nivel nacional e internacional

Somos una empresa que promueve buenas prácticas agropecuarias, impulsando el desarrollo de nuestro país, donde el cuidado, la gestión y recuperación del suelo, son claves para incrementar la productividad y la rentabilidad de la propiedad.
Nos posicionamos del lado del productor mediante un conjunto de herramientas tecnológicas que nos permiten ser precisos y eficientes. 
Ofrecemos Asesoría y tecnología comprobadas, con enfoque en información y gestión para mejorar la sanidad del suelo y la rentabilidad del negocio.

Nuestros Productos
_ Diagnóstico de la propiedad para el manejo, conservación y recuperación de suelos
_ Ambientación con imágenes satelitales para clasificación de ambientes de producción
_ Muestreo georreferenciado de suelos para generación de zonas de manejo de cultivos
_ Interpretación de los resultados analíticos y recomendaciones de fertilización
_ Clasificación morfológica y taxonómica de suelos y su capacidad de uso y manejo
_ Planificación del sistema de producción de granos, pasturas y cultivos de cobertura
_ Análisis económico del sistema de producción agropecuario
_ Servicio de investigación, desarrollo e innovación
_ Plataforma de gestión de datos para optimización del sistema productivo
_ Implementación de buenas prácticas agrícolas con tecnología digital
_ Entrenamiento y transferencia de tecnología con énfasis en el sistema de siembra directa
_ Asesoramiento integral y mensual de acuerdo a la necesidad del productor

Name: CONAFER
Description:
A marca agrofamiliar brasileira
Trazendo tecnologia e inovação aos agricultores e empreendedores familiares rurais.

Name: Jardin Exotics
Description: Somo una empresa comercializadora y exportadora de aguacate hass y gulupa que abastece el mercado internacional y que busca generar bienestar empresarial, social y ambiental por medio de su trabajo.

Name: A&Alpaca
Description:
Azienda agricola "Alberto Baruffato" e connessa Fattoria Didattica A&Alpaca certificata dalla Regione Veneto.

 Siamo specializzati nell'allevamento di Alpaca, il quale avviene secondo un approccio professionale ed elevati standard di benessere animale, in un ambiente che privilegia la sostenibilità e l'alimentazione naturale, promuovendo la qualità della vita degli alpaca e la tutela dell'animale a 360°.

 Come Fattoria Didattica offriamo percorsi educativi per scuole, famiglie, gruppi e appassionati della natura, permettendo di scoprire il mondo degli alpaca da vicino; le nostre attività, che includono visite guidate e laboratori didattici, sono progettate per creare un’esperienza interattiva e formativa, favorendo il contatto diretto con gli alpaca e con la natura; le attività sono completamente personalizzabili, anche per eventi di team building aziendali o attività outdoor con i colleghi. 

 Tutto ruota intorno alla nostra Azienda Agricola, attività che ci permette di coltivare i nostri terreni attraverso pratiche agricole sostenibili e di promuovere la biodiversità, favorendo un equilibrio tra la produzione agricola e la tutela naturale del paesaggio.

Inoltre, A&Alpaca è un punto di riferimento per chi desidera avvicinarsi all’allevamento di alpaca, fornendo consulenza specializzata e promuovendo buone pratiche nel settore al mondo degli allevatori e a tutti coloro che intendono intraprendere questa affascinante attività.

Name: D4AgEcol project
Description: D4AgEcol is a EU-Horizon 2021 project with the strategic objective to provide knowledge for the rapid digital transition of AgroEcology by identifying appro- priate digital tools and technologies, by interacting with scientists, farmers and policy-makers and  by suggesting measures for to the transition to sustainable food and agricultural systems. Grant agreement No. 101060759.

Description: Especializada no sistema de confinamento, a Ribas oferece serviços que resultam na produção de carne de qualidade, com alta eficiência, baixo custo e de forma sustentável. Está em franca expansão, mantendo o foco na inovação e preservando o princípio da ética empresarial.

Name: DanHatch Group
Description:
Welcome to DanHatch Group.

DanHatch Group, owned by the two leading Danish farm supply companies, Danish Agro and DLG, is an international group operating in the poultry. DanHatch has more than 85 years of experience in its main areas of business; the production and sale of hatching eggs and day-old broilers. With hatchery facilities in Denmark, Poland, Finland and France, the group is one of the largest and most efficient hatchery businesses in Europe.

Name: Cooperativa Cordillera Azul
Description: Peruvians Cooperative, from San Martín Bellavista, Peru, produces certified organic (ORG) and Fair Trade (FTO) coffee and cocoa, working with farming families. We conserve and protect the Cordillera Azul forest.

Description: Expo AgriTech - La Feria del Campo 4.0 es la nueva feria tecnológica dedicada a mejorar la competitividad del sector del campo gracias a la innovación, la tecnología y la sostenibilidad. Apunta la fecha, 26 - 28 noviembre 2024.

Description: Samenwerkingsverband van Nederlandse organisaties die de productie en het gebruik van duurzaam geproduceerde palmolie stimuleren.

Description: Wij helpen boeren met het verbeteren en optimaliseren van hun bodemleven - dat is waar het allemaal om draait en dat staat centraal bij ons (en dus niet zozeer welke vorm van landbouw wordt toegepast)

Name: Burgerboerderij Oosterwold
Description: Op deze agro-ecologische boerderij werken we samen aan mooie voedselproducten en biobased bouwmaterialen. Inwoners uit stad en platteland gaan met elkaar in gesprek over hun leefomgeving en het voedselsysteem.

Name: farmshare
Description:
Farmshare is revolutionizing the $200B U.S. meat industry by empowering independent farmers, ranchers, and processors with technology-driven solutions. Our platform decentralizes the supply chain, providing seamless scheduling, processing, and direct-to-market capabilities to level the playing field against industry consolidation.

We’re building the infrastructure for the future of meat—one that prioritizes transparency, efficiency, and profitability for the people who produce our food. By leveraging data and automation, Farmshare helps processors streamline operations, drive revenue, and connect with their producers more effectively.

Our mission is simple: to create a more resilient, independent, and sustainable meat supply chain.

Name: 406 Bovine, Inc.
Description: 406 Bovine is an agricultural technology company providing facial recognition software for livestock.

Name: National Organic Coalition
Description: The National Organic Coalition (NOC) is a national alliance of organizations working to provide a "Washington voice" for farmers, ranchers, environmentalists, consumers and others who care about organic agriculture. NOC advances organic food and agriculture and ensures a united voice for organic integrity, which means strong, enforceable, and continuously improved standards. NOC provides information and educational opportunities about the multiple health, environmental, and economic benefits that organic agriculture provides. The coalition works to assure that policies are fair, equitable, and encourage diversity of participation and access.

Name: Neser Integrated Solutions
Description: Neser integrated solution is providing complete integrated solutions to the farmers from selection of the crop to its harvest. We are  introducing Drones, Data Analytics, IoT, AI and ML, sensor based system to the agriculture industry. From which farmer will get early pest detection, post harvest losses, irrigation facilities, and early weather forecasting from which more than 40% reduction in input cost and around 35% increase in farm productivity and overall 35% increase in profit.

Name: Cerne Florestal - Prestação de Serviços e Locação de Máquinas LTDA
Dizengoff Ghana
Description:
As Ghana was celebrating its independence in 1957, so was Dizengoff Ghana established.
As Dizengoff Ghana, our heritage is deeply entrenched and intertwined to our holding company Balton CP. We are a private limited company, and a subsidiary of Balton CP which is owned by CP Holdings Limited, a British company with an international presence across a number of territories namely the United Kingdom, Central and Western Europe as well as Sub-Saharan Africa.
We pride ourselves in understanding the full spectrum of agribusiness because of our holistic approach to farming through our business divisions – Chemicals and Fertilizers, Seeds, Greenhouse, and Irrigation.
Through decades of partnership with our farmers, we have become a “one-stop shop” for Ghana farmers’ agricultural needs. While playing a significant role in bringing the Ghana agriculture industry to its place as a global leader, we have also remained focused on the needs of horticultural and cereal farmers countrywide.
As pioneers in the Agribusiness sector in Ghana, we are a company of many firsts… the first company to introduce new innovations and new technologies such as Greenhouses and Drip Irrigation; the first company to introduce advanced technology pesticides and fertilizer products to the Agricultural industry.
We operate in all the main areas in Ghana – Accra, Takoradi, Kumasi, Tamale, Volta, and even further north, east, and west.
Our business focus lies in the following main strategic areas:
Agribusiness
• Chemicals
• Fertilizers
• Greenhouses
• Irrigation
• Seeds

Name: AminoLife
Description:
En AminoLife impulsamos a los productores para que alcancen mayores rendimientos de producción de forma sustentable, con formulas de nutrición que se integran a la perfección a todo tipo de riego y alimentación. Estas son formulas 100% orgánicas con un perfil de 20 aminoácidos de un mismo origen. 

En AminoLife estamos acompañado a los productores a dar paso agigantados hacia un mejor futuro. Permitiéndoles mejorar sus ganancias y aportar mas alimento a la población.

Name: Crucian Farms
Description:
whitepaper

Crucian Farms is located in Christiansted, St Croix, US Virgin Islands. A leading example of the fusion between technology and agriculture, this new venture is spearheaded by husband and wife team Luke & Reanne Wu. This family enterprise epitomizes groundbreaking agricultural practices by utilizing disruptive AI & Fintech advancements, with a strong commitment to sustainability and creativity, thereby setting a precedent for the future of farming and hospitality through the adoption of Web3 technologies.

Crucian Farms emphasizes biodynamic and organic farming methods, aligning with its tentative USDA certification for organic farming. Its agricultural operations are diverse, featuring a range of crops such as mangos, avocados, hot peppers, sugar apples and a list of over 30 herbs and spices, all of which highlight the farm's dedication to biodiversity. The farm also runs a comprehensive livestock program that includes chickens, sheep, and cattle, supported by a cast of other animals like cats, dogs, and bees, all of which contributes to a balanced and sustainable farm ecosystem. This is further supported by a selective breeding program designed to enhance animal health and productivity.

Reanne Wu, co-founder of Crucian Farms and a native of the Virgin Islands, brings her experience as a Health and Nutrition Coach. Her extensive international background as an educator in the US, China, Hong Kong & Japan serves to enrich the local community by incorporating global food and hospitality trends with the local farm and restaurant culture. Since becoming an early stage investor in Matic Polygon Labs, on the ETH Ethereum network, her crypto portfolio has since made historical gains of over 11,700%.

One notable aspect of Crucian Farms' innovation is the integration of Solar AI DePin Farm Chef Bots, which represent a significant advancement in farm and kitchen engineering. These bots, powered by solar energy and artificial int...

More @ https://crucianfarms.io

Terra Vadis movement where Impact Leaders are dedicated to pioneering ways for a sustainable land future, a team set to transform the way the world approaches food security for everyone.

Enable Agriculturist - Engage changemakers - Empower next generation

Name: Grupo Los Lazos
Description:
Grupo Los Lazos, es una de las empresas agroindustriales más importantes de Argentina.

Nacido en 1870, este Grupo tiene una rica historia y tradición familiar que sigue creciendo día a día gracias a todos los que forman parte de esta empresa.

Entre las actividades principales del Grupo, se destacan el Agro, la Industria y los Servicios.
Cada una de estas unidades de negocio, realiza diferentes labores que alimentan a todo el Grupo, pero comparten una misma filosofía: la de producir la máxima calidad de productos y servicios.

De esta manera, es que Los Lazos se ubica como una empresa modelo a nivel no solo nacional, sino también mundial.

Name: LIGNEO Coopérative Forestière
Description: La coopérative forestière LIGNEO est un partenaire important de la filière forestière du Nord-Est de la France. Très impliquée dans le territoire, elle engage ses 48 Collaborateurs auprès de ses Associés pour les accompagner dans la gestion durable et la valorisation de leur forêt. Plus de 3 000 propriétaires forestiers associés (75 000 hectares) lui font confiance au quotidien.

Name: DRAAF Bretagne
Description: La Draaf Bretagne est une administration régionale du ministère de l'agriculture et de la souveraineté alimentaire dont le siège est à Rennes.

Name: ThüringenForst AöR
Description:
Unsere Vision ist die Zukunft für Mensch und Wald. Wir fühlen uns dem Ökosystem Wald verbunden und arbeiten mit Waldsicht, damit nachfolgende Generationen die Vielfalt des Ökosystems Wald genießen können. Unsere Mitarbeiter:innen schützen und entwickeln das Ökosystem Wald und sichern seinen Nutzen für die Menschen.

Mit einer nachhaltigen Waldbewirtschaftung und einer aktiven Waldpflege leistet ThüringenForst einen aktiven Beitrag für den Klimaschutz. Gemeinsam entwickeln wir gezielt den Wald und unterstützen damit eine klimastabile Entwicklung der Thüringer Wälder.

Bei uns finden Förster:innen, Forstwirt:innen, Waldspezialist:innen, Forscher:innen und auch Expert:innen aus nicht forstlichen Bereichen Menschen mit unterschiedlichen Qualifikationen eine verantwortungsvolle berufliche Aufgabe im Grünen. Seit 2012 erfüllen wir die an uns gestellten Aufgaben als Anstalt öffentlichen Rechts (AöR). Circa 1.300 Mitarbeiter:innen arbeiten in 24 Forstämter und weiteren Dienststellen von ThüringenForst. Mit dem Forstlichen Forschungs- und Kompetenzzentrum in Gotha verfügen wir über ein eigenes modernes Forschungsinstitut für alle Fragen rund um Wald und Forstwirtschaft.

Name: ARAG DO BRASIL
Description:
Líder mundial de acessórios para pulverização e irrigação.
Oferecemos tecnologia e qualidade em soluções para o agronegócio brasileiro.

Name: MAGMA seaweed
Description:
MAGMA est une startup innovante dédiée à la culture à terre de macroalgues de meilleure qualité dans un environnement contrôlé grâce à des technologies de pointe. MAGMA utilise l'innovation pour produire de manière constante des algues de haute qualité, assurant ainsi un approvisionnement fiable pour les acteurs du marché. Notre mission est de fournir une source durable et régulière de ce superaliment, contribuant à un avenir plus sain et respectueux de l'environnement.

Notre approche repose sur la conviction que les algues marines sont l'une des ressources les plus prometteuses pour répondre aux besoins croissants de la société dans laquelle nous vivons. 

Chez MAGMA, nous sommes fiers de contribuer à l'expansion de l'industrie des algues marines en fournissant une alternative à la récolte en mer. Notre approche durable permet de répondre à la demande croissante en matière de produits à base d'algues tout en protégeant notre précieux écosystème marin.

Nos algues sont destinés au marché de l'alimentation humaine et nutraceutique, et nous collaborons avec des entreprises dans ces secteurs pour fournir des solutions sur mesure répondant à leurs besoins spécifiques. Nous travaillons sans relâche pour optimiser les variétés et les processus de production, assurant ainsi une qualité constante et une valeur nutritive élevée.

Chez MAGMA, nous sommes convaincus que les algues marines ont un rôle essentiel à jouer dans l'alimentation et la santé humaine. Nous nous efforçons de devenir un leader de l'industrie en fournissant des algues de la plus haute qualité, cultivées de manière durable. Rejoignez-nous dans notre mission de contribuer à un avenir plus sain et respectueux de l'environnement grâce à la puissance des algues marines.

Name: RTCV RIF TAOUNATE CHEFCHAOUEN Ventures
Description:
RTCV (RIF TAOUNATE CHEFCHAOUEN Ventures) is a venture that represents a powerful fusion of expertise, vision and dedication of the Legal Cannabis sector in the kingdom as part of the implementation of the provisions of Law No. 13-21 for legal uses of cannabis.

This strategic alignment between 4 major industry operators (CBDRIF Morocco, BIOCANNAT, TALAMBIO and LaboVolta) is a common commitment to excellence and sustainability for a unique Moroccan experience full of opportunities and growth in order to maximize capabilities respective companies and for strengthening cooperation in economic, social and environmental development.

This partnership marks an important milestone in the history of the legal cannabis industry in the Kingdom and will make it possible to play a leading role in the ecosystem of this promising Moroccan industry and to empower stakeholders for future investors.

Name: Colegio Oficial de Ingenieros Agrónomos de Castilla y León y Cantabria
Description:
Los Ingenieros Agrónomos son técnicos superiores formados para realizar un aprovechamiento racional y sostenible de los recursos naturales, vegetales y animales, consumidos por el hombre. 

Uno de los objetivos principales es fomentar la participación de los colegiados en las actividades del COIACLC para un mayor enriquecimiento de los contenidos del mismo. Con ello, se pretende hacer del Colegio el lugar de encuentro de los profesionales, capaz de dar cobertura a las necesidades e inquietudes profesionales del colectivo

Name: Qarlbo Biodiversity
Description: Qarlbo Biodiversity is a wholly owned subsidiary of Qarlbo AB and operates within two segments. Our goal is to sequester carbon, conserve and restore biodiversity by implementing the latest science to future-proof sustainable forestry while providing market returns to our owners.

Description: Vier jonge boeren met in hartje Gelderland (Elst) een gemengd regeneratief landbouwbedrijf: Voedselbos De Laar. Dertien hectare, drie voedselbossen en biologische akkers. We doen het samen met een geweldige groep lokale betrokkenen en een perceelteam van Land van Ons. Sluit je aan!

Name: Noveu Florestal
Description:
Na Noveu Florestal, acreditamos que o sucesso do seu plantio começa com a escolha certa. Somos especialistas em oferecer a você o TOPO DA PERFORMANCE em reflorestamento, fornecendo mudas clonadas com genética comprovada e alta tecnologia.

Nosso Compromisso com a Alta Produtividade: Impulsionados pela ciência e pela inovação, desenvolvemos e cultivamos mudas de eucalipto que são sinônimo de máxima produtividade no campo.

Name: Landwirtschaftskammer Österreich
Description: Wir bieten dir aktuelle Informationen aus den vielfältigen Tätigkeitsbereichen der LKÖ. Folge uns!

Name: CABINET PROAGRO SARL
Description:
Le Cabinet ProAgro est une société béninoise spécialisée dans les études, les consultations en agronomie, la formation et le suivi-évaluation des activités agricoles et connexes. Fondé en 2019, notre cabinet propose des services et prestations de haute qualité, tant au niveau national qu'international.
Nos activités se concentrent principalement sur les domaines suivants :
•	Études hydrobiologiques, environnementales et écotoxicologiques aquatiques, ainsi que l'aménagement des pêcheries.
•	Restauration de la biodiversité et repeuplement des cours d'eau et plans d'eau.
•	Formation et suivi-évaluation dans les secteurs de l'agriculture, de la pêche, de l'aquaculture, de l'élevage et de la foresterie.
•	Renforcement des capacités des acteurs du secteur agricole, sensibilisation, formation et reconversion des jeunes.
Avec une équipe pluridisciplinaire d'experts composée d'ingénieurs et de docteurs spécialisés dans leurs domaines respectifs, nous offrons des solutions innovantes basées sur des données scientifiques et les meilleures pratiques.
Nous avons déjà réalisé avec succès plusieurs prestations et sommes attributaires de marchés importants, parmi lesquels ceux réalisés pour le compte de l'Agence Territoriale de Développement Agricole Ouémé-Atlantique-Littoral-Mono (ATDA-OALM), African Parks (Bénin), l'Agence Nationale de Promotion des Patrimoines et de Développement du Tourisme (ANPT), etc.
Forts de notre expérience, de notre expertise et de notre engagement envers nos clients, nous sommes prêts à relever de nouveaux défis et à contribuer activement au développement durable de l'agriculture.
Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir comment notre équipe d'experts peut contribuer à votre succès.
Restez connectés pour en savoir plus sur nos réalisations et nos projets à venir.

Name: Primal Pastures
Description:
What began with 50 chickens in a Southern California backyard in 2012 has grown into a mission to bring America's cleanest meat to dinner tables across the country. As a physician assistant and father of four, our founder Rob witnessed firsthand how food choices could either heal or harm, inspiring him to create a better way to feed our families. Guided by the simple truth that "you are what you eat, eats," and inspired by regenerative farming pioneers, we set out to offer truly clean meats raised the way nature intended – not just another greenwashed label making empty promises. From our grass-fed and grass-finished cattle to our 100% corn and soy-free chicken, every product reflects our unwavering commitment to nutrient density and ethical farming practices.

Today, Primal Pastures continues to set the gold standard for wholesome, pasture-raised meats, proving that when you respect nature's wisdom and prioritize true quality over quick profits, everyone benefits: the animals, the land, and the families who gather around dinner tables across America.

Name: Shagaya Agri
Description:
Founded in 2024, Shagaya Agri is pioneering large-scale, integrated cattle feedlot operations and agricultural ventures in Nigeria. Through strategic collaboration with the Plateau State Government, we are implementing sustainable practices that support Nigeria's agricultural transformation and position Shagaya Agri as a key driver in the industry.

Our flagship operation in Zakali, Bassa Local Government Area of Plateau State, will be a fully integrated feedlot facility. We are committed to producing high-quality cattle efficiently while managing resources responsibly. Our operations span from cattle backgrounding programs and feed crop cultivation to streamlined feedlot management, positioning Shagaya Agri to deliver top-tier beef products to the Nigerian market.

We’re continuously expanding our infrastructure and technology to accommodate an exponential increase in production over the coming years. We are dedicated to establishing a world-class cattle feedlot management process that will enable us to meet market demands while maintaining the highest standards of quality and sustainability.

With plans to establish dedicated sales and distribution centres, we’re building an efficient, end-to-end supply chain that will support our vision for growth. Shagaya Agri’s aim is to strengthen regional economic growth, enhance food security, and drive private sector investment within Nigeria’s agricultural sector, setting new standards in cattle farming and agribusiness.

Name: Association for Farmers Rights Defense, AFRD

With the help of ACDI-VOCA, American National Farm Bureau and local farmers and farmer organizations were founded AFRD. AFRD mission to help Farmers to create market-oriented, economically viable farmer and agribusiness enterprises.  AFRD demonstrated capability and experience to successfully plan implement, monitor development and agribusiness partnership programs in Rural Areas of Georgia, with close cooperation with local and international organizations. AFRD’s advocacy policy for development farmers and farming movements comprises several components: Holding training courses and educational seminars in different regions of Georgia for Organic Farming, Biodiversity Conservation, Climate Change, Renewable energy projects. Genes Bank for Plants Germplasm collection, Giving juridical consultations to farmers, defending their rights, Drafting Legislation, Lobbying, Rise of public awareness and broaden support, Supporting Rural and Ecotourism in Rural Areas of Georgia. For sharing of high experience develops young farmers and students training and educational programs in EU and US, Support of SME, Rural and Urban Youth Employment. AFRD provides Paid Internships for Georgian Students and Young Farmers in the US and Europe.

Name: NN Hedges
Description:
At NN Hedges, we specialize in the sale of premium hedge plants and cater to businesses across Europe. Our offering encompasses a wide range of hedge species and varieties, thoughtfully selected to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

Our customer-centric approach means that we focus on our clients' requirements, providing flexible solutions for both small and large businesses. At NN Hedges, we believe in transparency and simplicity in our processes. Here's how our ordering and delivery process works:

Order: Customers can place orders with us for hedge plants, with a minimum purchase of a pallet box or pallet spot. This allows businesses to choose the quantities that best suit their needs.

Payment: Once the order is placed, customers can securely and conveniently make payments. We accept various payment methods to make the process as smooth as possible for our clients.

Pick-Up: After successful payment, the customer will receive the pick-up address for our hedge plants. The transportation of the plants to the desired location must be arranged by the customer. This approach provides flexibility and allows our customers to manage logistics according to their preferences.

At NN Hedges, quality is our top priority. We guarantee that our hedge plants are of the highest standard, carefully cultivated and healthy. Our expertise in the horticultural sector enables us to offer advice and support, helping clients select the right hedge plants for their specific projects.

Contact us today for top-quality hedge plants and reliable service in the European horticulture industry. We are here to support your green projects and provide high-quality hedge solutions.

Name: SICampo, Salón Internacional del Campo
Description:
Impulsado por Alianza Rural, el Salón Internacional del Campo, SICampo , tiene lugar en mayo el Hipódromo de la Zarzuela, Madrid.
Además, en el marco de SICampo se celebra el CONGRESO AGROFORUM SICAMPO (mayo, en IESE Business School), con dos jornadas: 'Agua, un recurso renovable' y 'Campo y medio ambiente'.

Somos la convocatoria más representativa a nivel nacional e internacional: 
-Un encuentro de todos los actores del mundo rural, que fortalece vínculos comerciales, explora nuevas oportunidades de mercado e impulsa crecimiento, conocimiento, innovación y transformación positiva del sector rural.
-Un congreso profesional con presencia de expertos de primer nivel que generan diálogo y compromiso en retos como la gestión del agua y del medio ambiente.
-Un espacio que reúne a agricultores y ganaderos, instituciones y empresas, técnicos y profesionales, y conjuga experiencias que permitan a la sociedad una aproximación al campo, es decir, a su despensa y a sus raíces.
OBJETIVOS
1.- Convocar al sector del campo en un evento profesional, socio-educativo y lúdico, que permita dar visibilidad y fomentar el diálogo con las administraciones públicas e instituciones vinculadas al sector, poniendo el foco en los retos del campo.
2.- Establecer una nueva relación entre lo urbano y lo rural fomentando la creación de condiciones que frenen la despoblación, afiancen una economía sostenible y garanticen el acceso a la tecnología en el ámbito rural.
3.- Proporcionar una plataforma para abordar los desafíos del mundo agroempresarial y brindar oportunidades para establecer contactos con líderes del sector.
4.- Promover la conexión entre la naturaleza y la juventud y acercar la vida del medio rural disfrutando de un día de campo ambientado con gastronomía y conciertos.
5.- Promover el emprendimiento y la innovación, el desarrollo del talento, la formación profesional y la empleabilidad en medio rural.

Our guides will take you out on a hunt of a lifetime. Guides can handle up to 3 hunters at one time on stand. Our guides will also film your hunt so you can share it with your friends. 

Hunters may use all weapons and will hunt from a variety of stands. We offer fully enclosed non elevated and elevated box blinds with heaters that can accommodate firearm or archers, as well as wheelchair handicapped. Other stands include ground blinds and ladder stands.

Guests will have a variety of meals prepared each day of the hunt. Guests will also have their own rooms to stay in at our lodge.

Description:
What is WWOOF?

WWOOF was founded in 1971 and is one of the world’s first educational and cultural exchange programs. Today, WWOOF is in more than 132 countries around the world (and growing).

Name: Manejo de Suelo Regenerativo
Description:
En Manejo de Suelo Regenerativo impulsamos una agricultura más eficiente y sostenible mediante el diagnóstico avanzado y la gestión integrada de la salud del suelo. Nos especializamos en la evaluación integral de la salud del suelo mediante un enfoque técnico y regenerativo, integrando análisis físicos, químicos, biológicos y satelitales para mejorar la productividad agrícola de forma sostenible.

Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinario con más de 15 años de experiencia en geoestadística, manejo de suelos, espectrometría y economía de recursos naturales, lo que nos permite generar diagnósticos precisos y recomendaciones diferenciadas a nivel de cuartel.

Desarrollamos e implementamos servicios avanzados como:

 SoilSense: Diagnóstico sitio-específico del suelo para decisiones más eficientes en fertilización, bioestimulación y enmiendas.

 SkySense: Monitoreo satelital para evaluar vigor, estrés hídrico y respuesta a tratamientos agrícolas.

 FruitSense: Mapeo y análisis de fruta para anticipar rendimientos y mejorar la calidad del producto.

 RootSense: Evaluación de raíces mediante reconocimiento de imágenes para medir desarrollo radicular.

 LabSense: Diagnóstico de salud del suelo con indicadores físicos y biológicos como masa microbiana, estabilidad de agregados y respiración basal.

Nuestro propósito es claro: regenerar el suelo, optimizar los recursos y contribuir a una agricultura más resiliente, productiva y saludable. Porque todo comienza en el suelo.

Nuestra metodología se basa en identificar y habilitar áreas disponibles, con un fuerte trabajo con comunidades locales, que luego se adaptan a estrategias de restauración específicas según los objetivos del proyecto. Name: Meilleur Plantations
Description:
Meilleur Plantations (MS INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED) is an leading agarwood plantation company . We are also a member of MSME, GST, DGFT, FSSAI & APEDA. Agarwood, also known as oud, is a highly prized fragrant wood that is used in perfumes, incense, and traditional medicines. It is known for its distinctive and intense aroma and is sourced from a variety of evergreen trees.
Meilleur Plantations is focused on the cultivation and production of agarwood and is committed to sustainable and ethical practices. The company aims to provide high-quality agarwood to the global market while preserving the natural resources and ecosystem of the regions in which it operates.
With its experienced team and innovative techniques, Meilleur Plantations is well positioned to meet the growing demand for agarwood and contribute to the development of the industry in India. By combining traditional knowledge with modern technology, the company strives to deliver the finest agarwood products to customers while promoting sustainable and responsible agriculture practices.

Name: SOLU'NATURE
Description:
Solu’Nature est une entreprise française spécialisée dans le développement et la mise en marché de solutions naturelles, alternatives aux traitements antibiotiques, pesticides et engrais issus de synthèse chimique.

Les domaines d’application sont :
-	Prevention, bien-être et santé des animaux
Solutions alternatives pour soutenir les systèmes immunitaire, digestive, respiratoire, reproducteur, cutané… via une approche cohérente et globale pour faire en sorte que les traitements antibiotiques et chimiques deviennent le dernier recours
o	Ruminants
o	Equins
o	Volailles
o	Canins 
o	Apiculture

-	Protection des végétaux 
Solutions alternatives pour protéger les plantes des ravageurs et maladies fongiques et faire en sorte que les traitements aux pesticides (herbicides, fongicides, insecticides) deviennent le dernier recours
o	Arboriculture
o	Jardinage
o	Maraichage

-	Fertilisation des sols
Solutions pour neutraliser l’acidité du sol, permettre une meilleure biodégradation de la matière organique, une meilleure valorisation des éléments fertilisants et une diminution de l’utilisation des engrais de synthèse
o	Jardinage
o	Maraichage

Solu’Nature développe ses produits en respectant l'approche globale "One-Health" ("une seule santé") et utilise en priorité des matières premières et ingrédients d’origine naturelle (végétale ou minérale) et les microorganismes. Les ingrédients sont sélectionnés en fonction de leur efficacité et sécurité afin de respecter l’environnement et les êtres vivants. 
Solu’Nature s’engage à collaborer avec les fournisseurs et fabricants français pour agir sur l’économie locale, garantir la qualité de produits et le respect des normes sociales et réduire l’impact environnemental. Solu’Nature s’investit dans des projets pour la protection des abeilles (le parcours « vitalité de l’abeille) et la recherche des pathogènes de l’abeille avec la mise en place de tests de diagnostic PCR. 
Solu’Nature s'engage pour un monde plus durable.

To achieve this goal, we are developing a product designed to encase tree seedlings like a protective plate. This design not only efficiently manages hydration by containing water but also shields the seedlings from potential harm by animals. 

Are you seeking an opportunity to apply your expertise in product design or 3D printing? Leaf.it is actively seeking individuals like you to join our mission. Reach out to us and be a part of the solution!

Name: Shambhala Orchard & Agro
Description:
At Shambhala Orchard and Agro, we believe that true farming is rooted in nature, nurtured by tradition, and driven by innovation.

Founded on ancient wisdom and modern health consciousness. Inspired by the Shambhala Kingdom's ideologies—a mythical realm in Tibetan Buddhism symbolizing harmony with nature and ethical values—we are committed to sustainable farming.

Our founder's experience in the life sciences industry, particularly in cell and gene therapy, revealed how food quality directly impacts human health. Studies by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the International Agency for Research on Cancer (IARC) have linked pesticides and chemicals in industrial farming to health risks, including cancer and reproductive issues. This realization led us to adopt organic farming practices focused on health and wellness while avoiding harmful chemicals.

At Shambhala Orchard and Agro, we revive ancient techniques from the "Vrikshayurveda" (The Science of Plants), which emphasize soil health, natural pest control, and organic inputs. By implementing these traditional practices, we produce nutrient-rich crops that benefit both people and the environment.

We cultivate a diverse range of fruits, including figs, mangoes, table grapes, and exotic varieties. Using 100% organic methods like Vermicompost, Trichoderma, Neem cake and natural fertilizers, we nurture the soil for healthy plant growth. Our agroforestry approach integrates trees of non-invasive species, generating biomass while enhancing soil fertility and biodiversity—reflecting principles in "Agroforestry for Sustainable Agriculture".

This data-driven approach optimizes planting, irrigation, and other activities, reducing risks and ensuring sustainable yields. We are also registering for Nature-Based Solutions (NBS) carbon credits, reinforcing our commitment to environmental sustainability.

Name: Arrenda Facil
Description:
Arrendamento rural fácil e confiável!

Name: Boeren in het Bos
Description:
Boeren in het Bos is een Opleidingscentrum en Demonstratiebedrijf voor Regeneratieve Landbouw. 

Onze opleiding, workshops en cursussen hebben als uitgangspunt natuurlijke landbouw en gaan over de praktijk van permacultuur op een agrarisch bedrijf, agroforestry, natuurlijk vee houden, waaronder kippen, varkens, runderen en schapen, no-dig groenteteelt en ondernemerschap op een natuurinclusief landbouwbedrijf.

Boeren in het Bos wordt geleid door Richard en Mariska, echte bosboeren in hart en nieren. Samen met een mooi team medewerkers en vrijwilligers beheren ze landgoed Boschhoeve in Nijeberkoop. Hier komen natuurbeheer, landbouw en vee op een holistische manier samen. Naast de opleidingen en cursussen is er bij Boeren in het Bos ook een permacultuur zelfoogsttuin, een webshop en een boerderijwinkel met o.a. gezond natuurvlees van eigen dieren en producten uit eigen tuin.

Name: Agroforum Congreso
Description:
Impulsado por Alianza Rural, el Congreso Agroforum se organiza bajo el marco del Salón Internacional del Campo, SICampo, en el IESE Business School, de Madrid.
Agroforum es un congreso profesional que cuenta con la presencia de expertos de primer nivel que generan diálogo y compromiso en retos como la gestión del agua y del medio ambiente.
Un congreso que no sólo inicia jornadas de discusión, sino que también simboliza el firme compromiso de la ciudad con las iniciativas de desarrollo sostenible y responsable.

Name: RechtsAcker
Description: Willkommen auf dem Rechtsacker! Fünf  Agrarjuristinnen bringen Recht und Landnutzung in den Dialog und beleuchten aktuelle und spannende Themen im Agrar‒ und Umweltrecht.

Name: Vereniging voor de bevordering van het welzijn van landbouwhuisdieren vzw
Description:
Dierenwelzijn is vandaag maatschappelijk belangrijker dan ooit.
Het dierenwelzijnskeurmerk “Beter voor dieren” wil de consument
meer inzicht geven in het dierenwelzijn doorheen de volledige keten
(boerderij, transport, slachthuis) en hem/haar helpen bij het maken
van onderbouwde keuzes in de winkel, net zoals hij/zij rekening kan
houden met de ecologische voetafdruk (Eco-Score) en de
voedingswaarde (Nutri-Score) van een voedingsproduct. De “Beter
voor dieren”-Score (1 tot 3 plusjes) is een maat voor de extra
inspanning die doorheen de volledige keten geleverd werd om een
hogere mate van dierwelzijn te creëren voor het dier dan wettelijk
vereist.
Het “Beter voor dieren”-keurmerk werd opgericht door de vzw
“Vereniging voor de Bevordering van het Welzijn van
Landbouwhuisdieren” en biedt een antwoord op de vraag van
Vlaams minister Ben Weyts, bevoegd voor dierenwelzijn, om een
systeem uit te bouwen om het dierwelzijn in de voedselketen in
Vlaanderen te verbeteren en te monitoren. De vzw schrijft daartoe
lastenboeken uit voor veehouders, transporteurs en slachthuizen, en
werkt een solide controlesysteem uit om de naleving ervan na te
gaan.
De lastenboeken houden rekening met de adviezen van een
onafhankelijk samengesteld wetenschappelijk adviescomité en
worden afgetoetst bij een maatschappelijk adviescomité en een
sectoradviescomité.
In een eerst fase wordt werk gemaakt van een lastenboek voor de
varkenssector (2024). Daarna volgen lastenboeken voor de
pluimveesector (2025) en de rundveesector (2026).

Name: KGZS - Zavod Murska Sobota
Description: KGZS Zavod murska Sobota is one of the eight regional institutions that make up the Chamber of Agriculture and Forestry of Slovenia. KGZS Murska Sobota aims to preserve the population of the countryside, professionally advise and educate users in agricultural activities, while at the same time supplying them with the highest quality genetic material for animal husbandry. Furnished with its knowledge, experience and expertise, visionises to become a central professional, advisory and educational institution for agriculture and rural development in the region.

Name: Agroforestry Netwerk Limburg
Description:

Rombouts Agroecologie, Heijerhof, Forestry Service Group, Benjamin van Leeuwen, Schmitz Agroforestry in samenwerking met de LLTB.

Boeren die (mogelijk) belangstelling hebben om met agroforestry aan de slag te gaan en/of die zich willen aansluiten bij het netwerk kunnen zich melden via petra@schmitz-agroforestry.nl of bellen naar 06-30291611.

Description: We provide ranchers and farmers with a profitable path toward, and proof of, land stewardship. We’re in the business of helping you maximizing the profitability and health of your land. You need data about your land that is scientific, impactful, and easy to use. We can help.

Name: Bwa Lontan Syntropie
Description:
Notre approche basée sur l’agriculture syntropique d’Ernst Götsch vous guide vers la création d’agroécosystèmes hautement diversifiés, transformant votre terre en un environnement productif, résilient et riche en biodiversité.

Notre mission :

- Former et accompagner agriculteurs, collectivités, associations et porteurs de projets à une transition agroécologique et agroforestière basés sur les processus de succession naturelle.

- Concevoir des systèmes agroforestiers diversifiés adaptés aux réalités tropicales insulaires mêlant gestion de l'eau, préservation de la biodiversité, et production alimentaire saine.

- Alimenter le changement de paradigme pour démontrer qu'une agriculture nourricière, nutritive et abondante est possible, et qu'elle peut devenir la norme.

Name: Laboratorio de Análisis de Suelos, Plantas, Aguas y Fertilizantes - LASPAF - UNALM
Description:
El Laboratorio de Análisis de Suelos, Plantas, Aguas y Fertilizantes, es una Unidad de Investigación y Servicios del Departamento de Suelos de la Facultad de Agronomía de la Universidad Nacional Agraria La Molina. Fue fundado en 1958, con la finalidad de realizar análisis físico - químicos de suelos, químico de aguas, niveles nutricionales en plantas y riqueza de fertilizantes. 

El Laboratorio cuenta con personal técnico experimentado y altamente capacitado, además con la infraestructura adecuada, equipos e instrumentación, y metodología analítica que le permite realizar los análisis físicos y químicos de suelos, químicos totales de plantas, aguas, materias orgánicas y fertilizantes bajo normas de control de calidad internacional, y con equipos de última generación, garantizando rapidez, confiabilidad y eficiencia en los resultados de las} determinaciones realizadas. Analítica que le permite realizar los análisis físicos y químicos de suelos, químicos totales de plantas, aguas, materias orgánicas y fertilizantes bajo normas de control de calidad internacional, y con equipos de última generación, garantizando rapidez, confiabilidad y eficiencia en los resultados de las determinaciones realizadas.

Name: Confederação Nacional da Agricultura
Description:
A CNA define-se como a “expressão organizada, predominantemente, dos agricultores e agricultoras das explorações agrícolas familiares”. Entre outros princípios, assume “as preocupações actuais sobre a construção de uma agricultura que responda às exigências de qualidade dos produtos, de defesa do meio ambiente, do mundo rural, da saúde, do trabalho e que promova a melhoria dos rendimentos e da qualidade de vida dos agricultores portugueses”.
A CNA é fundamentalmente constituída por Associações de
Agricultores, embora também enquadre outras Associações voltadas para o âmbito mais abrangente do desenvolvimento rural.
A nível europeu, a CNA está filiada na Coordenadora Europeia Via Campesina - CEVC, que congrega Organizações de diversos países da Comunidade Europeia. Por sua vez, a CEVC pertence à Via Campesina, movimento agrícola que se estrutura à escala global.

Name: CRA (Confederaciones Rurales Argentinas)
Description:
CRA representa, dentro del panorama gremial del campo argentino, la presencia de una organización federal de profunda raigambre democrática, en la que encuentran su más cabal expresión todas las voces de la producción en su diversidad geográfica como en sus distintas variantes productivas.

Fundada en 1943, ha crecido hasta contar en la actualidad con 16 confederaciones y federaciones, integradas a su vez por más de 300 sociedades rurales de todo el país. En total, están representados a través de la acción de CRA poco más de 109.000 productores agropecuarios.

Tanto productores pequeños, medianos o grandes son recibidos y bienvenidos en CRA, como un reflejo fiel de su espíritu federalista que inspiró su creación.

A través de sus más de 70 años de vida acreditó sobradamente su conducta gremial, fortalecida en la defensa irrestricta de los intereses del productor y de las empresas rurales y con ese férreo estandarte se ha guiado.

Confederaciones Rurales Argentinas es:

Una Asociación civil gremial su objetivo central es la defensa del productor agropecuario y sus intereses.
Federativa de tercer grado. Más de 300 rurales de todo el país dan sustento a 16 confederaciones y federaciones rurales, el pilar de CRA.
Una entidad sin fines de lucro y su cuadro directivo no recibe honorarios por su labor.
Una entidad gremial que propende al fomento y desarrollo de las actividades agropecuarias.
Una entidad que coordina la acción de todas las entidades que agrupa y se integra con asociaciones de similares características.

Name: Evdron
Description: At EVDRON, we are passionate about giving wings to rural economies. With a presence across Jamaica, Sri Lanka, India, and the UK - we are a fast-growing start-up specializing in drone-based Digital Agronomy & Precision Farming Services (Field Mapping, Crop Health Monitoring, and Precision Spraying/Spreading of Fertilisers & Crop Protection Products) to farmers.

Name: Natur-Al-Carnes - Agrupamento de Produtores Pecuários do Norte Alentejo, SA
Description:
A Natur-Al-Carnes, SA dedica-se à comercialização de bovinos e ovinos tanto vivos como abatidos, exclusivamente oriundos de explorações em regime extensivo, em modos de produção BIO e PRODI, com total respeito pela sustentabilidade dos ecossistemas e do bem estar animal.

Face à riqueza desta região do Alentejo em produtos de características inigualáveis, esta empresa dedicou-se à comercialização e exportação de bovinos e ovinos, bem como à realização de leilões de gado e comércio para os grandes grupos. 

No mercado desde 1993, a Natur-al-Carnes, S.A. é uma empresa sólida, ao lado da Produção Nacional, acompanhando a evolução dos mercados, Gestora de diversas Denominações de Origem Protegida e Indicações Geográficas Protegidas, como o Borrego do Nordeste Alentejano-IGP, o Queijo de Nisa-DOP e Queijo Mestiço de Tolosa-IGP, entre outros.

Name: Eldorado Terra

Com décadas de experiência no setor, nossa equipe não apenas assessorou operações em múltiplos segmentos do agronegócio, como investiu, desenvolveu, operou e desinvestiu com sucesso diferentes ativos relevantes do setor. 
Sem perder nossas raízes, nos orgulhamos do nosso histórico de sucesso em operações com investidores internacionais e locais.
O envolvimento direto dos sócios em todos os aspectos de cada operação é reflexo de nossa responsabilidade e comprometimento em extrair o máximo de valor para o cliente. Para isso, conduzimos todo o processo de forma independente, com foco, dinamismo e transparência, o que nos permite assessorar nossos clientes para capturarem as melhores oportunidades.

Name: Sustainable Spraying and Consultancy
Description:

o	Fornecer e assegurar que os produtores estejam a usar produtos ou sementes de qualidades, adaptadas as condições locais com vista a se ter os resultados esperados.

Name: GOD in Gardening
Description:
Welcome to GOD in Gardening, a newsletter dedicated to exploring the intersection of faith, gardening, and urban agriculture. Through inspiring stories, practical tips, and biblical insights, we aim to empower individuals and communities to cultivate a deeper connection with God through the act of gardening.

Whether you're a seasoned gardener or a curious beginner, we invite you to join us on this journey of spiritual growth and hands-on learning. Together, we'll discover how gardening can be a transformative practice that nourishes our souls, strengthens our communities, and reflects God's love and abundance.

In each newsletter, you'll find:

Uplifting stories: Hear from individuals and communities who are using gardening to connect with their faith, cultivate hope, and foster positive change.

Practical gardening tips: Receive easy-to-follow gardening advice tailored to urban settings, covering topics like soil preparation, container gardening, pest control, and harvesting techniques.

Biblical insights: Delve into the rich tapestry of biblical teachings related to gardening, exploring themes like stewardship, growth, and abundance.

Engaging interviews: Learn from experts, practitioners, and community leaders who are shaping the landscape of urban agriculture and Christian gardening initiatives.

We believe that gardening is an invitation to nurture not only our plants but also our spirits. As we tend to our gardens, we simultaneously cultivate a deeper connection with God, fostering a sense of purpose, peace, and joy.

Join us on this enriching journey as we explore the beauty and bounty of GOD in Gardening.

Subscribe today and start cultivating a garden of faith and flourishing in your own life.

Name: 5th World Congress on Agroforestry
Description:
On July 17th-20th, 2022, in Québec City, Canada, as well as in virtual mode, will be held the 5th World Congress on Agroforestry: Transitioning to a Viable World. This congress, organized by the Université Laval, in partnership with the International Union for Agroforestry (IUAF) and the International Centre for Research in Agroforestry (ICRAF), will be an opportunity to stimulate an open and inclusive dialogue between various stakeholders from around the world including farmers, researchers, advisors, policy makers, and representatives from the government, the civil society and the private sector.

Considering agroforestry participates in enhancing soil health, protecting water quality, increasing biodiversity, mitigating and adapting to climate change, and providing food security, health and revenues, it is an essential component of the needed ecological, energetic, social and economic transition. This critical transition can and must be achieved through a participatory collaboration process that helps building bridges between research, policy decisions and field work.

The 5th World Congress on Agroforestry will help creating or strengthening those connections by promoting knowledge sharing for a transition to a unified and healthy world.

Name: Africa Climate Resilience
Description:
Reach net zero by engaging in pre-emptive climate action by funneling climate finance to frontline rural development projects in the Global South and particularly Sub-Saharan Africa, disproportionately impacted by climate change. 

They face historic and current inequities, and most acute impacts of climate change, and have limited resources and/or capacity to adapt. These groups are often communities of color, Indigenous, low-income, or those whose lives and livelihoods depend on climate-sensitive natural resources.

Many forward thinking organizations in Africa are achieving incredible results with limited means: our goal is to increase investment towards these grassroots projects and scale their progress. These organizations live in silos and are often unaware of funding sources targeting them. 

Billions of dollars are invested in aid every year, but a significant percentage of the funds are spent on costly overheads and not always fully optimized. It is time funds are optimized and better channeled into direct rural development activities.

Goals of Africa Climate Resilience & Adaptation

1) Support front line communities, workers and projects that advance nature-based community climate resilience activities

2) Increase funding towards water and reforestation projects in Sub-Saharan Africa arid zones

3) Enhance the technical, logistical and economic capacity of frontline development workers, communities and organizations in their climate resilience and adaptation work

4) Establish connections, relationships, and mutual learning between grassroots organizations, communities and global communities.

5) Scale up local solutions and lessons learned to global decision makers at various levels of government, private sector and other resourcing entities

6) Scale local solutions out to similar communities facing similar challenges for duplication 

7) Support frontline-community initiatives and projects to advance community-based climate resilience.

Name: North Carolina Urban Forest Council
Description:
The North Carolina Urban Forest Council is a nonprofit organization that consists of individuals, citizen groups, nonprofit organizations, businesses, and agencies from around the state.  All members share an interest in community and urban forestry and are dedicated to protecting trees where we live, work, and play.  Collectively, we pursue urban forest protection in three ways.

First, NCUFC organizes educational programs for arborists, landscape contractors, and landscape planners/architects.  These continuing education and training events help all members of the tree care industry stay informed of the latest developments in arboriculture and maintain their licensing credentials.  We also partner with local colleges and the tree care industry to promote careers in arboriculture among North Carolina youth.

Second, the Council helps local tree advocacy groups achieve their unique goals for urban forest management.  We provide these groups with a forum for networking and discussion and offer tree planting grants through our annual Legacy Tree Fund.  

Lastly, NCUFC promotes the socio-economic and ecological values of trees in our urban and rural communities.  We educate elected officials and decision-makers about critical issues affecting the health of trees in North Carolina’s communities.

Financial support for NCUFC originates from member donations and our annual partners:  Arborguard Tree Specialists, Bartlett Tree Experts, North Carolina Forest Service, Duke Energy, Leaf & Limb, and Davey Resource Group.

Name: Vilamas Ranch
Description:
Vilamas Ranch is a family-farm Venture located in Sakon Nakhon province, in southeast of Thailand, that prioritizes a natural farming approach with a strong focus on sustainability and community engagement. A distinctive feature of the ranch is Vilamas Indigo, an area dedicated to cultivating indigo plants for natural dye production. The entire operation is powered by solar energy, reflecting a commitment to self-sufficiency.

Activities and Offerings
Vilamas Ranch provides immersive experiences for visitors interested in sustainable agriculture, including:

Farm Experiences: Opportunities for guests to engage in hands-on farming activities.
Harvesting and Collecting: Participation in gathering seasonal fruits and vegetables, highlighting sustainable practices.
Outdoor Cooking: Cooking meals using fresh, farm-sourced ingredients, promoting the farm-to-table concept.
Fishing and Hunting: Engaging in food sourcing directly from the farm, fostering a deeper appreciation of nature.
Farm Events: Organized community-focused events aimed at educating guests on sustainable farming.
The ranch also cultivates rice, seasonal fruits, and raises water buffaloes, pigs, chickens, dugs, while emphasizing the cultural heritage of the region through the art of indigo dyeing.

Goals and Philosophy
The core philosophy of Vilamas Ranch revolves around back-to-nature principles that seek to preserve traditional farming techniques and enhance the connection between people and the land. The use of solar energy not only supports local biodiversity but also contributes to community awareness of sustainable practices.

Visitors enjoy a truly "farm fresh" experience, leaving with a greater appreciation for food and lasting memories from their time at this sustainable venture. For further information, inquiries are welcomed

Name: Forest Plastics Working Group
Description:
The Forest Plastics Working Group brings together partners to focus on the reduction in single use and temporary use plastics in tree and woodland establishment. It includes a comprehensive range of sector representatives.

The Forest Plastics Group use a collaborative approach to look at concerns and problems with the use and management of plastic and associated waste and compliance.

The group has broad support from across the United Kingdom and the Republic of Ireland, and includes a comprehensive range of sector representatives, including the major Environmental NGOs: Woodland Trust and National Trust, forestry companies, the nurseries, the National Parks, and the state (Coillte, Forestry & Land Scotland, Confor, Scottish Forestry, Natural Resources Wales, Forestry England, Forestry Commission, Forest Research, Defra, Resources and Waste, Environmental Quality Directorate). 

FPWG brings together partners to focus on the reduction in single use and temporary use plastics in tree and woodland establishment. The Forest Plastics Working Group believes increasing woodland planting should not entail a subsequent increase of plastics in the environment.

Name: Tree For Life
Description:
TreeForLife, an organization committed to work towards a sustainable ecosystem and nature as a whole. We trying to address the most serious conservation threats at the largest scale that broadly includes climate change, fresh water shortage and conservation lands.

TreeForLife empowers an individual or corporates to work towards social cause linked to the ecosystem and nature with an enablement of technology and social media influence. 

What we do?
At TreeForLife.net, our mission is to restore the planet one tree at a time by empowering individuals, communities, and corporations to participate in sustainable tree plantation, reforestation, and afforestation efforts. We aim to create measurable environmental impact, enhance biodiversity, and foster a greener, healthier Earth for present and future generations.

Vision:
Our vision is to become a global leader in environmental restoration, building a world where every person and organization contributes actively to rebalancing nature. We envision a future where vast green landscapes thrive, carbon footprints shrink, and ecological harmony is restored — making sustainability not just an initiative, but a way of life.

Name: Adopt A Forest- Ke
Description: Adopt A Forest (AAF) champions the establishment of sustainable forestry in arid and semi-arid areas (ASALs), making up 89% of Kenya. We believe in proper post-planting management of trees to guarantee at least a 97% survival rate. ASALs areas of Kenya have the lowest forest and tree cover, standing at below 4%. We cannot discuss climate change adaptation, mitigation, and food security when leaving out 80% of the country. Our clarion call is for stakeholders to "ADOPT FORESTS"; this means caring for and nurturing planted trees for three years to ensure they survive and grow into healthy, valuable crops. Trees, like all crops, need good management, site preparation, soil assessment, quality seedling, watering, weeding, physical protection, and pest and disease control. Poor post-planting management of tree seedlings reduces the survival rate significantly. According to World-Agroforestry-ICRAF, unmanaged trees have less than a 30% chance of survival, while 35% of the lucky ones are at risk of being stunted and sickly. The survival rate is even lower ASALs because of unsupportive weather and poverty. Our business model is guided by research and years of interactions with ASAL regions. Adopting a tree for three years is $5 (World Wildlife Fund WWF). The high-cost calls for innovative ways of raising funds. Only 11% of climate change adaptation funds in Kenya are available (UNEP 2022, & Climate Policy Initiative (CPI) 2020). Forests are valuable economic resources if used sustainably: agroforestry, carbon credits, land restoration, pulp, medicine, timber, and fodder. Our model encourages a shift from tree-planting donations to forest assets. We want to incentivize people and companies by offering them a return on investment. At Adopt A Forest Ltd, you can participate in the war against climate change while generating wealth through trees.

Name: Agrointell Consultoria Científica

Estamos aqui para elevar a eficiência, qualidade operacional, relevância e lucratividade de empresas e produtores rurais.
Não somos apenas consultores; somos seus parceiros na jornada da agricultura de sucesso. Nossa abordagem vai além da superfície, mergulhando nas profundezas da ciência. Nossas recomendações são sólidas, baseadas em estratégias cientificamente comprovadas. Queremos que nossos clientes tomem decisões assertivas e transformadoras. Acreditamos que a ciência é a força motriz para a revolução do agronegócio. 
Trabalhamos lado a lado com uma ampla gama de parceiros, desde empresas de pesquisa até agricultores individuais, institutos, organizações governamentais e ONGs. Nossa flexibilidade nos permite criar soluções personalizadas, inovadoras e eficazes, adaptadas às necessidades específicas de cada um.

Com foco em tecnologias de alto valor agregado e matérias primas de última geração.

-Bioestimulantes e outros fertilizantes especiais de base sustentável.

Estamos conectados e com projetos no ecossistema de agritechs e empreendedorismo, desde o segmento de fertilizantes ao de bioestimulantes, até o de proteção de cultivos e de produtos de agbio. 

AgroNova Consultoria&Investimento is a science-based business platform that accelerates the adoption of technologies in the field and brings our customers (rural producers and agroindustries) closer to great opportunities and trends of brazilian and global agribusiness. Business pillars
