Name: Sustainable Agriculture Sustainable Tourism SAST
Description:
Rethinking -'Sustainable Tourism & Sustainable Family Farming! - 
'ST & CBT - Sustainable Tourism' is the key to achieve UN SDGS-17 Goals 2030 Agenda! - 
What is “Sustainable Family Farming “and Why “Sustainable Family Farming ?
- KEY FACTS:
#Family farms occupy around 70-80% of farmland worldwide.
#Women hold only 15%. More than 90% of farms are run by an individual or a family who rely primarily on family labor.
# FAMILY FARMERS ARE THE AGENTS OF CHANGE WE NEED TO ACHIEVE ZERO HUNGER
#CONCEPT OF FAMILY FARMING -
Family Farming (including all family-based agricultural activities) is a means of organizing agricultural, forestry, fisheries, pastoral and aquaculture production that is managed and operated by a family and is predominantly reliant on the family labor of both women and men. The family and the farm are linked, co-evolve and combine economic, environmental, social and cultural functions. "With the launch of the United Nations Decade of Family Farming (2019-2028), FAO and IFAD reiterate our determination and commitment to support concerted actions to fulfill the ambitions of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, and to step up interventions for a healthy, resilient and sustainable food system."

DO YOUR BIT! BIG OR SMALL, EVERY BIT COUNTS!
Let us put 'Sustainable family farming 'at the center to lead this transformation for this decade and beyond- UN SDGS-17 2030 Agenda!
"Sustainable Family Farming " लाइ २ categories मा बाडन सकिन्छ ,
1.Sustainable Rural Family Farming -Horizontal, Free-Range,Permaculture.
2.Sustainable Urban Family Farming- (Vertical,Soilless,Aquaponics) 
Sustainable Tourism is a way of travelling and exploring a destination while respecting its culture, environment, and people. According to the United Nation (UNWTO)-Sustainable tourism is, “Tourism that takes full account of its current and future economic, social and environmental impacts, addressing the needs of visitors, the industry, and the environment & Host Communities.

Name: ANGUA S.A
Description:
ANGUA FIBER es una empresa ecuatoriana dedicada a la producción y comercialización de fibra de abacá, siguiendo las líneas de responsabilidad social y ambiental que caracterizan su origen. Esta es parte de un grupo empresarial español que por años se ha dedicado a contribuir con un mundo más sostenible, a través de la implementación de proyectos que evitan la emisión de más de 1.000.000 TnCO2eq al año.

ANGUA FIBER toma el mismo nombre de su empresa madre “ANGUA FORESTAL”, la cual cuenta con más de 2000 Ha de bosques nativos en Corrientes, Argentina que han sido plantados y cuidados con el objetivo específico de producir madera sostenible, es decir, sin deforestación, manteniendo la biodiversidad y contribuyendo con la eliminación del CO2 disperso en la atmosfera.
La producción y procesamiento de la fibra de abacá se realiza en los sectores de Valle Hermoso (Santo Domingo de los Tsáchilas) Centro de procesamiento y La Villegas (La Concordia) Centro de producción. ANGUA FIBER, es una empresa convencida de que el pequeño productor merece un trato justo, formalidad que involucre contratos a largo plazo y capacitación, permitiendo así que la producción local crezca y proyecte un exponencial desarrollo comunitario. 

De acuerdo a los lineamientos y fundamentos de responsabilidad corporativa característicos de nuestro grupo, ANGUA FIBER se encuentra preparando sus plantaciones y procesos de producción, para demostrar al importador la trazabilidad del producto, a través de la certificación de las plantaciones, con la implementación de sistemas de producción que se encontrarán en armonía con el ecosistema y demostrarán el mejoramiento de las condiciones de vida de pequeños productores asociados a los objetivos de sostenibilidad de nuestra empresa.

Name: MicoLab
Description:
Services for truffle growers: consultancy, analyses and trainings

For nursery owners and truffle farmers

At MicoLab we provide services for truffle growers, nurserymen and specialists in the field of black winter truffle and summer truffle cultivation (Tuber melanosporum and Tuber aestivum).

The basic objective of our consultancy service is to make land owners aware of the possibilities of their plots for successful truffle farming. We also aim to help them select the field works to be carried out and the most suitable management techniques to achieve high yields in truffle plantations.

At MicoLab we will help you decide where and how to plant. We will analyze and assess if the plants to be used have the right quality to produce truffles in the future. You will also be able to know the progress of the black or summer truffle mycorrhizae in your plantations and the presence of possible contaminating mycorrhizal fungi that could endanger the productive future of your plots.

Through our training service we offer high quality practical courses to obtain higher yields and increase efficiency in the nurseries, plantations and laboratories. Our courses are designed to focus on the needs that we identify in the sector, through our experience as analysts, plantation managers and trainers.

Op de 210 hectare van het landbouwbedrijf zijn sinds de drooglegging van de polder in de zestiger jaren van de vorige eeuw nooit chemisch-synthetische middelen gebruikt. De gewassen zoals granen, aardappels, rode bieten, uien, pompoen, kool, erwten, bonen en suikermais worden dus sinds jaar en dag op ecologisch unieke bodem geteeld. De stichting heeft in haar statuten vastgelegd dat NZ27 voor altijd biologisch zal blijven.

Sie ist allein fachlichen Aspekten verpflichtet und politisch neutral. Dabei ist die Wirtschaftlichkeit der land- und fischereiwirtschaftlichen Betriebe sowie die land- und fischereiwirtschaftlichen Arbeits- und Produktionsbedingungen im Einklang mit den Interessen der Allgemeinheit unter besonderer Berücksichtigung von Natur und Umwelt zu verbessern. Die Landwirtschaftskammer unterstützt damit die Produktion hochwertiger Nahrungsmittel und das Erzielen angemessener Einkommen auf den Betrieben.

Name: China AgriTech Decoded
Description:
This page shares curated insights on agriculture and agri-tech developments in China — a fast-moving landscape that remains underexplored by global audiences, yet is critical to the future of food, innovation, and sustainability.

Our goal is to make insights more accessible and actionable for an international audience.

The project is led by Diletta Di Iorio and Diogo Tulio, both with diverse international experience in agriculture and agtech, strategic consulting, marketing, innovation, and global policy. 

Together, we bring a cross-disciplinary lens to help professionals, companies, and institutions better understand the forces shaping China’s rural transformation and technological shift.
What we publish:

- Visual summaries and translated reports from Chinese sources
- Strategic trends in agri-tech, food systems, and sustainability
- Policy insights from China's agricultural and rural development agenda
- Data visualizations and charts with global comparisons
- Reflections on tech transfer, innovation models, and global relevance

Whether you’re a company, policymaker, investor, or simply curious about China’s role in shaping the future of agriculture, this page is designed to inform, connect, and inspire.

Follow us to stay up to date on a China that grows, scales, and transforms, through the land and beyond.

Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.catdecoded.info

Name: Arrozeira Pelotas Agro

Somos a Arrozeira Pelotas Agro, uma empresa dedicada à produção agrícola e pecuária. Especializados no cultivo de arroz e soja, bem como na criação de gado, nossa jornada de 23 anos é um testemunho do nosso profundo apreço pela agricultura e pecuária, setores que moldam nosso legado.

Fundada no coração do Rio Grande do Sul, nossa granja surgiu há duas décadas e três anos, e desde então temos operado com um compromisso inabalável, zelando com carinho e devoção pelo universo agropecuário. Alicerçados em parcerias sólidas construídas junto a colaboradores, clientes e fornecedores, temos prosperado de maneira contínua.


Na Arrozeira Pelotas Agro, reconhecemos e valorizamos as pessoas que dedicam suas vidas à agropecuária, contribuindo para o fortalecimento deste setor vital no Rio Grande do Sul. Nossa atuação se baseia em respeito à terra e atenção meticulosa aos animais, seguindo nossa trilha ao lado de parceiros que compartilham do nosso orgulho e confiança. Dessa forma, buscamos incessantemente entregar excelência por meio das operações em nossa granja.

Vergelijk het maar met zuurkool. Door er bokashi van te maken kun je vrijwel alle organische resten omzetten tot een rijke bodemverbeteraar. Onze missie? “De hele wereld aan de bokashi”

Name: AGRAP - Alianza por la Ganaderia Regenerativa en la Amazonia Peruana
Description:
The positive relationship of livestock farming with the forests of the Peruvian Amazon depends on the actions of private, public actors, and civil society.

Therefore, the Alliance for Regenerative Livestock Farming in the Peruvian Amazon (AGRAP) is a community of practice that designs, implements, monitors, and communicates actions in the livestock production chain based on a shared vision.

We aim to improve the quality and sustainability (e.g., through regenerative attributes and deforestation-free production); recognizing the potentials and dynamics of the landscape where the activity is developed and promoting the improvement of the local producer's welfare and of the productive chain.

Symbioun was launched in 2018 to provide the essential investments, business intelligence and contacts needed for Srilankan companies to develop and extend internationality. The goal of the Symbioun is to bring in community development through investment, knowledge share and co-existence. We exist to promote growth and sustainability for rural communities

The financing of Symbioun for small-scale businesses ranges from Organic Poultry, Small Grocery Shop, Pottery and will expand to agroforestry, seasonal cultivation and other cottage industries. With Symbioun, since January 2020, 10 small-scale businesses of 13 families with a total investment capital of LKR 411,000 have been initiated in two provinces of Srilanka.

We have managed to get businesses to achieve an average of 80 % of the profit target projected over a 6 month period. And we have achieved a success rate of more than 75% on businesses started with more than 8 businesses bringing monthly projected revenue levels. All projects in the Uva and Eastern Provinces of Srilanka are handled by a team of project manager and 2 coordinators of Symbioun.

Moreover, there are 12 projects to be launched by December 2020 to complete Symbioun’s milestone of launching 25 small-scale business projects with a total investment capital of LKR 750,000.

Worms

People

L'agriculture est passionnante car nous sommes convaincus que la première richesse de l'agriculture, ce sont les femmes et les hommes qui la font vivre. 
Notre priorité est de créer les conditions pour que l'agriculture attire les talents et les compétences, compte tenu notamment des défis  démographiques de la prochaine décennie.

Name: KüstenSwien
Description:
KüstenSwien – das ist Schweinefleisch aus Nordfriesland, vom Wetteringshof der Familie Brunk. Hier an der Nordsee haben wir die Vision, Genuss und Tierwohl miteinander zu verbinden, indem wir unseren Großbetrieb Schritt für Schritt auf Haltungsstufe 4 umstellen. 

Seit jeher liegt es uns am Herzen, mehr für unsere Tiere zu tun als es gesetzlich vorgeschrieben ist, denn wir sind Landwirte mit Leib und Seele – und das seit Generationen. 
Je mehr Händler und Verbraucher sich bewusst dafür entscheiden, diesen Weg mit uns zu gehen, desto schneller kommen wir dabei voran. Auch über die Grenzen Schleswig-Holsteins hinaus.

Zudem ist es uns besonders wichtig, auf Transparenz zu setzen, mit einem klaren Herkunftsversprechen: Unsere KüstenSwiene werden in Nordfriesland geboren, aufgezogen und geschlachtet. Auf unserem Hof erfreuen sie sich frischer, salziger Luft mit großzügigem Auslauf – für ein stressfreies und artgerechtes Leben. 

Und das schmeckt man auch!

Description:
Entreprise de conseil en Bilan Carbone & Contribution Carbone
Accompagnement des entreprises et subvention des agriculteurs pour la plantation de haies bocagères 

Chez 4FORESTS , nous aidons les entreprises à mesurer, réduire et compenser leur empreinte carbone grâce à des solutions adaptées et concrètes. Spécialisés en bilan carbone et contribution carbone, nous accompagnons nos clients dans leur transition écologique tout en soutenant des initiatives de reforestation locale.

 Nos services :
Bilan Carbone : Nous analysons les émissions de gaz à effet de serre (GES) de votre entreprise pour identifier les postes les plus émetteurs. Nous proposons des recommandations personnalisées pour réduire votre impact environnemental.
Contribution Carbone : Nous mettons en place des projets de compensation carbone certifiés, pour compenser les émissions incompressibles et permettre à votre entreprise de tendre vers la neutralité carbone.
 Soutien aux agriculteurs : Plantation de haies bocagères
Nous soutenons les agriculteurs en France en finançant la plantation et l’entretien de haies bocagères. Ces haies, véritables puits de carbone, permettent de capter le CO2 tout en améliorant la biodiversité, la qualité des sols et la protection des cultures. Grâce à nos subventions, les agriculteurs bénéficient d’un soutien financier pour participer activement à la lutte contre le changement climatique tout en protégeant leurs terres.
 Pourquoi choisir 4 FORESTS?
Expertise en gestion carbone
Solutions sur mesure pour votre secteur
Impact environnemental mesurable et durable
Contribution à des projets locaux de reforestation
 Ensemble, agissons pour un avenir durable ! Contactez-nous pour découvrir comment nous pouvons vous aider à réduire votre empreinte carbone tout en soutenant la biodiversité locale.

Name: Sustaina Grow
Description:
About Sustaina Grow
Sustaina Grow is a New Zealand-based brand dedicated to making gardening and land care more sustainable, accessible, and effective. We create eco-friendly solutions that replace harmful plastics with natural materials like wool and seaweed, helping people and organisations grow better while caring for the planet.

Our product range includes wool garden blankets, SeaWool soil enhancers, premium fertilisers, and seasonal grow kits that make it simple for anyone to grow food at home. Beyond the backyard, Sustaina Grow supports large-scale native plantings, erosion prevention, and sediment control projects that protect New Zealand’s land and waterways.

We also offer a unique corporate gifting range, giving businesses the chance to share meaningful, sustainable gifts that inspire greener living.

At our core, we believe small, everyday choices from the way we garden to the way we give can create lasting change. Sustaina Grow is here to prove that growth and sustainability can thrive together.

A Conect Agro Tech é uma AgTech brasileira que desenvolve um ecossistema completo de tecnologia para agricultura inteligente, sustentabilidade e economia verde. Nossa plataforma integra Marketplace de Produtos Agrícolas, Marketplace de Créditos Ambientais, sensores IoT, IA cognitiva, Blockchain, Gêmeo Digital, relatórios ESG automatizados, diagnóstico por imagem, logística inteligente, pagamentos digitais e inclusão digital por voz e imagem.

A solução permite que produtores de todos os portes monitorem suas propriedades em tempo real, gerem créditos ambientais certificados e comercializem produtos diretamente com consumidores e empresas. Usamos sensores agrícolas, IA generativa, visão computacional, machine learning e blockchain público para garantir rastreabilidade, autenticidade e impacto socioambiental mensurável.

Nosso sistema também oferece educação digital, gamificação sustentável, assistentes de voz acessíveis para analfabetos digitais, análises climáticas, painéis de desempenho ESG e ferramentas de gestão rural. Toda a arquitetura é cloud-native, modular e escalável, construída com AWS, MongoDB Atlas e integrações avançadas de pagamentos (Pix, Stripe, Sicredi) e logística (Melhor Envio, iFood/DHL/99Food futuramente).

A Conect Agro Tech nasce com o propósito de democratizar o acesso à tecnologia no campo, gerar renda sustentável, reduzir desigualdades e apoiar pequenos produtores na transição para um futuro agrícola mais inteligente, inclusivo e ambientalmente responsável. Nossa solução conecta o campo ao mundo com inovação, impacto e acessibilidade.

Name: Ferme de Lilan

La Ferme de Lilan est un domaine de 7 hectares situé à Bavois. Créé en 2021, le design de la ferme a été réalisé selon les principes de la permaculture, des pratiques de l’agro-écologie et de la biodynamie. Nous pratiquons une agriculture respectueuse des sols et du vivant.

Les récoltes des cultures maraîchères, fleurs et plantes vivaces, petits fruits, jardin-forêt, verger et céréales sont transformées à la ferme en une grande diversité de produits qui allient le goût et les bienfaits des plantes aromatiques et médicinales de nos jardins.

Le lieu a également l’ambition de devenir un centre de formation et de dissémination de la permaculture et d’autres pratiques qui visent à prendre soin de l’humain, des animaux et de la nature.

Name: Triple B Ranch of Gilmer LLC
Description:
Farm to fork cattle ranch specializing in high-quality free range Japanese Wagyu raised in a traditional, low stress, and respectful environment. Orders via invitation only, fractional cow pre-orders only. All USDA inspected. All sales via deposit, with final price based on hanging weight. 

Given our family's Spanish and Japanese heritage, we love our Iberian Longhorn and Japanese Wagyu,  
 
Triple B Ranch is based on traditional Spanish and Japanese bovine raising methodologies, gained from the co-owners having lived and worked in both Spain (mainly the Extremadura and Malaga regions), and Japan, American co-founder lived over 13 years in the Tokyo region, as well as Western Japan, Hyogo Prefecture (birthplace of Wagyu), where the other co-founder, Yumi, hails (with family roots to the agricultural communities).  

The idea of Triple B was born at El Capricho, in Spain. El Capricho is run by Jose Gordon, a man with much passion and respect for our beloved cows and the process of reaching an ultimate finished product. We allow for all our cows to live peacefully at Triple B. "When you mistreat something in some way, you will eat that abuse. So that welfare is fundamental.", Jose Gordon. We live by this code at Trible B!

Description:
OUR MISSION
Build a unique and dynamic network for the popularization of good methods of ecosystem restoration in Africa and in the world with the diversity of communities

ABOUT US IN FEW WORDS
STAG FORESTREE is a young Ivorian company created in 2021. Its head office is located in the beautiful Ivorian political capital (Yamoussoukro, Ivory Coast).

It specializes in the construction of modern forest nurseries (shade net and installation of irrigation systems), industrial production of tree seedlings and forest fruit trees and the establishment of local seed production cooperatives.

Young, we believe in our ability to mobilize and federate initiatives in favor of ecosystems and biodiversity. STAG FORESTREE participates in the production and distribution of forest seedlings in highly degraded cocoa areas, in the establishment of local forest cooperatives and thus in the creation of green jobs in Côte d'Ivoire.

OUR ADDED VALUE
We mobilize scientific (restoration ecology, ecological engineering, etc.) and technological knowledge to accelerate the process of restoring degraded areas

OUR GOAL BY 2030
Help restore and protect 50% of degraded ivorian areas

Onze missie is het vooruithelpen van de keten met onderzoek, kennis, innovatie en instrumenten.

Het Platform Melkgeitenhouderij initieert sectorspecifieke projecten op het gebied van marktinformatie, voedselveiligheid, diergezondheid en duurzaamheid. Het Platform Melkgeitenhouderij geeft ook richting aan onderzoek dat van toegevoegde waarde is voor de geitenzuivelketen.

Het Platform Melkgeitenhouderij heeft, met het oog op verduurzaming van de geitenzuivelketen, de Duurzame GeitenZuivel Keten (DGZK) opgericht. Binnen DGZK verband werken zuivelondernemingen en melkgeitenhouders samen aan de uitwerking van 3 thema’s: dierenwelzijn en diergezondheid, energie en klimaat en sectortransparantie. In het DGZK-programma kunnen
melkgeitenhouders punten scoren voor bovenwettelijke inspanningen die bijdragen aan een duurzamere sector. 

Platform Melkgeitenhouderij is initiatiefnemer van consumentenplatform Ontdek de Geit.

Мы донесём необходимую информацию по специфике вашей деятельности до ваших коллег и партнёров по бизнесу.

Name: Geplant - Forest Technology
Description:
Our core business is to enable and ensure the growth and profitability of forest-based businesses, with projects that integrate people, knowledge and technologies.

Name: Pro Silva France
Description:
Pro Silva France est aujourd’hui un acteur reconnu dans le monde forestier et plus particulièrement dans la filière forêt-bois français.
La sylviculture prônée depuis plus de 30 ans par le réseau Pro Silva en France et en Europe reposant sur des principes de respect et de bon sens et privilégiant sur le terrain l’observation et l’équilibre des écosystèmes forestiers est plus que jamais d’actualité avec les multiples défis qui se présentent à nous : sécheresses, tempêtes, incendies, dépérissements, dégradations des sols, prolifération des maladies et parasites. Tous favorisés par le changement climatique en cours plus brutal qu’annoncé.
La multifonctionnalité des forêts mise en valeur par la Sylviculture Mélangée à Couvert Continu est plus que jamais une réponse crédible pour la sauvegarde et la résilience de nos forêts tout en conservant une exploitation raisonnée et performante.
La double mission de Pro Silva est FORMER et (S')INFORMER.
Nous proposons des formations à celles et ceux qui souhaitent mettre en pratique la SMCC (professionnels, propriétaires ou amis de la forêt). Notre réseau de 450 adhérents répartis dans toute la France propose également régulièrement des tournées en forêt via nos 13 groupes régionaux animés par des passionnés.
Enfin, nous publions régulièrement de nombreux documents afin de mieux appréhender cette sylviculture et de partager le fruit de notre expérience.
Pour en savoir plus : https://prosilva.fr/

Name: Agroforestry Netwerk Nederland

Name: Nutrient Density Initiative
Description:
We are the Nutrient Density Initiative, a member-driven non-profit with engagement from those in food industry, agricultural and the environment groups, nutrition and healthcare space, as well as the farming and ranching community, linking regenerative agriculture and nutrient-dense outcomes in order to improve human and environmental health. 

We aggregate data and research and are making meaningful nutrient density metrics widely and directly accessible to everyone, from farms to families, that will drive demand for a healthy food system by deepening awareness that human health is inextricably linked to the wellbeing of the soil, water, biodiversity of life above and below the ground, and the welfare of the human beings growing our food.


The opportunity for farmers, food company leaders those in food service/retail as well as nutrition professionals/healthcare practitioners to highlight the relationship between soil health and nutrient density can inspire a profound shift towards a food system that nourishes both people and the planet. When the soil is regenerated, it becomes a rich source of essential nutrients, leading to the production of healthier, tastier, more nutritious crops.

Our purpose is to ignite awareness and action around nutrient density to drive demand for a regenerative food system by empowering eaters to engage the direct connection between their health and the health of the food system.

Let's work together to meaningfully define nutrient density in food, and activate eater demand and use that demand as a primary lever for food system transformation, including deep regenerative agriculture practices, in service of planetary wellbeing.

Name: Projet AVENIR Rdc
Description:
Dans le cadre de sa politique de lutte contre la pauvreté en milieu rural, de l’autonomisation des femmes et des jeunes par la valorisation de l’entreprenariat agricole et rural, sensible à la nutrition et résilient au changement climatique dans les provinces situées autour de la ville province de Kinshasa, le Gouvernement de la République Démocratique du Congo a conclu avec le Fonds International pour le Développement de l’Agriculture (FIDA), l’Agence Française de Développement (AFD) et le Fonds pour l'environnement mondial (FEM), en vue de mettre en œuvre le projet d’Autonomisation par la Valorisation de l’Entreprenariat agricole et rural, sensible à la Nutrition, Inclusif et Résilient au changement climatique (AVENIR). Avec un coût total de 213,5 millions d’USD, le projet AVENIR est mis en œuvre sur une période de 7 ans (de 2023 à 2030) en ciblant particulièrement les quatre provinces (Kongo Central, Kwango, Kwilu et Maï-Ndombe) ceinturant Kinshasa.

L'objectif global du Projet est de contribuer à la réduction de la pauvreté rurale et à l’amélioration de la nutrition des populations rurales des provinces citées.
L'objectif de développement est de soutenir la transformation durable de l'agriculture familiale, y compris une meilleure gestion des ressources naturelles contribuant à l'atténuation du changement climatique, l’amélioration des revenus et diversité alimentaire.

Il est structuré suivant deux (2) composantes techniques :
Composante 1 : Agriculture Familiale et Entreprenariat Agricole et Rural
Elle comprend 4 sous composantes : (i) Développement des agroécosystèmes, (ii) Aménagement et gestion durable des cultures, (iii) Amélioration de la sécurité nutritionnelle familiale et l’appui à l’autonomisation des femmes, (iv) Entreprenariat Rural inclusif.
Composante 2 : Désenclavement et marchés territoriaux
Elle comprend 2 sous composantes : (i) réhabilitation des infrastructures économiques et (ii) dispositifs de gestion et de maintenance des infrastructures.

Name: Agrimedia.cd
Description: AgriMedia.cd est un média d’informations générales sur l’agriculture, l’entrepreneuriat agricole et la gestion de l’environnement en RD-Congo. Il se veut être une plateforme de référence pour toute information en rapport avec le secteur agricole en RDC.

Name: PT. Agrina Sawit Perdana
Description:
PT. Agrina Sawit Perdana didirikan pada tanggal 27 November 1999 dan bergerak di bidang perkebunan kelapa sawit di Kabupaten Sanggau, Propinsi Kalimantan Barat. Penanaman kelapa sawit pertama kali dilakukan pada tahun 2000 seluas 270 ha. Perseroan terus mengembangkan areal perkebunannya dan pada tahun 2017, Perseroan mengoperasikan Pabrik Kelapa Sawit (PKS) dengan kapasitas olah 60 ton per jam untuk mengolah Tandan Buah Segar (TBS) menjadi Minyak Mentah Sawit (CPO) dan Inti Sawit (PK). Pada bulan Desember 2019, Pemegang Saham menyetujui perubahan status Perseroan menjadi perusahaan terbuka dan melakukan penawaran perdana saham kepada publik.
Saat ini Perseroan memiliki delapan entitas anak usaha yaitu PT. Bumi Tata Lestari (BTL), PT. Bintang Sawit Lestari (BSL), PT. Karya Boga Mitra (KBM), PT. Karya Boga Kusuma (KBK), PT. Rana Wastu Kencana (RWK), PT. Agrina Sangkara Persada (ASPD), PT. Anugerah Samudra Pratama (ASPR), dan PT. Wahana Tata Nugraha (WTN).
Enam anak usaha yaitu BTL, BSL, KBM, KBK, RWK juga bergerak di bidang perkebunan dan industri kelapa sawit yang berlokasi di Kabupaten Sanggau, Kabupaten Sekadau, dan Kabupaten Sambas, Propinsi Kalimantan Barat.
Sampai saat ini Perseroan dan entitas anak memiliki perkebunan kelapa sawit dengan lahan area usaha mencapai 18.804 hektar dan lahan tertanam mencapai sekitar 17.401, 7 hektar dan dua unit PKS dengan kapasitas olah masing - masing 60 Ton per jam yang sudah beroperasi dan satu unit PKS yang sedang dalam tahap pembangunan yang ditargetkan dapat beroperasi penuh pada tahun 2021 dengan kapasitas olah 45 ton per jam.

Name: INOCAS
Description: Somos um negócio de impacto socioambiental positivo! Fazemos agricultura e agropecuária com base sustentável e competitiva, envolvendo a agricultura familiar, regenerando áreas degradadas e valorizando a biodiversidade brasileira. A macaúba é a protagonista, o componente florestal de nossos sistemas agroflorestais e agrossilvipastoris.

Name: Ordine dei dottori agronomi e dei dottori forestali - CONAF
Description:
Il Consiglio dell’ordine nazionale dei dottori agronomi e dei dottori forestali cura e rappresenta gli interessi connessi all’esercizio della professione di dottore agronomo e dottore forestale. 
Cura i rapporti del sistema ordinistico con le istituzioni nazionali e internazionali, nonché con i professionisti e le loro organizzazioni di categoria, elabora indirizzi comuni, promuove e realizza iniziative coordinate, sostiene lo sviluppo e la tutela della professione.

Name: Nutrient Density Alliance
Description:
Our Nutrient Density Alliance is made up of key players and pioneers working to drive regenerative agriculture practices and outcomes, nutrient dense food, and improved human health.

Our purpose is to ignite awareness and action around nutrient density to drive demand for a regenerative food system by empowering eaters to engage the direct connection between their health and the health of the food system.

Let's work together to meaningfully define nutrient density in food, and activate eater demand and use that demand as a primary lever for food system transformation, including deep regenerative agriculture practices, in service of planetary wellbeing.

Name: TERRA OPTIMA AG
Description:
Our proprietary HUMIVERSE is a 100% pure organic humic acid in powder form and feed quality. 
In combination with organic fertilisers or other organic materials, HUMIVERSE can cultivate humus-poor soils and make them usable for agricultural cultivation. Humic acid, which intensively supports the formation of humus, is the most important basis for the vitalisation of arid soils. 
By isolating organic and inorganic pesticides, hydrocarbon compounds and chelating heavy metals in agriculture and fish farming, it helps to detoxify natural resources.

Name: Trishul Biotech
Description: Trishul Biotech strives to foster scientific advancement to make agriculture more sustainable and productive. Trishul Biotech aims to improve agricultural sustainability, and quality, by utilizing cutting-edge crop solutions. Trishul Biotech's products are built on the company's unique Upcrop Research, Development, and Commercialization platform. This technique has allowed Trishul Biotech to manufacture products (biofertilizers, biostimulants, and biopesticides) that have substantially impacted the rapidly growing agricultural market.

Name: Top 50 Farmers
Description: Top 50 Farmers is a living soil initiative and an acceleration platform paving the way for regenerative agriculture to be scaled from soil to gut.

Name: Sementes Santa Fé
Description:
Somos especializados na produção e comercialização de sementes forrageiras.

Investimos em tecnologia de ponta, com técnicas inovadoras de produção e beneficiamento para extrair o potencial máximo da semente. Tudo isso com foco em desenvolver cultivares que se adaptam às mais diferentes condições de cultivo.

Adquira nossos produtos através de nossos representantes comerciais que estão preparados para oferecer a melhor solução para a sua necessidade.

Nosso objetivo é proporcionar uma rede de oportunidades, aprendizado e negócios, impulsionando o crescimento e a evolução do setor em um ambiente dinâmico e global.

Acreditamos na força e na importância do Agro brasileiro!

Name: ENERDJIL
Description:
SAFETY FOOD 
Eleveur de NAC
A Diamond is Forever
Les 4 piliers de la sécurité alimentaire ,la disponibilité, l'accès, l'utilisation et la stabilité
L’Afrique possède énormément de ressources naturelles, qu’il s’agisse de terres arables, d’eau, de pétrole, de gaz naturel, de ressources minérales, de forêts et de faune et flore sauvages. Le continent africain abrite une grande proportion des ressources naturelles mondiales, aussi bien renouvelables et non renouvelables.

À l’échelle mondiale, l’Afrique détient environ 30 % des réserves de ressources minérales, 8 % du gaz naturel et 12 % des réserves de pétrole. Le continent abrite 40 % de l’or de la planète et près de 90 % des réserves mondiales de chrome et de platine. Les plus grandes réserves de cobalt, de diamant, de platine et d’uranium du globe se trouvent en Afrique. Cette dernière concentre 65 % des terres arables et 10 % des sources continentales d’eau douce renouvelable à l’échelle mondiale. des travaux de rénovation énergétique,
c’est : isoler son toit, ses murs, refaire son système de chauffage, installer une climatisation, ou encore isoler sa maison par l’extérieur. L’enjeu de rénover énergétiquement son logement est de réduire son empreinte carbone grâce à l’installation d’appareils dernier cri moins gourmands en énergie et ainsi faire des économies sur sa facture ….Votre habitation mieux isolée et mieux équipée vous fera faire des économies d’énergie… et donc diminuer votre facture d’énergie…. Pour un projet en toute sérénité, confiez vos travaux à une entreprise de rénovation énergétique, et pas n’importe laquelle .

Name: Tecaliman
Description:
Tecaliman is a private technical center, created in 1981 initially by the animal feed nutrition industry with the support of Nantes ITC and INRA. Based in Nantes, in the heart of the regions of France that produce the most of compound feeds, Tecaliman is a key player in the bulk food sectors. The association consists of a group of industrialists, today broadens to the grain processing industries, all with the objective of improving the performance of industrial tools in terms of profitability, product quality, compliance with the environment and safety of the operators.
Tecaliman members are present in 13 countries. French members manufacturers of compound feed produce 100% of the French production.

Name: TOMIGUNN
Description:
TOMIGUNN offers solutions that are engineered to push boundaries and break barriers. When you choose TOMIGUNN, you’re choosing innovation that takes you further, faster.

Animal Health
Our products improve animal health through a complex mix of microbial organisms that promote gut health.

Equipment 
Our advanced filtration equipment cleans large volumes of air safely and efficiently. We also offer a high-pressure vapor steam cleaner, a filter that converts calcium carbonate in water into aragonite, a filter that removes clay, silt and other large particles in water, and more.
 
Litter Treatments
Experience a transformation in poultry litter performance and its monetary resale value with our all-natural treatments. 

Biosecurity
TOMIGUNN uses the power of beneficial microbes to facilitate the formation of protective biofilms on surfaces.

Plants
By encouraging positive microbial interactions and enhancing nutrient cycles, our products support the well-being of plants, seeds, soil, and water.

Name: Las Taperitas S.A.
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina, de carácter familiar. Desde el año 1928, venimos desarrollando diferentes producciones agropecuarias.

Nos dedicamos a la producción agrícola, lechera, ganadera, porcina y forestal en distintas provincias de la República Argentina.

Conformamos un gran equipo de personas que todos los días trabajamos, planificamos y gestionamos para alcanzar nuestra misión: “Proveer productos y servicios agropecuarios para mejorar la vida de las personas”.

Name: Futuro Florestal Ltda.
Description:
A Futuro Florestal foi fundada em 2006, trabalhando de forma pioneira no setor de reflorestamento comercial de madeiras nobres tropicais. Criada inicialmente para fazer a implantação e gestão de áreas florestais e agroflorestais utilizando madeiras tropicais nativas e exóticas, como também a produção de mudas dessas espécies em viveiro florestal próprio.

Tem como propósito realizar a implantação, gestão, consultoria e assessoria florestal para os plantios florestais e agroflorestais de árvores de espécies nativas brasileiras e exóticas, com a finalidade de produção de madeira nobre tropical, de forma sustentável, em sistemas de plantio monocultural, misto ou consorciado com agricultura e pecuária, também conhecidos como sistemas agroflorestais ou agrosilvipastoris (ILPF).

Desde seu início como empresa, focou na produção com alto padrão de qualidade, na criação de alianças estratégicas e parcerias tecnológicas com instituições de pesquisa nacionais e internacionais, no planejamento e na execução de estudos de campo e na produção do conhecimento necessário para o sucesso comercial. Assim, a Futuro Florestal atua principalmente nas áreas de nutrição e adubação, melhoramento genético, manejo de pragas e doenças, prospecção de novas espécies e modelos agroflorestais, assim como estudos mercadológicos e educação ambiental. 

Destaca entre suas prioridades a produção e a comercialização de madeira tropical, subprodutos florestais e agroflorestais de forma sustentável, agregando responsabilidade social e benefícios ao meio ambiente.

Aplica alta tecnologia em suas atividades e conta com uma equipe de engenheiros graduados e pós-graduados, como também com consultores, doutores e PHDs nas melhores empresas e instituições do Brasil e do exterior, a fim de atender ao suporte técnico para assuntos específicos e para grandes projetos.

Our mission is to reconnect people with nature through productive, regenerative environments that benefit both communities and the planet.

Name: Amkeni Mkulima Cooperative
Description:
The Amkeni Mkulima cooperative brings together farmers located around the Kahuzi-Biega National Park (KBNP) in South Kivu, Democratic Republic of Congo.

We offer coffee, cocoa and vanilla production based on a permaculture and agroforestry model. A wide range of vegetables, local fruits and medicinal plants are produced to meet the needs of the region. We have developed numerous ponds that give rise to a significant fish production.

Our farms are designed to achieve a synergy between the different species cultivated to create a virtuous and productive ecosystem allowing us to develop the localities in which we are established.

Name: Nohakherha Farms
Description: Our core activity is agriculture, we inspire to do more than produce high-quality agriproducts. Our mission is to cultivate not only top-quality crops but also thriving, inclusive, and sustainable communities. Our dedication to agriculture and community development is at the heart of the positive impact we aim to create.

Name: Blink Biotech
Description:
Blink Biotech develops nutritional solutions and feed additives for animals, applying biotechnology to increase productive efficiency, safety, and predictability in production systems.

Our solutions are based on science, technical validation, and a deep understanding of the invisible challenges of animal nutrition, reducing risks and losses throughout the production chain.

We work alongside producers, nutritionists, technicians, and industry partners, sharing technical knowledge, innovation, and trends that directly impact results in the field.

Blink Biotech. Applied science for results.

Name: LM Florestal | Silvicultura
Description:
Acreditamos que o futuro da silvicultura brasileira será definido pela inteligência e pela precisão, não pela força bruta. Em um setor onde o ceticismo com a tecnologia ainda é uma barreira, a LM Florestal nasceu para desmistificar o impossível.

Nossa missão é garantir a máxima eficiência do capital investido por nossos parceiros, entregando controle total sobre os insumos e a tranquilidade de uma operação de alta confiabilidade.

Como fazemos isso? Através de uma plataforma que une três pilares de excelência:

1. Confiabilidade e Segurança Operacional: Nossa estrutura de manutenção única, com frota moderna e sinergia com a Aplic Certo, garante a máxima disponibilidade mecânica. Isso, somado a uma cultura rigorosa de segurança (SST) com excelentes índices, resulta em uma operação de menor risco, protegendo primeiramente nossos colaboradores, nosso ativo mais valioso, e blindando seu cronograma e reputação.

2. Execução de Qualidade: Nossa metodologia, baseada em calibração rigorosa, planejamento detalhado e operadores qualificados, minimiza o risco de erros e a necessidade de retrabalho, garantindo que o serviço seja executado em total conformidade com os padrões técnicos exigidos desde a primeira vez.

3. Aplicação Assertiva: Nossa tecnologia de taxa controlada assegura a aplicação mais precisa do mercado (desvios < 1,5%), minimizando drasticamente o desperdício de insumos e viabilizando a redução do uso de água em operações específicas, transformando a eficiência técnica em eficiência de capital para o seu negócio.

Ao final, entregamos relatórios transparentes que dão ao gestor o controle e a visibilidade que ele precisa.

Nossa visão é tornar a silvicultura de precisão a nova referência de excelência no Brasil, provando, em cada hectare, que é possível unir performance, controle e sustentabilidade.

Somos mais que um prestador de serviço. Somos o parceiro que traz o futuro da gestão florestal para a sua operação, hoje.
Location: Três Lagoas , Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Sky Greens Canada
Description:
Sky Greens Canada is the world's first low carbon, fully hydraulic, Vertical Farming System, producing high-quality fresh fruits and vegetables for local and international markets year-round. It's our belief that food production and consumption should be fresh, lean, and clean while zeroing down on energy and food wastage.

When compared to traditional monolayer farms, the Sky Greens Canada patented Vertical Farming System intensifies land use and can result in 10 times more yield per unit of land area.

It is only through research and innovation that countries can overcome the ever-demanding challenges of unpredictable climate conditions, limited arable land, water, and energy resources, and a rapidly growing world population. Sky Greens Canada is committed to exploring innovative agricultural engineering solutions to be at the forefront of urban agri-technological breakthroughs.

The Sky Greens Vertical Farming System is a revolutionary agriculture solution that alleviates environmental impact while making a bold move towards global food security. Addressing a variety of pressing global challenges, the system is the world's first low carbon, water-driven plot that grows vegetables through efficient and highly sustainable production methods. Using minimal land, water and energy resources, the system provides the community with fresh, locally grown vegetables, and has a dramatically smaller carbon footprint than traditional farming and import systems.

Name: CMA Confinamento Monte Alegre Oficial
Description: Com mais de 2 décadas de trajetória no mercado, a CMA (Companhia Agropecuária Monte Alegre) é uma empresa que se destaca no segmento agropecuário, oferecendo parcerias de alta qualidade e confiança. Confinamento bovino de grande porte, produção agrícola de cana-de-açúcar e feno Tifton-85. Tudo isso com qualidade comprovada em infraestrutura, recursos humanos, técnicas de manejo, tecnologia e modelos de parceria.

Name: Grow For Me
Description: Grow For Me is a web based Agricultural crowdfunding platform that funds farmers to scale and grow more crops, using the income received from interested sponsors. Sponsors would make a fair profit when crops are sold to our accredited offtaker partners or on the Ghana Commodity Exchange. We are addressing SDG 1 and 2 by creating wealth and contributing to food stability particularly in the rural communities where mass urban migration is having a detrimental impact on the agricultural food chain, by ridding it of essential labour force particularly during this pandemic. By incorporating crop insurance, working with professional agronomists, and utilising drone / satellite imagery to create data analytics, we provide leading edge feedback to sponsors and farm managers. This instills confidence in sponsors who can see real-time results, and supports farmers to maximise yields and increase their profits.

Name: Plataforma PUMA
Description:
Plataforma PUMA impulsa la transición hacia una agricultura regenerativa rentable, medible y escalable.

A través de la integración de ciencia de datos, modelización de suelos y tecnología climática, Puma permite a empresas y productores transformar la manera en que gestionan su huella de carbono, la trazabilidad de sus mediciones y la sostenibilidad en toda la cadena agroalimentaria.

Su plataforma combina rigurosos modelos científicos (AMG, Steady State, RothC) con estándares internacionales (GHG Protocol, ISO, 2BSvs) y alianzas globales como CFT, garantizando precisión en el monitoreo, reporte y verificación (MMRV) de impactos climáticos y productivos.

Para las empresas, Plataforma Puma ofrece soluciones para abastecimiento sustentable, gestión de emisiones de Alcance 3 y tableros auditables de desempeño ESG.

Para los productores, brinda herramientas como el Pasaporte Climático y planes de manejo basados en métricas reales, mejorando márgenes y resiliencia frente al cambio climático.

Con certificaciones y validaciones internacionales, Plataforma PUMA se posiciona como un aliado estratégico para quienes buscan integrar el rigor científico con la acción climática y la toma de decisiones basadas en datos verificables, desde el lote hasta la góndola.

Name: Secretaria da Agricultura - SEAPI/RS
Description: Instituição pública atuante na área do agronegócio desenvolvendo suas atividades em apoio a produção primária e na manutenção da saúde animal e preservação da saúde pública através da inspeção e fiscalização sanitária. Atua também no fomento da atividade agrícola como organizador e promotor das câmaras setoriais de interesse do agronegócio do RS.

Name: LEBATEC FOREST
Description: A Lebatec Forest é uma empresa brasileira, fundada no ano de 2006, com sede na cidade de Rio Negrinho/SC. Ao longo de 17 anos no mercado, firmamos parcerias com as maiores empresas de base florestal do Brasil onde já atuamos em 13 estados brasileiros além de Argentina, Uruguai e Chile. Name: Association des Producteurs de Cacao de Martinique
Description:
Fondée en 2015, l'Association VALCACO est le seul groupement reconnu des producteurs de cacao de Martinique. Elle est soutenue par le programme opérationnel FEADER de l’Union Européenne  et par ses partenaires bancaires, le Crédit Agricole Antilles-Guyane et la BRED. 
L'Association compte, à ce jour, 50 adhérents répartis sur 125 ha du territoire de la Martinique.

Seule représentante de la filière cacao de Martinique, VALCACO regroupe 44 agriculteurs, 4 acteurs (Le PARM La Chambre d'Agriculture de Martinique, Entreprise Environnement et l’Etablissement scolaire AMEP) ainsi que 2 transformateurs (Frères Lauzea et Chocolat Elot).

Sa mission première est de structurer et développer une filière d’excellence de cacao d’origine 100% Martinique.
L’association a pour but de fédérer les producteurs de cacao du territoire autour d’une dynamique commune visant:
- qualité,
- excellence,
- développement durable.

VALCACO souhaite contribuer au développement économique de la Martinique en relançant une filière patrimoniale et en favorisant la diversité agricole. Elle promeut et encourage la culture du cacao sous couvert forestier naturel, bannissant toutes utilisations d'intrants étrangers aux systèmes agro-forestiers.

Enfin, VALCACO a pour ambition de travailler en partenariat étroit avec les transformateurs qui se sont engagés à acheter un produit à un tarif équitable, valorisant nos producteurs, notre agriculture et nos terroirs.

Name: Réensauvager la Ferme
Description: Alors que l’agriculture est aujourd’hui identifiée comme l’une des causes de la fragilisation des diversités du vivant, une paysannerie se réinvente dans un nombre croissant de fermes en France, soucieuse de concilier production alimentaire rentable et accueil de la vie sauvage. Nombre d’entre elles se sont ainsi regroupées sous le réseau « Paysans de nature » et, dans le département de la Drôme, une dynamique territoriale s’organise au sein de la jeune association « Fermes paysannes et sauvages ». Nous avons créé l’association Réensauvager la ferme plus spécifiquement comme un laboratoire d’invention et d’expérimentation de pratiques et dispositifs sur la ferme du Grand laval, à Montélier, et comme un espace d’exploration et de suivi de la faune, de la flore, de la fonge des microbiotes qui s’y installent et des dynamiques interdépendantes qu’elles assurent.

Name: Landwirtschaftskammer Niedersachsen
Description:
Die Landwirtschaftskammer Niedersachsen ist die größte Beratungs- und Bildungsorganisation für Betriebe der Land- und Forstwirtschaft, Hauswirtschaft, Fischerei und des Gartenbaus.
Für die grüne Branche nehmen wir zahlreiche bedeutende Aufgaben im Auftrag des Landes Niedersachsen wahr. Wir möchten den ländlichen Raum stärken, indem wir über 150.000 Unternehmende und Beschäftigte u. a. zu folgenden Themen beraten und unterstützen:

•	Arbeitsorganisation
•	Arbeitnehmende
•	Pflanzenproduktion
•	Tierhaltung
•	Ökonomie
•	Landbau

Zusätzlich übernehmen wir Aufgaben der Agrarverwaltung und bieten mit unserem Laboranalytik-Unternehmen (LUFA Nord-West) Analysen, Bewertungen und Beratungen für die gesamte Agrar-, Lebensmittel- und Umweltbranche an.

Name: KAPAR ORGANİK TARIM SAN. TİC. LTD. ŞTİ.
Description:
Kapar Organik Tarım San. Tic. Ltd. Şirketi , Dr. Tuncer ÇEVİK tarafından 23 Ekim 2000'de kurulmuş olup, Türkiye'de üretimi gerçekleşmeyen feromon ve renk tuzaklarını yerli olarak üretmeye başlamıştır. Bu işletme, Organik Tarım, İyi Tarım ve Biyoteknik Mücadeleye katkı sağlamaya mutluluk ve azimle devam etmektir.

Firmamız, üretim çalışmalarının yanı sıra Ar-Ge ve ürün gelişilme çalışmalarına da devam etmiştir. Bu amaçla ;
1. “Böcek Yakalama Zamkının Geliştirilmesi,” isimli projemiz, KOSGEB Başkanlığı, A.Ü.Teknoloji Geliştirme Merkez Müdürlüğü tarafından Araştırma ve Geliştirme desteği almıştır. 25.02.2003 tarihinde başlatılan proje 31.01.2006 tarihinde başarı ile tamamlanmıştır.
2. “Orman ve meyve zararlılarının biyoteknik mücadelesinde kullanılan feromon tuzaklarının yerli olarak üretilmesi” KOSGEB Ankara OSTİM Hizmet Merkezi Müdürlüğü tarafından AR-GE, İnovasyon ve Endüstriyel Uygulama Destek Programı kapsamında destek verilmiştir. Projemiz, 03.03.2014 tarihinde başarı ile tamamlanmıştır.
3. "Orman Kabuk Böcekleri ( Ips spp. ) Mücadelesinde Kullanılan  Feromon Tuzaklarının Araştırılması ve Yerli olarak üretilmesi." isimli TÜBİTAK tarafından desteklenen projemiz 28.02.2009 tarihinde başarı ile tamamlanmıştır.


Zararlı böceklere karşı yerli üretim feromon tuzaklarla; ilaçsız, ekonomik ve doğa dostu çözümler üretiyoruz.
Zehirsiz çevre ile mutlu yarınlar.

Name: RADIX Investimentos Florestais
Description:
A empresa foi fundada em 2015, é uma startup de vanguarda dedicada à inovação em reflorestamento e investimentos verdes, com foco na restauração produtiva e manejo sustentável na Amazônia. Trabalhamos com o plantio de espécies nobres como Mogno Africano e Teca, além de mais de 10 espécies nativas.

O modelo de silvicultura sucessional da Radix ajuda a criar uma nova cultura ao valorizar as florestas plantadas e a biodiversidade, gerando alternativa de emprego e renda para a população no entorno dos projetos. O sistema produtivo, com um mix de espécies madeireiras e frutíferas, recupera áreas degradadas e tem um alto potencial para captura de carbono da atmosfera, permitindo retorno atrativo para os investidores e para a manutenção da própria floresta.

Com uma veia de inovação e tecnologia, a Radix começou sua trajetória lançando o crowdfunding florestal e permitindo a democratização no acesso aos investimentos florestais, antes restritos a grandes investidores e fundos. Hoje, a empresa expande o portfólio para atender financiadores institucionais e viabilizar o reflorestamento em larga escala atrelado a projetos de carbono. Essa evolução posiciona a Radix de maneira ainda mais sólida nos mercados da Bioeconomia, gerando novas oportunidades de investimento estruturadas e diversificadas que combinam retornos financeiros com impacto ambiental positivo.

Name: HS AGRO
Description:
Grupo HS Agro: Agregamos valor à terra!

A história do Grupo HS Agro, sob a liderança visionária dos irmãos Alison e Bruno Toro, é uma inspiradora jornada de transformação, inovação e compromisso com a sustentabilidade. A partir de 2011, ao assumirem a Fazenda HS em São Félix do Xingu, PA, eles enfrentaram o desafio de reverter a degradação do solo e a perda de produtividade, um reflexo de anos sem manejo preventivo ou melhorias significativas. Através de uma gestão inovadora e uma visão estratégica, a HS Agro se tornou um exemplo de como a agricultura pode ser uma poderosa ferramenta de transformação ambiental e econômica.

Com mais de 8.700 hectares sob sua gestão, divididos entre agricultura e pecuária, e empregando sazonalmente mais de 50 funcionários, o Grupo HS Agro exemplifica o crescimento que pode ser alcançado quando o foco está na conversão de pastos degradados em áreas agricultáveis produtivas. Este modelo não apenas promove a sustentabilidade ambiental, mas também contribui significativamente para a economia local e para o setor agrícola do Brasil como um todo.

A trajetória do Grupo HS Agro desde 2011 é um testemunho do poder da visão, inovação e compromisso com a sustentabilidade. Ao transformar desafios em oportunidades, Alison e Bruno Toro e sua equipe não apenas revitalizaram a Fazenda HS, mas também estabeleceram um modelo de negócios que promove o crescimento econômico, a sustentabilidade ambiental e o desenvolvimento social. O Grupo HS Agro é um exemplo brilhante de como a agricultura moderna e sustentável pode ser uma força motriz para a transformação positiva.

Name: Plaats De Kleine Aarde
Description:
De Kleine Aarde in Boxtel was vanaf 1973 een proeftuin die pioniers de ruimte bood om te experimenteren met onder meer ecologische landbouw, duurzame energie en anders wonen.  Sinds 2023 komen opnieuw verschillende functies samen met ruimte voor onder meer praktijkkennis, inspiratie, onderwijs en innovatie. Het samenbrengen van verschillende functies, sectoren en actoren maakt deze Plaats tot een unieke plek. 

Veel dat van waarde is, is ooit met vallen en opstaan in de praktijk ontstaan en uitgedacht. Dat gebeurde onder meer op de Kleine Aarde. Ook nu is er volop behoefte aan gedeelde inzichten en praktische kennis van en voor iedereen die een bijdrage wil leveren aan een voedselsysteem dat zorgt voor de aarde. Of je nou boer, tuinder of wetenschapper bent, kunstenaar, financier of ‘gewoon’ in je eigen keuken staat te koken, je bent vanaf weer welkom bij Plaats De Kleine Aarde; het bruisende vlaggenschip van de Plaatsen.

Name: KhetiUtsav
Description:
"I am Ready to Drive Meaningful Change!" 
KhetiUtsav 
By KhetiValah – A Signature Brand of Haladhari’s KhetiValah Foundation & Haladhari Communications Pvt. Ltd.

In the heart of India’s soil lies a story — of sweat, seeds, seasons, and soul.
KhetiUtsav is not just an event. It’s a celebration. A movement. A return to our roots.

Spearheaded by KhetiValah, the signature brand of Haladhari’s KhetiValah Foundation and Haladhari Communications Pvt. Ltd., KhetiUtsav is an agritourism initiative that brings together the timeless trio of agriculture, culture, and community on one vibrant platform.

This Harvesting Festival showcases India’s rich agricultural landscape on a brighter, broader canvas — a vision where fields turn into festivals, and the simple rhythms of rural life become a source of joy, pride, and learning for all.

 Our Mission:

To reconnect people with the land, to revive village culture, and most importantly, to encourage the direct consumption of farm produce. By creating a deeper understanding and appreciation of farming, we aim to:

Support farmers directly through farm-to-home models

Promote sustainability in food systems

Encourage urban citizens to adopt or engage in agricultural practices

Safeguard and showcase traditional rural cultures and indigenous wisdom to the world

Through KhetiUtsav, KhetiValah invites you to step into the fields, breathe in the earthy scent of harvest, listen to the folk songs, share a farmer’s meal, and feel the heartbeat of rural India.

This is more than nostalgia — this is a mission for sustainability, a celebration of identity, and a step towards a better, balanced future.

Join us in celebrating agriculture, culture, and community.
Let’s not just consume food — let’s understand it, respect it, and be a part of the hands that grow it.

KhetiUtsav — Rooted in Soil, Rising in Spirit.
#JaiKisan #KhetiUtsav #KhetiValah #CelebrateWithSoil

Nossa família é formada por mais de 1.500 colaboradores, que nos ajudam a concretizar nossa missão de fortalecer o agronegócio, proporcionando através da tecnologia e da inovação, o aprimoramento da gestão e melhoria da qualidade de vida a seus cooperados, colaboradores e sociedade. 

Nossos pilares são: 
Velocidade: é ser ágil para buscar soluções aos cooperados, colegas, parceiros, fornecedores e clientes. 

Aproximação: é estar ao lado do cooperado, colaborador, parceiro e fornecedor, oferecendo atendimento e assistência técnica de forma profissional, cordial e transparente. 

Consolidação: é ser a principal parceira do cooperado na comercialização de insumos, na compra da produção e assistência técnica, oportunizando o crescimento para todos e atingindo níveis de eficiência competitivos. 

Somos certificados GPTW pelo segundo ano consecutivo, somos uma das 10 melhores empresas para se trabalhar no Estado. Se quiser fazer parte do nosso time, converse com nossa RH por meio do WhatsApp:  (49) 99945-3519.

Name: Wijntuin De Blaak
Description:
Onze wijntuin ligt in het buitengebied van Fijnaart, tussen percelen voor gangbare landbouw en - fruitteelt, achter een dijk langs de Dintel. De wijntuin bestaat uit een bescheiden wijngaard (350 druivenstruiken), een voedselbosrand, een eetbare tuin en een kleine boomgaard. 
Kenmerkend voor onze manier van werken is dat wij samenwerken met de natuur. Dat wil zeggen dat wij de energie van de zon en de natuurlijke eigenschappen en talenten van de planten en de (bodem)dieren optimaal faciliteren met als doel de gewassen te laten groeien en bloeien en voedsel te laten produceren. We laten ons hierbij vooral inspireren door de positieve effecten van regeneratieve landbouw, in het bijzonder de syntropische landbouw. Wij gebruiken geen kunstmest en geen bestrijdingsmiddelen. Sinds 2024 nemen wij deel aan een onderzoek van Wageningen University naar de effectiviteit van schimmelbestrijding met in de natuur voorkomende vijanden van de schimmels. In 2025 is hiertoe in een deel van de wijngaard een proefplot ingericht. 
Sinds maart 2020 verbouwen wij witte en rode druiven en diverse soorten fruit. De voedselbosrand is in 2021 aangeplant en bevat bekende voedselbos bomen en struiken zoals de uiensoepboom, szechuanpeper, olijfwilg, krent, honingbes. Ook staan er diverse notenbomen. In 2025 hebben wij de syntropische eetbare tuin aangelegd. Deze bestaat uit diverse kruidenplanten, bessenstruiken en fruitboompjes. Van de druiven maken wij zelf wijn, het fruit verwerken we tot verschillende producten. Doordat we in Wijntuin De Blaak samenwerken met de natuur hebben we de biodiversiteit en het natuurlijk evenwicht in het ecologisch systeem binnen de wijntuin enorm zien toenemen. Wij zien de wijntuin vooral als inspiratiebron voor ecologisch bewustzijn van onze bezoekers. De wijntuin is een plek waar je via dé natuur in contact komt met je eigen natuur, letterlijk met je handen en je voeten in de bodem en door te luisteren naar de vele zingende vogels en zoemende insecten.

Description:
Somos uma empresa inovadora que atua em duas frentes distintas, unindo conhecimento técnico e expertise em relações humanas para transformar o agronegócio brasileiro.

AURA FERTILIZANTES: Nutrição Essencial para o Solo
Oferece soluções com a comercialização de produtos granulados para nutrição do solo, com foco em magnésio, cálcio, enxofre e boro. Nossos produtos são cuidadosamente formulados para otimizar a produtividade das lavouras, promovendo um manejo regenerativo e sustentável.

 AURA INTENTO: Potencializando Pessoas e Equipes
 Acreditamos que o sucesso do agronegócio depende do desenvolvimento das pessoas que o impulsionam. Por isso, oferecemos soluções em gestão comportamental para equipes de revendas agrícolas, suporte personalizado para lideranças e análise do componente humano das empresas.

Na Aura Agro, acreditamos que a agricultura moderna se baseia em três pilares:

1.	Inovação Sustentável: Buscamos soluções de vanguarda para otimizar a produtividade e a sustentabilidade das lavouras.
2.	Relacionamentos Duradouros: Valorizamos conexões humanas de qualidade, construindo parcerias duradouras com representantes, revendas e produtores, com base em transparência, confiança e compromisso.
3.	Lucratividade: Otimizamos o uso de insumos, reduzimos custos, aumentamos a produtividade e tornamos o agronegócio mais lucrativo.

Nossa área de atuação compreende os estados do Centro-Oeste, Sudeste e Paraná.

Junte-se a nós na jornada para um futuro agrícola mais próspero!

#AuraFertilizantes #Agronegócio #AgriculturaResponsável #NutrindoATerraValorizandoPessoas

Name: ERSO
Description:
ERSO is a pioneering startup at the forefront of agriculture and environmental solutions. We specialize in organic regenerative farming, agrivoltaics, agroforestry, soil regeneration, and a range of environmental services. We build regenerative biodiverse agroecosystems.

Our mission is to revolutionize the way we manage land, with the main commitment of restoring the environment. Through our innovative approaches and cutting-edge technologies, we aim to create organic regenerative farming systems that restore degraded land while producing a positive environmental impact.

Our soil regeneration services focus on rebuilding healthy soils by utilizing natural processes. By fostering soil vitality, we support nutrient cycling, water retention, and carbon sequestration, ultimately contributing to a healthier environment.

ERSO agrivoltaic solutions are innovative and disruptive because we adapt our farming techniques to the solar photovoltaic parks exactly as they are built. This approach allows to use the same land for both energy and crop production, providing multiple win-win benefits, including increased land use efficiency and higher photovoltaic energy yield.

In the realm of organic regenerative farming, we employ practices that prioritize soil health, biodiversity, and carbon sequestration. By implementing organic regenerative agriculture techniques, we restore soil fertility, enhance ecosystem climate resilience, maximize land utilization, and promote long-term sustainability.

Join us in our mission to transform agriculture and create a regenerative future. Connect with us to explore partnership opportunities, learn about our innovative solutions, and join the movement towards a more sustainable and resilient planet.

Name: American Castanea
Description:
At America Castanea, we are on a mission to bring the American chestnut tree back from the brink of functional extinction.

 For millennia, billions of chestnut trees reigned over 200 million acres of eastern woodlands until succumbing to a lethal disease known as the chestnut blight during the first half of the 20th century - an event called the greatest ecological disaster in the history of North American forests.

In many ways, the chestnut was America’s perfect tree. It has a broad, protective canopy, grows quickly, and supplies straight-grained rot-resistant lumber. Chestnut lumber was a vital part of the economy and was used for everything from cradles to coffins.

These trees also produced an annual abundant and nutritious food source - up to 6,000 nuts per tree per year. 

Recent research also suggests that American chestnuts store significantly more carbon than other hardwood species like oak or hickory.

After over thirty years of scientific achievement by a diverse coalition of scientists, land owners, and passionate volunteers, we stand ready to return a keystone species in the eastern forest ecosystem and U.S. economy. American Castanea, a public benefit corporation, is dedicated to the large-scale, responsible restoration of the American Chestnut tree.

Name: Southern Loggers Cooperative
Description:
In October of 2004, a small group of insightful businessmen decided to do something about the rising costs associated with the logging industry. The plan was simple. By forming a cooperative to utilize the "strength in numbers" approach, as a group they would be able to negotiate better prices than they would individually. Founded on the premise of value for its members, Southern Loggers Cooperative (SLC) set out in 2004 to give independent loggers, truckers, farmers and ranchers a helping hand in the form of real bargaining power to meet the challenges of today’s market. 

The SLC is a member-owned cooperative association which provides expertise in negotiation and contract formulation for the membership, which is composed of harvesters of timber, haulers of forest products in the natural state, finished products or products for recycling, forest road contractors, silvicultural contractors, forest landowners, farmers, ranchers, horticulturists or viticulturists. The philosophy of this cooperative is that the membership must receive the most competitive prices for their supplies, services and equipment in order to thrive in this ever-changing industry. 

Today our cooperative-owned fueling stations stretch from Texas to Ohio with annual fuel sales of nearly 57 million gallons in 2024. Our growth has been steady, but we’re far from finished. Saving our members money on fuel is our primary focus. We presently have 34 stations in 7 states including: AL, LA, MS, OH, SC, TX and VA. SLC membership has now reached over 6000 members spanning more than 27 states. Our members are part owners in a strong, independent organization with fantastic benefits.  Future plans include even more fuel locations, services and deeper discounts. Our members save on fuel, tires, parts, and fuel transfer pumps; and now the SLC is proud to offer our members Diesel Exhaust Fluid (DEF) at the pump at all stations.

Objectives

2. Innovation Promotion: Encourage the development of innovative solutions to addressagricultural challenges, leveraging technology and research.
3. Market Linkages: Facilitate connections between farmers and markets to enhance
productivity and profitability.
4. Sustainability: Promote environmentally friendly farming practices to ensure longterm agricultural sustainability.
5. Youth Engagement: Inspire and support young people to venture into agriculture as a
viable and rewarding career path.

Services

Name: The UPLB VALUES Lab
Description:
The project aims to strengthen capacity in the valuation and accounting of natural capital and ecosystem services in support of developing interventions for Sustainable Forest and Natural Resources Management. Specifically it aims to:

1.	Establish a repository of ecosystem service/s (ES) studies
2.	Identify gaps in the science and practice of valuation and accounting of natural capital and ecosystem services in the Philippines
3.	Develop simplified approaches and guidelines on valuing natural resources
4.	Build a critical mass of men and women researchers that will implement valuation studies in support of integrating natural capital accounts into the System of National Accounts (SNA)
5.	Promote the use of information from valuation studies for sustainable financing mechanism and access benefit sharing schemes
6.	Develop policy recommendations based on the gaps in science and practice of valuation identified

Name: alga.farm
Description:
Alga.farm kweekt verse Spirulina. Een van de meest voedingsrijke (micro) organismen op aarde. Hiervoor heeft Alga.farm zeer efficiënte foto-bioreactoren ontwikkeld in de kelder van het voormalig Tropicana zwembad in het centrum van Rotterdam. 
Dankzij onze reactoren kunnen eiwitten worden geproduceerd waarbij ruim 99% van het benodigde land en water wordt bespaard in vergelijking met andere eiwitbronnen zoals soja en vlees. Tevens worden er tijdens het kweekproces van Spirulina worden grote hoeveelheden koolstofdioxide (CO2) omgezet in zuurstof. 
Dankzij de neutrale smaak en textuur van onze Spirulina kan het gemakkelijk vermengt worden met bestaande voedingsmiddelen zoals smoothies, spreads, ijsjes, bonbons of andere gerechten. Deze producten worden hierdoor niet alleen gezonder maar ook duurzamer. 
De missie van Alga.farm is om gezond voedsel, op duurzame wijze in Nederland te produceren zodat we de planeet en de mensen erop gezonder kunnen maken.  Voor meer informatie zie: www.alga.farm
Location: Rotterdam, Selecteer een gebied, staat of provincie a.u.b.

Name: COAG - Coordinadora de Organizaciones de Agricultores y Ganaderos
Description:
La Coordinadora de Organizaciones de Agricultores y Ganaderos (COAG) es la primera organización agraria profesional de ámbito estatal que se constituye en España (1977). Es una organización plural, independiente y reivindicativa, representativa en todas las Comunidades Autónomas. Defiende los intereses del modelo social y profesional de agricultura, mayoritario en España, y da servicio a más de 150.000 agricultores y ganaderos a través de sus 220 oficinas en todo el territorio nacional y una delegación permanente en Bruselas. 

COAG está reconocida por el Ministerio de Agricultura, Alimentación y Medio Ambiente como organización agraria más representativa y como tal forma parte del Comité Asesor Agrario, órgano de interlocución oficial con el Gobierno. Además, es miembro del Consejo Económico y Social (CES), el COPA-COGECA y la Coordinadora Europea Vía Campesina.

Name: Grassfed Farmer
Description:
Agro-ecological Coaching, Consultancy & Education services designed to support farmers in achieving truly resilient profitable systems by taking a context specific soil centric approach to your farming operation. As a coach, it is about helping you figure out how to take the handbrake off and unlock the potential of your agribusiness. I am also a farmer, so I understand from first hand experience the challenges, practicalities and systems that make real farms tick.

Despite the name “Grassfed Farmer” I can support farmers across all farming enterprises. I work with clients across a range of scales 40ha - 2500ha, in both conventional and organic systems…the link is in the soil.

My coaching / consultancy offering has been greatly influenced by Integrity Soils after completing “CREATE Yellowstone 2024”. This programme led by Nicole Masters, is the world’s most in-depth training in agro-ecological systems thinking. 

Over the last fifteen years I have strategically integrated practical farming experience with a broad network across the supply chain, and extensive training in agro-ecological systems. My farming journey began on the family dairy farm and kiwi fruit orchards in New Zealand, grounding me in lean, profitable, year-round grazing systems. In the UK, I have managed farms in both commercial and direct selling models and was farm manager at FAI Farms during their seminal “AMP Grazing” research project. I now farm in the Cotswolds with my business partner at “Cotswold Cattle Company”. Cattle Co focuses on collaborating with landowners to increase natural capital through integrating our cattle into arable systems, whilst building a food brand (smash burgers) for our farming operations to feed into.

Currently based in the UK, I am positioned to work with farms and organisations globally. I dream big, with a mission to achieve landscape & community regeneration on 5 million hectares over my lifetime.

We’re building something different, meaningful, and profitable.

The future of agribusiness begins here — in Kentucky.
Scalable. Profitable. Authentic. Canruiz.

Name: Energy Crops GmbH
Description:
Die Energy Crops GmbH ist eine hundertprozentige Tochtergesellschaft der Berliner Energie und Wärme (BEW) und produziert Biomasse für energetische Zwecke durch den Anbau von Kurzumtriebsplantagen (KUPs) und Agroforstwirtschaft. Wir sind ein im Land Brandenburg tätiges landwirtschaftliches Unternehmen, das sich derzeit auf den Anbau von Kurzumtriebsplantagen und Agroforststreifen konzentriert, die eine nachhaltige Form von Biomasse für die Fernwärmeversorgung in Berlin liefern. Wir beraten und unterstützen Landwirte im Rahmen des Vertragsanbaus. Die Energy Crops organisiert eigenständig die Ernte, diese finden während der 20-jährigen Vertragslaufzeit alle drei bis vier Jahre statt, und bewirtschaftet derzeit rund 2.000 Hektar Agroforstfläche. 

                          

Energy Crops GmbH is a wholly owned subsidiary of Berliner Energie und Wärme (BEW) and a producer of biomass for energy purposes through the cultivation of short rotation coppice and agroforestry. We are a company operating in the German state of Brandenburg, currently focusing on the cultivation of short rotation coppice and agroforestry strips, providing a sustainable form of biomass for the district heating supply in Berlin. We advise and support the farmers as part of the contract cultivation. Energy Crops independently organises the harvest, which takes place every three to four years over the 20-year contract period, and currently manages around 2,000 hectares of agroforestry land.

Description:
InnoBovino es un App diseñada para el sector ganadero, apoya a las ganaderías con un sistema amigable y muy completo en el cual ingresan datos diariamente de sus actividades dependiendo del sistema productivo que utilicen (Lechería, Desarrollo, Engorde, Cría, Doble propósito) InnoBovino convierte esos datos en información funcional y a la mano, para impulsar la toma de desiciones inmediata, basada en información. 
InnoBovino Apoya a los técnicos y profesionales en el sector, permitiéndoles ser autorizados desde el App y sus usuarios personales, a las fincas que les estén brindando sus servicios. Facilitándoles hacer diagnósticos previos para dar un mejor servicio.

InnoBovino Apoya a las organizaciones e instituciones del sector, por medio del análisis de datos masivo. Toda organización ganadera que desee apoyar a sus miembros por medio de estudios, análisis y asesoría grupal, lo puede hacer con InnoBovino.

InnoBovino cuenta con un sistema de alertas, el cual es personalizable por los usuarios, permitiéndoles llevar un monitoreo remoto meticuloso.

Otra funcionalidad innovadora de InnoBovino, es la sección de InnoAprende, incluida en la App. En está sección nuestros usuarios pueden acceder a cursos, tutoriales, entrevistas, etc.. los cuales son impartidos por expertos en cada tema. 

Lo que viene en InnoBovino:
-Carbono neutralidad.
-Gestión Bufalina.
-Gestión de Ovinos.
-Gestión de Caprinos.
-Gestión de Porcinos. 
-Gestión de Caballos.
-Gestión Aviar

Name: Farm Marketing
Description: Helping farms use online marketing to find customers, so they can grow, profit & thrive.

Name: Het Voedselmoeras
Description:
Voor het huidige (dominante) agrarische systeem in het veenweidegebied moet het grondwaterpeil kunstmatig laag gehouden worden. Daardoor klinkt de bodem in, komen broeikasgassen vrij en komt zout water omhoog. Ook is de waterkwaliteit op veel plaatsen onvoldoende, én gaat de biodiversiteit achteruit. Daarnaast levert de huidige vorm van landbouw, de melkveehouderij, vaak onvoldoende inkomsten op voor de boer.

Het Voedselmoeras gebruikt permacultuur inzichten voor het ontwerpen van een regeneratief landbouwsysteem. Zo kunnen we samenwerken met de natuur om die gebieden ook productief te houden voor de mens. Oogst voedsel en grondstoffen en biedt tegelijkertijd ruimte voor de natuur en zuiver ook nog eens het oppervlaktewater. Dat is het idee achter het Voedselmoeras.

Het Voedselmoeras richt zich op het snijvlak van ondernemers, (kennis)organisaties en (lokale) overheden. We verbinden, inspireren en zoeken samen naar werkende verdienmodellen voor voedselmoerassen. Hierbij experimenteren we met natte teelt in het veenweidegebied en onderzoeken alternatieve verdienmodellen voor agrarisch ondernemers.

Name: Vanabandhu Naturals
Description: At Vanabandhu, we work tirelessly to bring about the conservation of forests and the sustainable development of forest-dependent communities. By providing technical and marketing support along the agriculture and forest products supply chain, we enable these communities to thrive while preserving the natural beauty of our planet.

Name: Shroomwell Innovation
Description: Shroomwell Innovation aims to empower the world through mycotechnology that leaves a net positive effect on the ecosystems we share and thrive in. We conduct applied research in forestry, mycoremediation, health, and nutrition. Our mycological competence center is located next to Tallinn Technical University (Taltech). It includes a vertical mushroom farm and high-tech laboratory for scientific and analytical services. In South-Estonia, Tõrva, we operate a large scale indoor mushroom growing facility. Overall in Estonia and USA we conduct research and outdoor growing on more than 500 hectares of forests.

A Ambiflora, é uma empresa que atua no setor florestal. "Nascida" em 2003, trata-se de uma empresa sólida, que ocupa uma posição de destaque no mercado nacional.
Primámos pela qualidade no serviço prestado, tendo sempre em consideração vetores como o cuidado pelo meio ambiente e a segurança dos nosso trabalhadores.
