Name: Agronativo Biosoluciones
Description:
Somos , una consultora líder en el sector agroalimentario con un enfoque en la sostenibilidad y la innovación. Con más de 4 años de experiencia, hemos estado impulsando la transformación en la cadena de valor agroalimentaria a través de soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas y una perspectiva centrada en la circularidad económica.


Nos especializamos en la transferencia tecnológica y de conocimiento para optimizar procesos y productos en la cadena agroalimentaria. Desde agricultura limpia y orgánica hasta el manejo eficiente de recursos naturales como el agua y el suelo, ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios.


Nuestra misión es proporcionar asesoramiento técnico de vanguardia y soluciones innovadoras a productores agrícolas y agroindustrias. Trabajamos en toda la cadena de valor, desde el mejoramiento genético de ganadería hasta el diseño de productos alimentarios y no alimentarios. Nuestro enfoque está arraigado en la economía circular y la responsabilidad ambiental.


En Agronativo Biosoluciones, nos enorgullece ser un socio estratégico indispensable para todos los actores del sector agrícola y agroindustrial. Promovemos la modernización tecnológica y la sostenibilidad en la producción agroalimentaria de Colombia y a nivel mundial.


Nuestros valores fundamentales son la responsabilidad, empatía, disciplina y compromiso. Nuestros pilares son la transferencia tecnológica y de conocimiento, la democratización del saber y la protección de la naturaleza.


Economía circular, agricultura sostenible, agricultura limpia, productos orgánicos, transferencia tecnológica.

Estamos aquí para enfrentar la crisis climática y resolver los desafíos desde la ingeniería. Apoyamos la transición hacia la economía circular y el escalamiento de sistemas productivos basados en la bioeconomía. También la creación de empresas de deep tech que integren múltiples sectores para un futuro más sostenible y saludable.

Name: Agro Betel
Description:
Há 23 anos, a Agro Betel é referência na exportação de gado vivo, conectando a tradição da pecuária brasileira com soluções inovadoras para os mercados globais. Localizada na Fazenda Betel, em São Paulo, somos pioneiros na exportação de bovinos, bubalinos, equinos e ovinos, oferecendo animais de alta qualidade genética para reprodução, engorda e abate.

Nosso compromisso com a qualidade é refletido em nossas instalações de ponta, como os Centros de Quarentena, onde os animais passam por rigorosos processos sanitários, garantindo o cumprimento das exigências internacionais. Com capacidades que variam de 2.400 a 14.000 animais, esses centros são projetados para proporcionar conforto e bem-estar, assegurando a saúde dos rebanhos.

Exportamos para todos os continentes, com foco em mercados exigentes, como os do Oriente Médio e Ásia. Utilizamos transporte aéreo para animais de alto valor genético e transporte marítimo para grandes volumes, garantindo que os animais cheguem ao destino em perfeitas condições. Nosso compromisso com a logística de ponta e o monitoramento contínuo assegura a rastreabilidade e o bem-estar dos animais em cada etapa do processo.

Ao longo desses anos, investimos em inovação, sustentabilidade e no desenvolvimento das comunidades ao nosso redor, com o objetivo de expandir nossa presença global. Agro Betel é sinônimo de qualidade, ética e compromisso com o futuro da pecuária mundial, conectando tradição e inovação a cada embarque.

Name: hektar9
Description:
Unsere Mission ist die Digitalisierung der Landwirtschaft.

Die Kernaufgabe von hektar9 ist eine ertragreiche und nachhaltige Landwirtschaft zu ermöglichen, indem ein kosteneffizienter und einfacher Zugang zu Maschinen geschaffen wird. Neben einer kostengünstigen Alternative zum Maschinenkauf wollen wir moderne Landtechnik einfach und flexibel verfügbar machen. Zudem ist es uns wichtig, eine größere Transparenz auf dem Markt für verfügbare Landmaschinen zu schaffen.

Name: Eytemaheert
Description:
Natuurbuurderij Eytemaheert richt zich op het optimaal voedsel produceren, binnen de grenzen van de natuur. Met de kringloop gesloten op bedrijfsniveau en een grote focus op herstel en behoud van biodiversiteit en bodemgezondheid, zetten wij ons dagelijks in voor een vorm van landbouw waar ecologie en economie hand in had gaan. 

Onze Groninger Blaarkop koeien zijn volledig grasgevoerd en leveren een wezenlijke bijdrage aan een veerkrachtige bodem en (boeren) natuur. 

Eytemaheert werkt aan het verder inrichten van een divers en veerkrachtig gebied, waarbij de natuur de landbouw versterkt, en andersom. 

Ook hebben we een CSA Tuinderij en werken we aan een verdere verbreding van de voedselproductie, binnen het gebied, waarbij wij werken op regeneratieve wijze.

Eytemaheert werkt samen met kennisinstellingen en overheden om de transitie naar een duurzame en toekomstbestendige landbouw te versnellen en ondersteunen.

Name: Grupo Gabanes
Description: Producir, procesar y comercializar alimentos de más alta calidad para el beneficio de nuestros clientes, aliados y colaboradores. Nuestra se sustenta en un equipo humano calificado y comprometido conn la eficiencia y el desarrollo sostenible del sector, el país y medio ambiente.

Name: NOVALTERRA
Description:
NOVALTERRA es una promotora de inversión rural especializada en conectar inversionistas del agro con propiedades rurales de alto potencial en Colombia. Desde hace más de 15 años facilitamos inversiones agroindustriales rentables, sostenibles y seguras a través de servicios inmobiliarios, técnicos, legales y estratégicos.

Contamos con un equipo interdisciplinario que combina conocimiento territorial, experiencia en agronegocios, tecnología y una red consolidada de compradores, vendedores e instituciones aliadas.

Nuestra oferta incluye tres servicios principales:

 BET (Búsqueda y Evaluación de Tierras):

Identificamos predios rurales que cumplen criterios de legalidad, aptitud productiva y viabilidad de inversión según las necesidades específicas de cada uno de nuestros clientes. Evaluamos cada propiedad desde una perspectiva técnica, jurídica y estratégica.

 SAV (Servicio Acelerador de Venta):

Ayudamos a propietarios a vender propiedades rurales y predios productivos de manera estructurada, diseñando una ruta de comercialización eficiente y enfocada en atraer compradores calificados.

 LandTrack (Bolsa de Tierras):

Plataforma privada con más de 1.000.000 de hectáreas caracterizadas. Es una herramienta para acceder a información detallada sobre tierras rurales listas para inversión.

 +80.000 hectáreas negociadas con éxito
 +50 negocios exitosos en los últimos 15 años
 +1.000.000 hectáreas ofertadas en nuestra base de datos

Creemos en un agro colombiano más competitivo, estructurado y transparente.

Transformamos la tierra en oportunidad.

Name: Fundación Urbanatika
Description:
Fundación Urbanatika, es una ONG dedicada a la investigación y desarrollo especialmente de las personas en situación de pobreza mediante la Industria Agro Urbana.

Desarrollamos iniciativas ambientales con tecnología donde utilizamos la automatización en proyectos como producción de abonos, proteinas de insectos, gestión de residuos orgánicos y producción agricola además de monitoreo ambiental para el cumplimiento de normativas ambientales vigente, decreto 90, norma 409/1-2, NCHC2880, entre otras.

Name: Det Fynske Dyrskue
Description:
Sommertid er dyrskuetid
– sådan har det været siden 1882 og sådan bliver det også i 2024, hvor Det Fynske Dyrskue åbner portene igen den 7.-9. juni.

Det traditionsrige dyrskue bringer årligt det mangfoldige landbrug til byen hen over en weekend. Her kan de ca. 50.000 gæster opleve, hvad det moderne landbrug kan byde på af prægtige dyr, gode lokale fødevarer, innovative maskiner samt initiativer, der skal værne om vores natur og bringe os tættere på den grønne omstilling. 

Skuet byder også på en kæmpe messe under åben himmel - Udelivsmessen. Udeliv dækker over alt fra outdoor-aktiviteter til det udeliv, vi elsker derhjemme i eget hus og have.

Det Fynske Dyrskue er for alle – små som store.

Name: Nojo Farm
Description: Welcome to Nojo Farm. For the next two years, this is a blog as I figure out how to startup and run a commercially viable farm, that doesn't use chemicals, hormones, pesticides or GMOs. Why two years, is because it takes about 24 months to turnover your first GMO/non-engineered crop. So, enjoy! Ask questions about farming, agriculture, farming economics and other animal husbandry topics and by all means leave advice as I have no idea what I'm doing. But we can figure it out together.

Name: BM
Description: En BM Monitoring, ayudamos a la industria agrícola y forestal global a fomentar el uso de tecnologías de vanguardia para impulsar el mejoramiento continuo y la innovación en sus cultivos. Sabemos que lo único constante es el cambio, por lo tanto, una rápida adaptación podrá ser la ventaja de su negocio. Nosotros lo podemos ayudar a través del monitoreo de alta precisión, el cual permitirá hacer un uso estratégico de los recursos, controlar la salud y el rendimiento de sus cultivos, brindar soporte a la administración de su campo y contribuir a procesos sustentables.

Their commitment is to combine modern technology with eco-friendly principles, assisting farmers and large enterprises across India to achieve resource-efficient agriculture and meet environmental sustainability goals. #SustainableBusiness #AgricultureInnovation #ForestryManagement #CarbonConsulting #GISMapping #EnvironmentalSolutions #Infrastructure

Name: Green Farm Coöperation
Description:
De telersvereniging Green Farm werd opgericht in 2005 en richt zich op de productie van groenten die bestemd zijn voor de versmarkt. Inmiddels telt Green Farm meer dan 200 actieve leden in België, Nederland en Frankrijk.
Eén van de belangrijkste doelstellingen van Green Farm is de telers ondersteunen waar mogelijk. We hebben met succes een zeer professionele teeladviesdienst uitgebouwd, waardoor we zelf ook altijd de producten van de best mogelijke kwaliteit geleverd krijgen van onze telers.

L'association de producteurs Green Farm a été fondée en 2005 et s'axe sur la production de légumes destinés au marché du frais. Entre-temps, Green Farm compte plus de 200 membres actifs en Belgique, aux Pays-Bas et en France.
L'un des principaux objectifs de Green Farm consiste à soutenir les producteurs en fonction des possibilités. Nous avons créé avec succès un service de consultance très professionnel en matière de culture, qui nous permet d'obtenir nous-mêmes les produits les plus qualitatifs possible de nos producteurs.

Description: IMPRESA PERSONA AGROALIMENTARE è un'associazione che unisce imprenditori, manager e professionisti del settore agroalimentare in tutta Italia. Nel 2024, Gianmaria Bettoni è stato eletto presidente, portando avanti l'eredità di Camillo Gardini, fondatore dell'associazione.

Name: GRASS4YOU
Description:
A Grass4you nasceu em 2014 e foi a primeira empresa em Portugal a vender relva natural em tapete exclusivamente online.

Somos uma plataforma de e-commerce que comercializa relva natural em tapete, incluindo o serviço de transporte e o de colocação dos mesmos, permitindo a qualquer utilizador adquirir relva através de um único CLICK.

Dispomos de uma rede de parceiros a nível nacional que nos permite disponibilizar serviços em todo o território nacional.

Através da nossa linha de apoio (+351 910 492 074), prestamos todo o aconselhamento técnico necessário à colocação dos tapetes de relva natural e à manutenção dos relvados.


Contacte-nos através do email admin@grass4you.com

Name: Boerderij De Annahoeve - De Moer
Description: In het Brabantse dorpje De Moer grenzend aan natuurgebied Huis ter Heide ligt onze bijna 100 jaar oude Hoeve waarbij zoveel mogelijk rekening wordt gehouden met de natuur. Dat is goed voor onze dieren, het landschap en voor jou. We hebben een melkveebedrijf, zijn Natuur-inclusief, leveren Planet Proof melk en verkopen een deel van onze eigen producten in de boerderijwinkel en automaten.

Name: WPSA - België
Description:
Welkom bij de Belgische afdeling van de World's Poultry Science Association (WPSA). De WPSA is een wereldorganisatie met als doel het verwerven, verspreiden en toepassen van kennis van alle aspecten van de pluimveehouderij. Dit houdt in: stimulering van contacten tussen en uitwisseling van informatie door bij de WPSA aangesloten leden. Deze leden zijn veelal afkomstig uit vakgebieden als onderzoek, onderwijs en voorlichting, zowel bij de overheid als in de industrie.

De WPSA tracht haar doel te bereiken door: 
- Het uitgeven van het WPSA-Journal met wetenschappelijke artikelen. Het Journal verschijnt vier keer per jaar, kan door alle leden van de WPSA digitaal worden ingezien of wordt toegezonden.
- Stimuleren van de organisatie en deelname aan wereldcongressen, regionale congressen, symposia en studiebijeenkomsten. De congressen vinden elke vier jaar plaats, afwisselend een wereldcongres en een Europees congres. 
- Samenwerking met andere (internationale) organisaties.

Name: 1919 by Shelby Arabians
Description:
Vision
Our family farm, led by Thomas and Tanja Shelby, has a clear vision: To connect the tradition of the purebred Arabian horse with modern genetics, premium nutrition, and sustainable athletic performance. Our focus is on health, longevity, and achieving results in racing and endurance.
Key Stallion & Genetics: DJELANO (HOL) 
The core of our breeding program is the stallion DJELANO (HOL) (b. 2013), who is the son of the legendary Nizam (GB) and the grandson of Amer (KSA).
• Sporting Performance: An excellent racehorse with a maximum HCP 82 and the title "Best Arabian in Sweden 2021".
• Genetic Quality: Tested and N/N (negative) for SCID, CA, and LFS.
• Breeding Fees (2026): Standard Fee of 8,000 SEK + Live Foal Guarantee for 10,000 SEK. We offer fresh semen (for Sweden) and EU-certified frozen semen (for export).
Equine Supplements: Djelano Signature Line 
We have developed a range of premium feed supplements that align with our philosophy of purity and quality. All products are made from 100% EU-sourced ingredients and are soy-free, palm-free, and molasses-free.
• ELITE PROTEIN MÜSLI: High-protein, grain-free muesli mix for muscle growth (38-40% Crude Protein).
• ASTRO Joint Support: Liquid joint support with Glucosamine, MSM, and Hyaluronic Acid.
• GASTRO Shield: For stomach lining protection, pH stabilization, and ulcer prevention, containing Sodium Bicarbonate and Clinofix (Zeolite).
• MUSCLE Regeneration: Recovery support with Red Beet Juice and Beta-Alanine to delay muscle acidification.

Description:

Name: MINNICK FAMILY FARM LLC
Description:
1st generation sustainable farm raising pork, chicken, honeybees, eggs, turkey, duck, lamb and beef. We raise ethically and all on pasture with nongmo feeds. Sheep and beef are not fed grain. 

We sell locally, farmers market, from the farm and we ship. 

With only a wife and husband pair and both working full time it gets busy.
We process what we can on the farm and all livestock gets sent to an inspected family own butcher.

We also consult for inquiries on regenerative agriculture ranging from half acre properties to hundreds of acres, this also entails plants and tree species along with ponds if interested. 

Currently accepting farm sponsorships for livestock housing, farm growth and outreach. Please let us know within if you're interested. we have many projects, dreams and ambitions you would be able to help with.

Name: Landgoed Zuylestein

Name: Argeave
Description:
Somos una empresa nacional, presente en el mercado avícola argentino desde el 2006.
Somos líderes en un mercado altamente competitivo. En Argeave hemos desarrollado programas de bioseguridad. Nuestro proceso de crianza se desarrolla en granjas ecológicamente controladas ubicadas en zonas especialmente aptas para la avicultura, asegurando una calidad de excelencia.

Nos unimos para formar CULTIVA Soluciones con el objetivo de ofrecer asesoramiento, soluciones y servicios personalizados a agricultores, productores y empresas agrícolas.

Nuestros Servicios son variados y adaptables a la necesidad del agricultor:

- Gestión de Cuadernos Digitales de explotación
- Prevención de Incidencias Condicionalidad y SIGPAC
- Alegaciones Incidencias Monitorización
- Fotografías Georreferenciadas (prevención y resolución de incidencias)
- Valoraciones, Peritajes e Informes técnicos
- Tramitación de Expedientes para Certificación en Producción Ecológica y Producción Integrada (mediación entre agricultor y certificadora)
- Gestiones en Registros Específicos (ROPO, RETO, ROMA, Explotación Prioritaria, etc.)

En CULTIVA Soluciones, estamos listas para ser tu aliado en el crecimiento y el éxito de tu negocio agrícola. No dudes en ponerte en contacto con nosotros para saber más sobre cómo podemos colaborar contigo

Desde la Región de O’Higgins, trabajamos directamente en terreno para crear una agricultura más inteligente, rentable y segura, conectando la experiencia agrícola con la potencia de los datos.

 Riego inteligente
 Seguridad y monitoreo remoto
 Gestión hídrica y nutricional
 Robótica agrícola y sensores en tiempo real

Porque creemos que el futuro del agro no es solo producir más, sino producir mejor.

Name: Digichange Agronomists Ltd
Description: Digichange Agronomist is a private limited company that offers agronomic extension and writing services. It serves many customers, including small and medium enterprises and individuals interested in farm extension and writing services. The company thrives on addressing issues farmers face across the value chain, such that clients will have seamless production and sales and after-sales care.

Name: agrifoodTEF Austria
Description:
AgrifoodTEF ist ein Netzwerk von Testzentren in Europa, das Unternehmen & Start-ups aus dem Agrar- und Lebensmittelproduktionssektor bei der Produktentwicklung von KI- und Robotik-Lösungen unterstützt.

Zur Förderung einer nachhaltigen und effizienten Lebensmittelproduktion bietet AgrifoodTEF eine breite Palette unterschiedlicher Services für Unternehmen an, die diesen dabei helfen sollen, ihre Produktentwicklungen im Bereich KI & Robotik unter realen Bedingungen zu testen und zu validieren. Damit wird den Unternehmen eine einzigartige Möglichkeit angeboten, ihre Produkt- bzw. Anwendungsidee einen entscheidenden Schritt weiter in Richtung Marktreife zu bringen.

Die Projektpartner bilden ein Netzwerk, welches den heterogenen Bedingungen im Agrar- und Lebensmittelproduktionssektor in ganz Europa gerecht wird. Die nationalen TEF-Knoten, wie die nationalen Konsortien im Projekt bezeichnet werden, bieten hierfür Services an, die für die jeweiligen Fachgebiete und territorialen Bedürfnisse optimiert sind. Das Serviceangebot umfasst neben physischen Test- und Validierungsmöglichkeiten, z.B. in Form von Feldversuchen oder auf Maschinenprüfständen, auch virtuelle Services, z.B. Testen von Algorithmen auf Grundlage verschiedener Datensätze, welche komplett remote durchgeführt werden können und damit für Kunden aus ganz Europa jederzeit verfügbar sind.

Name: Giovanni Farm
Description:
Welcome to Giovanni Farm, a verdant haven where the artistry of agriculture unfolds across fields, pastures, and orchards. Nestled in the embrace of nature, our farm stands as a testament to the seamless integration of general farming, ranching, and the cultivation of succulent fruits.

In the heart of our fields, a patchwork of crops flourishes under the sun's nurturing glow. From the organic tubers to the vibrant hues of seasonal vegetables, our commitment to sustainable and responsible farming practices is evident. At Giovanni Farm, we harmonize traditional wisdom with modern techniques, ensuring a bountiful harvest that not only sustains but enriches the land.

Venture into our ranching operations, where the well-being of our livestock is paramount. Sprawling pastures provide a natural haven for contented animals, from free-ranging poultry to the gentle graze of our grass-fed cattle. Ethical ranching practices guide us as we strive to create a symbiotic relationship between the land and its inhabitants, resulting in high-quality, humane products.

Stroll through our nascent orchard, where the air is refreshing. Giovanni Farm takes pride in cultivating two varieties of fruit trees; avocados and bananas.  Our commitment to fruit farming extends beyond mere cultivation; it's a dedication to nurturing the flavors of the land and sharing the bounty with those who appreciate the pure, natural goodness that nature provides.

At Giovanni Farm, we view agriculture as a harmonious dance, where the rhythm of the seasons guides our every step. Our integrated approach to general farming, ranching, and fruit cultivation is a celebration of the interconnectedness of these disciplines. Join us on this journey as we cultivate not just crops, livestock, and fruits, but a legacy of sustainable farming that honors the land and its abundance.

Name: Lifeworks Global
Description:
Lifeworks Global teaches lifelong skills to farmers on how to restore optimal soil health using freely available materials that boost yields by up to 150% after just one harvest.

This increases incomes, enhances resilience to climate change and has long-term added benefits in terms of carbon sequestration, employment creation and abiotic stress tolerance.

Lifeworks Global works across the areas of sustainable agriculture; climate change mitigation and adaptation; regenerative agriculture; and forests and landscape restoration. We work with established partners running projects in farming communities, training smallholder farmers in how to make and apply 18-day compost and microbial biofertilizers. 

Our key aim is to empower communities to move away from damaging chemical fertilizers, to healthy, organic alternatives to deliver lasting change.

Name: ARABLE EARTH PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
ARABLE EARTH PRIVATE LIMITED is a Hyderabad-based startup committed to addressing environmental challenges such as rising CO₂ levels, greenhouse gas emissions, and soil degradation. The company is pioneering sustainable solutions through the production of Biochar, a carbon-rich material derived from bamboo using advanced pyrolysis technology. With a vision to combat climate change and promote regenerative agriculture, ARABLE EARTH is actively encouraging bamboo cultivation under a buy-back agreement and sourcing bamboo from the Telangana government.
Biochar is a climate-positive material with multiple environmental and agricultural benefits:
1.	Carbon Sequestration – Locks carbon in the soil for centuries, preventing CO₂ emissions.
2.	GHG Reduction – Lowers methane (CH₄) and nitrous oxide (N₂O) emissions.
3.	Soil Enhancement – Boosts fertility, moisture retention, and microbial activity.
4.	Waste Management – Converts agricultural waste into a valuable resource.
5.	Water Retention – Increases soil water-holding capacity, aiding drought-prone areas.
BIOCHAR PRODUCTION & INFRASTRUCTURE
The company is setting up a cutting-edge Pyrolysis unit designed to process 409 tons of bamboo per day, yielding approximately 109 tons of Biochar. This large-scale operation is expected to commence production in 2026, positioning ARABLE EARTH as a key player in India's carbon sequestration and soil enrichment initiatives

Jakość naszych produktów, solidność i elastyczność w działaniu przekonują naszych klientów do długoterminowej współpracy z nami. Wszystko to sprawia, że nieprzerwanie rośnie zapotrzebowanie na nasze produkty zarówno w Polsce, jak i za granicą.

Nasz cel to zagwarantowanie naszym klientom wzrostu wydajności produkcji  przy znaczącej poprawie jej opłacalności.

We are experienced and well-trained to propagate a variety of plant species. Our propagation units are equipped to handle the requirements of young seedlings. We continue to learn, expand and develop our capabilities to meet the needs of our esteemed customers.

Name: Arefloresta
Description:
A Associação dos Reflorestadores de Mato Grosso (Arefloresta), atua desde 2003 para fortalecer o setor de florestas plantadas no estado.

Representamos uma cadeia produtiva completa, unindo produtores, indústrias, empresas de assistência técnica e outros parceiros.

Nosso objetivo é promover o desenvolvimento econômico sustentável, garantindo que o crescimento agroindustrial seja suprido por florestas plantadas, não pelo desmatamento.

Trabalhamos na defesa e na criação de políticas públicas que incentivam o setor, como o Plano de Suprimento Sustentável.

Acreditamos na integração lavoura-pecuária-floresta e no potencial de áreas degradadas para o reflorestamento, transformando passivos ambientais em ativos econômicos.

Atuamos na conscientização sobre a importância do eucalipto e de outras florestas plantadas, desmistificando informações equivocadas.

A Arefloresta plataforma de negócios, estudos e inovação, conectando produtores a consumidores e incentivando o uso de biomassa renovável.

Nosso compromisso é com um Mato Grosso cada vez mais sustentável, impulsionando a economia e o meio ambiente de forma responsável.

Name: Blodgett Urban Garden (BUG)
Description:
Blodgett Urban Gardens (BUG) is a 2.3- acre community garden located in the historic Third Ward – less than one mile southeast of downtown Houston, TX. Within its boundaries is Cuney Homes, a public housing development, and two of the City’s universities – Texas Southern University, an historically black university (HBCU) and the University of Houston.  

The garden’s presence in the community is the result of efforts by Texas Southern University students and residents who were concerned that the community in which they lived and studied had been designated a food desert. Since 2012, BUG has served the community through its mission – to provide access to fresh produce, to educate the community about gardening and good nutrition, and to create a safe gathering place. In 2020, BUG expanded during the height of the COVID-19 pandemic to help meet the increased food insecurity demand exacerbated by additional grocery store closures surrounding Third Ward, higher food prices, lack of transportation to healthy food options.  Currently, BUG boasts over 90 beds of fresh fruits and vegetables growing throughout a given season and offers produce during the weekly Saturday Farmer’s Market at a cost of donations only.  Through volunteers, donations and sponsors like you, BUG continues to provide access to fresh produce.

Name: Dutch Canary
Description: We welcome you to our finca on Gran Canaria. It’s locally know as ‘La Hoyatilla’ which can be best translated to ‘The Dimple’. This name is based on the finca’s comfortable and sheltered position on our mountain. The finca is surrounded by mountains that are almost barren. Once, they were covered by extensive pine forests. Cut down by mankind to fuel the growing rum production, it created space and opportunity for extensive agriculture. But during the last decades, more and more people exchanged the countryside and farm life for opportunities in Las Palmas or on the Spanish mainland, leaving behind abandoned and degrading terraces to remember us of those days. Barren, unused, lacking biodiversity and water, the mountains deteriorate quickly. We want to do something about that and change the tide on our mountain. We want to return the mountain to a natural state where it can provide its own water and fertility. This will make it flourish once again.
Location: Gáldar, Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

Name: Nabahya Food Institute
Description:
Nabahya Food Institute (NFI) is an organization based in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to bring local farmers work in cooperatives, mitigating the cycle of poverty, starvation and climate change while promoting access to clean Energy and Resilient Food Systems with commitment to tackling the dual challenge of increasing food production and protecting natural resources and the environment. NFI is a grant award winner for the Water and Energy for Food Grand Challenge for Development (WE4F). WE4F is an international initiative jointly supported by the German Federal Ministry for Economic Cooperation and Development, the European Union, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Government of the Netherlands, the Norwegian Agency for Development Cooperation (Norad), the Swedish International Development Cooperation Agency (Sida), and the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID). 
NFI is also a grant award winner of the TerraFund for AFR100 Landscapes Restoration Champions, a program jointly run by World Resources Institute, One Tree Planted and Realize Impact. 
NFI is nominated among 48 best world initiatives in sustainability by the Food Planet Prize.

En Id Animal hemos desarrollado el Nasobiograma Inteligente: ¿qué es y cómo funciona?
Es un sistema de identificación animal a través de la huella del morro. El sistema se basa en la lectura del morro del animal: a través de un proceso basado en Inteligencia Artificial, se identifica la huella como única, se registra, y se compara con otros morros para validar la veracidad de la identidad del animal.

Name: Forests To Fortune; People, Planet, Profit
Description:
Anyone can now invest in tropical hardwood trees as green assets.

Las Azucenas is an expertly managed reforestation farm comprising 10,000 planted  tropical hardwood trees of high economic value. There are three types of prized hardwoods on the farm: mahogany (Swietenia macrophylla King), cedar (Cedrela odorata L.) and ciricote (Cordia dodecandra Dc.). Hardwoods in other parts of the world take 80 to 100 years to reach maturity. In the Petén region of northern Guatemala, well-cared-for hardwoods achieve maturity in an average of 18 years. The combination of ideal soil, humid climate and rainfall provides optimal conditions for trees to grow rapidly and thrive. 

Las Azucenas also bodes well for its human counterparts, generating 100 seasonal jobs per year for a period of 18 years, and maintaining a permanent core technical team charged with designing and developing the treescape and nurturing and caring for the trees full-time.  Having this core technical team onsite is critical, as high-value trees left to grow in the wild would be vulnerable to premature chopping and at risk of fires caused by human activity.

We extend a warm invitation to you to become more familiar with the Las Azucenas project and consider becoming an owner of your own prized hardwood tree. The team at Los Santos, led by Las Azucenas owner Javier García Esquivel, has effectively democratized environmental impact reforestation projects by generating a sustainable model that accounts for all project resource requirements and establishes the units required to reach equilibrium while designing it as a viable proposition for a community of investors to consider. Unlike other timber investment projects, which are accessible to only a select few, this one allows individuals to purchase as few hardwoods as they wish or can afford, even just one tree. 

Anyone can now invest in the cultivation one or more trees from anywhere in the world.   Learn more at goodalways.com

Name: Larval
Description:
At Larval, we're transforming animal nutrition with sustainable insect protein. Our mission? To address the environmental issues associated with traditional animal feed, specifically the deforestation associated with soybean meal.

Why insect protein?

Efficiency: A tiny area of land can produce as much protein as a huge soybean field.
Nutritional superiority: Insects are a natural part of an animal's diet

 Our Process:
 Circular Model: We use food waste from local suppliers to feed our insects
 Sustainable Production: Reduces waste and increases sustainability
 High Quality Feed: Superior nutritional value that improves the welfare of the animals
 Added Value: Producing organic fertilizer as a byproduct

Join us in revolutionizing the food chain for a sustainable future. Larval is more than a company - it is a movement towards efficient, environmentally friendly agriculture.

Name: WULU
Description:
WULU zajmujemy się projektowaniem i produkcją innowacyjnego systemu monitorowania pasieki.

Taki system pozwala na efektywne zarządzanie i opiekę nad ulami.
Umożliwia śledzenie temperatury, wilgotności i poziomu hałasu w ulu, co pomaga w wykrywaniu wczesnych oznak problemów zdrowotnych i środowiskowych. 

Dzięki zebranym danym można nie tylko mieć dostęp w sposób bieżący i bezprzewodowy do informacji na temat tego, co się dzieje w pasiece, ale też analizować i przewidywać zagrożenia. 

Projekt został wyróżniony w Międzyuczelnianym, Ogólnopolskim Konkursie Młodych Mistrzów organizowanym przez Radę Programową Forum Teleinformatyki.

Name: Iedere Boer Een Bos
Description:
Iedere boer een bos

Van ontwerp naar uitvoering. Van idee naar systeem.

Er worden steeds meer voedselbossen aangelegd. Maar wat daarna komt – het echte werk – blijft vaak liggen. Het beheer. De zorg. Het op gang brengen van een levend systeem dat tijd, kennis en inzet vraagt. Precies dat is wat voedselbossen kwetsbaar maakt: ze beginnen vol energie, maar lopen vast voordat ze echt iets opleveren.

Wij willen dat anders doen.

Iedere boer een bos bouwt aan een professioneel beheermodel voor voedselbossen op agrarische grond. Wij nemen de kritieke eerste tien jaar voor onze rekening – de periode waarin het voedselbos vooral vraagt, maar nog weinig teruggeeft. Zo maken we het mogelijk voor boeren om te verduurzamen zonder hun bedrijf op het spel te zetten.

We werken samen met boeren, niet over hun hoofden heen. Zij blijven eigenaar van hun grond. Wij doen het werk. En samen bouwen we aan een systeem dat wél toekomst heeft.

Dit is geen adviesbureau. Geen subsidiegedreven project. Dit is uitvoerend werk, gebaseerd op ervaring in het veld, met de blik op schaal en impact.

We maken van het voedselbos een serieus onderdeel van het boerenbedrijf.

En dat begint met goed beheer.

Name: Green Farmer Co-Op Limited
Description:
Our organization fosters an environment of cooperation between farmers, scientists, entrepreneurs, regulatory agencies, traditional financial institutions and technology solution providers to accomplish our mission. TGF Co-Operative welcomes new members, including farmers and circular Bio-Economy professionals to join. 

It is a collaborative community led by Farmers and Bio-Economy professionals developing practical and compliant solutions in the new Circular Bio-Economy. TGF is laying the groundwork for farmers to develop practical solutions to thrive in the new Circular Bio-Economy.

The Co-Operative aims to produce high-quality duckweed for use as animal feed and for the extraction of valuable bioactive compounds. Through our various partnerships, TGF is positioning itself to become a leader in the cultivation and processing of duckweed as a cash crop in Europe. Membership of the cooperative offers a unique opportunity for members to participate in a growing industry with a high potential for growth and profitability.

Duckweed is an alternative protein source for agri-food application. Preliminary investigation has demonstrated that amino acid profile of duckweed is comparable to those of land based pulses particularly suitable for agri-food applications. Duckweeds evolved to take advantage of the minerals released by decaying organic materials in water. Contaminated waters that are high in P and K and an Ammonia source will suit duckweed cultivation. Researchers have shown duckweed cultivation effective in removing Nitrogen and Phosphorus from animal manure waste water.

The Green Farmer Co-Operative Society Limited (TGF) is registered under the Industrial and Provident Societies Acts, 1893 to 2021.

Name: Central de Frades S. Coop. Galega
Description:
Desde 1963, Central de Frades traballa ao servizo das explotacións gandeiras galegas, ofrecendo unha ampla gama de servizos e solucións integradas que melloran a rendibilidade, o benestar animal e a sostibilidade das granxas. Cun equipo altamente cualificado e máis de 800 socios, comprometémonos en fortalecer o sector agroalimentario galego a través da profesionalización, a innovación e o respecto polo medio rural.

As nosas áreas de actuación inclúen:

• Nutrición animal: Fabricamos pensos personalizados para cada explotación, garantindo a trazabilidade e a calidade de cada ingrediente para obter un produto natural e saudable.

• Veterinaria e saúde animal: Ofrecemos servizos especializados en calidade do leite, reprodución, e prevención sanitaria para mellorar a produtividade e saúde dos nosos animais.

• Certificación e asesoramento técnico: Apoio agronómico e técnico para optimizar a xestión das explotacións, asegurar a súa viabilidade e adaptarse aos estándares de calidade e sostibilidade.

• Sostibilidade e compromiso social: Comprometémonos coa conservación do medio e a revitalización do rural galego, impulsando prácticas agrícolas que reduzan a pegada ambiental e aseguren un futuro próspero para as novas xeracións.

En Central de Frades, cremos na forza da unión e o traballo conxunto. Máis de 60 anos despois, seguimos traballando coa mesma ética, responsabilidade e dedicación que nos viu nacer, para contribuír ao benestar das persoas que viven do campo e á calidade dos produtos que chegan aos fogares.

Name: Associació de Dones del Món Rural
Description:
Som dones rurals de Catalunya, principalment ramaderes i pageses, amb la fi de visibilitzar la nostra feina i millorar la igualtat d’oportunitats. 

Només el 20% de dones es dediquen professionalment al sector primari, tot i que gairebé un milió de dones viuen en zones rurals. És molt important i necessari que les dones estiguin presents al món rural i per descomptat, que tinguin veu a tots els espais de decisió i de debat del sector. 

Des de fa segles, la figura de la dona a pagès s’ha subordinat a realitzar tasques associades a la família, la pagesia i el camp, quedant invisibilitzades tot i realitzar gran part del treball en els sistemes productius. La feina, l’experiència i el saber femení s’ha anat silenciant al llarg de diversos anys. 

Des del Grup Dones del Món Rural volem posar de relleu el gran i valuós paper que tenen totes les dones de Catalunya en el desenvolupament econòmic, rural, local i territorial. L’apoderament de la dona al món és possible, la igualtat de gènere i d’oportunitats és assolible i millorar la posició de la dona en aquest sector és aconseguible. 

Som dones del món rural.

Name: The Cacao Project PH
Description:
The Cacao Project is an initiative which builds sustainable, regenerative, and resilient agricultural livelihoods in San Fernando, Camarines Sur, Philippines.

It was founded in the aftermath of Super Typhoon Nock-ten, which in 2016 destroyed over 80% of agricultural land and highlighted the urgency to rethink the existing food systems in the area, which have become increasingly vulnerable to extreme weather conditions brought about by climate change.

The Cacao Project provides skills training, resources, interventions, and guidance for farmers, ensuring that their livelihoods are positioned to work with nature and restore our landscapes, while providing them with an equitable livelihood.

Name: Davidova ekologická včelí farma
Description:
100% PŘÍRODNÍ — 100% RAW

V podstatě necháváme matku přírodu, sezónní cykly, symbiotické vztahy a mikroklima, aby kultivovali základ našich produktů. Naší úlohou je představit je světu v jejich nejvyšší a nefalšované podobě s co nejmenšími lidskými zásahy a nedostatky.

Náš raw med je vyráběný na jižní Moravě v České republice ekologicky chovanými včelami. Je to krásný a vzácný zdroj s výrazně vyššími hladinami enzymů a antibakteriálními vlastnostmi, než jaké se nacházejí v jiných medech.

Raw med, neboli med v syrovém stavu, je v poslední době stále populárnější. Tento druh medu je zpracováván minimálně a zachovává tak všechny přírodní látky, které jsou v něm obsaženy. V raw medu jsou stále přítomné enzymy, vitamíny, minerály a další prospěšné látky. Jeho konzumace může přinést mnoho zdravotních výhod, včetně podpory imunitního systému, zlepšení trávení a poskytnutí antioxidantů.

Name: Kopakker
Description:
Kopakker | Van vitale bodem naar waardevolle ketens

Kopakker helpt boeren, bedrijven en ketenpartners om de voordelen van vitale bodems om te zetten in marktwaarde. Wij geloven dat gezonde bodems de basis vormen voor duurzame en voedzamere voedselketens. Door bodemgezondheid te koppelen aan product- en marktproposities creëren wij tastbare meerwaarde voor consumenten, boeren en het milieu.

Met onze bewezen aanpak ontwerpen we marktproposities (PMC's) en ontwikkelen we Minimum Viable Products (MVP's) die duurzame ketens mogelijk maken. We brengen bodemvitaliteit, CO₂-vastlegging, lagere emissies en verminderde watervervuiling samen in innovatieve producten die consumenten waarderen en boeren belonen. Ons werk richt zich op praktische opschaling, samenwerking met ketenpartners, en het ontwikkelen van strategieën die zowel economische als maatschappelijke impact hebben.

Samen bouwen we toekomstbestendige voedselketens die van bodemgezondheid profiteren. Bij Kopakker zetten we visie om in realiteit, van strategisch ontwerp tot uitvoering. Klaar om waarde te creëren uit vitale bodems? Ontdek samen met ons de kansen in uw keten.

Name: EcoGroundTech
Description:
Somos uma empresa familiar que transforma tradição em inovação. Atuamos no desenvolvimento de soluções agrícolas sustentáveis e tecnologicamente avançadas, com foco no cultivo do cânhamo e outras plantas de interesse farmacêutico. Nosso compromisso é com um futuro mais verde, inteligente e regenerativo.

Assumimos a missão de transformar a terra cultivada há gerações por nossa família em um laboratório de inovação sustentável, unindo saberes ancestrais à agricultura de precisão, sensoriamento de solo e automação inteligente.

Visamos explorar todo o potencial da terra— desenvolvendo o potencial industrial e preservando o meio ambiente — com tecnologia de ponta, gerando impacto positivo no Brasil e no mundo.

Nossos Valores
Inovação com raízes – Valorizamos o conhecimento tradicional aliado à ciência e à tecnologia.
Sustentabilidade integral – Buscamos impactar positivamente o meio ambiente e a sociedade.
Excelência e qualidade – Operamos com rigor técnico e foco nos mais altos padrões regulatórios.
Diversidade e bem-estar – Respeitamos a biodiversidade e promovemos saúde em todas as dimensões.
Responsabilidade social – Geramos empregos, movimentamos a economia e promovemos o desenvolvimento local.

Objetivos Estratégicos

Implantar uma operação moderna, com baixo impacto ambiental
Desenvolver fitoterápicos com valor agregado para o setor farmacêutico
Criar eco-florestas inteligentes e regenerativa
Garantir conformidade regulatória e padrões internacionais de qualidade
Atuar no mercado nacional e internacional com visão sustentável e inovação contínua

Diferenciais da Nossa Proposta

União entre tradição agrícola e alta tecnologia
Aplicação de automação e sensoriamento no campo
Foco em pesquisa e desenvolvimento
Acesso a mercados em crescimento
Compromisso com a economia verde e o impacto positivo

Aspiramos a embellecer el paisaje con bosques nativos y praderas saludables, mientras que también proporcionamos un ambiente productivo para nuestra ganadería y otros negocios.

Además, estamos comprometidos con el crecimiento y desarrollo de nuestra comunidad local, brindando oportunidades para el aprendizaje y la capacitación en ganadería regenerativa y prácticas de manejo de la tierra sostenibles.

Name: Capto Biotech & Infra Limited
Description:
Agriculture has long been the backbone of India's economy, providing employment to 90% of the population. While India is self-sufficient in agriculture, meeting both domestic food security needs and exporting high-quality produce, the demand for quality agricultural products has been steadily increasing. To meet this demand, Indian agriculture requires new and effective production technologies to enhance productivity, profitability, and sustainability.

Modern agricultural practices are crucial for the growth of the sector, with CBIL offering farmers various scientific advances and methods, specializing in Horticulture. Our team focuses on providing affordable, advanced, and sustainable techniques to improve quality and affordability in farming. Our goal is to help farmers reduce production costs, enhance profitability, and navigate the unpredictable market conditions influenced by fluctuating crop prices and economic shifts.

Name: Sindicato Rural de Pedregulho
Description:
O Sindicato Rural de Pedregulho é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos, reconhecida pelo Ministério do Trabalho e Emprego e mantida pelos produtores rurais. É filiado à FAESP (Federação da Agricultura do Estado de São Paulo), integrante da CNA (Confederação da Agricultura e Pecuária do Brasil), que reúne 27 federações, 2.300 sindicatos.

A defesa dos interesses dos produtores rurais é a razão de ser do Sindicato. Braço político do homem do campo, articula reivindicações do segmento, como melhoria da infraestrutura, ampliação do crédito, preços condizentes com os custos e investimentos, redução de impostos para a cadeia produtiva e garantias para quem se dedica a uma atividade de elevado risco e fundamental para o País.

A entidade atua na organização e valorização da classe. Viabiliza suporte através de levantamentos e estudos sobre questões de ordem econômica, social e ambiental. Representa legalmente a categoria com assessoria previdenciária, tributária, econômica e jurídica. Promove ainda cursos e treinamentos para melhoria da qualidade de vida e dos processos de produção, beneficiando a família rural e a sociedade como um todo.

Name: GC4SHEEP
Description:
Este Grupo Operativo ha sido beneficiario de una subvención ejecución de proyectos de innovación de interés general por grupos operativos de la Asociación Europea para la Innovación en materia de productividad y sostenibilidad agrícolas (AEI-Agri), en el marco del Programa Nacional de Desarrollo Rural 2014-2022, con fondos procedentes del Instrumento de Recuperación Europeo (EU Next Generation). La autoridad de gestión encargada de la aplicación de la ayuda correspondiente se atribuye a la Dirección General de Desarrollo Rural, Innovación y Formación Agroalimentaria (DGDRIFA). Se trata de una medida subvencionada al 100 % con fondos procedentes del Instrumento de Recuperación de la Unión Europea (Fondos Next Generation) y articulada a través del Programa Nacional de Desarrollo Rural y del Fondo Europeo Agrícola de Desarrollo Rural (FEADER). El montante total de la ayuda asciende a 599.022,40 € y el presupuesto del proyecto a 599.022,40 €.

Hiperenlace a la Comisión Europea => https://commission.europa.eu/eu-regional-and-urban-development/topics/rural-development_es

El Grupo Operativo GC4SHEEP es responsable del contenido de esta página.

Puede consultar más información sobre el proyecto en la página web.

Name: SmartCow
Description:
La plataforma de monitorización de ganado bovino es una herramienta tecnológica diseñada para ayudar a los ganaderos a supervisar y gestionar su ganado de manera eficiente. Utiliza dispositivos de seguimiento colocados en el ganado para recopilar datos en tiempo real sobre su ubicación, movimiento, salud y producción de leche. Esta información se puede acceder a través de una aplicación móvil o una plataforma web, lo que permite a los ganaderos monitorizar su ganado desde cualquier lugar y en cualquier momento.

Además, la plataforma también proporciona alertas automatizadas para cualquier problema de salud o comportamiento anormal detectado en el ganado, lo que permite a los ganaderos tomar medidas rápidas para abordar cualquier problema. En resumen, la plataforma de monitorización de ganado bovino permite una mayor eficiencia, reducción de costos y una mejor calidad de vida del ganado.

La competenza acquisita negli anni ha consentito a Tenuta Ritornella di raggiungere eccellenti risultati organolettici nella produzione di un olio d'oliva che non risulta grasso ed è particolarmente apprezzato in tutto il territorio europeo e dagli addetti al settore.
L'azienda negli ultimi anni si è occupata anche della produzione agrumicola sfruttando le capacità produttive del territorio dell'Etna. 
Nella tenuta è possibile recarsi in vista e apprezzare le eccellenti qualità dei prodottin un percorso naturalistico di assoluto valore.

Name: BlackSoil
Description:
BlackSoil was created and launched by a team of regenerative ag experts. Our expertise with regenerative farming and carbon sequestration gave us the inspiration to work out a system that puts the Farmer in its heart and not the credit or the emitting company.

Our experience with regenerative farming goes back to 2016 when we started to mix our first cover crop cocktails. Until that time, no-till and cover cropping was not widely known in Hungary and the surrounding countries. In the last 7 seasons we grew into a company with a complete regenerative product portfolio, and a team overseeing more that 35.000 hectares of regenerative lands.

Name: Rede do Campo Cantinho da Roça
Description:
Rede do Campo – Cantinho da Roça

Fundada em 1991 em Lavras (MG), a Rede do Campo – Cantinho da Roça nasceu do espírito empreendedor de André Luis Chalfoun de Souza, que começou produzindo e vendendo queijos, doces e quitandas. Ao longo dos anos, a empresa se consolidou como referência regional nos setores agropecuário, agrícola e petshop, expandindo sua atuação com lojas físicas, fábrica própria de rações e marcas exclusivas.

Com mais de 30 anos de história, a empresa é sócia-fundadora da Rede do Campo, primeira rede associativista do ramo agropecuário no sul de Minas, que hoje conta com mais de 50 lojas e um centro de distribuição em Alfenas.

Nosso portfólio abrange:
 Agrícola – sementes, adubos, defensivos, insumos e organominerais da marca própria DOCAMPO.
 Pecuária – rações da marca própria ALIMENT.
 Petshop – rações premium (CAMPET) e acessórios diversos.
 Cachaça – marca própria Tonel de Minas, nas versões tradicional, premium e saborizadas.
 Pesca e utilidades gerais – ampla linha de produtos para lazer e vida no campo.

Além de produtos, oferecemos soluções, serviços e parcerias que fortalecem a vida no campo e na cidade. Nossa missão é ser o braço direito do produtor e do cliente urbano, sempre com foco em qualidade, preço justo e compromisso socioeconômico.

Visão: Ser a principal referência como grupo parceiro de clientes em Lavras e região até 2026.
Valores: Ética, integridade, simplicidade, comprometimento, bom humor e paixão pelo negócio.

Name: Biovisión Chile
Description:
Biovisión Chile es una empresa de base tecnológica dedicada a transformar el agro latinoamericano mediante soluciones integradas de ingeniería, datos y automatización.
Nos especializamos en apoyar proyectos de inversión agrícola que requieren datos cuantitativos confiables para maximizar su rentabilidad, eficiencia hídrica y resiliencia productiva. Combinamos tecnología de sensores, inteligencia artificial, visión computacional y modelamiento agroclimático para ofrecer herramientas precisas y escalables, orientadas a la toma de decisiones estratégicas en tiempo real.
Nuestro enfoque se centra en desarrollar plataformas adaptadas a los desafíos reales del sector agrícola, desde el diseño técnico de unidades de cultivo hasta la validación científica de indicadores clave como el estrés hídrico, el vigor vegetativo y el potencial productivo.

Ámbitos de especialización:
– Inteligencia agronómica aplicada a proyectos de inversión
– Monitoreo térmico, espectral y climático de cultivos
– Automatización de informes y visualización avanzada de datos
– Desarrollo de sistemas de bajo costo para agricultura de precisión

 Con presencia en Chile y redes de colaboración en América Latina, Biovisión Chile apunta a liderar la innovación agrícola regional con soluciones accesibles, científicamente validadas y orientadas al impacto económico y ambiental.

Name: JAB Farm & Nursery
Description:
Operating with sustainable and regenerative practices in mind JAB Farm & Nursery seeks to change the way we look at feeding our communities. 

While we build out our longterm infrastructure and get fully organized here are a few of the highlights about our farm currently. We have an apiary made up of three active hives. Accompanied by native pollinators, our busy bee hives service rolling acres of berry fields, wildflower meadows and gardens. Our fields include 9 varieties of haskap berry growing alongside some raspberry, blueberry and strawberry that allow our fields to produce a seemingly endless stream of blooms that culminates in the fall when our saffron harvest takes place. This season we've also added hazelnuts to the farm with nearly 100 young orchard trees going into the fields, we can't wait for them to start producing!  

As well, our farm includes a greenhouse and soon a full market garden designed to provide fresh produce and nursery seedlings to our community. Our indoor grow rooms cultivate a variety of mushrooms that we produce both fresh and dehydrated.

Stay tuned and follow along as we continue to expand and build out. Website coming soon!

Onze focus ligt op het leveren van een optimale service en ondersteuning aan onze klanten. Zo kunnen zij er voor blijven zorgen dat de winkelrekken gevuld blijven met ‘h’eerlijke Belgische producten. 
Voor onze werknemers laat Audenaert nv zich vooral kenmerken door zijn familiale en vlakke bedrijfsstructuur waar respect en het welbevinden van de werknemers voorop staan.

Name: Herenboeren Hoeksche Waard
Description:
Een Herenboerderij is een duurzaam opererend, kleinschalig coöperatief gemengd bedrijf. Het is ongeveer 20 hectare groot en brengt in beginsel voedsel voort. Maar zoveel mensen, zoveel wensen en dus werkt elke Herenboerderij uiteindelijk net een tikkie anders. Toch is er wel een rode lijn te ontdekken in de manier waarop een Herenboerderij draait.

De boerderij verbouwt een grote variatie aan groente, fruit en vlees. De huishoudens halen wekelijks zelf het vers geoogste eten op bij de boerderij. We eten het hele jaar door van onze eigen grond en verbouwen alles zo biologisch en natuur-inclusief mogelijk. Zo zijn we goed voor het land, onszelf en de biodiversiteit in de omgeving!

Een enthousiaste groep van 5 kartrekkers is vastbesloten een Herenboerderij in de Hoeksche Waard te realiseren. De coöperatie Herenboeren Hoeksche Waard is opgericht, de ledenwerving is in volle gang en de zoektocht naar grond begint zijn vruchten af te werpen. Geïnteresseerd? Bezoek onze website!

Name: Phylize
Description:
Modern ve endüstriyel yetiştiriciliğe karşı değiliz, sadece geleneksel yetiştiriciliği modernleştiriyoruz. 

Bu fikirden yola çıkarak herkesin taze gıdaya erişimini destekleyecek süper gıdaya odaklandık; Mikro yeşillikler... Modern yaşamın bir sonucu olarak doğal gıdalar yerini  endüstriyel gıdalar ve takviye edici gıdalara bıraktı. Oldukça yüksek maliyetlere sahip takviye edici gıdalara bir alternatif olarak, şık tasarımı ve kolay kullanımı ile yetiştiriciliği sevdirecek, evlerinizde ve işyerlerinizde kendi mikro yeşilliklerinizi yetiştirebilmenizi sağlayan Phylize Mikro Yeşillik Yetiştirme Kiti ile çok yakında sizlerleyiz.

Kendi sağlığınızı yetiştirin...

Mikro yeşillikler, sağlık için önemli vitamin ve mineraller içerir, ancak geniş kitleler tarafından bilinmeyen ve tüketilmeyen bir niş üründür. Phylize, sağlıklı mikro yeşillik yetiştirmeyi kolaylaştıran bir üründür. Zaman ve kaynak tasarrufu sağlayarak manuel ekim süreçlerini azaltır. Aşırı tohum kullanımını önler, suyu verimli kullanır ve doğal gübre içerir. 4 tohum yatağı ile çeşitlilik sunar ve abonelik sistemiyle kullanıcıları destekler. Estetik tasarımı ev dekorasyonuna uyum sağlar, mikro yeşilliklerin büyümesiyle ortama şıklık katar. 

Yakın zamanda başta Amerika Birleşik Devletleri ve Avrupa’da yaygınlaşan mikro yeşillik üretimi ve tüketimi alışkanlığını, Türkiye’ye kazandırmak ve sağlıklı yaşama katkı sağlamak istiyoruz. Gelecekte detaylarını paylaşacağımız 2. ürünümüz "Phylize Fuzz" modelimizle dünyanın en büyük kitlesel fonlama platformu Kickstarter’da yerimizi alacağız.

Name: GT Moringa Limited
Description:
GT Moringa Ltd. is a venture based in Bangladesh, devoted to providing its customers with completely natural products and utmost satisfaction. Here, we are all about ensuring we deliver to you the finest quality plant-based products, especially Moringa.

‘Bringing Businesses and Community Together with Moringa’, GT Moringa Limited is committed to realizing this goal. This initiative is not only a business but also a social movement. Rajib Parvez Raju's more than six years of empirical knowledge and social research on economic emancipation through social entrepreneurship in Moringa cultivation and marketing has been combined with fit and healthy living through Moringa.

To make this goal a reality, GTML has set up producer groups for community farming, contract farming and homestead cultivation of Moringa in 20 districts of Bangladesh. A model of Moringa cultivation and processing has been developed under the supervision of a team of skilled and trained workers. Moringa leaves are producing food for humans and cattle. Besides, with the aim of creating a growing market for the product and building an important position for it, the production of various types of by-products from Moringa leaves is ongoing.

Name: Moreganic Certification
Description:
Moreganic
Growing Biodiversity. Strengthening Communities.

Moreganic is a sustainability standard and certification program dedicated to agroforestry products, starting with rubber. We define clear ecological, ethical, and economic criteria and verify that farms, manufacturers, and products meet them through a trusted certification process.

Moreganic goes beyond traditional approaches by supporting farming practices that increase biodiversity and system services, while strengthening farmer livelihoods.

Since 2021, Moreganic has been proudly supported by Novaya, a leader in latex innovation and materials. Moreganic is on its path to becoming an independent, globally recognized certification.

Our Vision
To enable a world where responsibly grown materials are the foundation of healthy and diverse ecosystems, smallholder economies, and fair, resilient communities.

Our Mission
To deliver biodiversity-focused impact and trusted standards and certifications that make sustainability achievable for farmers, manufacturers, and brands alike.

What We Offer

- Verified Certification for farms, processors, and products

- A full Farm Management Standard for rubber producers

- Chain of Custody and Traceability

- Certified branding programs for Moreganic-based materials

- Training and support services for supply chain partners

Join the Movement

Whether you're a farmer, a manufacturer, a brand, or a conscious consumer - reach out and see how you can partner with Moreganic and help increase biodiversity.

Description:
" Cultivating Prosperity, Nourishing Futures 

Welcome to VOGDAYA Farms – your local source of diverse agricultural excellence nestled in the heart of Mpatasie-Trede, Ashanti, Ghana. Spanning lush 10 acres, we're more than a farm; we're a thriving ecosystem of livestock, poultry, aquaculture, and bountiful vegetables.

 Growing Together: Since our March 2020 inception, we've evolved – now  combining diverse production of aquaculture, horticulture and food processing. A synergy of flavors and well-being in one space.

 Powering Collaborations: We're not just farmers; we're partners. Aligning with like-minded souls, we're forging pathways towards a resilient agricultural future. Together, we're sowing seeds of prosperity, ensuring food security, and nurturing tomorrow's bounty.

 Seizing the Moment: Our landscape is rich with possibilities:

1 Livestock market: Riding the surge in demand for quality livestock, we're poised to providing nourishment that resonates.

2 Kumasi Connection: With Kumasi's bustling retail network, our farm-to-table journey finds a swift route, enriching households across the city.

3 Broiler Brilliance: In a region hungry for quality broilers, we spread our wings, catering to restaurants, hotels, schools, and beyond – with an eye on export.

 Grown for Good: VOGDAYA Farms – a growing legacy of quality, sustainability, and shared success. With every harvest, we're sowing the seeds of a thriving agricultural landscape, ensuring a brighter future for all.

Join us on this vibrant journey. Together, we're cultivating prosperity, nourishing futures, and redefining agricultural excellence.

Name: Thikri Veerangana Mahila Producer Company Limited.
From The Farm
Description:
At From The Farm, we believe that our mission to create a better food system is not just a business endeavor—it is a calling from God. We are deeply committed to reshaping the food supply chain in a way that honors the farmers who grow our food and the consumers who depend on it. Our goal is to build a system where people come before profit, where the connection between the land, the producer, and the consumer is restored, and where food sovereignty is a reality for every family.

We don’t walk this path alone. As an organization, we make it a regular practice to pray for guidance, seeking divine wisdom in every decision we make. Integrity, courage, and respect for the laws of nature are core to our values, and we believe that through God’s grace, we can build a system that is both just and sustainable.

We also honor the divine roles given to men and women in this mission. Masculine men are called to protect, provide, and preside over their families, farms, and communities. We believe in the strength of men to stand as guardians of the land and stewards of its resources. Likewise, women hold the sacred role of nurturing, caring for, and guiding both their families and the natural world around them. It is through this balance of strength and nurture that true sustainability and harmony can be achieved.

From The Farm isn’t just a platform; it’s a movement rooted in faith, integrity, and a commitment to building a food system that reflects God’s design. We invite you to join us in restoring balance to our food supply, empowering family-owned farms, and creating a future where the land is respected, the producers are honored, and the consumers are connected to the source of their nourishment.

Together, we will continue to pray, act with integrity, and strive to uphold the natural laws that God has set in motion for a better world.

Name: Buitengewone Varkens
Description:
Buitengewone Varkens – Animals with Added Value

At Buitengewone Varkens, we believe in meat with a story. We are here for everyone seeking truly good meat, with respect for animals, nature, and the food chain. Our pigs play an active role in nature management and are raised in an environment that guarantees the highest level of animal welfare.

Our Approach
Owners Cas den Boer and Josse Haarhuis, together with a dedicated team, have established a transparent and sustainable approach. Across 25 locations throughout the Netherlands, we collaborate with feed producer Nijsen to ensure our pigs are fed 100% circularly. This means our outdoor pigs forage for much of their own food, supplemented by rescued products from the human food chain. No extra farmland needed, and significantly less food waste.

Animal Welfare
Our pigs are born on small-scale farms with 35 times more space than organic pigs. The sows build their own nests and display fully natural behavior. The result? Breeds like Berkshire, Bonte Bentheimer, and Duroc, which grow slowly and produce beautifully marbled meat. Animal welfare is central, even though we don't carry an organic label due to the feed we use.

Fair Pricing
Good meat comes at a price, as we account for animal welfare and climate impact. However, we keep our prices affordable by selling directly to the hospitality industry and consumers, without using distribution centers or supermarkets. From daily meat products to charcuterie, you'll find it all at Buitengewone Varkens. We're also happy to create custom packages for you.

At Buitengewone Varkens, nature management and sustainable meat production go hand in hand. Taste the difference and discover where our meat is sold or served in restaurants via our website.

Landmandsdrevet Innovation (Farmer-Driven Innovation) er et nyt, nationalt projekt, der bringer danske landmænds egne idéer og erfaringer i centrum for udviklingen af fremtidens bæredygtige landbrug. Projektet samler landmænd fra hele landet i regionale innovationsnetværk, hvor de – i samarbejde med rådgivere og eksperter – udvikler, tester og deler nye løsninger for mere miljøvenlig planteproduktion.

Fra foråret 2026 bliver marker over hele Danmark til levende laboratorier, hvor nye metoder og teknologier prøves af i praksis. Målet er at omsætte landmændenes praktiske viden til dokumenterede resultater, som kan styrke både landbrugets konkurrenceevne og bidrage til den grønne omstilling.

Projektet er støttet med 23 millioner kroner fra Novo Nordisk Fonden og løber fra 2025 til 2027. Landmandsdrevet Innovation drives i samarbejde mellem regionale rådgivningsselskaber landet over samt Teknologisk Institut og Agrovi, der er initiativtagere.

Landmænd mødes i netværk, udvikler og deler idéer og afprøver bæredygtige dyrkningsmetoder på flere niveauer – fra enkle markforsøg til avancerede test.

Erfaringer og resultater formidles løbende via workshops, markvandringer og netværksmøder, så flere kan få glæde af nye metoder. Nogle løsninger kan tages i brug med det samme, mens andre videreudvikles gennem eksisterende innovationssystemer.

Formålet med Landmandsdrevet Innovation er at skabe en platform, hvor landmænds praksisnære idéer hurtigt kan afprøves, dokumenteres og komme hele landbruget til gavn – til fordel for miljø, natur og økonomi.

Name: Green Economy Partnership
Description:
State of the Green Economy with Forestry by 2050

Green Economy leads the way in developing and restoring the forestry for carbon capture and ecosystem services in the world.

The Green Economy is the first carbon elimination standard for engineered carbon removal methods in the voluntary carbon industry. We want to mobilize the world to reverse climate change by removing its carbon emissions.

As per Paris agreement offsets are not enough to achieve their goals all alone. The Oxford Principles for Net Zero Aligned Carbon Offsetting and other international initiatives are calling for companies to include Carbon Dioxide Removal (CDR) as part of their net zero strategy. We identify carbon removal suppliers from various methodologies.

We are securing the rights to the first forestry to launch a campaign to start the carbon ecosystem at a jurisdictional level.

Wir sind eine im Jahr 2015 gegründete Europäische Genossenschaft, die sich in den letzten Jahren zur ersten auf land- und forstwirtschaftliche Betriebe zentrierte Plattformgenossenschaft entwickelt hat. – zwischen landwirtschaftlichen Betriebe  und ihren Marktpartnern in unterschiedlichen  Wertschöpfungsketten
– zwischen landwirtschaftlichen Betrieben und ihren öffentlichen und privaten Dienstleistern und
– zwischen Praxis und Wissenschaft

Engagierte landwirtschaftliche Betriebe im EQA- Team sind der Überzeugung, dass mit unseren Serviceleistungen „Mehr mit Weniger“-  also nachhaltiges Wirtschaften möglich wird. Dies bedeutet wir wollen im genossenschaftlichen Verbund die Transformation wagen, produktiver werden  bei  gleichzeitig geringerem Ressourcen-Verbrauch . Mit einem auf die Zukunft gewandtem  integrierten Management- Systemen sollen die Voraussetzungen hierfür geschaffen werden.

Egg Serenity Farm is a newly established poultry farm dedicated to providing the highest quality, ethically-sourced eggs. We believe that happy hens lay the most delicious and nutritious eggs, which is why we prioritize their well-being and natural instincts.

Our Commitment:

- Animal welfare: We believe in humane treatment of our hens, providing them with ample space, natural sunlight, and a stress-free environment.
- Sustainable practices: We are committed to environmentally conscious farming practices that minimize our impact and promote healthy soil.
- Quality eggs: Our hens are fed a balanced diet for optimal health, resulting in eggs rich in flavor, vitamins, and antioxidants.
- Community focus: We are passionate about connecting with our local community, offering farm tours and educational opportunities about ethical egg production.

Products:

Fresh, farm-laid chicken eggs from a variety of heritage breeds, known for their unique flavors and vibrant colors.

Coming Soon: Compost enriched with chicken manure, perfect for boosting garden health.

Looking Forward:

Egg Serenity Farm is committed to continuously growing and evolving. We are dedicated to providing exceptional quality eggs while promoting ethical farming practices and fostering a connection with our local community.

Name: FarmLife Health Services Ltd
Description:
"When I was a child, my aunt Esther was the backbone of our family’s prosperity. Her farm would produce bountiful harvests, and food was never scarce. But in recent years, she started calling me frequently, sometimes in tears. Her once-thriving farm now faced challenges—low yields, unpredictable markets, and mounting frustrations. She felt defeated, and seeing her struggle weighed heavily on me."
This is the personal life story of Yegon Philemon, CEO and Co-Founder of FarmLife Health Services Ltd.
"Aunt Esther’s struggles became personal to me, and they inspired me to take action. In 2020, I co-founded FarmLife Health Services Ltd. to address the systemic challenges that small-scale farmers, like my aunt, face daily."
Through our work, we’ve identified key challenges affecting farmers: soil erosion, biodiversity loss, biomass depletion due to deforestation, and lack of access to competitive markets. These barriers not only threaten food security but also leave farmers vulnerable to economic hardships.
At FarmLife, we are committed to restoration and climate-smart agriculture. We work hand-in-hand with smallholder farmers to promote sustainable farming practices. Our main focus is agroforestry by planting fruit trees- avocados and nuts, apiculture, alongside Milk Value Addition to enhance productivity and diversify income streams.
But we don’t stop there. To ensure sustainable impact, we organize farmers into groups and cooperatives, encouraging collective savings. These pooled funds empower farmers to borrow for farm activities such as purchasing certified inputs, improving farm management, and boosting production. This approach reduces reliance on high-interest loans from informal lenders and microfinance institutions, providing farmers with financial independence and stability.
We focuses on impacting women, youth, and marginalized groups by training 80,000+ farmers on sustainable practices. We reduce post-harvest losses, secure premium markets, and improve lives.

Nosso principal foco é a produção de uma variedade de animais, incluindo gado bovino, caprino, ovino, suíno, avestruzes, galinhas, patos, gansos, coelhos e tilápias. Nosso compromisso com a sustentabilidade é evidente em nossas práticas agrícolas, que incluem a produção de capim-elefante em nossas machambas.

Além disso, operamos uma fábrica de ração no local para garantir que nossos animais recebam nutrição de alta qualidade, contribuindo para a saúde e o bem-estar geral do rebanho.

Para os visitantes que desejam prolongar a sua estadia, oferecemos quartos de hospedagem confortáveis e acolhedores. Nossos hóspedes podem relaxar e desfrutar de nossos locais de lazer, enquanto apreciam a beleza natural e a tranquilidade do retiro.

Venha para o Nhavambe Bush Retreat para uma experiência agrícola autêntica e um refúgio tranquilo da agitação da vida urbana.

At Agriforests, we empower grassroots leaders with the tools, expertise, and market access to shape their futures in the Voluntary Carbon Market. Drawing on 25+ years of corporate leadership in integrated Sustainable Forest Management (SFM), Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) standards, and Safety, Health & Environmental (SHE) systems, we deliver holistic, science-backed nature-based carbon solutions that advance our mission: Rural Livelihoods Without Dependency.

𝐇𝐎𝐖 𝐖𝐄 𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐄 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐓

We enable NGOs & farmers to launch high-integrity carbon projects - from bamboo agroforestry to large-scale ecosystem restoration - that deliver: 

✓ Climate Action: Remove millions of tons of CO₂ via science-backed data. 
✓ Social Justice: Break poverty cycles with income, food security, and reinvestment (healthcare, schools, cholera eradication). 
✓ Thriving Ecosystems: Restore biodiversity & ecosystem services at landscape level. 

𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐓 𝐈𝐍𝐕𝐄𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐒:

Name: Sunart Fields
Description:
Sunart Fields is a 120 acre uplands farm based in the High Peak, Derbyshire, working to restore a healthy balance with nature. Until 2019 the land was operated as an active dairy farm, and 100 years prior to that was coal mined.

We now manage the land in a restorative way, creating the conditions that will allow nature to thrive. We are doing so as part of Defra's SFI Pilot and Natural England's Biodiversity Net Gain Credits Scheme Pilot.

Name: Project MAARA
Description:
MAARA, founded by Dace and Robert in 2020, is an initiative dedicated to reshaping lifestyles and cultivating sustainability. Leaving the city life behind, we jumped into this adventure by buying 30 hectares of land with forests, waterfalls and grazelands, surrounded by the mountain stretches of the National Park of Três Picos, close to Nova Friburgo in Rio de Janeiro state. 

Our project has converted a conventional farm in a sustainable permaculture haven. Projects implemented include setting up all soft and hard infrastructure, building of an ecological sewage system, establishing an agroforest with focus on coffee, fruit, wood and nut production, partly with CO2 compensation. Additionally, we've undertaken bio-construction, created a natural pool, manage a volunteer community, and initiated an eco-pedagogic project with local schools to raise awareness about sustainable practices.

MAARA is more than a cultivation initiative; it aspires to be a reference and permaculture playground for like-minded individuals. The goal is to foster collaborative learning, share experiences, produce sustainable food, and enhance land fertility, productivity, and biodiversity. Rooted in principles of harmony and respect for nature and the local community, MAARA seeks to catalyse positive change, aspiring to be a beacon of inspiration for those passionate about creating a sustainable future.

We welcome volunteers from around the world, providing an opportunity to learn about permaculture, agroforest management, organic gardening, soil regeneration, composting, the importance of bees and other insects, as well as enjoying nutritious vegetarian meals and community living. Nestled in a comfortable farmhouse amid breath-taking mountainous scenery near Rio de Janeiro, it's the perfect setting to embark on a journey of discovery. Explore our website for the various possibilities.

Name: mOrganic Holdings, LLC.
Description:
mOrganic Holdings, LLC operates at the intersection of capital markets and sustainability, specializing in the superfood and BeeGenerative agribusiness sectors.

The core of our business is the mOrganic 3-Tree Agroforestry System. This innovative model functions as an impact investment vehicle explicitly designed to shift the financial risks and management burdens associated with the regenerative agriculture transition from individual farmers onto long-term, supportive investors.

We strategically integrate diverse components—including superfoods, leafy greens, aquaponics, and timber trees—alongside BeeGenerative animal and crop farming systems. This integration within the 3-Tree Agroforestry framework is engineered to achieve multiple ecological and financial objectives: improving soil health, maximizing carbon sequestration, minimizing soil erosion and water pollution, significantly enhancing biodiversity and crop pollination rates, and improving profitability.

The system is structured to deliver meaningful financial and nature-related returns for all stakeholders when constructed correctly. mOrganic Holdings, LLC and its 3-Tree Agroforestry System serve as a vital hub for project management/advisory services, financing, research, and collaborative growth within the regenerative agriculture community.

Name: Petty Creek Mountain Ranch LLC
Description:
Petty Creek Mountain Ranch: Where Purpose Meets Passion
Just 25 minutes from Missoula Airport, Petty Creek Mountain Ranch (PCMR) spans 710 acres in western Montana. This sanctuary embodies decades of dedication, innovation, and connection to both technology and nature.

Through 41 years of effort and unwavering faith, this ranch has become the embodiment of my life's journey. It's where my core strengths—strategic thinking, responsibility, achievement, disruptive activation, and futuristic outlook—blend with my mission to advance, advise, and adventure.

My wife and I have revitalized this historic property, where century-old log cabins offer havens from the outside world's chaos. Here, curiosity roams freely among towering trees, and tranquility awaits by the fireside. This is a spiritual haven where the soul communes with the divine, and fly fishing becomes effortless poetry of the heart.

Bordering the 2-million-acre Lolo National Forest, PCMR hosts diverse wildlife including deer, turkeys, bighorn sheep, and elk. The ranch's elevation ranges from 3,400 to 5,200 feet, with several creeks enriching the land.

As a working ranch, we raise Scottish Highland cattle and produce weed-free hay. Our accommodations include:

The Ranch House: A three-bedroom log home with wood-burning fireplace and outdoor pizza oven

The Cooks Cabin: A two-bedroom haven with chef's kitchen

The Bighorn: A restored four-bedroom cabin along West Fork Creek

The Tamarack: Our newest cabin overlooking a trout pond

Activities include fly fishing on nearby rivers, shooting sports on our range, and hiking trails with wildlife observation opportunities. 

Ask about our limited Recharge Retreat slots for a unique opportunity to disconnect and rejuvenate.

PCMR represents more than a destination; it's where rhythms of nature synchronize with personal growth and genuine connections. Here, amid towering trees and meandering creeks, guests discover not just a place to stay, but a space to truly live.

Delujemo v laboratoriju za analize mleka ter kemijskem laboratoriju, kjer izvajamo analize tal, vina in krme. Poleg tega ponujamo knjigovodske storitve za kmete ter proizvodnjo in distribucijo bikovega in merjaščevega semena. 
Organizirani smo v šestih strokovnih oddelkih, našo ekipo pa sestavlja več kot 100 sodelavcev, pretežno s področja kmetijstva in kemije. Naše delo temelji na strokovnosti, dolgoletnih izkušnjah in tesnem povezovanju z lokalnim okoljem.
