Name: ECOTRUEQUE standard
Description:
The ECOTRUEQUE standard is a concept of environmental and social recovery that achieves carbon neutrality for products and companies using a new way of doing a circular economy using natural methods for its recovery and with security and transparency parameters for our clients all over the planet.

El estándar ECOTRUEQUE es un concepto de recuperación ambiental y social que logra la neutralidad en carbono de productos y empresas utilizando una nueva forma de hacer economía circular utilizando métodos naturales para su recuperación y con parámetros de seguridad y transparencia para nuestros clientes en todo el planeta.

We make a circular economy between companies that produce plastic waste and others that we turn into useful products in agriculture, exchanging these products for a space of land to grow trees that recover the environment and as a source of income for the future of the workers involved.

Hacemos economía circular entre empresas que producen residuos plásticos y otras que convertimos en productos útiles en la agricultura, intercambiando estos productos por un espacio de tierra para cultivar árboles que recuperen el medio ambiente y como fuente de ingresos para el futuro de los trabajadores involucrados.

The ECOTRUEQUE standard begins with several allies that help us generate the credibility of our work. We started in Ecuador certifying new bamboo plantations that capture carbon dioxide to achieve carbon neutrality of agricultural products for export with KIWA as certifier of our standardized processes.

El estándar ECOTRUEQUE comienza con varios aliados que nos ayudan a generar la credibilidad de nuestro trabajo. Iniciamos en Ecuador certificando nuevas plantaciones de bambú que capturan dióxido de carbono para lograr la neutralidad de carbono de los productos agrícolas de exportación con KIWA como certificadora de nuestros procesos estandarizados.

Name: M2 Soluções Agrícolas
Description:
Seja bem-vindo à página oficial da M2 Soluções Agrícolas no LinkedIn! Somos uma empresa focada em soluções agrícolas inovadoras, especializada na prestação de serviços utilizando drones para atender às necessidades específicas dos agricultores modernos.

Quem Somos:
Na M2, combinamos paixão pela agricultura com expertise em tecnologia para oferecer soluções sob medida que impulsionam a produtividade, reduzem os custos e promovem a sustentabilidade no setor agrícola.

Nossos Serviços:

- Pulverização com Drones: Utilizamos drones de última geração para aplicar defensivos agrícolas com precisão milimétrica, reduzindo o desperdício e aumentando a eficiência.
- Mapeamento Aéreo: Realizamos mapeamentos aéreos de alta resolução para monitoramento de culturas, detecção de doenças, análise de saúde vegetal e muito mais.
- Dispersão de sementes: Usamos drones para fazer a distribuição de sementes de pastagens e de reflorestamento para a restauração de ecossistemas naturais e o manejo de áreas agrícolas.
- Liberação de Agentes Biológicos: Oferecemos serviços de liberação controlada de agentes marcrobiológicos, como Cotesia flavipes, Trichogramma galloi e Telenomus podisi, para o controle natural de pragas agrícolas.

Nosso Compromisso:

- Qualidade: Comprometemo-nos a oferecer serviços da mais alta qualidade, utilizando tecnologia de ponta e melhores práticas agrícolas.
- Inovação: Estamos constantemente buscando novas soluções e tecnologias para atender às necessidades em evolução dos agricultores e impulsionar o progresso no campo.
- Sustentabilidade: Nosso objetivo é promover práticas agrícolas sustentáveis que minimizem o impacto ambiental e preservem os recursos naturais para as gerações futuras.

Por que escolher a M2?

- Experiência comprovada no setor agrícola.
- Equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados e dedicados.
- Compromisso com a excelência em cada projeto.
- Parcerias estratégicas com empresas líderes do setor.

Name: The Christieville House
Description:
Industrial agriculture reached its limit a long time ago. Many recognized it, and so have we. 

The design, implementation and operation of new sustainable systems specific to local requirements and attributes are more than ever required. 

We are doing our part by converting farmlands into orchards. 

By doing so, growing permanent crops reduces soil interventions, significantly captures and stores carbon in the soil and their out-of-soil structures, and produces high-value fruits for both the fresh and the transformation markets. 

We do all this while supporting a circular model, sustainable by design and in harmony with local communities of farmers, entrepreneurs and citizens. And all of this, with the generations to come in mind.

Walking or cycling the many hills surrounding our orchards every fall, you'll experience a set of tangible initiatives designed to save our living habitat by sequestering over 50 tons of carbon per hectare, year after year, while providing quality fruits to regional markets.

Description:
En Delfos Agroconsulting somos un equipo multidisciplinario de profesionales especialistas en el sector agroindustrial, con la capacidad de generar soluciones para el desarrollo de negocios dentro del mismo. Contamos con experiencia en desarrollo de negocios dentro del sector apícola, avícola, porcino, cannábico, agrícola, ganadero, silvícola, piscícola, hortícola y frutícola, como así también en la construcción y obras civiles. Desarrollamos mercados para negocios en todos los eslabones de la cadena agroindustrial, de la semilla al plato.

Llevamos muchos años trabajando en el sector de los agronegocios con especial atención en el sector cannábico, el cual creció considerablemente en los últimos 10 años y tiene una proyección de crecimiento muy importante con la incorporación de nuevos marcos legales favorables en diferentes países. Tenemos la capacidad de formar equipos de venta y técnicos, desarrollar nuevos productos y nuevos mercados como así también en la confección de estrategias basadas en la experiencia y en la coyuntura del sector. Nuestra MISIÓN es la de ser los socios estratégicos de las empresas agroindustriales para que estas logren sus objetivos de la forma más eficiente, con la ventaja que otorga una amplia experiencia en el sector. Así mismo nuestra VISIÓN es la de profesionalizar al sector agroindustrial, creando nuevas oportunidades de negocio a través de la innovación y el desarrollo de proyectos de integración con especial cuidado en la discreción.

Name: De Wickevoorter Stadsboeren
Description:
De Wickevoorter Stadsboeren is een biologisch bedrijf in Cruquius, tussen Haarlem en Hoofddorp. We zijn gevestigd op meerdere percelen, midden in een nieuwbouwwijk. We werken nauw samen met de bouwende partijen en de reeds gevestigde bewoners om ons heen. 

Naast de agrarische activiteiten worden er activiteiten georganiseerd om de verbinding tussen de omwonenden onderling en hun verbinding met voedsel te versterken. Je kunt hierbij denken aan gezamenlijke maaltijden, workshops en seizoensfeesten.  

De Wickevoorter Stadsboeren zoekt mensen die mee willen doen om ons unieke initiatief verder te ontwikkelen. Concreet hebben we nu 1 hectare groenteteelt (zelfoogsttuin), 600m2 plukbloementuin, ruim een halve hectare fruitgaard (aardbeien, bessenstruiken en bomen), kippen en varkens en een boerderijwinkel.

Name: Foss Farms and Resorts
Description:
At FOSS Farms and Resorts, we are committed to advancing food wellness through responsible agriculture, ethical sourcing, and premium-quality production. Our operations span across seafood, livestock, grains, plants, and poultry—providing fresh, naturally processed, and export-ready products to meet both local and international demand.

With a focus on quality, sustainability, and safety, we ensure that every product—from catfish to plantain, rice, goat, and poultry—is cultivated, handled, and processed to the highest standards. Our drying techniques and farm-to-table approach enable us to deliver products that are nutritious, hygienic, and aligned with global agricultural expectations.

Our diverse product portfolio includes:

Seafood: Catfish, prawns, crab, fresh fish, and snail

Livestock: Goat, grasscutter, antelope, gazelle

Grains: Rice

Plants: Plantain

Poultry: Chicken and turkey


Operating across Ogun, Lagos, and Port Harcourt, we pride ourselves on being a reliable partner for wholesalers, retailers, manufacturers, and hospitality businesses seeking steady access to high-quality agricultural products.

At FOSS Farms and Resorts, we don’t just supply food—we cultivate wellness, ensuring every product reflects our promise: From Soil to Plate, Naturally.

For inquiries or partnerships:

Name: Creditar - Créditos de Reposição Florestal
Description:
O Crédito de Reposição Florestal é um tipo de “moeda verde” e foi criado em 2006 pelo Governo Federal como uma estratégia combater o desmatamento ilegal e incentivar o reflorestamento. Portanto, sua utilização já faz parte de um conjunto de obrigações ambientais.

Plataforma digital para negociação de Créditos de Reposição Florestal 100% online.

O processo será totalmente digital, mas assistido por nosso time de profissionais que acompanharão a tramitação junto aos órgãos competentes.

Vamos conectar as propriedades rurais e o setor industrial e estimular o mercado do reflorestamento.

Name: Ithaca Organics Cannabis Co.
Description: Welcome to Ithaca Organics Cannabis Co., a family farm nestled in the heart of the Finger Lakes region. For decades, we have been dedicated to growing the highest quality organic fruit, vegetables, and hemp for our local community. Now, we're excited to introduce a new chapter in our journey: small-batch, premium cannabis meticulously crafted with the unique terroir of our region. At Ithaca Organics, we value quality over quantity, focusing on developing rich terpene profiles, captivating aromas, and unforgettable tastes that elevate the cannabis experience. From our water-washed rosin to our top-tier distillate, every product is a testament to our dedication. We grow, harvest, and process everything ourselves, ensuring that each batch reflects the care and expertise that goes into its creation.

Name: Daai
Description:
“Daai” is the Sanskrit word for the female traditional folk healers of ancient India. 

Each season, Daai formulates a curated collection of herbal infusions for holistic health, focused on anti-aging and longevity. These are handmade in small-batches by indigenous folk healers of the Himalayas. 

As a cultivator and processor of high-altitude medicinal plants, Daai is dedicated to preserving the indigenous biodiversity of the Uttarakhand Himalayas. 

Through the utilisation of ancient natural farming practices, we play our role in promoting natural farming, and biodiversity conservation for the long-term sustainability for the planet.

Name: Apiculteurs en Provence
Description:
Collectif d’apiculteurs actif en Région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur. 

Nous sommes 3 600 apiculteurs provençaux qui exploitent près de 163 000 ruches dans la région Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur. Ambassadeurs passionnés, nous réalisons 60 % de la distribution de miel en vente directe.
 
La production régionale en miel avoisine les 2 500 tonnes par an. Celle de miel de lavande représente en année normale plus de la moitié de la production totale. 
IGP Miel de Provence et 2 Labels Rouges, l’apiculture provençale est la 1ère filière apicole de France en termes de signes de qualité.

L’apiculture provençale s’appuie sur une filière très dynamique et structurée autour de trois acteurs majeurs : 

•	L’Association pour le Développement de l’Apiculture Provençale (ADAPI), structure de développement technique et économique de la région (http://adapi.adafrance.org/) 
•	Le Syndicat des miels de Provence et des Alpes du Sud assure la gestion de la démarche qualité IGP/label rouge miel de Provence (www.miels-de-provence.com)  
•	La Coopérative Provence Miel (http://provence-miel.com) qui garantit une commercialisation éthique et raisonnée.

Name: Silva Futures
Description:
Silva Futures restores abandoned forest ecosystems.
We buy and revive stumpage and abandoned agricultural land suitable for forestry.
We plant trees and take care of early maintenance.
We offer young 10-15 years old forests, which do not require maintenance investments.
Benefits:
	• Investment backed by real property
	• Forest available to non-foresters
	• Solving the most challenging works of forestry
	• Direct carbon impact
	• High quality forests absorb and maintain 2x more CO2 than unmanaged forests.
Managed forests' wood is up to 2.5x more valuable and retains CO2 for many generations as material, whilst low quality wood ends up as chips or paper, but even decomposing emits carbon-dioxide.

Name: NAVCHETNA AGRO CENTER PRODUCER COMPANY LIMITED
Description: Navchetna Agro Center Producer Company Limited, based in Mirzapur, Uttar Pradesh, is a pioneering Farmer Producer Organization (FPO) supported by NABARD. With a dedicated focus on sustainable agriculture, organic farming, vermicomposting, and agroforestry, Navchetna empowers over 3,000 local farmers, particularly tribal and women farmers, across Eastern Uttar Pradesh. Notable initiatives include a state-of-the-art vermicomposting unit, crop diversification, capacity building, and solar installations. Led by CEO Mr. Mukesh Pandey, Navchetna is a beacon of agricultural innovation, exporting vermicompost globally, and promoting self-reliance with its seed processing and infrastructure units. It stands as a model for rural development and sustainable farming practices.

Name: Voedselbos op de Beek (onderdeel van Agroforestry Breda)
Description:
Wij zijn Johan Hagenaars en Lisenka Schalk. Vanuit onze liefde voor het buitenleven en de natuur zijn wij met dit agroforestry project gestart. We nemen jullie mee op onze reis om de verschillende onderdelen van agroforestry te realiseren. Zo gaan we rijenteelt (alley cropping) en een bosweide met hoogstam fruitbomen aanleggen met vee en natuur niet te vergeten een echt voedselbos
Daarnaast hebben we een agroforestry kwekerij opgezet en kweken we planten en bomen voor voedselbossen, forest gardens en agroforestry projecten. Dit betekent dat we hoofdzakelijk eetbare planten kweken. Hierbij kan je denken aan diverse fruitbomen, struiken en allerlei ander planten die eetbaar zijn.

Name: Rohtas Agro & Livestock Farms
Description:
Rohtas Agro and Livestock Farms are dedicated to promoting sustainable agriculture practices and responsible livestock management. Located in the heart of Jhelum, our farms are committed to delivering high-quality agricultural produce.
Enhancing Agricultural Productivity and Livestock Management: Our Agro and Livestock Farms.

At , Rohtas Agro and Livestock Farms we take pride in our commitment to sustainable agriculture and responsible livestock management. Our agro and livestock farms serve as the foundation of our operations, enabling us to provide high-quality agricultural produce and livestock products to meet the growing demands of consumers. With a strong focus on innovation, animal welfare, and environmental stewardship, our farms are at the forefront of driving positive change in the agricultural industry.
Agro Farms: Cultivating Sustainable Agriculture
Our agro farms are dedicated to sustainable agriculture practices that prioritize long-term productivity, environmental health, and consumer well-being. We employ cutting-edge techniques to minimize the use of synthetic inputs, such as pesticides and chemical fertilizers, and promote organic and natural alternatives. Through agroecology, precision farming, and integrated pest management, we ensure the preservation of soil fertility, conservation of water resources, and enhancement of biodiversity.
Crop Diversity for Nutritional Excellence
At our agro farms, we cultivate a diverse range of crops to offer our customers a wide variety of high-quality agricultural produce. From nutritious fruits and vegetables to staple grains and cash crops, we understand the importance of a balanced diet. By embracing crop rotation and avoiding monocultures, we reduce the risk of pest outbreaks and disease susceptibility, enhancing the overall resilience of our farms and ensuring a consistent supply of fresh, healthy produce.

Juntos, estamos a implementar uma agenda de investigação ajustada às necessidades dos agentes económicos, e a promover a pecuária extensiva e os seus produtos, com o objetivo de contribuir para a sustentabilidade do setor.

Name: PRAVDA Farms
Description:
PRAVDA Farms is a sibling-led social enterprise rooted in a small family farm in Central Ghana now reimagined for a regenerative and climate-resilient future. What began in 2020 as a modest poultry and subsistence venture founded by our father has evolved into a cross-continental effort linking rural Ghana and Manitoba, Canada.

We’re designing farming systems that work with nature, not against it. Guided by ancestral wisdom and grounded in science, our model integrates hydroponics, poultry, aquaculture, biogas, and solar energy into circular, closed-loop ecosystems that restore land, build local capacity, and feed communities sustainably.

At PRAVDA Farms, we believe resilience grows where knowledge is shared and communities lead. Youth and women are at the heart of our vision for food systems that are inclusive, regenerative, and future-ready.

Our next chapter, Pravda AgriFutures Inc., expands this vision into scalable programs for training, applied research, and regenerative innovation; helping communities everywhere grow food systems that heal both people and planet.

We’re not just cultivating crops. We’re growing futures, one closed-loop system at a time.

Name: Paisa Ganadería
Description:
Paisa es un proyecto nacido de la curiosidad por transformar la producción de carne de una manera más sostenible, maximizando los recursos y buscando un impacto resiliente.

Nuestro enfoque se basa en un Sistema de Ganaderia de Precisión, que combina el Manejo Holístico de Allan Savory, Pastoreo Racional de André Voisin e implementación de nuevas tecnologías satelitales.

El objetivo es trabajar en armonía con la naturaleza para lograr altos rendimientos de producción, reducir costos y tener un impacto positivo en el medio ambiente.

Desde Paisa queremos ser ese compañero que te ayude a trabajar en el campo que te asiste en los desafíos diarios.

Name: Rain Shadow Ranch
Description:
Rain Shadow Ranch is a reservation-only, seasonal flower field and photography venue in Port Orchard, WA. We specialize in cultivating flower varieties that have a long vase life, strong stems, and are beautiful to all the senses.

From spring to autumn, purchase fresh flower bunches, market bouquets, and wholesale florals. For ongoing beauty in your home or for a very special gift, buy our six- and four-week seasonal bouquet subscriptions (aka CSA). These items are limited to pick-up and local delivery. 

In the hot summer months,  join us in picking fresh from the field. Times and dates are regularly updated for Pick-Your-Own and based upon our volume of blooms and vegetables. 

Dried flowers and handcrafted goods are available online throughout the year. Dahlia bulbs are on sale in the early spring months. All can be standard shipped.

Thanks for supporting our local, small business, and we hope to see you soon at Rain Shadow Ranch.

Name: EcoGroundTech
Description:
Somos uma empresa familiar que transforma tradição em inovação. Atuamos no desenvolvimento de soluções agrícolas sustentáveis e tecnologicamente avançadas, com foco no cultivo do cânhamo e outras plantas de interesse farmacêutico. Nosso compromisso é com um futuro mais verde, inteligente e regenerativo.

Assumimos a missão de transformar a terra cultivada há gerações por nossa família em um laboratório de inovação sustentável, unindo saberes ancestrais à agricultura de precisão, sensoriamento de solo e automação inteligente.

Visamos explorar todo o potencial da terra— desenvolvendo o potencial industrial e preservando o meio ambiente — com tecnologia de ponta, gerando impacto positivo no Brasil e no mundo.

Nossos Valores
Inovação com raízes – Valorizamos o conhecimento tradicional aliado à ciência e à tecnologia.
Sustentabilidade integral – Buscamos impactar positivamente o meio ambiente e a sociedade.
Excelência e qualidade – Operamos com rigor técnico e foco nos mais altos padrões regulatórios.
Diversidade e bem-estar – Respeitamos a biodiversidade e promovemos saúde em todas as dimensões.
Responsabilidade social – Geramos empregos, movimentamos a economia e promovemos o desenvolvimento local.

Objetivos Estratégicos

Implantar uma operação moderna, com baixo impacto ambiental
Desenvolver fitoterápicos com valor agregado para o setor farmacêutico
Criar eco-florestas inteligentes e regenerativa
Garantir conformidade regulatória e padrões internacionais de qualidade
Atuar no mercado nacional e internacional com visão sustentável e inovação contínua

Diferenciais da Nossa Proposta

União entre tradição agrícola e alta tecnologia
Aplicação de automação e sensoriamento no campo
Foco em pesquisa e desenvolvimento
Acesso a mercados em crescimento
Compromisso com a economia verde e o impacto positivo

Name: Terrafrica-Tech
Description:
Les Sociétés et Cultures d'aujourd'hui sont en en pleine transformation mais malheureusement les changements climatiques et contraintes environnementales mettent en péril de nombreuses communautés à travers le monde.

Nous sommes deux entrepreneurs du vivant franco-italiens avec un parcours multisectoriel structuré autour de l'impact et de la valeur ajoutée de "Projets Green" orientés vers les enjeux de financement de la transition écologique et sociale.

Terrafrica-Tech accompagne les investisseurs à impact désireux de soutenir des projets ESG (finance verte/Investissements responsables/Green impact investing) et les solutions basées sur la nature pour la planète.

Notre mission découle de l'urgente nécessité de lutter contre les effets du changement climatique et de l'inconscience des hommes sur l'appauvrissement des ressources et sur la dégradation des terres en favorisant le financement de projets à impact (ESG / NBS) afin de préserver la biodiversité et de compenser les émissions carbones.

Terrafrica-Tech organise son travail en 3 axes interconnectés :
- la création de partenariats à impact (entreprises à mission, solutions basées sur la nature "NBS", Tech4good)
- la gestion des connaissances utiles à réaliser des investissements responsables
- la coopération nationale, sous-régionale et régionale en identifiant les obstacles et les goulots d'étranglement à l'augmentation des investissements et développent des investissements GDT (gestion durable des terres) 

Le tout en reconnectant les cultures afin de redonner du sens à l'intelligence collective et au multilatéralisme (soft skills, soft power)

Actions :
- Catalyseur, auditeur et accompagnateur de projets à impact liés à la transition agroécologique en France et à l'international & Financement durable et Investissements responsables (ESG, NBS, etc.)
- Conseiller en investissement agricole (étude de marché & étude d'impact par filière, accompagnement sur l'acquisition et la valorisation de foncier agricole)

Name: Rø Jordbrug
Description:
Vi flyttede til solskinsøen efteråret 2018, i vores jagt på et meningsfuldt hverdagsliv, med tid og fordybelse. Fordi vi gerne vil leve bevidst og med hjerterne forrest. Vi fandt vores plads, hvorfra vi dagligt eksperimenterer, udvikler os, prøver os frem og lærer nyt, og ikke mindst bruger en stor del af vores dag udenfor. Fordi vi virkelig tror på den synergi der opstår, ved at tilbringe sin tid i smuk natur.



Vi driver et lille jordbrug, og visionerne rager højt, vi vil skabe mere liv. Mere liv i jorden og mere liv mellem mennesker. Gården og jordbruget danner rammerne for forskellige arrangementer og oplevelser, vi vil gerne inspirerer og vise hvilke veje der også kan betrædes i jagten på at skabe balancen.  

Vi tror på, at kort vej fra jord til bord i forhold til produktionen af fødevarer er vejen frem.

Vi drømmer og skaber undervejs. Og bringer unikke minder til de folk som deltager i vores middagen på marken, eller kommer som gæster til vores glampingtelte.

Name: Wiersema Wagyu
Description:
Kom eens kennismaken met ons duurzame Wagyuvlees. Onze koeien groeien op in een familiekudde en worden op duurzame manier gehouden.

Wagyuvlees staat bekend als het kaviaar onder het vlees. Veel geroemd om de smaaksensatie. Daarnaast is het gezond vlees. Onze koeien worden grotendeels gras gevoerd en het vlees bevat veel Omega 3 en Omega 6. Het vlees is cholesterol arm en bevat wel 30% meer onverzadigde vetzuren dan ander rundvlees.

Wij streven elke dag naar de beste kwaliteit van onze Wagyu’s. Het mooiste vlees is een combinatie van genetica, voer en tijd. Daarom werken wij met unieke stieren uit o.a. Australië.

Naast gras en hooi voeren wij GMO-vrij en Circulair voer. Er is geen hectare landbouwgrond gebruikt voor dit voer en alles komt uit reststromen van menselijke consumptie.

Wist u dat de dooradering van de Wagyu pas na 36 maanden volledig ontwikkeld is? Daarom slachten wij de dieren nooit voor die tijd. Ze groeien rustig op in de kudde en worden dus ook minimaal 3 jaar oud.

Name: Agriculture Advocates, LLC
Description:
At Agriculture Advocates LLC, we are committed to supporting U.S. agriculture and farmers. Founded by a team of former diplomatic and trade policy professionals and scientists, we are dedicated to helping the U.S. agricultural community navigate today’s rapidly changing global economic and trade landscape.

Our team brings decades of experience shaping U.S. agricultural trade policy, building public-private coalitions, and engaging with foreign governments and multilateral institutions. From expanding market access to enhancing trade negotiations to executing global competitiveness strategies, we understand how policy and diplomacy shape opportunities for U.S. producers.

We work alongside industry associations, agribusinesses, and state and federal partners to strengthen U.S. agriculture’s position in international markets. Through strategic analysis, advocacy, and relationship building, Agriculture Advocates LLC ensures that America’s farmers and agribusinesses remain globally competitive and well-represented.

Our Services Include:
--Coalition and stakeholder partnership development
--Trade diplomacy and institutional relations
--International market analysis and engagement
--Agricultural trade and policy strategy
--Strategic communications and advocacy

Together, we advance the success of U.S. agriculture at home and abroad.

Name: İSTAR İstanbul Tarımsal Ürünler İşletme Kooperatifi
Description:
İnsan olarak hepimiz her gün mecburen bir şeyler yiyor, içiyoruz. Metropol hayatının içerisinde, hızlı dönen çarklar pek çok insanın gün içinde yediği gıdaların kalitesine ve orijinalliğine dikkat etmesine fırsat vermiyor. 

Ekonomik koşullar, çiftçi ile manav, kasap, bakkal arasında ticaretin maliyetini katlayarak büyüten tüccarlar, bazen de fırsatçılar,  hilekarlar.. Bizi Günlük gıda ihtiyacımızın karambolde gerçekleşmesine mahkum ediyorlar. 

Piyasada satılan pek çok ürün, içerisine katılan çeşitli katkı malzemeleri ile sanki orijinal ve lezzetliymiş gibi görünürken aslında çeşitli hileler ile gerçeğini taklit eden kopya ürünlerin piyasada dolaşmasına sebep oluyor. Kaşar peyniri görünümlü patatesli karışımlar, Dondurma gibi görünen makarna tozları, Fıstıklı baklavada görücüye çıkan bezelyeler, içinde süt bulunamayan sütlü ürünler… Bu kopya ürünler, hem sağlığımızı tehdit ediyor hem de algılarımız ile oynayıp toplumsal moralimizi bozuyorlar.

İstanbul’da orijinalliği ve yöreselliğinden şüphe duyulmayan ürünlerin makul fiyatlarla satışa sunulduğu yeni bir işletmecilik anlayışına ihtiyaç olduğu için İsTar Kooperatifini kurduk. 

Amacımız, İstanbul’da yaşayan kent insanlarından, orijinal, geleneksel ve yöresel ürün satın almak isteyenlerin gönül rahatlığıyla ve makul piyasa şartlarında alış veriş yapabilmesini sağlamak

İstanbul’un her yerinden bireysel ve kurumsal siparişler alarak, müşterinin adresine orijinalliği tartışmasız olan, temsil ettiğimiz tüm üretici kooperatiflerin yöresel ürünlerinin tanıtımını, pazarlamasını, satışını ve müşteri adresine teslim edilmesinin sorumluluğu ile hareket ediyoruz.

İsTar, bu ihtiyacı karşılamak için tarafımızca kurulması planlanan fiziki ve sanal, bireysel ve kurumsal, toptan ve perakende niteliklere sahip bir orijinal yöresel ürün tedarik, satış ve teslimat projesidir

Name: Gujarat Natural Farming Science University (GNFSU)
Description: Gujarat Natural Farming Science University is a unique and diverse Educational, Research, and Extension hub for Natural farming established in the year 2017 by the Government of Gujarat and it is the only Natural Farming university in India. The University Campus shall be developed at the Jambudi farm of Halol Block of Panchmahal District of Gujarat. The Pavagdh Mountain and historic Champaner site are adjacent to the University’s Site. The university will provide an opportunity for Researchers to take up Research in Natural Farming, For Students Post Graduate level courses shall be available. Currently, the University offers M.Sc. in natural farming. The university shall cater to the needs of time in Natural Farming. The jurisdiction of the university includes eight agro-climatic zones of Gujarat state.

Name: Omni Agro
Description:
Na Omni Agro, estamos revolucionando o agronegócio por meio da tecnologia. Nossa abordagem omnicanal conecta produtores, distribuidores e consumidores, impulsionando a eficiência e o crescimento sustentável do setor.

Acreditamos que a tecnologia é a chave para superar os desafios enfrentados no agronegócio. Por meio de soluções digitais inovadoras, estamos democratizando o acesso à informação e criando oportunidades para todos.

Com nossa plataforma centralizada, oferecemos acesso fácil a dados, inteligência de mercado e ferramentas de gestão, capacitando os agentes do agronegócio a tomar decisões estratégicas e assertivas.

Utilizamos tecnologias avançadas, como IoT, IA e análise de dados, para desenvolver soluções que aumentam a produtividade, reduzem o impacto ambiental e promovem a segurança alimentar.

Além disso, estamos comprometidos com a sustentabilidade em todas as nossas ações. Valorizamos a preservação dos recursos naturais e buscamos promover a responsabilidade social em toda a cadeia produtiva.

Na Omni Agro, acreditamos na colaboração e na construção de parcerias duradouras. Promovemos a troca de conhecimento e melhores práticas entre produtores rurais, fornecedores e revendedores, visando fortalecer o setor como um todo.

Estamos impulsionando a transformação do agronegócio e convidamos você a fazer parte dessa jornada. Junte-se a nós e descubra um universo de possibilidades para o futuro do setor. Vamos construir, juntos, um agronegócio mais eficiente, sustentável e próspero. Vem com a Omni Agro!

PT Bio Konversi Indonesia is engaged in the biological processing of organic waste by conversion process with the help of Black Soldier Fly into liquid organic fertilizer products that can be reused by farmers and society.
Biokonversi liquid biofertilizer or Pupuk Hayati Cair

Name: NEXORA GREEN COMPANY
Description:
1. Qui sommes-nous ?
NEXORA GREEN COMPANY est une structure pluridisciplinaire intervenant sur deux pôles :  Développement Agricole et Rural et Énergie. Le premier est spécialisé sur les secteurs de l’Agriculture, de l’Elevage, de l’environnement, de l’économie Verte, de la gestion des projets ruraux. Le deuxième est spécialisé dans les secteurs d’Energie Renouvelable (solaire et hybride), de l’efficacité énergétiques et la gestion des projets énergétiques. 
Nous apportons aux particuliers, entreprises, ONG, collectivités et institutions, des solutions complètes allant de l’étude à la mise en œuvre, avec un engagement fort pour la durabilité, l’innovation et l’efficacité économique.
Avec une approche participative, notre objectif est de contribuer à un développement inclusif et durable, en apportant des solutions adaptées aux besoins des communautés rurales et urbaines, tout en respectant les exigences environnementales et socio-économiques actuelles pour une résilience des populations.
2. Notre mission
Contribuer au développement durable et inclusif en proposant des services professionnels, innovants et respectueux de l’environnement, pour renforcer les capacités des acteurs et favoriser la résilience des communautés.
3. Notre vision
Un monde résilient pour un développement vert grâce à la promotion de pratiques agricoles durables, de solutions énergétiques propres et de gestion efficace des ressources naturelles, en faveur d’un avenir prospère.
4. Nos valeurs
•	Durabilité : préserver les ressources pour les générations futures
•	Innovation : adopter des solutions technologiques adaptées
•	Qualité : garantir un service professionnel et fiable
•	Proximité : comprendre et répondre aux besoins réels des clients
5. Nos atouts
•	Une équipe pluridisciplinaire de jeunes expérimentée (au moins 10 ans d’expérience dans les différents domaines) et de consultants experts
•	Une approche participative et orientée vers de résultats durables
•	Des solutions adaptées au contexte

På Lundsgaard Gods samles og inspireres man. Her stimler kunstnere, forskere, musikere, og alle mulige andre dygtige mennesker sammen. For her er bogstaveligt talt højt til loftet. Her er ro til at tænke og plads til at skabe. Her emmer af virkelyst.

Ejerne Vini og Rudolf Iuel driver den store kulturarv med gæstfrihed, kvalitetssans og bæredygtighed i højsædet.
 
Lundsgaards historie strækker sig helt tilbage til 1200-tallet, mens det nyeste hovedhus kom til i 1765. Stedet har altid været samlingssted for kunstnere og forfattere, og traditionen for stor gæstfrihed føres videre hver eneste dag. Sammen med dogmer om høj kvalitet og bæredygtighed, er godsets værdier tilstede i alt fra økologisk produktion til løbende istandsættelse og de mange innovative tiltag.

E' produzione.

Ed è un'azienda con una vera e propria economia circolare, dopo tanti anni di progettazione da febbraio è attivo un distributore di biometano in azienda per rifornire i mezzi aziendali e le auto della comunità.

Name: VisuInnovation
Description:
We stand out for our pioneering use of drone technology to optimize agriculture, with a focus on precision viticulture. Initially targeting vineyards, we offer various solutions, from drone sales to personalized services, with specialized pilots operating drones in both traditional and mechanized vineyards. As exclusive distributors of the European company "ABZ Innovation," we ensure the quality and reliability of our products, meeting stringent European certifications. Additionally, we are expanding our operations to the agroforestry market, providing innovative solutions for sustainable forest management.

We have also established a strategic partnership with a vocational school, subsidized by a Municipal Chamber, to offer specialized training in drone operation, focusing on vineyards that are difficult to access. Our mission is to drive innovation in agriculture by providing advanced solutions that reduce the use of chemicals, protect the environment, and streamline work processes. We have a talented and diverse team, composed of experts in aviation, marketing, information technology, and leadership, all committed to transforming the agricultural industry.

We aim to foster innovation and lead the way towards a more efficient and environmentally responsible agriculture sector. In parallel, we are associated with projects utilizing drones for other purposes, ranging from goods transportation to ensuring the safety of people and property.

Name: Get Well Polska
Description:
Spółka Get Well jest firmą zrodzoną z pasji i zamiłowania do prawdziwej ekologii. Założyciele swoje zawodowe życie związali z produkcją żywności, szczególnie z produkcją zwierzęcą, w tym drobiarską.

„Wykorzystując swoje 30-letnie doświadczenie połączyliśmy wiedzę z zakresu hodowli, weterynarii, ekonomii i ekologii w nowe przedsięwzięcie, które ma wpływ na produkowaną żywność. Widząc postęp, jaki dokonał się w genetyce zwierząt, wyposażeniu obiektów, sposobach zarządzania stadami, weterynarii, zwróciliśmy uwagę na pomijany dotychczas aspekt produkcji, jakim jest ściółka, na której zwierzęta przebywają całe swoje życie.”

Spółka Get Well w pracach nad opracowaniem nowego procesu technologicznego ukierunkowanego na wdrożenie do produkcji wysokiej jakości podłoża torfowo-wiórowego, realizowała działania polegające na możliwości wyeliminowania z produktu czynników stanowiących potencjalne zagrożenia dla zdrowia zwierząt hodowlanych. Bezpieczeństwo zdrowotne produkowanej żywności oraz poprawa dobrostanu zwierząt to istotne aspekty, do których przywiązuje się duże znaczenie w hodowli zwierząt. Natomiast, produkcja drobiarska do której skierowany będzie produkt jest obecnie najintensywniej rozwijającą się gałęzią produkcji. Zauważalny na rynku, znaczny postęp gospodarczy branży drobiarskiej wymusza sprostanie wymogom w zakresie warunków utrzymywania i hodowli drobiu w aspekcie zapewnienia wysokiej jakości podłoża hodowlanego. Mając na uwadze dobrostan ptaków hodowlanych oraz wysoką jakość produktów pochodzenia zwierzęcego, producenci drobiu powinni dbać o to, by warunki bytowe ptaków były ściśle związane z ich naturalnymi potrzebami. Zauważając tę potrzebę rynkową spółka Get Well podjęła się działań ukierunkowanych na opracowanie innowacyjnej technologii wytwarzania ściółki torfowo-wiórowej o podwyższonych parametrach użytkowych w następujących aspektach:

Name: Biocomp 3.0
Description: O Projecto BioComp_3.0 identifica três problemas fundamentais relacionados com: A baixa fertilidade dos solos, a gestão deficiente de resíduos orgânicos e a falta de soluções economicamente viáveis e seguras para o controlo eficaz de plantas exóticas invasoras aquáticas, nomeadamente jacinto-de-água (Pontederia crassipes). É com estas 3 preocupações presentes que o projecto BioComp 3.0 visa conciliar a necessidade de controlo físico do jacinto-de-água, à recuperação e aproveitamento dos nutrientes que esta espécie concentra, respeitando os princípios da Economia Circular, transformando a biomassa da planta invasora em compostos orgânicos equilibrados, com qualidade para a agricultura. Através do valor dos compostos produzidos é possível aliviar a fatura dos custos com o seu controlo e, ao mesmo tempo, aumentar a fertilidade e resiliência dos solos por via do aumento do teor em matéria orgânica.

Name: Gracias Algas
Description:
Gracias Algas is a family-owned, Chile-based wholesale seaweed company, dedicated to providing premium, organic seaweed in bulk to customers worldwide. Founded in the early 1990s in Chile’s Coquimbo region, Gracias Algas was born from the vision of María Graciela Ortiz, a marine biologist, and her husband, Rubén Rojas, an aquaculture engineer. Together, they saw an opportunity to sustainably cultivate, harvest, and export high-quality Chilean seaweed.

Over the years, Gracias Algas has grown into a trusted name in the seaweed industry, working closely with local non-industrial fishing communities and associations. We are committed to fair trade and sustainability, overseeing every step of the production process—from cultivation and harvesting to drying and export. Our focus on quality and collaborative practices ensures our customers receive the best Chilean seaweed while supporting the communities that help make it possible.

Name: AGROLAB_BIOGAL
Description:
El reto del proyecto GO AGROLAB BIOGAL es conseguir un aprovechamiento de purines más eficiente mediante el conocimiento de sus características en términos de NPK. Perseguimos una fertilización y producción agrícola sostenible y para ello nos apoyamos en la sensórica avanzada. En concreto, en AGROLAB BIOGAL empleamos la fotónica mediante la espectrofotometría NIRs.

Además de hacer más precisa la fertilización con purines, y que satisface al agricultor; también esperamos mejorar la salud del suelo, reduciendo la contaminación difusa por metales.

Participantes del proyecto: TALLERES CARRUXO SL, CLUN (Cooperativas Lácteas Unidas), SAT As Cavadas Ganadería, Universidade de Santiago de Compostela y el grupo de investigación BioMODEM.

Con la colaboración de: Medrar Innovation Office, AMSlab y AOTECH.

Puede consultar más información sobre el proyecto en la página web.

El proyecto Agrolab_Biogal se desarrollará durante los próximos tres años al amparo de las ayudas convocadas por la Agencia Gallega de Calidad Alimentaria (Agacal) en el año 2024 para la ejecución de proyectos innovadores de los grupos operativos de la Asociación Europea de la Innovación (AEI), cofinanciadas con el Fondo Europeo Agrícola de Desarrollo Rural (Feader) en el marco del Plan Estratégico de la Política Agraria Común (Pepac) 2023-2027.

Name: Carboglace Maroc
Description:
Carboglace Maroc se spécialise dans la production et la distribution de la glace carbonique, offrant des solutions de refroidissement innovantes et efficaces pour divers secteurs industriels à travers le Maroc.

Fonctionnalités de la Glace Carbonique
Refroidissement Puissant : La glace carbonique, avec une température de -78,5°C, offre un pouvoir de refroidissement supérieur aux méthodes traditionnelles.
Sublimation Directe : Se transforme directement de l'état solide à l'état gazeux, sans résidu liquide, facilitant le nettoyage et l'utilisation.
Polyvalence : Utilisée dans des applications variées allant de la conservation des aliments à la médecine, en passant par le nettoyage cryogénique et le transport de produits sensibles à la température.
Avantages de la Glace Carbonique
Efficacité Thermique : Excellent maintien des basses températures pour les besoins de conservation et de transport.
Propreté : Pas de résidus liquides, ce qui est idéal pour le transport d'articles sensibles à l'humidité.
Sécurité : Non toxique et non inflammable, assurant une manipulation sécurisée.
Écologique : Produit à partir de CO₂ recyclé, contribuant à la réduction des émissions globales de gaz à effet de serre.
Présence sur le Marché Marocain
Carboglace Maroc est un acteur clé sur le marché marocain, avec une présence stratégique permettant de répondre rapidement et efficacement aux besoins des entreprises locales. Nos points de distribution bien situés assurent une disponibilité continue et une livraison rapide de nos produits à travers le pays.

Contactez-Nous
Pour en savoir plus sur nos produits et services, et découvrir comment la glace carbonique peut optimiser vos processus industriels, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter.

Carboglace Maroc - La solution glaciale pour un avenir plus frais et plus propre.

Name: Agri-Art.cloud
Description:
Questa piattaforma nasce dall'idea di voler creare un "mercato digitale" che rappresenti l'implementazione digitale del Km0 e dell' economy sharing, applicati all'agricoltura, all'allevamento e all'artigianato. 

Il Km0 è fondamentale per i creatori della piattaforma, nasce dal desiderio di nutrirsi con alimenti prodotti dalla nostra terra e con le nostre regole! Le quali regole sono molto più restrittive rispetto agli altri stati. Sono regole che vanno rispettate per la nostra salute, per il nostro benessere e che il prezzo minore non può compensare. Purtroppo però tutti cerchiamo di risparmiare meglio che possiamo, quindi risparmiamo sul trasporto! Il KM0 serve anche a questo! Il nostro obiettivo principale è quello di offrire uno strumento per aiutare tutte le aziende nelle vendite del proprio prodotto o che si ritrovano prodotti e materiali invenduti o inutilizzati, magari richiesto e di fondamentale importanza per altre aziende o altre persone a te vicine. Quindi questo portale è l'incontro tra domanda e offerta di tutto ciò che serve ad agricoltori e artigiani italiani, ottimizzando la ricerca di quello più vicino a te.

L'economy sharing invece ci permette di risparmiare sull'acquisto di attrezzature, macchinari, e, se vogliamo, anche utensili. Ad esempio, se per un periodo di tempo non utilizzi un macchinario, puoi noleggiarlo o offrirlo come contoterzista.

L'altro nostro obiettivo è quello di utilizzare un sistema che permetterà di suggerirti cosa potrebbe interessarti. Ad esempio, se hai dei bovini ti invieremo le migliori offerte che possono interessare a chi possiede dei bovini, come mangimi, attrezzature per l'allevamento di bovini, e tutto ciò che è inerente i bovini.

ACQUISTA DIRETTAMENTE DAI PRODUTTORI.

--> Assistenza sempre al tuo fianco, anche per principianti! Ti aiuteremo a configurare al meglio il tuo negozio, i tuoi prodotti e gestirlo al meglio.

Name: VisuInnovation
Description:
We stand out for our pioneering use of drone technology to optimize agriculture, with a focus on precision viticulture. Initially targeting vineyards, we offer various solutions, from drone sales to personalized services, with specialized pilots operating drones in both traditional and mechanized vineyards. As exclusive distributors of the European company "ABZ Innovation," we ensure the quality and reliability of our products, meeting stringent European certifications. Additionally, we are expanding our operations to the agroforestry market, providing innovative solutions for sustainable forest management.

We have also established a strategic partnership with a vocational school, subsidized by a Municipal Chamber, to offer specialized training in drone operation, focusing on vineyards that are difficult to access. Our mission is to drive innovation in agriculture by providing advanced solutions that reduce the use of chemicals, protect the environment, and streamline work processes. We have a talented and diverse team, composed of experts in aviation, marketing, information technology, and leadership, all committed to transforming the agricultural industry.

We aim to foster innovation and lead the way towards a more efficient and environmentally responsible agriculture sector. In parallel, we are associated with projects utilizing drones for other purposes, ranging from goods transportation to ensuring the safety of people and property.

Name: Freiherr von Fürstenberg'sche Forstverwaltung
Description:
Wir bewirtschaften zwei Forstbetriebe im Sauerland, NRW, nach den Grundsätzen der naturgemäßen Waldwirtschaft, also mit dem Ziel einen klimastabilen Mischwald aufzubauen.

Beim Umbau der Betriebe von im wesentlichen von der Fichte dominierten, zu stärker durchmischten Beständen, setzen wir auf gezielte Einbringung von Mischbaumarten und ansonsten auf Naturverjüngung und konsequente Bejagung. Dabei versuchen wir immer wieder neuartige Ansätze, wie die Drohnensaat einzusetzen und "über den Tellerrand zu schauen" um von anderen Branchen zu lernen.

Neben der Holzvermarktung, machen wir gezielte (Vertrags-)Naturschutzmaßnahmen und verkaufen das in den Revieren erlegte Wild in Direktvermarktung.

Name: FLX Agroforestry Solutions
Description:
Agroforestry, the strategic integration of trees and shrubs with other crops or livestock, can offer a variety of economic, ecological, and social benefits. That includes the potential for greater net production relative to monoculture cropping systems, “overyielding” where the whole is truly greater than the parts. The value generated by these systems can also include benefits like carbon sequestration, enhanced biodiversity, improved soil and water quality, and increased resilience to social and environmental perturbations. 

Drawing on a wealth of resources and opportunity in our area, FLX Agroforestry Solutions works with a wide range of partners in support of agroforestry based initiatives in New York State's Finger Lakes region.

Name: 22Bee
Description:
L’amore per la natura è il motore che muove 22bee, nata dall’idea di Francesco, giovane ragazzo pratese, che ogni giorno, sulle splendide colline toscane, coltiva con dedizione la sua passione per le api, producendo il suo miele nel pieno rispetto della natura e delle sue piccole alleate.

Questa passione è il filo conduttore che lo ha accompagnato sin dai suoi primi anni di vita: dalle lunghe passeggiate in montagna col nonno, fino ai pomeriggi a giocare libero nei campi con gli amici, sempre a stretto contatto con la natura, fino a farne della sua passione un lavoro.

Dal 2018 si immerge nel mondo della produzione del miele Biologico Toscano, guidato dallo spirito di collaborazione e cooperazione coi suoi colleghi, proprio come fanno le api.

Arnie, api, miele, un circolo virtuoso di crescita in continua espansione: oggi, infatti, 22bee si sta specializzando nella produzione di pappa reale italiana made in Tuscany – Biologica e si prevede l’avvio di tanti altri innovativi progetti.

Name: Fondazione Le Eccellenze Agroalimentari e Zootecniche dei Parchi Naturali della Sardegna
Description:
La Fondazione denominata “Le Eccellenze dei Parchi Naturali della Sardegna” si occupa delle aziende agroalimentari e zootecniche, di tutta la Sardegna, nasce nel centro Sardegna, il Sarcidano, cuore selvaggio della Sardegna.

La Fondazione si occupa di favorire lo sviluppo delle imprese agroalimentari e zootecniche di ogni dimensione così come di favorire la ricerca, la commercializzazione, la formazione delle imprese di ogni settore di attività, si occupa altresì di favorire la cultura d’impresa,

Tra i vari riconoscimenti, già ottenuti, prima la Regione Sardegna, Assessorato Regionale all’Agricoltura, quindi il MIPAAF hanno riconosciuto la Fondazione, quale titolare del Distretto Agroalimentare di Qualità: Le Eccellenze Agroalimentari e Zootecniche dei Parchi Naturali della Sardegna”. Successivamente, é giunto anche il riconoscimento di Distretto del Cibo. In virtù di tale attributo, la Fondazione si propone quale vettore per la diffusione di produzioni agroalimentari e zootecniche di qualità certificata nonché strumento per la valorizzazione della tradizione culinaria e territoriale dell’Isola.

Attraverso la collaborazione con istituzioni locali e del settore Ricerca, la Fondazione vuole creare nuove filiere agroalimentari regionali. Si tratta di micro, piccole e medie realtà che ancora conoscono i segreti della natura e che meritano di essere arricchite con le più moderne conoscenze.

Infine, ultimo ma non per importanza, la Fondazione si propone come mezzo per la cooperazione tra filiere complementari, come quelle ricollegabili al Turismo. Quest’ultimo, per noi, vuole manifestarsi, con rispetto ed eticità, costituendo un vero e proprio strumento per la valorizzazione delle tradizioni locali.

Name: Native Breed Solutions CIC
Description:
Native Breed Solutions is a research organisation registered as a UK-based Community Interest Company focused on the conservation and practical use of native livestock breeds in modern agriculture. We work to demonstrate how these breeds contribute to sustainable food systems, environmental stewardship, and rural livelihoods.

Our approach is grounded in science. We support and conduct research on the nutritional value, health outcomes, and environmental impacts of native breeds. We collaborate with farmers, researchers, and other partners to assess production systems, improve product quality, and strengthen the case for native genetics in commercial and small-scale farming.

We aim to improve understanding of how native breeds fit into regenerative grazing, low-input systems, and climate adaptation. We also support traceability and transparency in supply chains, promoting high-quality meat, milk, and fiber products linked to breed and origin.

Our work combines evidence-based research, practical fieldwork, and stakeholder engagement. Whether supporting a farmer trial, contributing to a policy discussion, or sharing data on breed performance, our goal is to keep native breeds relevant, productive, and valued.

We welcome collaboration with producers, academics, retailers, and anyone committed to improving food systems through better livestock, better land use, and better data.

 Science-led. Breed-focused. Future-ready.

We welcome collaboration and conversation. Please feel free to contact us directly via LinkedIn message or via Email at NativeBreedSolutions@gmail.com

Check out our official collaborators!
Devon Cattle Breeders Society - https://www.redrubydevon.co.uk/
Reaseheath College - https://www.reaseheath.ac.uk/

Name: CEPAA
Description:
La CEPAA est une Compagnie d'Experts Judiciaires en productions agricoles, agro-alimentaires, activités horticoles et vétérinaires, pollution, dépollution et servitudes de l'environnement près les Cours d'Appel et les Tribunaux Administratifs.

La CEPAA est une association loi 1901.

Dans le cadre de nos activités judiciaires, nous sommes soumis aux règles de déontologie édictées par le Conseil National des Compagnies d'Experts de Justice. Dans le cadre de nos activités extra-judiciaires ou amiables, nous nous engageons à respecter en particulier les bases d'éthique suivantes :

1 - le respect de l'esprit du Nouveau code de procédure civile français,
2 - la compétence, l'objectivité, la diligence
3 - l'indépendance, c'est à dire de n'avoir aucun lien d'intérêt avec les parties,
4 - le respect du non conflit d'intérêt,
5 - la confidentialité et le secret professionnel,
6 - la garantie d'assurance de notre responsabilité civile professionnelle.

Ingénieurs et économistes experts sont à votre disposition pour le règlement des conflits liés aux activités agricoles et agro-alimentaires, forestières, environnementales, à l'alimentation, aux milieux vivants et naturels.

Dans notre société Française qui apparaît de plus en plus urbanisée, paradoxalement, le monde agricole reste l'incontournable partenaire de notre quotidien. Il est présent partout : dans notre assiette et dans nos verres, dans nos loisirs (jardinage, horticulture, jouissance de l'espace rural, partage avec les animaux domestiques…) et au-delà même.

L'expert de justice lié aux domaines de l'agriculture et de la nature, principalement au service du magistrat, apporte à tous les lumières d'un technicien de terrain et d'expérience, sans cesse en formation et à l'écoute des nouveautés de sa spécialité. Certaines dépassant même le milieu agricole, l'agro-alimentaire par exemple, qui est devenu un véritable secteur industriel avec un volume d'affaire prodigieux et de très nombreux emplois.
Location: Compagnie Nationale couvrant toutes les Cours d'Appel

Name: The FARM 1780
Description:
The FARM has been in the Monts Family for eight generations. George Monts and his family arrived in Lexington, SC in 1780, and by 1787 had been decreed several land grants totaling more than 900 acres.

The granting of land was an important practice in establishing South Carolina. Like early versions of homesteads, land grants insured the cultivation of the land since acreage was determined by the number of family members.

George Monts’ original  acreage has been divided among families over the years.  Today, The FARM sits on just over 34 acres and remains the only intact piece of the original land grant.  It was inherited in 2017 by George’s 7th great-grandson Brett Flashnick.

Brett and his wife, McKenzie, felt an innate sense of obligation to continue the tradition and protect the original purpose of the land.  And, so, The FARM was born.  The property remains a family farm focused on growing local, seasonal fruits and vegetables, raising heritage breed livestock, and connecting the community.

What We Do:

Livestock Farming: Our livestock operations include raising goats, chickens, ducks, and pigs, ensuring quality, pasture-raised products.

At MNC Farms, we’re not just growing food—we’re growing a movement toward a healthier, self-sufficient Liberia. Connect with us as we continue to innovate, educate, and cultivate a sustainable agricultural landscape.

 Join us on our journey from seed to harvest!

Name: Alternative Solutions to Somali Indigenous Farmers - ( ASOIF)
Description:
ASOIF as humanitarian organization gives its maximum priority to develop the rural society in the field of agricultural, food security and livelihoods. ASOIF is not restricting its activities and operational zones in south central regions of Somalia, however its strategy  encompasses  widening the scope of  ASOIF  to  other  regions of Somalia. Currently ASOIF is operating actively in the all south central regions of Somalia. ASOIF is focusing on Food Security, Increasing Incomes through Sustainable Agribusiness. Or order to make maximum impact the following operational areas will be guided its current intervention these includes
 
 
Strategic Objective 1:
 
Increase	the	capacity	of poor resource	beneficiary households to effectively practice sustainable agro- economic activities
 
Strategic Objective 2:
 
Increase food  security  and  environmental  conservation
practices at household level
 
ASOIF PROFILE 
 
With the aim to attain the desired strategic objectives ASOIF support will be provided to organised farmers organizations/associations to have the capacity to effectively provide services to individual farming households in their areas of operations to access agricultural inputs, to improve their farming practices, increase their agricultural based income, taking into considerations different and complimentary roles of male and female farmers in order to ensure food security and increased income.  Emphasis will be in the following areas:

Agricultural Extension
•- Support of participatory extension approaches with an important role of farmer organisation’s as intermediaries
•- Search for new partnerships between government extension system and farmers on farmer to farmer learning and exchange On improved access to extension systems based on through establishment and supporting farmers cooperatives
•- Revitalise traditional crops, in addition to new crops
•- Collaboration with research institutes

Name: NIRS2CUSTOM
Description:
Investigación para el desarrollo innovador de un prototipo equipado con la técnica NIRS para analizar la composición química del suelo en tiempo real, asociado a un cuaderno de campo digital dotado de
una capa de Inteligencia Artificial con predicción para la fertilización personalizada de los cultivos. El mundo agrícola ha cambiado radicalmente, profesionalizándose al ritmo que requería el mercado y los agricultores necesitan contar con un asesoramiento y un apoyo que es de vital importancia para alcanzar las producciones optimas de sus explotaciones, con la finalidad de optimizar el uso de fertilizantes y fitosanitarios y así proteger el medio ambiente. La utilización del análisis de infrarrojo cercano NIR, una técnica espectroscópica que utiliza de forma natural el espectro electromagnético, nos permitirá conocer a tiempo real estas carencias, permitirá al agricultor aplicar adecuadamente los fertilizantes, cumpliendo las normativas vigentes (Directiva 91-676-CEE o el futuro reglamento europeo por el que establecen las normas para la nutrición sostenible de los suelos agrarios).

At Reboisement et Exploitation des Forêts, we turn reforestation into a vehicle for environmental restoration, rural development, and sustainable investment. Based in Togo, we coordinate forest carbon credit projects that align with the highest global standards—transforming tree planting and forest protection into verified carbon assets.

We work with landowners, community groups, NGOs, and impact investors to design, certify, and scale forest projects that generate carbon credits while creating jobs, protecting biodiversity, and improving local livelihoods.

 What We Offer:
Project design & registration (Verra, Gold Standard, national frameworks)

Carbon baseline assessments, monitoring & verification

Community-based forestry & reforestation coordination

Certification and third-party validation

Market access and transparent revenue sharing

Our local expertise and commitment to environmental integrity ensure every project delivers measurable, lasting value—for the planet and for our partners.

 Join us in building nature-based climate solutions that deliver both impact and returns.

Name: Green Farmer
Description:
Founder’s Message 2025
At Green Farmer, everything we do begins with a simple idea: if we take care of the earth, it will take care of us.

What started as a small patch of soil, a few seeds, and a whole lot of hope has become something much bigger—a place where people reconnect with nature, learn where their food comes from, and discover the joy of growing things with their own hands. We’re more than just an organic farm. We’re a space for learning, for healing, and for community.

Our mission is to grow honest, healthy food without chemicals or shortcuts—and to do it in a way that respects the land, the seasons, and the people who eat from it. But just as importantly, we want to plant ideas. We want to show children that tomatoes don’t grow in supermarkets. We want families to learn how compost can turn scraps into soil. We want people to feel the magic of pulling a carrot from the ground and tasting something real.

That’s why we started Project G.R.O.W. (Green, Resilient, Organic, Whole)—an initiative that invites schools, youth groups, and everyday folks to roll up their sleeves and get involved. Through farm tours, workshops, and hands-on experiences, we help people understand not just how food is grown, but why it matters.

We also believe farming builds more than food—it builds character. On the farm, there are no shortcuts. The weather doesn’t always cooperate. Things don’t always go as planned. But that’s where resilience, teamwork, and responsibility take root. Our farm life education programmes are designed to nurture not just green thumbs, but grounded, thoughtful individuals who care about their world.

Every season brings something new, and every person who visits Green Farmer adds something to our story. Whether you come here to learn, to lend a hand, or simply to breathe fresh air and walk among the rows, you’re always welcome.

Name: Bundesverband Deutscher Tabakpflanzer / Vereinigung der Tabak-Erzeugergemeinschaften e.V.
Description:
Unter dem Dach des Bundesverbandes Deutscher Tabakpflanzer / Vereinigung der Tabak-Erzeugergemeinschaften e.V. sind die einzelnen regionalen Pflanzerverbände und Erzeugergemeinschaften zusammengeschlossen. Die Landesverbände und Erzeugergemeinschaften umfassen rund 100 Mitgliedsbetriebe.

Zu den Aufgaben zählt die Förderung einer positiven Einstellung zum Tabakanbau in Politik und Gesellschaft, die Interessenvertretung beim Bund, bei der EU und in internationalen Institutionen, die Darstellung der Bedeutung des deutschen Tabakanbaus insbesondere in Bezug auf nachhaltige, umweltgerechte und qualitätsorientierte Tabakproduktion und die Wahrung und Förderung der gemeinsamen Belange der im Verband organisierten Pflanzer und Erzeugergemeinschaften.

Name: CIVAM de l'Oasis
Description:
Le CIVAM de l’Oasis est une association de développement agricole et rural issue de l’éducation populaire, adhérente aux valeurs du Réseau CIVAM, et qui développe une expertise depuis 2008 sur les interactions entre agronomie et biodiversité en zone de grandes cultures. Nous travaillons principalement en Champagne crayeuse, et plus précisément sur les départements de la Marne et de l’Aube.

Notre association est un lieu de rencontre pour ceux qui veulent réconcilier l’agronomie et la biodiversité, dans un objectif de construction d’agrosystèmes cohérents et résilients. C’est également un lieu de débats entre citoyens et agriculteurs, afin de contribuer à des campagnes vivantes et solidaires.

Nous appuyons notre accompagnement sur des connaissances obtenues grâce aux applications de terrain, auprès de groupes d’agriculteurs.rices engagé.e.s dans des réflexions de changements de systèmes en lien avec divers partenaires. L’objet de notre association est d’accompagner ces fermes vers une meilleure résilience des systèmes de production et une autonomie décisionnelle, par le développement d’échanges de pratiques visant l’équilibre biologique des agrosystèmes, la diminution de leur dépendance aux intrants, le renforcement de leur ancrage territorial.

Nous sommes également en train d’approfondir notre accompagnement sur de nouveaux enjeux, et, à ce titre, nous animons un groupe de femmes en non-mixité choisie depuis 2023.

Name: AVF-SN
Description:
AVF-Sénégal est une association de producteurs/trices agricoles créée le 20 Septembre 2020, reconnue par l’état du Sénégal le 25 Mars 2021. (N° enregistrement : 2020 GRSL/AA/PMB du 23 Mars 2021). Ses membres se sont engagés à pratiquer une agriculture écologique, durable, régénérative pour préserver/restaurer leurs bases productives agricoles à travers l’agroforesterie par les arbres fertilitaires. AVF-Sn par le paquet technique qu’elle diffuse cherche à restaurer la vie dans les sols et les écosystèmes naturels en associant toutes cultures végétales avec des espèces d’arbres dits fertilitaires à croissance rapide.
L’objectif visé par AVF est de progresser à un rythme annuel d’environs 200 000 arbres plantés par hectare/an toutes espèces confondues (haies vives, brises vents, arbres fertilitaires, arbres fruitiers) soit 200 ha.

L’initiateur d’AVF-Sénégal est Mansour Ndiaye, Expert Agroforestier. C’est lui qui a été à l’origine de l’introduction au Sénégal du système agroforestier portant sur l’utilisation d’arbres dits ‘fertilitaires’ à travers l’ONG APAF Sénégal (Association pour la Promotion des Arbres Fertilitaires, de l’Agroforesterie et de la foresterie), qu’il avait lui-même fondée en 2014 et dont il fut le directeur exécutif jusqu’en Octobre 2020. Depuis 2013, grâce à la vision de M. Ndiaye, l’ONG #APAF est intervenue dans plusieurs régions du Sénégal pour faire la promotion de l’agroforesterie par les Arbres Fertilitaires en milieu rural. Après 7 ans de service, il quitta APAF Sénégal pour créer avec un groupe de producteurs agricoles de la vallée du fleuve Sénégal l’association Afrique Verte et Fertile-Sénégal (AVF-SN) dont il est le Directeur exécutif. AVF-Sn est membre de la Plateforme Panafricaine d’organisations nationales du même nom qui poursuivent les mêmes missions et objectifs au Togo, Mali, Burkina Faso’.

Name: GrowyTech Endüstriyel Tarım
Description:
GrowyTech is an agricultural technology company founded by a team with over 10 years of experience in industrial automation. Initially, we provided innovative solutions to various sectors of industry through our expertise in custom machine manufacturing and software development.

Today, under the GrowyTech brand, we operate in the field of industrial soilless agriculture. Our system is based on cultivating plants in NFT (Nutrient Film Technique) channels, and all processes can be remotely controlled through our proprietary software. This enables critical operations such as irrigation, nutrient balance, lighting, and climate control to be managed fully automatically, maximizing efficiency.

The Future of Smart Agriculture
At GrowyTech, the systems we develop are not only automation-driven, but also feature self-learning capabilities and automated error notifications. In case of malfunctions or abnormal conditions, our system instantly sends feedback via SMS, email, and emergency calls, ensuring uninterrupted agricultural processes.

“Smarter Agriculture, Greener Future!” is not just a slogan — it's our roadmap.

At GrowyTech, we aim to revolutionize agricultural production by harnessing the power of technology.

Name: Agromada cooperative
Description:
Agromada cooperative is serving grains, vegetable and fruit farmers in Ukraine 

Cooperative Services.  Building growth. Building strong communities.

Whether it’s crop nutrients or other inputs to achieve optimal yields, or grain marketing and agribusiness services that help capture economic value, Agromada cooperative is helping farmers succeed. 

By providing services, such as collecting, storing, processing and selling the harvest, Agromada closes the gap between producers on the one hand, and consumers and the processing industry on the other. Thanks to our extensive storage and transport resources, we can act as a buffer to bridge the time lags between seasonal production subject to environmental influences and ongoing, demand-oriented consumption.

Agromada cooperative foster extensive direct partnerships with farmers growing grains, vegetables and fruits and support them in all stages, from sowing the seed and crop protection through to the harvest. Naturally this also applies to farms with animal husbandry where we supply optimally mixed feedstuff and advice on animal health.

Farmers need Agromada cooperative to provide the services and functions they would have a hard time doing themselves. Our cooperative services include functions like building facilities to handle grain, developing domestic and international markets for commodities, providing a reliable supply of inputs, and sharing the product expertise producers need to raise crops and livestock. Agromada cooperative serve as business advisors, providing the input to help us make decisions based on the  needs of local grains, vegetable and fruit producers. With our cooperative support Agromada members gain size, scale and speed in an ever-changing global economy.

Name: Kampura
Description:
Who We Are

Kampura grows organic cacao and cardamom, along with natural rubber, mahogany and Honduran rosewood. We are a healing project rooted in the forests of Guatemala.

On 2,000 acres of regenerated land in Caqui Creek, Izabal, we’ve transformed degraded terrain into a thriving agroforestry system where cacao grows underneath rosewood & mahogany, where cardamom thrives under natural rubber, and native trees.

Our work is guided by two parallel missions:

1. **Healing the land** through regenerative practices that restore biodiversity, capture carbon, and protect water systems.

2. **Healing relationships** by partnering with Qʼeqchi’ Maya communities to provide dignified work, living wages, and pride in the shared craft of cacao.

At Kampura, every tree planted, every seedling nurtured, and every cacao block produced is part of a bigger circle of renewal.

#What We Make#

We craft **ceremonial-grade cacao** at origin in Guatemala — stone-ground, lightly roasted, and free from sugar or additives.

Unlike most cacao that’s exported as raw beans and processed overseas, Kampura **keeps every step close to the forest it comes from**. Fermentation, roasting, winnowing, grinding, and packaging all happen here in Izabal. 

The result: fresher cacao, complete transparency, and more local value creation.

Why We Exist

Cacao is often marketed as a “superfood” or “ceremonial” drink. For us, it’s much more.

Cacao is the link between soil health, human health, and community well-being. 

Kampura cacao is crafted for:

Health-conscious professionals seeking an alternative to coffee.

Wellness and yoga practitioners who incorporate cacao into ritual and daily practice.

Foodies and ethical consumers who want transparency and taste.

Biohackers and nutrition seekers who value lab-grade nutrition.

Wholesale buyers and distributors in North America, Europe, Australia & New Zealand, Japan, and Latin America America.

Healing the land and communities together in one process

Name: Pascoe's Field
Description:
Pascoe's Fields is a leading sustainable farming company in Ghana, revolutionizing vegetable and honey production through climate-smart agricultural practices. With a strong commitment to environmental sustainability, food security, and youth empowerment, Pascoe Fields operates across multiple regions, with its main farm in Aprekusu (Eastern Region), a branch in Nsuta (Volta Region), and a dedicated beekeeping farm in Nkuranza (Bono Ahafo Region).

At the heart of Pascoe's Fields’ mission is the drive to create innovative and eco-friendly farming solutions that boost productivity while preserving natural ecosystems. The company has directly and indirectly employed over 100 youth, providing opportunities in agribusiness and fostering economic growth in rural communities.

Pascoe's Fields’ impactful work in sustainable agriculture earned it recognition as part of the Ghana Climate Innovation Centre (GCIC) project by Ashesi University, GIZ, and the Government of Canada, a prestigious initiative supporting climate-focused enterprises with over $20,000 in funding.

With a vision to transform the agricultural landscape in Ghana and beyond, Pascoe's Fields continues to set the standard for sustainable farming, ethical beekeeping, and community-driven agribusiness innovation.

Name: Società Agricola Semplice i prodotti della Natura
Description:
I Prodotti della Natura SAS è un'azienda agricola situata nell’Appennino toscano, dedicata alla rigenerazione ecologica dei suoli, alla biodiversità e alla produzione sostenibile di estratti botanici, biostimolanti per la salute del suolo e substrati di riciclo.

Operiamo in un’area collinare a 420 m s.l.m., in un contesto di ex-bosco degradato, che stiamo riportando in vita attraverso pratiche agroforestali, progettazione permaculturale e monitoraggi ambientali in collaborazione con iniziative scientifiche e reti internazionali.

Tra le nostre linee principali:

Biostimolanti naturali a base di Inula viscosa e Cistus, come Cignula.

Prodotti apistici e agroecologici collegati alla flora spontanea locale.

XR ed esperienze educative che uniscono agricoltura, arte e tecnologia.

Siamo parte attiva della transizione ecologica, con un forte orientamento all’innovazione responsabile e all’integrazione tra digitale e natura.

 Toscana |  Rigenerazione |  Biodiversità |  Ricerca |  XR & Blockchain per la terra

Name: Ranch de l'Espérance
Description:
Dans les années 2000, le Ranch de l’Espérance, fût créé et commença son activité de pension de chevaux.

Dans les années 2010, l’élevage de poneys Welsh débute avec l’arrivée de Samanta, notre première poulinière suivi d’Atomic notre premier étalon.

Le Ranch de l’Espérance continuera son activité en développant l’éco-pâturage, ce qu’il l’amène à élever en plus des poneys, des vaches Higland, des moutons Landes de Bretagne, des chèvres des Fossés.

Le Ranch de l’Espérance intervient pour l’éco-pâturage sur 6 départements, le Maine et Loire, la Mayenne, la Sarthe, la Vendée, l’Indre et Loire, et la Loire Atlantique

Name: Grão Digital
Description: A Safratoken oferece soluções inovadoras para produtores rurais. A empresa tokeniza essas commodities agrícolas e pode fornecer empréstimos usando esses bens como garantia, através de ferramentas do ecossistema DeFi. Esta abordagem simplifica e reduz os custos das linhas de crédito para os agricultores, permitindo-lhes economizar para a próxima safra, comprando insumos e implementos agrícolas.

Name: AC McCartney Equipment

Reforestación  para prevenir el cambio climático Preservación y recuperación de la biodiversidad Generación de valor agregado de la madera
Maximización del uso de los recursos de una manera sostenible Competencia con base en calidad ambiental
Innovación y desarrollo de tecnologías apropiadas Utilización completa de todos los recursos- ceros desechos o emisiones

Name: Earthbean PH
Description:
Earthbean PH is a passion project by Kaelle Calzado, a forestry graduate.

Earthbean is her green space where she documents her journey into sustainable homestead gardening, aiming for self-sufficiency in table food needs while exploring entrepreneurial opportunities.

Earthbean invites everyone to cultivate not just our gardens but a deeper connection to the earth. Whether you’re a seasoned gardener or just starting out, every small step counts toward a more sustainable future.

Join us on this journey with Earthbean, and let’s inspire each other to grow, learn, and thrive in harmony with nature.

Together, we can make our world a greener, more bountiful place!

Name: Facultad de Ciencias Forestales
Description: Facultad de Ciencias Forestales de la Universidad Autónoma de Nuevo León
