Name: GIMUNALU SGPS
Description:
Bem-vindo à página oficial da GIMUNALU no LinkedIn! Desde 2004, somos líderes no setor agroindustrial em Angola. Nossa empresa angolana tem como missão impulsionar o desenvolvimento sustentável através da agricultura responsável e da produção industrial.

Na GIMUNALU, combinamos experiência local com padrões internacionais de excelência para oferecer uma ampla gama de produtos agrícolas e serviços de qualidade. Nossa equipe dedicada e nossas instalações de ponta nos permitem atender às demandas do mercado com eficiência e inovação.

Estamos comprometidos em promover o crescimento económico e social em Angola, contribuindo para a segurança alimentar, a geração de empregos e o desenvolvimento das comunidades onde operamos.

Ao seguir nossa página no LinkedIn, você terá acesso a atualizações sobre nossos projetos, iniciativas de sustentabilidade, oportunidades de carreira e muito mais. Junte-se a nós enquanto continuamos nossa jornada para moldar um futuro agrícola vibrante e próspero para Angola e além.

Conecte-se connosco e faça parte da nossa comunidade dedicada à excelência agroindustrial.

Name: Landen Agriculture
Description: Welcome to Landen Agriculture, a pioneering company dedicated to combating climate change and promoting sustainable agriculture practices. At Landen, we firmly believe that the future of our planet lies in the hands of responsible agriculture. Our team of passionate experts combines cutting-edge technology and innovative solutions to address the pressing challenges of climate change, ensuring a resilient and sustainable future for generations to come. From sustainable farming methods to carbon sequestration initiatives, we are committed to driving positive change across the agricultural sector. Join us in our mission to create a greener, more sustainable world through Landen Agriculture.

Name: Folia Cakra
Description:
At Folia Cakra, we bridge tradition and science to deliver nature’s purest solutions—starting with the world’s first No-Boil Probiotic-Fermented Catappa Leaf Extract.

Our Story
Born from a passion for sustainability and cutting-edge biotechnology, we pioneered a breakthrough fermentation method that transforms Catappa leaves into a more potent, eco-friendly extract—without boiling. By harnessing probiotics, we unlock bioactive compounds that outperform traditional methods, offering:
 Enhanced efficacy – Stronger antifungal, antibacterial, and stress-reducing properties.
 Zero heat degradation – Preserves 100% of the leaf’s natural benefits.
 Eco-conscious processing – Reduces energy waste and carbon footprint.

Why It Matters
For aquarists, our innovation means:
Simplified care: Ready-to-use tannins for healthier aquatic ecosystems.
Superior results: Ideal for shrimp, bettas, and blackwater habitats.
Trusted science: Backed by sustainable practices and rigorous quality standards.

We’re committed to redefining natural solutions—where sustainability meets potency, and tradition meets innovation.
 
Join us in revolutionizing aquarium wellness—naturally.

Name: Chemical Warehouse Pesticides
Description: We strive to find chemicals for a variety of industries and for home and farm applications that stand above all others.   Have you ever walked into a store and been confused by the numerous products that all claim to do the same thing?  Well, we have taken the guessing and confusion out of shopping for chemicals.  You can be assured that if we sell it, it works!  The owners of Chemical Outfitters have been in the chemical industry for many many years.  We have the right products for the job at the best prices.   We stock a limited number of products for each application to make your selection process easier.  After all, we’ve done the testing and research for you.

Name: La minute de l'agronome
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page "La Minute de l'Agronome" ! 
Découvrez le monde passionnant de l'agronomie, où science et durabilité se rencontrent. 
Explorez les secrets de la terre, les défis de l'agriculture moderne et les innovations qui façonnent notre avenir alimentaire. 
En tant qu'agronome, nous sommes des gardiens de la terre, des scientifiques dévoués à la gestion durable des ressources naturelles. 
Joignez-vous à nous pour explorer les avancées scientifiques, les bonnes pratiques agricoles et les enjeux actuels tels que l'agriculture biologique et l'agroécologie. 
Partagez vos idées, vos questions et vos expériences avec notre communauté dédiée à façonner un avenir agricole durable et prospère. 
Rejoignez-nous et découvrez les merveilles et les défis du monde agricole !

Name: Bangalore Agrico
Description:
Since our establishment in 2005 in Bangalore, Bangalore Agrico has been dedicated to advancing agriculture through innovation and sustainable practices. Originally serving the seed and irrigation needs of farmers around Bangalore, we have grown to support agricultural endeavors throughout India with a broad range of high-quality supplies and services.

Our Expertise:

High-Density Farming: Specializing in maximizing yields using minimal space.
Hydroponics and Aquaponics: Pioneering in soil-less farming techniques for cleaner, more sustainable cultivation.
Terrace and Container Gardening: Tailored gardening solutions for urban spaces.
Productive Landscaping: Creating functional, beautiful landscapes that thrive.
Butterfly Garden Projects: Designing vibrant ecosystems for butterflies, enriching biodiversity.
Our Farm:

Mature Fruit Plants: Our farm specializes in producing and selling mature fruit plants, ready to transplant. This initiative supports local and regional farmers with ready-to-harvest solutions, enhancing immediate productivity and yield.
Our Services:

Garden Maintenance: Expert care and maintenance to ensure the health and productivity of gardens.
Vegetable and Fruit Gardens: Custom setups for fresh, directly harvested produce.
Farming Projects: Comprehensive management from inception to harvest.
Our Evolution:

Bangalore Agrico was established as an independent entity focused on aiding local farmers with essential agricultural supplies, including seeds and irrigation solutions.
In 2016, Towncraft Agrico Pvt Ltd was founded, and Bangalore Agrico became a prominent brand under its umbrella. The creation of Towncraft Agrico marked a new phase of innovation and expansion, driven by the vision of our founder, Najeem Illyas.
Our Promise:
Dedicated to enhancing agricultural productivity and sustainability, Bangalore Agrico commits to continuous innovation and exceptional customer service, fostering long-term relationships based on trust and quality.

Join Us

Name: SIAFL - Sociedade Investimentos Agro-Florestal, S.A.

O controle da vegetação espontânea através do seu corte e manutenção, bem como a recolha, triagem e encaminhamento dos resíduos para tratamento ou para a produção de biomassa agrícola ou compostagem permite a valorização energética dos recursos biológicos e territoriais.
A aquisição progressiva do conhecimento e experiência das nossas equipas, permite-nos selecionar os melhores equipamentos técnicos e aplicar as melhores técnicas, de acordo com as condições do terreno e do estado da vegetação, tendo sempre por objetivo a satisfação do Cliente e o respeito pela floresta.

Abate de todo o tipo árvores de em todo o país.
Limpeza de espaços florestais.

Execução e manutenção de jardins, bem como a instalação de sistema de rega automática.

Execução de aceiros florestais em incêndios com profissionais qualificados.

Name: Lâminas Power Max
Description:
Desde 1998 a Power Max atua e é reconhecida em todo território nacional produzindo lâminas para roçadeiras. Para atendê-lo em diversas soluções, como: carretéis polimatic, fios de nylon, limitadores de altura e uma grande variedade de peças para roçadeiras e motosserras, trabalhamos com fornecedores que também oferecem qualidade em seus produtos, fortalecendo nossa atuação nos segmentos: agrícola, agropecuário, conservação de áreas verdes e jardinagem.

Nosso compromisso é de sempre fortalecer a parceria com nossos clientes, colaboradores, fornecedores e representantes. Buscamos realizar um excelente atendimento, oferecendo ao mercado produtos de qualidade com competitividade e respeito.

Agradecemos a todos que tem contribuído para o sucesso e crescimento de nossa empresa. Somos o resultado da confiança e da credibilidade de cada um de vocês.

A família Power Max fica a sua disposição e aguarda seu contato!

Notre objectif ? Booster la confiance en soi pour renforcer l'envie d'agir, échanger sur nos problématiques et nos expériences, créer une bulle d'écoute et de bienveillance.

Vous vous reconnaissez dans ce constat ? Rejoignez-nous !

Name: Jagcroft
Description:
Welcome to Jagcroft, a company that offers a wide range of  farm  fresh produce to local businesses and customers. Our objectives are to be a direct and indirect distributor of sustainable farming in a desirable environment, solving food insecurity for the local community and the world at Large. As a company, we have developed products and services, that will communicate the true value of our produce without compromise.

Our target market are local consumers and businesses that seek to have fresh grown produces year round, with the need for importing, without pesticides and nutritious for your health.

We are  your number one source for all  Agricultural needs  and edible Oils,  Soap and high quality, non GMO Peanut butter. We're dedicated to giving you the very best of our produce, with a focus on  dependability, customer service and uniqueness. Founded in 2022 under the  name Ebenezer Morning Joy, Jagcroft  has come a long way from its humble beginnings in Lusaka Zambia . When Ashley and John first started out, their passion was for people to eat and live healthy lives.

We hope you enjoy our products as much as we enjoy offering them to you. If you have any questions or comments, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Visit www.jagcroft.com to learn more!

Name: Pro Campo GEA

Para nós, pecuária leiteira é sobre pessoas, tecnologia e futuro.

Name: Polat Traktör ve Tarım Makineleri Ürünleri San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti
Description:
1985 ve 2000 yılları arasından Massey Ferguson ve Uzel traktör satışına yönelik olarak hizmete başlamış ve Polat Traktör ve Tarım Makinaları Ürünleri San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. olarak 2009 yılında Massey Ferguson ŞANLIURFA bayiliğini almıştır. 2009 yılından itibaren Agco-Massey Ferguson Bayiliği ile tarımsal kalkınmaya desteğini 38 yıldır sürdürmektedir.

     Tarım üretiminde çiftçilerimizin verimli sonuçlar elde etmesi amacıyla Massey Ferguson mühendisliğini ve uzmanlığını kullanarak gerekli desteği sunmayı hedefliyoruz. Traktör, Biçerdöverler, Malzeme İşleme, Balya Makineleri ve Yem Hasat Makineleri satışı ve sonrası destek ve teknik bakım onarım konularında çiftçilerimizin ihtiyaç duyduğu her türlü desteği uzman kadromuzla sunmaya devam edeceğiz. Yüksek kalite ve teknolojik donanıma sahip ürünleri doğru zamanda paydaş memnuniyetinde sürdürülebilirliği sağlamak, tarım sektöründe etkin ve düzenleyici rol almak.

       POLAT TRAKTÖR çalışanları kalite yönetim sistemine tam kadro olarak inanır ve gereklerini yerine getiririz. Biliriz ki; hizmet verdiğimiz pazarlardaki üstünlüğümüzü korumak ve yeni yatırımlar yapacağımız pazarlardaki lider pozisyonumuzu tesis etmek için kalite yönetim sistemi gereklerine uymak bir ön şarttır. Bu kapsamda, müşterilerimizin beklentileri ve pazar şartları doğrultusunda gerektiği gibi değişebilen, tutarlı çözümlere hızlıca ulaşabilen, kendini geliştirmek için önüne zor hedefler koyabilen büyük kaliteli sonuçlar ortaya çıkaracağını biliriz. Polat Traktör Teknik Servis yöneticileri; liderlik ve toplam kalite yönetimi anlayışları sayesinde, çalışanları teşvik ederek, sürekli gelişimin devam etmesi ve önemli hedeflerin tutturulması konularındaki sorumluluklarını yerine getirirler. 

       Polat Traktör ve Tarım Makinaları Ürünleri San. Ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. kuruluşundan günümüze kadar traktör sektöründeki uzmanlığını müşterilerine yansıtarak sorunsuz hizmet sunmayı hedeflemiştir.

Name: Silvexplor, Silvicultura Unip. Lda
Description: A empresa Silvexplor- silvicultura unipessoal, Lda., sedeada em Mortágua, foi criada em 2008 com o intuito de responder à crescente procura do mercado nacional e dar o seu contributo para uma floresta ordenada e sustentável. A empresa presta essencialmente serviços de silvicultura preventiva no âmbito da defesa da floresta contra incêndios nomeadamente junto de infraestruturas elétricas e de rede viária. Num passado próximo a empresa alargou o seu leque de serviços passando assim a realizar trabalhos de podas em altura com recurso à escalada.  A empresa conta com 60 colaboradores diretos e aposta na formação dos mesmos nomeadamente no manuseamento de equipamentos florestais e técnicas florestais.

Name: Rossen Seeds NL
Description:
Hallo, wij zijn Rossen Seeds!

Name: Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias Principado de Asturias
Description:
Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias Principado de Asturias, Unión de Cooperativas es la organización empresarial que defiende y representa los intereses de las cooperativas y SAT agroalimentarias del Principado de Asturias en foros de ámbito regional, nacional y europeo. El pertenecer a Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias Principado de Asturias da la oportunidad de formar parte de Cooperativas Agro-alimentarias de España, entidad que representa a casi 3.000 empresas cooperativas y SAT y además de un millón de socios en prácticamente todos los subsectores agroalimentarios. También estamos representados en el COGECA, que es el órgano de representación de las cooperativas a nivel europeo y en el que están representadas más de 22.000 cooperativas, con más de 7 millones de socios y socias y emplean a más de 600.000 personas.

Con ese respaldo y esa fuerza, y mediante la representación que ostentamos dentro los diferentes organismos e instituciones del Principado de Asturias (Comité de Seguimiento del PDR, Consejo Asturiano de la Economía Social, Grupos de Desarrollo Local, Grupos de Trabajo sectoriales, SERIDA, Consejo Forestal, Consejo Agroalimentario Principado de Asturias, etc.) defendemos un modelo cooperativo de futuro, como fórmula empresarial que permite la defensa de los intereses de los agricultores/as y ganadero/as socios de nuestras cooperativas y SAT.

Name: LURSAIL NEKAZARITZA ZERBITZUAK KOOP. S.
Description:
Nace LURSAIL NEKAZARITZA, centro de gestión de Euskadi dedicado a ofrecer servicios profesionales a explotaciones agroganaderas, con presencia en todo el territorio.

Con tres sedes estratégicas, estamos cerca del sector para acompañar a las explotaciones en cada paso:
 Araba
 Bizkaia
 Gipuzkoa

Nuestra filosofía combina experiencia, cercanía y compromiso con el medio rural, adaptándonos a las necesidades actuales del sector y aportando soluciones que potencian la eficiencia y la innovación en la gestión agroganadera.

Este perfil será un espacio para compartir actualidad, proyectos y colaboraciones, mostrando cómo nuestra cooperativa fortalece la red de asesoramiento y cooperación en Euskadi.

Si buscas colaboración, sinergias o nuevas oportunidades de proyecto, en LURSAIL NEKAZARITZA encontrarás un socio cercano, profesional y preparado para afrontar los retos del sector.

Name: Oerwroeters
Description:
Oerwroeters is opgericht door Coen Landheer, een ervaren dierverzorger en expert in diergedrag, en ontstaan uit een passie voor dierwelzijn en de natuur. Bij Oerwroeters staat de natuurlijke zorg voor onze varkens centraal, waarbij ze het hele jaar door buiten leven. De varkens zijn niet alleen onze dieren, maar ook onze medewerkers in het groen. Ze kunnen ingehuurd worden voor diverse vormen van natuurlijk landschapsbeheer. Denk aan het omploegen van een akker, voorbereiden van de grond voor een moestuin en het verwijderen van onkruid en ongewenste beplanting zoals japanse duizendknoop of berenklauw.

Ons streven naar een dierwaardig leven voor onze varkens resulteert in puur en kwalitatief hoogwaardig varkensvlees. Bovendien willen we onze passie en kennis delen door middel van educatieve activiteiten, waarbij jong en oud meer kan leren over deze fantastische dieren, natuurbeheer met varkens en de productie van natuurvlees.

Door natuurlijke varkenshouderij, duurzaam landschapsbeheer, de productie van kwaliteitsvlees en educatie samen te brengen, willen wij een bijdrage leveren aan een duurzamere toekomst, met de hulp van onze  varkens.

Name: Greenyields
Description:
we are an agriculture company that aspires to cultivate a well diversified mix of vegetable, grains and fruits using minimal inputs, yet deriving maximum ROI. 
We aim to achieve a triple-bottom line by addressing the profitability, sustainability and social elements of farming.

Berlokasi strategis di jantung salah satu lumbung pertanian Indonesia, perusahaan kami menempatkan diri sebagai mitra terpercaya bagi para petani, pekebun, pengembang properti, hingga pemerintah dalam upaya reboisasi dan penghijauan. Kami tidak hanya sekadar menjual produk; kami menawarkan solusi holistik yang dimulai dari bibit terbaik, didukung oleh pengetahuan dan pengalaman, demi memastikan keberhasilan setiap proyek penanaman.

Didirikan oleh para ahli dan praktisi di bidang pertanian, CV Lintas Batas Agro lahir dari pemahaman mendalam akan kebutuhan pasar domestik akan bibit yang tidak hanya tumbuh, tetapi juga produktif dan memiliki daya tahan tinggi terhadap berbagai kondisi lingkungan. Kami menyadari bahwa pondasi keberhasilan sebuah kebun atau hutan terletak pada kualitas bibitnya. Oleh karena itu, seluruh operasional kami berpusat pada satu tujuan utama: menghasilkan bibit unggul yang menjadi jembatan menuju masa depan hijau dan berkelanjutan.

BOA a pour mission de compenser et de contrôler l'impact de notre société sur la nature. Nous offrons des solutions innovantes pour la reforestation, la pollinisation, et la conservation de la biodiversité dans la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes et au-delà. 

Que ce soit par la plantation d'arbres comme le paulownia, l'installation de ruches en entreprise, ou la protection des espèces endémiques, nous travaillons sans relâche pour un avenir durable.

Pourquoi Nous Choisir ?

Chez BOA, nous croyons que chaque entreprise peut jouer un rôle crucial dans la protection de notre planète. En collaborant avec nous, vous ne contribuez pas seulement à la durabilité environnementale, mais vous renforcez également l'image de votre entreprise en tant qu'acteur responsable et engagé.

Rejoignez-nous !

Nous invitons toutes les entreprises, les collectivités et les particuliers à nous rejoindre dans notre mission. Ensemble, nous pouvons créer un impact positif durable et inspirer d'autres à suivre notre exemple.

Name: Central Texas Young Farmers Coalition
Description:
Central Texas Young Farmers Coalition (CTYFC) has a mission to support young and beginning farmers in Central Texas through education, connection and advocacy. We are a grass-roots, volunteer-led coalition organized by active and former young farmers who volunteer their time to educate, connect, and advocate on behalf of young, beginning, and aspiring farmers in Central Texas. We envision a collaborative and diverse farming community through which young and beginning farmers make a living as a key component in agricultural production and ecological stewardship.

The biggest pillar of our work is to provide resources and advocate for the next generation of growers, producers, and land stewards in this state.


CTYFC understands the need for more workers entering the farming profession. Increasing the number of young farmers in Texas will be instrumental in increasing food security and awareness, curbing carbon emissions, and building a stronger relationship between local food and local economies. By banding together and supporting one another, we can help create a positive environment for young farmers to network, exchange ideas, and become better farmers.

“Together we can build the farm future we deserve.”

CTYFC is part of the National Young Farmers Coalition (NYFC), connecting us to a national policy voice. The National Young Farmers Coalition is a national grassroots advocacy organization working to shift power and change policy to equitably resource our new generation of working farmers. We envision a just future where farming is free of racial violence, accessible communities, oriented towards environmental well being, and concerned with health over profit.

Membership

You can become a member of the National Young Farmers Coalition any time, for as little $1/month.

Name: IJsselmarke
Description:
Een landschap met hagen en bosjes tussen de akkers, bloemen en kruiden in velden en bermen, waar vogels kwetteren en insecten zoemen, de sloten en beken schoon en vol leven zijn. Boeren die waardering en beloning krijgen voor hun werk. 

Met IJsselmarke willen we dit samen waarmaken. Als jij je voedsel zoveel mogelijk bij de lokale boer koopt en daarvoor een eerlijke prijs betaalt, kan de natuur en het landshap weer als basis van het bedrijf zijn. 

Zo maken we samen met lokale boeren voedsel uit het bijzondere landschap tussen Veluwe en IJssel voor jou beschikbaar. Jij kunt zo profiteren van alle voordelen van vers, lokaal voedsel. De boeren uit de IJsselmarke regio worden weer onze boeren. Zo kunnen we allemaal genieten van een gezond landschap vol leven.

Name: Turkey Berry Nepal
Description:
Message from Co-Founder & CEO - Ms.Binaya Pokhrel :
The Undiscovered Power of Turkey Berry! Turkey Berry is not just a Plant but it is Nutritional Powerhouse! 
 From a Vision to a Movement – My Journey with Turkey Berry Nepal 
Every big idea starts with a question.
For me, it was simple: “How can we introduce something truly impactful for health, farmers, and Nepal’s future?”
That question led me to Turkey Berry a plant often overlooked, yet carrying immense nutritional, medicinal, and economic value.
As the Co- Founder & CEO of Turkey Berry Nepal, I feel proud to pioneer this journey in Nepal:
 Establishing our first pilot project in Sauraha, Chitwan
 Exploring Turkey Berry’s role as a superfood for health and wellness
 Creating opportunities for farmers, entrepreneurs, and researchers
 Building a vision where Nepal becomes a global leader in Turkey Berry innovation
Turkey Berry is more than a fruit. It’s a chance to empower rural communities, promote nutrition security, and inspire the next generation.

Let us put family farming at the center to lead this transformation for this decade and beyond. Family farmers play a critical role in making agri-food systems more inclusive, sustainable, resilient, and effective. According to the FAO (2014), family farming employs 30% of the global workforce and accounts for over 80% of global food production. They also serve as custodians of biodiversity, landscapes, and cultural heritage. According to Lowder, Sánchez, and Bertini (2019), there are more than 600 million family farms in the globe today, with more than 98 percent of them occupying less than 20 hectares (HLPE, 2013).
Family farmers are among those most impacted by poverty and vulnerability, despite playing a crucial role in reforming agri-food systems to feed the globe sustainably (FAO, 2020). Family farmers, particularly small-scale food producers, women, youth, Indigenous Peoples, and ethnic minorities, are among those who face challenges.

Name: K&C Silviculture Ltd.
Description:
K&C Silviculture Ltd. is located in the heart of wine country in Oliver, BC.  We first began commercial forest seedling production in 1981 under the name of World Silviculture Ltd., when the B.C. Government established a policy to allow private nurseries to grow seedlings for the BC Ministry of Forests.

First year production was 5 million seedlings.  Over the last 40 years, we have increased our production volume to be in excess of 42 million trees serving clients in Western Canada and Pacific Northwest of the United States.

We have focused our attention on building and improving relationships with all of our stakeholders – clients, staff, suppliers, and our owners – while providing high quality products and services.

Name: Carney Wagyu Cattle Ranch
Description:
Carney Wagyu Cattle Ranch is a 2nd-generation family farm in Trumbull County, Ohio. After decades raising Angus cattle, we transitioned to breeding only 100% full-blood Wagyu – prized for its rich flavor and melt-in-your mouth texture.

Our Wagyu cows are reared in a humane and stress-free environment, where they can graze and feed whenever they want. We take our time, allowing them to mature twice as long as American cattle breeds to develop the extraordinary marbling that’s a telltale sign of real, full- blood Wagyu that used to be available only in Japan.

Our breeding and feeding programs are based on traditional methods, backed by scientific testing, to assure our Wagyu steaks and chops aren’t just an American interpretation of the original, but the authentic artisanal Wagyu beef product that has captured the world’s culinary imagination.

Name: De Goed Gevulde Boerderij
Description:
Natuurinclusieve kringloop boerderij de Goed Gevulde, waar Heimen en Inge gewassen en vee houden. Welkom op de mooiste plek van de wereld!

Ooit werd het varken in tijden van overvloed ‘gevuld’, als spaarpot. Wanneer de voorraden minder werden, richting de winter, werd er geslacht. Op het platteland én in de stad. Elke buurt had een varken dat met overgebleven producten werd gevoerd. Dat is wat de Goed Gevulde nu ook doet: voedselverspilling tegen gaan en de lokale voedselkringloop sluiten, daarmee spekken we de lokale economie. Restproducten als fruit, groente, brood en zuivel van lokale supermarkten, bakkerijen en kaasmakerijen dat niet meer geschikt is voor onze consumptie wordt nu niet zomaar weggegooid. Met deze restproducten worden onze varkens Goed Gevulde spaarvarkens. Ze krijgen maximale ruimte in onze houderijen, waar ze uitgebreid buiten kunnen wroeten. Kortom, een Goed Gevuld verhaal dus!

Name: Uwe Schmidt mmb - Milchvieh Management Beratung
Description:
Agriculture in balance

The elements of animal, human, environment, soil and plant are interrelated as a system and form a more or less stable balance. As soon as we turn one side, everything else inevitably turns with it. This is how we understand agriculture, which is why we work with you to find holistic solutions for agriculture in balance.

Consulting services and products:

We work according to the precautionary principle: our advice is based on a holistic approach and aims to prevent problems before they arise. Our largely natural products promote the vitality of animals, plants and soil and are therefore the basis for healthy food.

Animal nutrition

The mmb feeding concept is based on the evolutionary understanding of the ruminant and the current needs of the high-performance cow.

Our values

VITALITY - We promote health in people, animals, plants and soil life, in social interaction on the farm and in ourselves.

HONESTY - We stand up for our values and convictions and communicate honestly and openly with each other and with our customers.

HOLISTICITY - We take a holistic, systemic view.

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION AND QUALITY - We meet the needs of today's milk production with high-quality and partly natural products. At the same time, we can react flexibly to our customers' wishes and thus contribute to maximum customer satisfaction.

RESPECT FOR ALL LIFE - We respect and honor all life.

Description:
A GRT Soluções Agrícolas é uma empresa especializada em fertilidade e nutrição de plantas. Estamos há mais de 4 anos trabalhando junto ao produtor rural nos Campos Gerais, nossa assistência técnica tem como objetivo aumentar a rentabilidade das áreas de plantio.

Somos parceiros oficiais da Laborsolo, que é referencia nacional em qualidade de análises de solo e folhas. Através da metodologia A2P (Agricultura de Alta Performance), solução inédita que utiliza uma base de dados completa, utilizamos equipamentos e estatística bem feita do terreno, garantindo uma representatividade e qualidade nas recomendações.

Name: SoilHealing
Description:
SoilHealing distributes a proprietary product called Ensoil Algae. It is the only living green algae, bio-stimulant on the market!! This all-organic product is a live colony of Chlorella vulgaris that is applied to the soil and can also be used in foliar feeding. Every plant, grass or tree group responds positively with Ensoil, promoting a balanced and fertile environment that supports optimal development. Regenerative growth processes using this live algae has shown substantially improved soil function, nutrient uptake, and stress adaptation. The reduced need for chemical inputs like NPK can be up to 50% on average! For as low as $9/acre, growers are experiencing reduced input costs, greater yields and higher ROI.

Good for the Soil, Good for the Soul

Name: Fruittuin van West

Name: PT Harvest Season Indonesia
Description:
Supplying Superior Palm Kernel Expeller to Distributors and Breeders while Exceeding Sucofindo’s Rigorous Quality Standards and Precise Analysis.

Palm Kernel Expeller is a valuable side product agriculture derived from the palm kernel processing industry. Abundant in protein, fat, crude fiber, and essential minerals, it stands as a testament to nature’s ingenuity.

With its moisture content typically below 10% and ash content capped at 6%, Palm Oil Cake boasts an impressive nutritional profile. Expect a minimum of 16% crude protein, a maximum of 12% crude fat, and a maximum of 14% crude fiber. Offering a minimum of 4 kcal of Gross Energy (GE) per unit, it becomes a vital source of cellulose, protein, fat, arabinoxylan, glucuronoxylan, and various minerals.

Versatile and adaptable, Palm Kernel Expeller serves as a key feed ingredient, providing a sustainable source of protein and energy for livestock of plant origin. Its applications extend to the nourishment of dairy cows, beef cattle, goats, sheep, poultry, and even aquatic life, such as fish.

Harnessing the power of Palm Kernel Expeller unlocks a myriad of possibilities, bridging the gap between sustainable agriculture and thriving livestock industries. Experience the transformative potential of this natural marvel, nurturing livestock while promoting environmental stewardship.

Heritage Reforestation Inc. is a leading tree planting company in Canada, providing services to Commercial Forest Managers, Private Land Owners, Crown Corporations, Saw Mills, Municipalities, Government Agencies, Commercial Landscaping, Mining Companies, Oil & Gas Companies, Forest License Holders and Conservation Authorities. We are passionate about tree planting and committed to restoring and protecting forests. We employ over 200 tree planters every season and have planted over 10 million trees since our inception.

We are a team of experienced and dedicated professionals who are committed to providing our clients with the highest quality tree planting services. We use state-of-the-art equipment and techniques to ensure that our trees are planted correctly and that they have the best chance of survival.

We are also committed to sustainability and environmental stewardship. We plant a variety of tree species that are native to the region and that are adapted to the local climate. We also use organic fertilizers and pesticides to minimize our environmental impact.

If you are looking for a company that is passionate about tree planting and committed to sustainability, then Heritage Reforestation Inc. is the company for you. Whether you are a Forest Manager, Private Land Owner, Municipality or Government Agency, Mine Operator, Oil and Gas Company, Saw Mill, Forest License Holder or Conservation Authority, no job is too big or small for us. We will take a look at your project and give you a price, free of charge. Contact us today to learn more about our services.

Name: Mel Melosa
Description:
Somos una familia perteneciente a la aldea de Trabado, un pequeño paraíso situado en pleno corazón de la Reserva de la Biosfera de Os Ancares lucenses, en la Galicia más oriental.

Con la idea de restaurar un pequeño cortín del que disponía la familia, ya que nuestros antepasados disponían de “trobos” para producir miel de autoconsumo y los protegían del oso mediante esta estructura de piedra, y de continuar con la tradición apícola, decidimos arrancar el proyecto de Mel Melosa en 2018 con 6 colmenas.
Aunque no ha sido fácil compartir el terreno, con grandes competidores como el oso, poco a poco hemos ido creciendo hasta disponer actualmente de 160 colmenas.

Nuestro propósito no es producir grandes cantidades de miel y dedicarnos laboralmente a la apicultura, si no que nos dedicamos a ella por verdadera pasión por las abejas y la naturaleza, produciendo pequeñas cantidades de miel, pero de una excelente calidad, garantizando la máxima profesionalidad en todos los procesos y el respeto con el medioambiente, y hacer llegar el producto directamente desde la colmena al consumidor final, sin intermediarios que puedan interferir en la calidad o en el precio del producto.

Nature Works evolved from James’ dual  passions for delivering specialized natural resources management services and training the next generation of skilled  practitioners needed to meet the growing demand for specialized, nature-based, management services.

Our mission is twofold:  deliver cutting edge natural resource management and restoration services; and cultivating the careers of the workforce required to do so through recruitment, training, investment, and empowerment.  

We want to raise awareness that investing in natural resource restoration and management not only improves the health of nature and the vital ecosystems that sustain us  — but also creates well paying jobs and supports local communities.

Mais do que soluções em saúde animal, oferecemos parceria de confiança. Estamos ao lado do criador em cada etapa, com conhecimento técnico, produtos de qualidade e acompanhamento que fazem a diferença no dia a dia da fazenda.

Nosso propósito é claro: nutrir o futuro do rebanho brasileiro, garantindo resultados que se traduzem em produtividade, bem-estar animal e crescimento sustentável.

Description:
We're Here To Make Chestnut Farming Visible, Viable, and Collaborative, Nationwide!

We Started With a Single Farm!  Now we are ready to support others!

United Chestnuts began at EBB Farms, where Melanie Jones was helping turn a few chestnut trees into something more: a working model of what chestnut farming could be. Along the way, she teamed up with digital strategist Kimberly Douglass to share what they were learning through podcasts, workshops, and direct support for fellow growers.

From the beginning, this work has been about more than just one farm—or one nut. United Chestnuts is laying the foundation for a first-of-its-kind model of collaborative growth in agriculture, where education, empowerment, and profitability go hand-in-hand.

Read more at https://unitedchestnuts.com/our-story/

Name: lumiere farmstead
Description:
At Lumiere Farmstead, we’re building more than sustainable farms — we’re pioneering a new global blueprint for regenerative agriculture, luxury hospitality, and scalable eco-systems.

Our vision merges AI-driven farming, zero-waste systems, high-yield aquaponics, and Michelin-quality dining into self-sufficient farmsteads designed to restore ecosystems, empower communities, and redefine sustainable profitability worldwide.

Driven by innovation and stewardship, Lumiere Farmstead is engineered to scale across continents, creating a global network of profitable, carbon-negative farmsteads that nourish both people and planet.

Key Pillars:
	•	Sustainably Grown: Precision aquaponics, orchards, and closed-loop systems.
	•	Luxury Crafted: Michelin-standard farm-to-table hospitality and premium export goods.
	•	Globally Scalable: Modular systems ready for replication across Africa, Asia, and beyond.
	•	Impact-Driven: Building community wealth, restoring ecosystems, and creating new economic frontiers.

By 2030, Lumiere aims to lead the rise of sustainable agri-luxury as a global economic and ecological force — merging ethical farming, luxury experiences, and strategic investment into a new era of global development.

Partner with us. Build the future.

Au cœur du Morbihan, à Ploërdut, non loin de la forêt de Brocéliande, un projet plus qu’ambitieux vient de voir le jour : la création du fonds de dotation Les Terres du Launay.

Son objectif : recréer, sur l’ensemble du domaine du Château du Launay, d’une surface de 400 hectares, un écosystème aussi bien forestier qu’agricole.

Cet immense écosystème à venir, qui repose sur un modèle circulaire, doit à la fois régénérer la terre et rétablir la présence de la faune et de la flore, tout en nourrissant les hommes et en créant de l’emploi.

Name: Hvidkilde Gods
Description:
Hvidkilde Gods ejes i dag af Carl Johan greve Ahlefeldt-Laurvig-Lehn. Han har ejet det siden 2018, hvor han overtog det fra sin far Christian greve Ahlefeldt-Laurvig-Lehn. Godset som virksomhed består af flere driftsgrene og en masse andre aktiviteter, som kommer befolkningen på Sydfyn og gæster og turister omkring Hvidkilde til gode.

Hvidkilde Gods’ historie strækker sig tilbage til 1300-tallet og er i dag en moderne virksomhed med godt 30 ansatte, der driver ca. 1.750 hektar skovbrug, 1.250 hektar landbrug og mere end 70 udlejningsejendomme omkring godset, samt nogle erhvervslejemål. Hertil kommer jagtudlejning, grusgrav, solceller, mountainbike track og events i godsets riddersal.

Godset spiller en væsentlig rolle i lokalsamfundet og har desuden en stor berøringsflade til en lang række andre interessenter, heriblandt politikere og organisationer.

Hvidkilde er på mange måder mere end en arbejdsplads. De historiske bygninger, den smukke beliggenhed og de stolte traditioner udgør en både forpligtende og fascinerende ramme om en spændende hverdag, hvor det falder naturligt som medarbejder at engagere sig og tage ansvar.

We believe that agroforestry has the potential to restore biodiversity, soil health, human health, wildlife, and the water cycle while also sequestering carbon.  Our crops include serviceberry, aronia berry, elderberry, currants, tart cherries, hazelnuts and chestnuts.  Berry and nut products are in development.

Name: Spice Creek
Description:
Spice Creek Farm is a Black-led agricultural enterprise in Brandywine, Maryland, dedicated to regenerative farming, food sovereignty, and land stewardship. Rooted in the Black Agrarian Corridor, we are reclaiming land, restoring traditional agricultural practices, and building a community-driven food system that prioritizes sustainability and equity.

Our farm integrates diverse soil health practices, including cover cropping, conservation tillage, and on-farm composting, to enhance soil fertility and reduce reliance on external inputs. We specialize in nutrient-dense vegetable production and pasture-raised poultry while implementing conservation strategies to restore ecosystem balance.

Beyond food production, Spice Creek serves as a hub for agricultural education and workforce development. Through hands-on training, workshops, and partnerships with regional farming networks, we equip the next generation of land stewards with the skills and knowledge to build sustainable farm businesses.

Our work extends beyond our fields. We actively collaborate with neighboring farms, agricultural organizations, and policymakers to promote land access, food justice, and environmental resilience. By fostering strong local food systems, we are strengthening the economic and ecological future of Southern Maryland.

At Spice Creek, we believe that farming is an act of reclamation, resistance, and resilience. By investing in soil health and sustainable land management, we are creating a thriving model of regenerative agriculture—one that nourishes both people and the planet for generations to come.

Name: Hunter Family Farm

Hunter Family Farm Enterprise cultivates high-quality produce through sustainable farming practices, strengthening local food systems and promoting health and environmental stewardship.
We are dedicated to fostering community and educational growth by connecting with local groups and institutions to deepen the understanding and practice of sustainable agriculture.
Through our boutique farm stay, we offer a unique, inclusive experience that celebrates “curated nothingness” — aiming to be at the forefront of agritourism and community enrichment.

Name: TumiVale Ltd.
Description:
At Tumivale, we are committed to producing premium-quality rabbit meat through sustainable, humane, and innovative farming practices in Ghana. Our mission is to provide healthy, high-protein meat to local consumers while developing strong export partnerships that meet the strictest international standards.

Located in a purpose-built, modern facility, we prioritize animal welfare, biosecurity, and environmental responsibility. Every stage of our process — from breeding and feeding to veterinary care and processing — is designed to ensure the highest quality meat and traceability for our customers.

Our Products and Services:

• Fresh, locally farmed rabbit meat – supplied to restaurants, hotels, supermarkets, and households.

• Processed and packaged cuts – prepared to meet both local and international market requirements.

• Export-ready supply – compliant with food safety, veterinary, and packaging standards for international trade.

• Breeding stock and farmer support – providing healthy, well-documented rabbits to new and existing farms.

By combining modern farming technology with deep respect for traditional agriculture, Tumivale Rabbit Farming is helping diversify protein sources in Ghana, create jobs in rural communities, and position rabbit meat as a healthy, sustainable choice for the future.

Our vision is to become West Africa’s most trusted and innovative rabbit meat supplier, known for quality, reliability, and ethical farming. Whether you are a local chef, a health-conscious consumer, or an international importer, Tumivale is your partner for premium rabbit products you can trust.

Gazelle Holding aims to create a complete chain of livestock and agricultural products by joining together 7 large companies in different links of the chain of production, supply, distribution, and marketing of livestock and agricultural products and has formed a complete chain in Iran's food industry.
The group's journey began with the establishment of Tabiat Makan Industrial Group(TMIG) and now in its third year of establishment with the new name of Gazelle development Holding, it plays a significant role across various links of the supply chain. These responsibilities include supplying and distributing raw materials for livestock, poultry, dairy products, and food industries to the market as well as delivering the products.
Ghazal Holding in a short period expanded and developed its activities in various fields, including production, import, supply, and distribution of livestock and poultry feed, sanitary materials and detergents used in livestock farms, poultry and dairy products industries Ultra-modern poultry slaughterhouse, contract manufacturing of agricultural products and especially chicken meat production, has been able to take a big step in creating the chain of production to consumption and eliminating unnecessary intermediaries. Of course, this is just the beginning and this group has a long but full of beautiful prospects path ahead for the future of the country, which is the ultimate hope of all the producers and servants of the "Motherland".

Name: GP Paulownia s.r.o.
Description:
Introduction:
The price of timber has seen stable growth over the past 25 years and has become a scarce commodity worldwide. Investing in the production of timber is safe, stable, and profitable.
-	Forestry and timber production can provide a worthwhile alternative and complement to traditional agriculture within only a few years. It is not labor or energy intensive and can help to absorb large volumes of carbon from the atmosphere.

We recommend growing Paulownia trees for the production of timber.
-	Paulownia is one of the fastest growing trees in the world.
-	Paulownia provides timber of outstanding quality with many uses in construction, manufacturing and design.

GP Paulownia s.r.o. is the exclusive distributor in Czech Republic of Paulownia trees from WeGrow CropTec GmbH in Germany. WeGrow is the market leader in Europe with more than 12 years history and their own developed varieties of Paulownia trees with proven success in our climates.

We are looking for land-owners and farmers that own suitable land for Paulownia plantations.

Growing Paulownia is not only a sustainable business that contributes to a better environment; it is a very profitable way of using land.

We are offering different programs to fit land-owners and farmers to plant and grow Paulownia plantations.

Starting from ready to plant trees, the programs offer services up to fully managed plantations with guaranteed buy-out contracts for the produced Paulownia wood. 
The starters program has a duration of 6 to 10 years depending on factors (such as soil type, position of the plantation site, maintenance and other factors that can influence the speed of growth). After harvesting Paulownia trees, they will grow again from the trunk to be harvested again after 6 to 10 years.

The income from one harvest should not be less than 50.000 Euros per hectare after harvesting costs form a well managed plantation. 

For more information, please contact us.

Name: Les abeilles de Jean
Description:
Nous prenons soin d'une trentaine de colonies d'abeille, hébergées en ruches Langstroth, idéalement situées sous les pins, dans des parcelles préservées la forêt des Landes, à plusieurs kilomètres de toute activité humaine !

Nos abeilles produisent principalement du miel d'acacia, de bourdaine, de ronce, de châtaignier et de bruyère Erica. Pour ne rien perdre, nous valorisons les autres produits de la ruche : savons à base de cire et de miel, bougies à la cire d'abeille, pains d'épices et bientôt une nouveauté 100% made in Landes pour les amoureux de glisse..!

Name: Prosperous Farms
Description:
Welcome to our vision. We are in the process of establishing our eco-friendly, open-pasture, free-range farm, a sanctuary where nature thrives, and farm-to-table excellence is a way of life.

Our farm embraces a holistic approach to agriculture, balancing the well-being of the land and its inhabitants. Our animals roam freely in open pastures, nurtured by our commitment to their happiness and health. Stress-free lives lead to superior products, and this ethos extends to every facet of their care.

Sustainability is the core of our farming philosophy. We employ organic practices that enrich the soil and yield premium, flavorful harvests. From seed to plate, we oversee every stage, ensuring only the finest reaches your table.

Our farm-to-table offerings are a testament to our dedication to quality and transparency. You can trust the source of every ingredient, delivering extraordinary flavor and nutrition. Dining with us is an immersion in the essence of the land.

But we're more than a culinary destination; we offer an eco-conscious travel experience. Our farm accommodations let you embrace rural life, waking to nature's sounds, exploring scenic beauty, and indulging in farm-fresh breakfasts.

We extend an invitation to join our farm family. Take guided tours, get your hands dirty in the fields, and discover our sustainable farming practices.
Every day is a celebration of the land, animals, and culinary traditions. Whether for a meal, stay, or educational adventure, you'll leave with a profound appreciation for sustainable farming's beauty and abundance.

Join us in this journey toward a greener, tastier future. We're more than a farm; we're a commitment to excellence, nature, and you. Come, savor the difference, and be part of our eco-friendly, farm-to-table community.

Watch us build this vision into reality one step at a time!

Name: Huckleberry Farms
Description:
Huckleberry Farms is a family-owned sustainable farm nestled in the heart of Indiana. We're dedicated to providing our community with ethically raised, farm-fresh poultry and eggs while embracing regenerative farming practices. 

 Egg Delivery: Enjoy weekly deliveries of our farm-fresh eggs, including chicken, duck, and even goose eggs, straight to your doorstep. We offer individual dozens and subscription options. 

 Chickens & Ducks: Discover our pasture-raised chickens and ducks, known for their superior quality and care. We offer both whole birds and specific cuts to suit your culinary needs. 

 Rabbits: Our pasture-raised rabbits are available for both meat and pet purposes. Experience the delicious flavor and ethical farming practices that set us apart. 

 Farm Club: Join our Farm Club for exclusive access to our regenerative farming journey. Get involved, learn, and savor the unique products we offer. 

 Bundles: Explore our carefully curated bundles that bring together a variety of our farm-fresh products. They make wonderful gifts for loved ones or a treat for yourself. 

 Cookbook: Delight in our "Huckleberry Homestead: Farm Fresh & Family Favorites" cookbook, brimming with wholesome recipes and farm insights. Free for our monthly members! 

We're passionate about offering eco-conscious, quality products while striving for a more sustainable future. Join us on our mission to support sustainable farming, nourish your body with premium products, and cultivate a greener, healthier world.

Name: Dzomo La Mupo
Description: Dzomo la Mupo work to preserve and revive cultural diversity and food sovereignty in South Africa. Based in the Limpopo province of the Vhembe district, the organisation strengthens local communities in ecological governance through awareness on the value of indigenous forests, by reviving indigenous seed, facilitating and encouraging intergenerational learning, and rebuilding confidence in the value of indigenous knowledge systems. The organization was founded in 2007 by Mphatheleni Makaulule, driven by her concern that cultural values are being eroded and indigenous forests are facing mass destruction, causing possibly irreversible disorder within Mupo. Dzomo la Mupo wants to restore this order. The protection of sacred sites plays a vital role in indigenous living, and hence it is core to the work of Dzomo la Mupo. The Dzomo la Mupo (DLM) vision is to protect nature in all its forms, especially indigenous forests, rivers, wetlands, and sacred natural sites, and to enhance the indigenous skills of traditional agriculture which support agro-ecological farming, and to preserve healthy nutritional food security.

Vakkundig in grote én kleine klussen
Delsasso Boomverzorging en Bosbeheer is een kleinschalig bedrijf dat werkt voor zowel particulieren, bedrijven als overheidsinstanties. Wij zijn voornamelijk werkzaam in het midden en zuiden van het land en werken nauw samen met collega’s in heel Nederland en zelfs in het buitenland. Daardoor is geen klus voor ons te groot. Daarentegen is ook geen klus te klein. We helpen u graag, of het nu gaat om een enkele boom of een heel bos.

Veilig en met zorg voor de natuur
Delsasso Boomverzorging en Bosbeheer is aangesloten bij Branchevereniging VHG, lid van de Kring Praktiserende Boomverzorgers (KPB) en ETW- en VCA-gecertificeerd. Onze boomverzorgers zijn flexibel en deskundig en werken volgens strenge veiligheidsnormen. Waar het kan met duurzame materialen. Zo werken onze machines op biologisch afbreekbare benzine en oliën en wordt al ons snoeiafval gebruikt voor het opwekken van groene energie.

Once you arrive, we will provide everything you need – buckets, instructions, and friendly “pit crew” members who will teach you where and how to pick sweet cherries! Enjoy the drive to this slice of heaven on the Leelanau Peninsula, and you will want to come back again and again!

Each of our eight sweet cherry varieties and our Montmorency tarts are available at different times.

Cavaliers
First – second week in July

White Golds
First – second week in July

Summits
Second – Third week in July

Ebony Pearl
Second – Third week in July

Ulsters
Second – Third week in July

Attikas
Second – Third week in July

Reginas and Montmorency Tarts
Third – Fourth week in July

Sweethearts
Fourth – Fifth week in July, mid-late August

We also have gorgeous flowers.  What started as our daughter’s “wedding Flower Garden” in 2017 is now an opportunity for you and your family to come experience the amazing variety of an ever-changing array of flowers! Come pick at your leisure, breathe in the scents, and design your own bouquet. We provide the snippers, a packet of flower food, and instructions as needed (including approximate size of bouquet).

HH Cherries is built on what we value as owners, farmers and a family. From the earliest days, three things inspired us and sustained us through the years, and much like the trees themselves that were planted and matured over time, our values of the land, access and joy grow with each year of operation.

Name: Grassland Analysis
Description:
Grassland Analysis es una plataforma de análisis y acompañamiento técnico orientada a la regeneración de suelos, praderas y sistemas productivos en Chile y América Latina.
Nuestro trabajo se basa en la integración de datos, ciencia del suelo y lectura sistémica del territorio, entendiendo que la sustentabilidad no es suficiente si no contribuye a restaurar la vida, la funcionalidad ecológica y la productividad de los ecosistemas.
Acompañamos a productores, empresas e instituciones en la toma de decisiones informadas, utilizando indicadores físicos, químicos y biológicos del suelo, análisis productivos de praderas, lectura del manejo animal y evaluación de procesos de regeneración y degradación.
Grassland Analysis no ofrece recetas universales ni soluciones estandarizadas.
Trabajamos desde el territorio real, combinando evidencia científica, experiencia práctica y comprensión humana de los sistemas productivos.
Creemos que regenerar es un proceso técnico, económico y ético, y que solo a través de datos con sentido, acción concreta y compromiso con las personas es posible construir sistemas productivos verdaderamente sostenibles en el tiempo.

Landbruget producerer eller står bag alle dine fødevarer: Lige fra mælken, gulerødderne, æggene, müslien, grillpølsen og rugbrødet til øllen, du nyder på festival. Vi laver både den røde bøf og plantebøffen.

Name: Avis 3000
Description:
În spatele oricărei fripturi gustoase de pui sau a ouălor servite la micul dejun exista o poveste.

Povestea oamenilor care și-au lăsat o bucățică de suflet, acolo, printre fermele cu pui, în frigul abatorului, în incubaţie sau în marea „bucătărie” care prepară hrana zilnică pentru zeci de milioane de pui. Chiar dacă e greu de imaginat, friptura gustoasă din farfurie şi ochiul de ou cu care vă începeți ziua, conțin un ingredient secret: sufletul avicultorului.

În momentul de față, AVIS deține două ferme de găini ouătoare crescute liber, de câte 100.000 de capete, o hală de creștere a tineretului pentru găini ouătoare, trei ferme pentru creșterea puilor de carne: Ferma 1, la Mintia, cu o capacitate maximă de 240.000 de pui, Ferma 7, la Șoimuș, cu o capacitate de 480.000 de pui, și Ferma 9, de la Bălata, tot cu 480.000 de pui. În ferma din Leșnic, cresc, în fiecare an, trei serii a câte 15.000 de găini și cocoși pentru reproducere, care produc ouă ce sunt incubate în propria stație de incubație din Leșnic. Conceptul de „complex avicol integrat” cuprinde producția de carne de pui obținută din propria linie de reproducere, abatorizarea păsărilor destinate consumului, producția de ouă, precum și fabricarea furajelor necesare creșterii păsărilor. Fabrica de furaje din Mintia produce nutrețurile pentru toate fermele firmei, iar abatorul, cu o capacitate de 30 — 35 de tone de carne pe zi, asigură desfacerea cărnii neinjectate — proaspete, refrigerate și congelate.

Name: Golden Oaks Farm
Description:
Just 50 miles outside of Chicago in the village of Wauconda, IL up the picturesque tree-line driveway is Golden Oaks Farm. Golden Oaks Farm was founded by the Crown family of Chicago, IL in 1948, the passion for dairy is lustrous as John Crown's love for Holsteins. John would spend his time at the farm fueling his passion and laying the building blocks to achieve an over 70-year reputation for outstanding Holsteins in an urban location. 

Today, the Crown family relies on a team of 16  dedicated full-time and several part-time employees to make Golden Oaks Farm successful both in the Dairy and Genetic markets.  Our team is driven by the mission statement: To efficiently and profitably produce quality dairy product and superior cattle genetics while maintaining the integrity of agriculture in a suburban setting.

Golden Oaks Farm is known for breeding sound, well-balanced cows that have the combination of dairyness and strength needed to be highly productive while creating bloodlines with a strong maternal and paternal side to breed in the future. Our herd consists of roughly 720 milking females and 680 young stock, with about 99% of these animals registered. We aim to produce 19,000,000 pounds of milk every year with solid components.   We classify several times each year and currently have 45 Excellent and 200 Very Good cows.

Most of our 1,600 crop acres are planted each spring and harvested by custom harvesters in the fall. Alfalfa haylage, dry hay, corn silage, high moisture corn and oatlage are produced on the farm to feed the cows. Winter wheat is also grown to provide both straw for both feed and bedding.  Additional dry hay, straw, corn gluten feed and a protein-mineral mix are purchased to fill out the ration.

Name: Holistic Management Canada
Description:
Land managers are facing growing uncertainty from increasingly unpredictable weather patterns, unstable financial conditions, and rising societal pressures. Across Canada, in all ecoregions, farmers and ranchers are facing the same challenge. We have been living through relatively stable conditions and have gotten by with a recipe-type approach to land management. If I do this, I can expect this. In this new uncertain world, this approach no longer serves us. We need an approach to management that helps land managers predict changes, diagnose problems, and design solutions in contextually-appropriate, adaptive and timely ways that benefit the farm, ecology, economy and society. 

Holistic Management Canada offers courses, mentorship and peer networks to empower farmers to regenerate land and communities. Do you know if your management is resulting in land regeneration? One exciting program we offer is Ecological Outcome Verification. EOV is a powerful management tool for land managers to know whether the land is degenerating, stable or regenerating. Contact us for more info.

Name: Landgut Kemper & Schlomski
Description:
Nachhaltigkeit und Qualität im Einklang mit der Natur – Das Landgut Kemper & Schlomski (LGKS) liegt am Rande der Sächsischen Schweiz in unmittelbarer Nähe zu Dresden.
Seit 2004 wird die Gesamtfläche von nunmehr 110 ha, davon 66 ha Wald, nach ökologischen Grundsätzen bewirtschaftet. Zur Sicherung der Artenvielfalt in der Kulturlandschaft wurde ein Bio-topverbund von Teichlandschaften, Waldlebensräumen und Streuobstwiesen angelegt.
Als Baustein für eine enkeltaugliche Waldbewirtschaftung sind unsere 66 ha Wald PEFC-zertifiziert. In Verbindung mit dem Projekt „Ein grünes Netz für die Fledermaus“ wird durch Maßnahmen, wie die Anlage artenreicher Waldsäume, ein strukturreicher Biotopverbund entwickelt, der neben einem reichhaltigen Nahrungsangebot auch wertvolle Lebensräume für Tier- und Pflanzenarten bietet.
Die Naturschutzprojekte am LGKS werden zudem begleitet von einer themenbezogenen und praxis-orientierten Umweltbildung.

Anflug der Wildbienen – Der Bienenwald am LGKS: 2018 fiel der Startschuss für unser Bienenwald-projekt. Mit diesem Leuchtturmprojekt haben wir ein Zeichen für den Natur- und Artenschutz ge-setzt. Im Frühjahr 2020 erfolgte die Auszeichnung als offizielles Projekt der UN-Dekade Biologische Vielfalt.
Das Konzept dieser insektenfreundlichen Aufforstung wurde bereits auf Standorten außerhalb Sach-sens adaptiert und wir hoffen auf weitere Bienenwälder in ganz Deutschland.
Mit unserem Kinderbuch – “Die kleine Wildbiene Wonka – Der Abenteuerflug im Bienenwald“ wer-den Kinder für den Natur- und Artenschutz begeistert.

Anfang 2023 wurde das LGKS erneut als hervorragendes Beispiel der UN-Dekade zur Wiederherstel-lung von Ökosystemen im Ökosystem-Komplex „Wälder“ ausgezeichnet.

„Wer A(rtenvielfalt) sagt, muss auch B(ienenwald) sagen – Ein „summendes“ Waldkonzept als bun-desweites Erfolgsmodell“: Am LGKS kann jeder bereits ab 1qm einen Beitrag für die Artenvielfalt leisten.

Name: KIVANÇ TARIM & DANIŞMANLIK
Description:
Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy: The Fertility of the Soil, the Assurance of the Future

Established in 2020, Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy is a pioneering company in Turkey’s agricultural sector, dedicated to sustainable farming and trade. By blending scientific methods with traditional agricultural knowledge, we aim to provide farmers with high yields, quality products, and sustainable agricultural techniques.

What Do We Do?
Through our agricultural consultancy services, we guide farmers at every stage, from planting to harvest. Our services include:

Fertilizer and pesticide prescriptions,

Climate and soil analyses,

Supply of seeds, fertilizers, and agricultural equipment,

Field inspections and one-on-one farmer support,

Training in sustainable agricultural practices.


How Do We Work?
We conduct regular visits to fields and orchards, continuously monitoring soil and plant health. By maintaining direct communication with our farmers, we address issues on-site and provide 24/7 support. Our expert team offers customized solutions for every farmer, prioritizing not only product quality but also the success and satisfaction of our clients.

Our Vision
At Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy, our goal is to spread sustainable farming practices across Turkey, empowering our farmers economically and environmentally. We are committed to leaving a legacy of healthy soils and sustainable agriculture for future generations.

Why Choose Us?

Farmer-friendly, solution-oriented service approach

A perfect blend of scientific expertise and cultural knowledge

Guaranteed high yields and quality

A dedicated consultancy team always by your side


We are here to value our soils and grow together.

Kıvanç Agricultural Consultancy – Carrying the Power of the Soil to the Future.

Name: GO Climafarm
Description:
El grupo operativo CLIMAFARM tiene como objetivo general el diseño y la implementación de un prototipo de sistema de climatización sostenible para la mejora de las condiciones térmicas y de calidad de aire de naves de ganado. Además, la inclusión de las TIC permitirá mejorar la gestión de la ganadería.

Name: Maple Ranch at Downlands
Description:
Welcome to Maple Ranch at Downlands, where tradition meets innovation in sustainable farming. Nestled in the picturesque valley of the Surrey/Hampshire border, our historic family-run estate has been a testament to agricultural excellence since 1550. Today, under the stewardship of James Gilboy, we are pioneering regenerative farming practices that not only preserve but enhance the natural beauty and productivity of our land.

Our Mission
At Maple Ranch, we are dedicated to restoring soil health, protecting biodiversity, and producing high-quality, ethically raised products. Our approach to farming is holistic and forward-thinking, blending traditional methods with cutting-edge techniques to create a sustainable and resilient agricultural system.

What We Do
Regenerative Agriculture: We employ practices that rejuvenate the soil, reduce dependency on synthetic inputs, and enhance ecosystem health.
Ethically Raised Livestock: Our English Shorthorn cows and pasture-raised chickens roam freely, supported by alpacas that guard them against predators. We also nurture ducks native to the Surrey Hills and something special is coming to our woodlands soon.
Premium Products: We proudly offer our high-quality beef through The Ethical Butcher and are soon launching a secret project very soon, bringing you more nutritious and ethically produced food to your table.

Why Follow Us?
Educational Insights: Learn about regenerative farming practices and their impact on the environment and food quality.
Behind-the-Scenes: Get a glimpse into daily life on the farm, from livestock management to innovative agricultural techniques.
Sustainable Living: Discover tips and stories on sustainable living and ethical food choices.
Join us on our journey to transform agriculture and promote a sustainable future. Follow Maple Ranch at Downlands to stay updated on our latest initiatives, products, and insights into the world of regenerative farming.

Name: Aero-Crop Solutions
Description:
Agricultural Drone Services for Farms, Horticulture & Forestry

At Aero-Crop, we provide specialist agricultural drone services across the UK, helping farms, plant nurseries, orchards, and forestry projects work smarter, faster, safer and more sustainably.

Using the advanced XAG P100 Pro drone, we deliver precise aerial applications that save time, reduce labour, and minimise crop damage — even in hard-to-reach or wet areas.

Our drone services include:
>Drone Spraying – Foliar feed application, biostimulants, nematodes, glasshouse shading & removal as well as pesticides as they become approved for aerial application.
>Drone Spreading – Granular fertiliser spreading, cover crop sowing, undersowing, direct seeding (forestry).
>Glasshouse & Polytunnels Care – Safe, even coverage of approved algaecides to maintain the light transmission optimal throughout the growing season.
>Forestry Drone Applications – Support for forest natural regeneration and establishment projects, especially in hard to reach areas.

Why choose us?
 Fully certified GVC drone operator with an Operational Safety Case (OSC)
 Precise application to reduce product waste and costs
 No heavy machinery or soil compaction
 Flexible, reliable service tailored to your needs

Whether you need any crops drone spraying, glasshouse & polytunnles care, or forestry aerial applications, we can help you get more done in less time and at the right time.

 Contact us today to arrange a free demonstration and see how drones can transform your growing season.

Name: ATECA
Description:
O Grupo de Pesquisa e Extensão em Administração, Tecnologia e Engenharia com foco nas Ciências Agrárias (ATECA), coordenado pelo Prof. Dr. Daniel Lamarca, está sediado na Faculdade de Ciências Agronômicas (FCA) da Universidade Estadual Paulista (UNESP), Câmpus de Botucatu-SP.

O ATECA é formado por discentes dos cursos de Engenharia Agronômica e Engenharia de Bioprocessos e Biotecnologia da Faculdade de Ciências Agronômicas (FCA/UNESP) e discentes dos cursos de Medicina Veterinária e Zootecnia da Faculdade de Medicina Veterinária e Zootecnia (FMVZ/UNESP).

São desenvolvidos projetos multidisciplinares com foco nas Ciências Agrárias, envolvendo principalmente as áreas de Administração, Tecnologia e Engenharia. Dentre os principais projetos do ATECA, estão:

DADOS DO AGRO: trata-se de um website que possui como objetivo centralizar em um único lugar o endereço eletrônico de diversas fontes de dados abertos do setor agropecuário brasileiro e mundial. Os links para acesso aos dados são apresentados separadamente, havendo uma página específica em função de cada cultura ou variável climática. O projeto pode ser acessado por meio do endereço: www.dados.agr.br/.

ZOOTEMPO: trata-se de um sistema baseado no conceito de IoT ("Internet of Things" ou Internet das Coisas), o qual possui como objetivo alertar e prevenir o produtor rural quanto a ocorrência do impacto de eventos extremos de temperatura (ondas de calor e ondas de frio) em seu sistema de produção animal.

AGROPECUÁRIA.APP: trata-se de sistemas para a realização da gestão de diferentes cadeias produtivas do setor agropecuário (produção animal e vegetal). Estão sendo desenvolvidos sistemas específicos para cada cadeia produtiva (soja, milho, cana, bovinocultura de corte e de leite etc.). Em cada sistema, está sendo desenvolvido um módulo para gestão financeira e outro módulo para gestão da produção (agronômica ou zootécnica). Em breve, os sistemas estarão disponíveis a partir do endereço: agropecuaria.app.

Name: CalmUnity Farms
Description: CalmUnity Farms was founded by Lee Pierce and Juanita Wald, childhood friends from Elmira NY who have witnessed the destruction of their hometown by the corporatization of community services, including agriculture. With the help of their creative partners and systems (an)architects, Sam Somostrada and Zeke Pierce, CalmUnity Farms was born. We are regenerating several acres of land outside of Elmira, NY; salvaging stone, brick, and wood to build raised permaculture beds; growing sustainable fruits and vegetables with focus on Chemung River Valley species and heirloom varietals; bringing produce to little ones through the Farm2Preschool Program; visiting our local markets to help families plant seeds to start their own gardens; supporting community gardens throughout the area; and getting pumpkins to families at Halloween. To sign up to receive or help give a pumpkin, visit our website to sign up. You can also make a financial contribution and/or sign up to get your hands dirty up at the farm!

It grows at the heart of the Wonderland Project, a place envisioned not only as a regenerative farm, but as a cultural sanctuary—where cacao is just the beginning. Set among waterfalls, volcanic soils, and tropical abundance, Wonderland is evolving into a center for art, ceremony, and cacao-based tourism. A living canvas where creativity, ecology, and ancestral knowledge intersect. Here, the land inspires not only what we grow—but how we gather, create, and remember.

Name: The Agrarian Institute
Description:
Our ancestors were in deep relationship with the land and the nutritious food they harvested. Sadly, we've become disconnected from the precious soil our food is grown in. The recent pandemic and geopolitical conflicts have exposed glaring vulnerabilities in our food system. Most of our food is grown far away using toxic chemicals and unsustainable farming practices. Our communities are increasingly food insecure. We deserve better. By leading our community back to the land, we hope to play our small part in inspiring a healthier, more sustainable local food future.

Empower and grow resilient communities through education, local grown organic food relief, and ecological restoration.

Name: GoldMark Farm
Description:
A complete equine experience for equestrians and visitors alike.  

Excellence at Every Step 
GoldMark collaborates with trade connections to invite owners or trainers with 10 or more horses at our state-of-the-art facility for dry stall and pasture boarding.  

On 1500 acres in Ocala, Florida, is the vast farm known as GoldMark. This expansive equine estate is home to state-of-the-art thoroughbred training facilities, sport horse resources, show cattle, and so much more. Opened in 2006, GoldMark has maintained a dedication to excellence and supports the success of every horse that enters our gates.  

We never compromise on excellence.  
GoldMark Farm operates a full-service state-of-the-art thoroughbred training center designed and run by equine professionals dedicated to the utmost comfort and safety of each thoroughbred. Every member of our team is committed to their optimum performance at the track.

Thoroughbreds at GoldMark Farm are treated like the elite athletes they are. Our state-of-the-art facilities focus on their comfort and care, provide cooling in the Florida heat, and offer optimal food and access to water. 
Horses are trained professionally, treated royally, and experience luxury.  

Offering the best for every horse.  
Discover top-tier facilities at GoldMark Farm, designed for champion-caliber equines. GoldMark Farm has opened its gates to the sport horse community by adding two world-class arenas.

Discover the pinnacle of horse racing achievement at the Triple Crown Museum, nestled within the enchanting GoldMark Farm.
With a rich legacy spanning decades, this unique museum stands as a tribute to the extraordinary journey of the 13 legendary Triple Crown Winners.  
Each exhibit is a testament to the individuality and charisma of these magnificent thoroughbreds, emphasizing their distinct personalities. From the powerful stride of Justify in 2018 to the historic gallop of Sir Barton in 1919.

Name: Agro Social Zambeze
Description:
QUEM SOMOS

A Agro Social Zambeze é uma empresa fruto de um processo do conhecimento adquirido junto às bases de agricultores e da demanda global por alimentos limpos. Emprega arranjos produtivos, econômicos e agroindustriais através de ferramentas e conceitos construtivos no planejamento, elaboração, implantação, assessoria e monitoramento de programas, planos e projetos agroecológicos e agro sociais, visando a organização da produção sustentável e de subsistência das famílias para atender as demandas do mercado, aumento da renda, geração de novos empregos, garantia alimentar e produção em larga escala.
ORIGEM METODOLOGIA

Sustentado pela metodologia internacional de otimização de recursos naturais e o sistema adotado pela Agro Social Zambeze, busca incansavelmente a inclusão social das pessoas envolvidas no sistema, dando importância as partes: social, produtiva, ambiental e econômica, sempre transferindo conhecimento prático e teórico interligados, que iniciou há mais de 10 anos com a preocupação de reduzir o impacto ambiental da biomassa (líquida e sólida) gerada nas fases de produção de qualquer sistema produtivo desenvolvido. No processo de transformação desses resíduos viabilizou a concepção de novas cadeias produtivas interdependentes com tecnologias, métodos, arranjos e módulos, aplicáveis às propriedades rurais, tornando-as verdadeiras indústrias verdes de alimentos sustentáveis.

Name: Consorzio Agrario del Tirreno
Description: Il Consorzio Agrario del Tirreno rappresenta un punto di riferimento essenziale per il settore agricolo della Maremma e delle aree circostanti. Fondato nel 1908, ha attraversato oltre un secolo di storia, contribuendo attivamente allo sviluppo economico e sociale del territorio. La sua missione è sempre stata quella di supportare gli agricoltori con servizi innovativi e soluzioni su misura per migliorare la produttività e la sostenibilità. Il Consorzio fornisce assistenza tecnica, sementi, macchinari, prodotti per la nutrizione delle colture e per la protezione delle piante, garantendo una presenza capillare e un supporto concreto in ogni fase del ciclo produttivo. Radicato nelle tradizioni locali ma con uno sguardo proiettato al futuro, il Consorzio Agrario del Tirreno promuove l’innovazione e la modernizzazione del settore agricolo, rimanendo al fianco degli operatori rurali nel perseguimento della crescita e della valorizzazione delle risorse locali. Il Consorzio Agrario del Tirreno, radicato nella storia e nelle tradizioni agricole del territorio, è diretto da un Consiglio di Amministrazione che guida con dedizione lo sviluppo e l'innovazione del settore. Da oltre un secolo, il Consorzio sostiene gli agricoltori, promuovendo l'acquisto collettivo di mezzi tecnici, la vendita di prodotti locali e offrendo supporto tecnico e finanziario. Attraverso strategie lungimiranti e una gestione integrata dei servizi, il Consiglio contribuisce alla modernizzazione dell'agricoltura, valorizzando le eccellenze territoriali e mantenendo uno sguardo sempre rivolto al futuro.

Name: MIEL CASTIZA
Description:
MIEL CASTIZA nace en 2019 de la unión de dos jóvenes emprendedores toledanos amantes de la naturaleza, de los productos auténticos y de las cosas bien hechas.  Con mucha dedicación, esfuerzo y cariño, fruto de esos valores nace este proyecto.

Nuestros colmenares se encuentran distribuidos entre los Montes de Toledo, el Parque Regional del Rio Guadarrama, la Sierra Oeste de Madrid y junto al Parque Natural de las Hoces del Duratón en Segovia. Actualmente tenemos entre 100 y 120 colmenas tipo Langstroth que movemos entre dichos asentamientos dependiendo de la época del año, la floración y las lluvias.

La miel que hacemos es completamente natural, cruda y no sufre ningún proceso de transformación. Se cosecha en colmenas tipo Langstroth, y se extrae de manera artesanal, con extractores mecánicos. Después, se filtra para quitarle impurezas y restos de cera, se decanta en maduradores de acero inoxidable y, por último, se envasa en frascos de vidrio reciclable. Llevando con todo nuestro cariño así a  vuestra mesa este manjar de la naturaleza.

Sostenibilidad, Ecología, Calidad y Sabor son y serán siempre los pilares fundamentales de MIEL CASTIZA.

Name: Spiruline Astrée
Description:
Spiruline Astrée est une production de spiruline paysanne française engagée pour une agriculture durable.

 La spiruline est une « microalgue » riche en protéines, source de fer, contenant toutes les vitamines sauf la C et source de minéraux. Qualifié comme « l’aliment le plus complet après le lait maternel » d’après l’UNESCO, ce superaliment aux nombreux bienfaits contribue notamment au tonus et à la vitalité.

 Notre spiruline est cultivée, récoltée et conditionnée à Trévoux dans l’Ain, idéalement située dans le Val de Saône entre Lyon et Bourg-en-Bresse. Notre production de spiruline dans 300 m² de bassins sous serre est économe en eau, en énergie et est garantie sans pesticide, sans herbicide et sans OGM.

 Par envie de transparence et surtout de qualité, Spiruline Astrée est membre de la Fédération des Spiruliniers de France et notre spiruline est labellisée Saveurs de l’Ain.

 Derrière la table de récolte se trouve Margaux Caia, passionnée par les microalgues. Après un diplôme d’Ingénieure Agronome à l’ENSAT, elle s’est spécialisée dans la culture de microalgues lors d’un Doctorat en microbiologie à l’INRAE et l’INRIA. Désireuse d’agir pour la transition alimentaire et de démocratiser la spiruline, c’est pourquoi elle s’est lancée dans l’aventure en tant que Spirulinière. C’est elle qui vous accueillera sur l’exploitation pour tout vous faire découvrir sur la spiruline!
