Name: Les Ruchers Delamarche
Description:
Les Ruchers Delamarche est avant tout une entreprise apicole familiale. 
Tout a commencé en 1974, à Pipriac, avec l’arrivée d’un essaim dans un chêne derrière la maison des parents de Gwenael Delamarche. Un ami apiculteur leur donne une ruche vide pour l’héberger et leur explique comment s’en occuper. C’est le début de la grande aventure et de la découverte du monde fascinant des abeilles. Le nombre de ruches progresse pour atteindre environ 250 en 1994, lorsque ses parents décident d’en faire leur métier et de créer l’entreprise. Depuis tout petit, il est baigné dans le miel et sa vie a été rythmée par les abeilles et la nature.
Il a repris l’activité de ses parents en 2009, il a installé l’exploitation apicole à Josselin qui est devenu : « Les Ruchers Delamarche ».
L’entreprise s’est développée et compte aujourd’hui 3 apiculteurs et une chargée de développement.  Notre équipe est réunie autour de valeurs communes : une entreprise familiale, une apiculture durable et des produits de qualité. 
Nous adoptons des méthodes de travail artisanales pour vous proposer un miel de Bretagne de qualité et participer activement à la sauvegarde de la biodiversité.
Nous avons choisi de travailler avec l’abeille noire bretonne, une abeille endémique de la Bretagne et donc parfaitement adaptée au climat breton.
Notre miel n’est jamais chauffé pour préserver ses qualités et ses goûts subtils
Il est extrait à froid et mis en pot à la récolte afin de préserver toutes ses qualités organoleptiques : saveur, texture, odeur, couleur et qualités nutritives. Il n’est jamais chauffé.
Nous produisons : du miel de Fleurs de Bretagne, du miel de blé noir, du miel de printemps, du miel de La Gacilly, du chouchenn, du pain d'épices, des bougies. 
Notre boutique à la ferme est située au 4 rue des trente à Josselin.

Name: Thrive Land Restoration
Description:
Thrive partners with mining (and industrial) companies to build Circular Economy Parks (CEPs) and create Thrive Spirals for local entrepreneurs to source and repurpose waste into energy and value-added products. These include regenerative composts, living soils, and fertilizer teas. 

Local growers then grow out fibre crops using the local fertilizers and pollinators, while our proprietary IP with hyperaccumulators and biochar enables on-site remediation & regeneration of soil & water resources. 

Thrive's circular economy blueprint (Thrive Spiral) is completed when makers and agri-processors produce value-added products within each CEP powered by its own on-site energy, whilst our fintech app networks all players in the ecosystem together to create wider markets. All waste circles back to the waste collectors.

We are refining the use of EM and bio-, myco-, and phyto-hyperaccumulators to extract REE's and critical minerals from several different streams of mine waste.

Name: Just More Forests

The Forests are valuable assets as they deliver stable returns, an improvement to the overall ESG company profile and benefits for all stakeholders (employees or local communities) in addition to Carbon Unit income.
To be clear, JMF projects are not suitable for Forestry for commercial logging purposes. 
The projects JMF promotes range from 20ha to 750ha in size (possibly more) and investment sizes needed is c. £ 0.5m to £ 5m+. 
We have a set of UK afforestation opportunities that are “ready to go” please reach out for more information.

Name: G.O. PECUS
Description:
GO PECUS aborda aspectos esenciales de la gestión de los pastos en sistemas complejos y en sistemas forestales o agrosilvopastorales, muy abundantes en nuestro país y en el Sistema Ibérico, de forma holística.
Tiene como objeto desarrollar una serie de herramientas digitales innovadoras que darán solución a las principales necesidades de los agentes implicados en la viabilidad de la ganadería extensiva:
1.	A los ganaderos/as, facilitándoles la selección de pastos en función del momento del año, de su fenología y productividad, así como el control de los careos y cargas aplicadas. Con ello se conseguirá, además de facilitar la movilidad de los ganados, clave de la ganadería extensiva, reducir la dependencia de aportaciones suplementarias y mejorar la rentabilidad de las explotaciones. Además de asegurar la transmisión de conocimiento de los sistemas tradicionales de manejo en favor de los y las nuevas ganaderas.
2.	A los propietarios/as de terrenos, facilitándoles la caracterización de los pastos de sus fincas, identificando las necesidades de mejora de las parcelas, además de proporcionándoles seguridad en cuanto que la gestión aplicada es la adecuada a través del control de carga pastante aplicada. Con esto se conseguirá mejorar la gestión de fincas actualmente pastoreadas y, en otros muchos casos, vencer la reticencia de muchos propietarios privados a permitir el pastoreo de sus fincas precisamente por esa falta de control.
3.	A los técnicos/as y administraciones, facilitando su labor de ayuda asesorando a ganaderos/as y propietarios/as y, especialmente, aportando herramientas para poder dirigir de forma más precisa e incentivadora los apoyos públicos.

Name: Project Wadi Attir Israel
Description:
Project Wadi Attir is a groundbreaking sustainable agricultural and tourism  initiative located in the Negev Desert, Israel. It stands as one of only 6 global projects backed by the Sustainability Laboratory (USA), born from the visionary collaboration of Dr. Michael Ben-Eli and Bedouin leader Dr. Mohammed Al-Nabari, alongside the local Bedouin community.
This pioneering project thrives on a holistic integration of sustainability principles—blending ecological, economic, social, and cultural values into daily practice. Managed collaboratively by both Bedouin and Jewish communities, Project  Wadi Attir serves as a living model for regional sustainability, economic innovation, and cultural preservation.
At its core, the project promotes harmony between communities, uplifts Bedouin traditions, and showcases a unique blend of economic success and respect for nature, human dignity, and diverse cultural heritage.

Name: Kelleñco

We're able to pack Frozen, fresh or dried organic strawberry, according to client specification.
Our farm also has great growth potential, to adapt to a growing clientele.
We like to refer to our plantation method as "Frutillas sin Dolor" in reference to the pain-free cultivation of our crop.
By raising the fruit beds, we increase yield, productivity and efficiency, reducing the physical strain on our staff, preventing back pain, knee injuries and other related injuries compared to ground level plantations.

powered by grass," reflects our commitment to sustainable, grass-fed practices that minimize 
costs and maximize environmental benefits. 
Mission: 
To provide high-quality, purebred Dorper sheep to Kenyan farmers while promoting 
sustainable grass-based farming practices.
 Vision: To scale into a regional hub for Dorper 
breeding and meat supply, exporting to East Africa by 2030.
Business Model: 
Breeding and selling pure Dorper rams and ewes; meat production from 
culled or market-ready sheep.

Nuestro Compromiso:

Responsabilidad y Transparencia: Construimos confianza a través de prácticas claras y datos verificables, asegurando calidad y responsabilidad en toda nuestra cadena de valor.

Integridad: Operamos con respeto hacia las personas, los animales y el entorno, garantizando que nuestras acciones contribuyan al bienestar de todos.

Innovación con Propósito: Buscamos constantemente soluciones que agreguen valor, optimicen procesos y promuevan la sostenibilidad del sector.

Colaboración: Creemos en el poder de la cooperación y el trabajo en red para lograr un impacto positivo en el sector y en la sociedad.

Nuestra Visión:
En Della Rosa, creemos en una forma de producir que le devuelva más a la tierra de lo que toma. Trabajamos en armonía con la naturaleza, combinando innovación y sentido común para demostrar que el agro puede ser rentable, regenerativo y un motor de bienestar para las comunidades.

Nuestro Impacto:

Regeneración de Suelos: Implementamos prácticas que restauran y fortalecen los ecosistemas, asegurando un futuro sostenible para las próximas generaciones.

Tecnología e Innovación: Utilizamos herramientas tecnológicas para optimizar procesos y maximizar el impacto positivo de nuestras operaciones.

Alianzas Estratégicas: Trabajamos en red con actores clave del sector para construir un futuro donde la producción no solo alimente, sino que también restaure ecosistemas, fortalezca comunidades y genere prosperidad sostenible.

Name: Forever K
Description:
Découvrez le Paulownia, cet arbre incroyable aux propriétés uniques.

Parce que nous croyons en un monde meilleur, nous développons une ressource en bois exceptionnelle mais sous-utilisée le Paulownia.

La Paulownia, c'est un arbre unique : 
- il pousse vite et peut atteindre à l’âge adulte jusqu'à 16 mètres de hauteur permettant une récolte tous les 5,5 ans
- il consomme jusqu'à 10 fois plus de CO2 que les autres arbres
- il produit jusqu'à 4 fois plus d'oxygène qu'un arbre classique
- il est facile à exploiter : faible consommation d'eau, forte résistance aux éléments, replantation inutile après la découpe de l'arbre....

Et pour aller plus loin, nous souhaitons agir pour un fort impact non seulement environnemental mais également social et local.
Ainsi, nous avons décidé de construire autour de la production du Paulownia, une économie circulaire entièrement intégrée, structurée et intelligente, du reboisement à l’industrialisation, avec pour objectif de créer de la valeur économique et durable à chacune des étapes (emploi local, diminution des déchets, utilisation responsable de l’eau…).

Avec ce projet, nous souhaitons avoir une résonance mondiale et ce ne seront pas moins de 28 500 hectares plantés les 5 premières années avec seulement 2 pays d'implantation !

Pour en savoir plus, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter : 
contact@seek-capital.com

Description:
A Espaço Rural é uma loja de produtos agropecuários dedicada a oferecer soluções de qualidade para o campo desde 2013 com matriz localizada em Porangatu-GO. MISSÃO 
Fornecer produtos e serviços que superem as expectativas do agricultor e do agropecuarista.
VISÃO 
Ser reconhecida pela diversidade de soluções proporcionadas ao agronegócio regional.
VALORES 
Amizade – trata-se de reciprocidade, companheirismo e estar presente na hora que o cliente ou colega de trabalho mais precisa.
Respeito – respeito às pessoas que produzem alimentos que chegam às mesas e que comandam o agronegócio. 
Responsabilidade - a responsabilidade norteia todas as nossas atividades e relações. Entendemos que a responsabilidade vai além das obrigações legais e se estende ao compromisso com a sustentabilidade, a transparência e o respeito em todas as nossas operações no agronegócio.
Inovação – levar aos nossos clientes produtos que facilitem seu trabalho, sua produção e também soluções que reduzem ou até mesmo eliminem desperdícios de tempo e de insumo.

Name: ALP Agricole Local Partner
Description:
The NGO ALP (Agricole Local Partner) is a non-governmental organization that has 
set itself the objective to help producers of perennial crops in general and in the field of 
coffee-cocoa in particular, to promote their activities in order to lead decision-makers to 
take the most appropriate decisions in their favour in order to improve their living 
conditions.
Our main tool is the collection of agro-economic data from farmers through paper or 
electronic surveys, to best match their realities and their households.
We have been formed since January 2013 but the main actors behind it have more than 
10 years of experience in data collection and processing.
In the course of our activities, we have attached ourselves to the services of major 
Ivorian and European research centres that support us in research projects, through their 
experts. 
- We signed a framework agreement with CIRAD-France (Centre de 
Coopération International en Recherche Agronomique pour le 
Développement) for yearly data collection in Côte d'Ivoire. 
 - We participated between 2012 and 2013 in the study of the impact of 
UTZ certification on cocoa cooperatives and producers in Côte d'Ivoire in 
collaboration with the research Institute of Wageningen University in the 
Netherlands. 
- We were responsible for the implementation of the monitoring and 
evaluation of the “Fertilizer Initiative in Côte d’Ivoire” project of the Idh 
Foundation in collaboration with the Conseil Café Cacao, CIRAD, the 
entire cocoa industry, the CNRA, ANADER, etc. from July 2013 to 
September 2018.
- We participated with the KIT Foundation of the Netherlands in cocoa 
demystification project in Côte d’Ivoire and Ghana in February 2016, 
which consisted of collecting data from all cocoa producing areas in both 
countries to create a data base accessible free of charge by all. We visited 
40 cocoa producing villages or former cocoa producers in 40 days to 
understand the dynamics of different production systems.

Name: Ecoculture
Description:
At Ecoculture (ecoculture.in), we are building a future where agriculture heals the planet instead of harming it. Our mission is simple yet urgent: enable climate-conscious farming that restores soil, sequesters carbon, and secures farmer livelihoods.

We work hand-in-hand with farmers to:

Transition to natural and regenerative farming practices.

Boost soil health and biodiversity through agroforestry and afforestation.

Unlock new income streams via carbon credits and fair market linkages.

Build a climate-conscious society by engaging youth and communities.

 What sets us apart?
We combine ancestral farming wisdom with modern technology and systems thinking to create scalable, measurable, and impactful change. Our work bridges the gap between policy and practice, providing on-ground pilots that generate real evidence for climate solutions.

 Our Vision
A livable, thriving planet for future generations — powered by resilient farmers, healthy soils, and sustainable food systems.

 Let’s Collaborate
We partner with governments, think tanks, corporates, and research institutions to scale climate-resilient agriculture and co-create solutions at the intersection of food, climate, and livelihoods.

Forestando nace con la idea de materializar nuestra pasión por los árboles y lograr concientizar a las personas de la importancia que tiene plantar un árbol y sus innumerables beneficios.

Somos una empresa que busca la concientización ambiental con miras a una ciudad más verde y con más vegetación nativa, que promueva el impacto ambiental positivo. 

Además, contamos con un vivero propio para lograr una escala mayor de producción de árboles nativos, y nos encargamos de su plantación y seguimiento. 

Creemos que es responsabilidad de todos la construcción de valores y la toma de decisiones para lograr construir un modelo de desarrollo sostenible; basado en la equidad, la justicia social y el respeto por la diversidad biológica y cultural.  

Desde Forestando nos encargamos de llevar adelante la gestión de alianzas estratégicas y la coordinación de las jornadas de reforestación, para lograr una plantación adecuada y un seguimiento de nuestros árboles nativos.

Si tu empresa u organización está interesada en hacer una campaña de reforestación, escribinos. Acá estamos para asesorarte!

Name: Lweya Honey Malawi
Description:
Lweya Honey is a social enterprise dedicated to sustainable beekeeping, environmental conservation, and community empowerment in Malawi. Founded to combat poverty and restore degraded land, we integrate innovative honey production practices with reforestation efforts to create lasting social, economic, and environmental impacts.
Our work empowers women and youth by providing climate literacy, beekeeping, and entrepreneurial skills training. Through partnerships and local engagement, we address deforestation, promote sustainable agriculture, and contribute to economic stability by building resilient communities.
At Lweya Honey, we believe in harnessing nature’s power to drive sustainable development while preserving ecosystems for future generations.

Name: Seifert Belmont Reds
Description:
Welcome to Seifert Belmont Reds, a name synonymous with premium cattle breeding and agricultural innovation. Situated in the heart of Queensland, our properties are dedicated to the meticulous breeding of Belmont Red cattle. A breed renowned for its superior genetics in fertility, tropical adaptation, growth and exceptional meat quality. At Seifert Belmont Reds,
we blend tradition with leading-edge technology to ensure selection pressure is at its highest. Our commitment to excellence begins with our breeding program, where we specifically select sires and dams that exhibit the best phenotypic and genetic traits of the Belmont Red breed. By focusing on traits of economic importance, such as fertility, growth, temperament, tropical adaptation and carcass quality, we consistently produce cattle that
meet and exceed industry standards. Our industry best practice stock husbandry, handling and facilities, plus sustainable grazing practices reflect our dedication to animal welfare and environmental stewardship. We believe that happy, healthy cattle are the cornerstone of a successful breeding program. Our cattle graze on native and improved pastures, where we prioritize their well-being at every stage of life. Seifert Belmont Reds is not just about cattle; it’s about community and collaboration. We work closely with our clients, other beef producers, researchers, and industry experts to advance cattle breeding practices and share our knowledge with the broader agricultural community. Our properties are a hub for innovation, where new techniques and technologies are tested and refined to improve the efficiency and sustainability of cattle farming. Our passion for excellence extends beyond the farm gate. We are committed to delivering the highest quality beef genetics from paddock to plate.

Name: HFF Protein
Description:
HFF Protein is a biotechnology company dedicated to enhancing the health and vitality of animals and plants. We develop and produce hydrolyzed protein from natural sources, tailored for the animal nutrition and agricultural industries.

Sustainability and innovation are at our core. By transforming natural raw materials into high-value products, we champion the circular economy and contribute to a more sustainable future.

Our business units:
- Animal Health: We design cutting-edge ingredients that support animal nutrition, health, and well-being.
- Plant Health: We provide specialized solutions for plant bio-stimulation and nutrition, empowering farmers with sustainable, natural alternatives.

At HFF Protein, we are your trusted partner in building a healthier, more resilient world.

Name: Pelo e Piume
Description:
Pelo e Piume – Azienda Agricola e Fattoria Didattica

Benvenuti a Pelo e Piume, situata nel cuore delle campagne toscane a Colle di Compito (Capannori, LU), a pochi passi dal suggestivo lago della Gherardesca. Siamo un'azienda agricola e una fattoria didattica che offre esperienze immersive in natura, pensate per famiglie, scuole, aziende e appassionati dell'ambiente.

La nostra missione
Educare e ispirare, promuovendo il benessere degli animali e la sostenibilità ambientale. Crediamo nell'importanza dell'educazione pratica e interattiva per formare una comunità più consapevole e rispettosa della natura.

Cosa offriamo:

Interazioni con gli Alpaca: Partecipa a sessioni di alimentazione, passeggiate e workshop, scoprendo il fascino di questi animali e imparando come prendertene cura.
Percorsi Didattici e Workshop: Laboratori creativi e attività interattive che mettono in luce le pratiche agricole sostenibili e la conservazione dell'ambiente.
Eventi e Team Building: Soluzioni personalizzate per eventi aziendali, giornate di team building e visite scolastiche, in un contesto naturale unico.
Esperienza Agricola: Un luogo dove la tradizione agricola si unisce all'innovazione, offrendo prodotti genuini e un ambiente che educa alla sostenibilità.
Contattaci:
 3407439669
 piume.pelo@gmail.com

Unisciti a noi per un'esperienza educativa e rigenerante, dove la natura diventa aula e ogni giornata è un'opportunità per costruire un futuro più verde e consapevole.

Name: Grayling Centennial LLC
Description: Grayling Centennial LLC is a ranching and Land Conservation,  Property Management & Environmental Advisory Limited Liability Company incorporated in the State of Montana. It specializes in the restoration of fragile high-altitude riparian areas and eco-systems to provide restored environments for native wildlife in combination with improved grazing management techniques such as those promoted by Allan Savory to produce a high-end organic grass fed beef product which can be naturally supported by a healthy wilderness environment. Its current focus is a project to preserve and return to a healthy level the last of two native populations of ad-fluvial arctic grayling (thymallus arcticus) left in the lower 48 States, in Montana’s Centennial Valley’s Alaska Basin.

En el año 2023 fundamos en Espartillar un vivero especializado en plantas micorrizadas con Tuber melanosporum.

Somos un equipo de profesionales con experiencia y con el compromiso de brindar plantas con porcentajes de micorrización certificados.

Para poder lograrlo creamos un invernadero con la tecnología adecuada  para asegurar las condiciones de desarrollo ideal para las plantas como para el micelio de la trufa negra. Logrando una simbiosis exitosa.

Desde que sembramos las primeras bellotas de nuestras plantas acompañamos en cada paso a quienes buscan crear las próximas plantaciones truferas de Argentina para adentrarse en el mundo de uno de los hongos más codiciados de nuestra tierra, la trufa negra.

Face aux menaces de changements climatiques, des pressions anthropiques multiples sur l’environnement et la biodiversité, AgriProNature s’engage à répondre efficacement en apportant des solutions concrètes et ciblées.
AgriProNature est spécialisé dans l’Agriculture de façon générale. De façon spécifique, il intervient dans les domaines de l’Aménagement des Pêches et Aquaculture, la Biodiversité, les écosystèmes forestiers, la production animale, l’agro-alimentaire, les fournitures d’intrants et équipements agricoles, l’hydraulique et les aménagements hydro-agricoles, la formation et renforcement de capacités et les prestations diverses. Des professionnels chevronnés de l’environnement aquatique et forestier, de la production et des autres services à la communauté collaborent étroitement pour fournir des solutions sur mesure et adaptées aux besoins de chaque client. Nous croyons en la puissance du travail d'équipe, de la communication ouverte et de l'écoute attentive pour offrir les meilleurs résultats. Notre Slogan est : Sérieux, Compétences et Efficacité.

Name: CAPAM ZAMAKOE
Description:
Créé par Alternatives Durables pour le Développement (ADD) en 2014, le Centre d'Apprentissage de Formation Professionnelle et de promotion de l'auto-emploi des jeunes dans les métiers agropastoraux dans la commune de Mbalmayo en abrégé CAPAM est un Centre de Formation Professionnelle ( CFP) Privé jouissant de la personnalité juridique.
Le CAPAM est situé au village zamakoé dans le département du Nyong et So'o fonctionne selon un programme de formation par alternance pendant une durée de  3 ans qui prévoit sur une période d'un mois, deux semaines au Centre et deux semaines en MSP ( milieu-socio-professionnel).
La formation est sanctionnée par un Certificat de Qualification Professionnelle qui permet aux jeunes formés de continuer leur formation dans une autre école de niveau supérieur, d'engranger un emploi salarial ou de se positionner en auto-emploi.

Name: Tomatopia
Description:
Tomatopia was born from the meeting of Paolo Riente and Francesco Martorelli, with the idea of bringing together their paths, skills, and passions into a project rooted in their land of origin. Sharing the same purpose, they also involved Francesco Guaglianone and Luca Spinelli: together they shaped Tomatopia.

Tomatopia is a regenerative mountain agriculture project based in Sant’Agata di Esaro, Calabria, focused on enhancing the territory and its agricultural heritage. Our work starts from cultivation, but looks at the value chain as a whole: we aim to develop a broad range of fruit and vegetable production, promoting local (native) varieties and Calabrian traditions, while also adopting crops and solutions that are consistent with the farm’s operational sustainability and product quality.

We operate with a regenerative approach, with the goal of improving soil fertility over time and supporting biodiversity through practical, verifiable practices. In parallel, we work to reduce the environmental impact of our farming activities, with particular attention to efficient water management and continuous improvement of field operations.

Our vision goes beyond building an agricultural business: Tomatopia aims to evolve into a broader project that can include a hospitality component and a community of supporters. Our goal is to contribute positively to local life and the surrounding area, strengthening the existing community and welcoming people who share the same approach, including supporters from other parts of Italy and the world.

We have established more than 30 indigenous tree nurseries in multiple locations and regularly work with communities to restore forests and  riparian areas. We are all certified Citizen Scientists and Trainers and have a five year track record of implementing programmes addressing reforestation in the Rift Valley, regenerative agriculture, wildlife conservation, prosperity, the circular economy and livelihoods in the informal sector. We are experienced in developing high integrity community projects for the Voluntary Carbon Market and Natural Capital credit schemes.

Name: YAVUZ ÇAPA MAKİNALARI
Description:
Sizlerle elele ve işbirliği içerisinde çalışabilmek için kaliteli ve randımanlı motorlu çapa makinalarını (Bahçe El Traktörü) imal etmeyi ana hedef olarak seçmiş bulunuyoruz. Bu nedenle firmamız en son teknolojileri kullanarak çiftçimizin daha rahat iş yapabileceği bir şekilde geliştirmiş olduğu makineleri itinayla ve titizlikle üretmektedir. Makinelerimiz, diğer ülkelerde üretilen aynı tür makinalardaki en son teknikler ve yenilikler dikkate alınarak Türk Tarımı ve çiftçisine sunulmuştur. Üretmiş olduğumuz ürünler 2 YIL firmamız garantisi altındadır. Bizi tercih ettiğinizden dolayı ilginize teşekkür eder, mahsülünüzün bol, kazancınızın bereketli olmasını dileriz.


Firma olarak, çalışanlarımızın eğitimini ve gelişimini daima sağlamakta, ürün kalitemizi etkileyecek teknolojik gelişmeleri takip ederek kendimizi sürekli yenilemekteyiz. Firmamız mimari projeler doğrultusunda fonksiyonel, estetik, ergonomik ve kaliteli ürünler üretmektedir. Günümüzde müşteriler sadece ürünü değil arkasındaki firmayı da dikkate alarak tercihini yapmaktadır. Bu vesile ile firmamız en değerli varlığı olan müşterilerine daha iyi hizmet verebilmek için TSE/TSEK kalite belgelerine haizdir.

Bugünlere gelmemizde büyük paya sahip müşterilerimizin bize güveni ve desteğiyle birlikte deneyimli ekibimizle müşterilerimizin beklentilerine en iyi şekilde cevap vermeye devam edeceğiz.

Compilation of information on local crop varieties and related local knowledge
Seed collection, field studies of traits, research on nutritional principles
On- farm participatory conservation, seed selection and production by setting up crop-wise conservation centres

Name: Estancia Los Lapachos
Description:
Nuestra historia comienza hace 10 años con la adquisición de un icónico establecimiento rural llamado "Pino Cambi", que fue transformado por sus nuevos dueños en lo que hoy conocemos como "Estancia Los Lapachos".

En la actualidad, somos un grupo diversificado en el sector agropecuario, con dos unidades de negocios principales: la Unidad Forestal y la Unidad Ganadera.

La Unidad Forestal desarrolla la cadena completa pasando por la producción de materia prima, aserrado, secado e impregnado hasta la comercialización de la amplia gama de productos a nivel nacional e internacional. Estamos comprometidos con la mejora continua, utilizando nuevas tecnologías y un equipo de alto desempeño para asegurar productos de primera calidad. Mantenemos un compromiso firme con la sustentabilidad de nuestros recursos naturales y con nuestras comunidades locales. 

Por otro lado, la Unidad Ganadera se dedica a producir reproductores Elite de Bovinos Braford y Equinos de razas Sangre Pura de Carreras (SPC) y Cuarto de Millas de Carreras, enfocándose en el mejoramiento genético de los rodeos.

#Agroforestal #Genética #GenéticaEquina #GenéticaGanadera #AgroForestoIndustrial

Name: LUBO FARMS AND RESORT
Description:
Agriculture impacts society in many ways, including: supporting livelihoods through food, habitat, and jobs; providing raw materials for food and other products; and building strong economies through trade. In our country, Nigeria, over 70 per cent of Nigerians live in rural areas and most of them are farmers who are involved in agriculture. Farmers produce the food items we eat everyday. We also need these foods to sustain our energy for work; but, nowadays, people don’t want to venture into farming again thereby increasing the rate of unemployment in the country when technology has taken over virtually everything and also government jobs.
Lubo farms and resort is committed to helping the government deal with unemployment by employing both skilled and unskilled workers to work in the farm. We are also committed to tackling food scarcity in Nigeria. We are into integrated farming.

 Os produtos Onforest integram plataformas tecnológicas inteligentes e modelos estatísticos robustos, permitindo um controle rigoroso de indicadores silviculturais, como sobrevivência, uniformidade, qualidade de plantio e manutenção. Trabalhamos com indicadores personalizados, adaptados à realidade e aos objetivos de cada cliente.

 Nosso compromisso é com a entrega de valor técnico e estratégico ao setor florestal. Acreditamos que a inovação baseada em dados é o caminho para florestas mais uniformes, produtivas e financeiramente viáveis.

 Se sua empresa busca precisão, inteligência e alto desempenho na gestão de florestas plantadas, a Onforest é seu parceiro ideal.

Name: Sare Yaffa Ranch
Description:
Established in 2018 by Professor Sidat Yaffa, Sare Yaffa Ranch is a Gambian agricultural enterprise that provides healthy, nutritious, and affordable meat protein to the local community and beyond. Located near Missira Village, Sandu District, Upper River Region, The Gambia, our ranch encompasses approximately 2.4 hectares and offers a unique environment for raising high-quality livestock. Our drilled borehole provides a clean and consistent water supply for our livestock, ensuring their health and well-being.
Our approach to animal care is meticulous. We practice a semi-intensive grazing system, allowing our animals to roam freely in natural pastures for a portion of the day. This is complemented by supplemental feeding with high-quality grains to ensure optimal health and growth. Veterinary services are readily available to address any health concerns.
Sare Yaffa Ranch goes beyond simply producing top-quality livestock. We are passionate about sharing our knowledge and expertise. We serve as a teaching laboratory, welcoming Gambians and visitors interested in sustainable livestock production and climate change adaptation strategies.
By combining a commitment to quality, community, and sustainability, Sare Yaffa Ranch strives to be a leader in Gambian agriculture and a model for the future of livestock production in West Africa.

Name: High Braythorne Farm
Description:
HIGH Braythorne is a family-owned 55 hectare farm set in the Washburn Valley in Lower Wharfedale, Yorkshire. For decades, much of the improved grassland has produced silage but is a ryegrass monoculture. 
IN 2022 we took a strategic decision to re-focus the farm towards biodiversity integrated with a less intensive farming system. We will do this by  re-establishing species-rich grassland and creating a mosaic of habitats incorporating existing permanent pasture, wet grassland, river catchment and ancient woodland. 
OUR aim is for the ecological changes to be a catalyst for income generation to supplement farming income, which is under pressure as British farming makes a transition away from the European Union subsidy system. 2023 is Year 1 in this transition.

Name: Coed & Fferm Hendre Ddu
Description:
To understand Coed and Fferm Hendre Ddu, read Carwyn Graves' wonderful book: Tir - The Story of the Welsh Landscape. Here is a short excerpt:

The collective word for culture, in Welsh, diwylliant, is, literally translated, ‘un-wilding’, and to till land is to ‘unwild’ it. By this measure, the idea of turning over vast tracts of hill country to nature by removing farming and farmers from the picture, as rewilding has often been presented by the media, is the very antithesis of all that rural Welsh culture has stood for. For speakers of a language where the talk is always of defending and upholding a threatened culture, to talk of ‘rewilding’ sounds very much like ‘killing [a] culture’.

Yet, in a journey that started in Cwm Pennant in Neolithic times, Wales is now 224th out of 240 countries on the Natural History Museum's Biodiversity Intactness Index. Without nature there is no farming, without farming we lose the essence of Welsh culture.

Over 90% of Wales is used for agriculture, mainly sheep and cattle, but both the beef herd, and the number of sheep, have fallen substantially over the last couple of decades. Producing food this way, when nearly 80% of the land is Severely Disadvantaged (53%) or Disadvantaged (23%), is not, by itself, profitable. 55% of farms in Wales are small (under 20Ha) but only farm around 7% of the land. The bigger farms farm the rest.

The Fferm and Coed Hendre Ddu team grew up with the idea of Welsh culture being killed. Their great great grandparents organised and funded the emigration to Patagonia in 1865 for the purpose of retaining and preserving the Welsh language, culture and traditions that were then under threat. Their great uncle paid with his life at the hands of members of Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid's gang.

Fferm & Coed Hendre Ddu is trying a different approach in today's world. Working with Welsh Government and Parc Eryri to grow the local economy in order to protect and develop Welsh culture.

Name: El Lucero
Description:
Nos dedicamos a la cría y levante de ganado bajo un enfoque regenerativo, generando un impacto positivo en el medioambiente y en la rentabilidad de los comerciantes de carne. Nuestro modelo de producción sostenible promueve la diferenciación y competitividad, además de facilitar el acceso a mercados premium que valoran productos de alta calidad y menor huella ecológica.

Somos una empresa comprometida con la cría de ganado en libertad, sin el uso de hormonas y con una alimentación 100% natural a base de pasto. Nuestro enfoque regenerativo no solo garantiza productos de alta calidad, sino que también contribuye al equilibrio del ecosistema y al bienestar de quienes consumen nuestra carne.

Name: Dansk Biofiber og Gødning
Description:
Dansk Biofiber og Gødning er dedikeret til at skabe langvarige og holdbare løsninger med omtanke for miljø, klima og samfund.

Vi producerer og laver produkter med udgangspunkt i restprodukter fra landbruget. Siden 2019 har vi arbejdet ud fra et standpunkt om at innovation spiller en stor rolle i at skabe et bæredygtigt ressourceforbrug. Noget vi realiserer gennem vores bioorganiske produkter til brug i gartnerier, landbruget og energisektoren.

Vores arbejde kommer af et tæt samarbejde med biogasanlæg, hvor vi aftager store mængder af restprodukter, som vi upcycler og skaber produkter ud fra. Produkterne laves til vækstmedier og jordforbedringsprodukter som tilføjer en naturlig næring, der går tilbage til de præcis samme industrier som produkterne kommer fra. Processen er altså en cirkulær bioøkonomi, hvor der arbejdes ud fra devisen om at intet er overflødigt, men indgår i en større værdikæde.

Name: Sitaram Forest (Beauty of Eco-Sensitive Area - ESA)
Description:
An Initiative of Sitaram Foundation

 Sitaram Forest – A Gift from Mother Nature 

Nestled in the heart of Kondhari Village, just 20 km from Bhor on the Bhor–Mahad Road, lies Sitaram Forest — a pristine stretch of greenery located near the serene Deoghar backwaters, on the picturesque slopes of Varandha Ghat, an Eco-Sensitive Area.

Sitaram Forest is nature’s untouched treasure, blessed with:

Lush biodiversity of over 5,000 trees and 100+ species, including rare medicinal and herbal plants, Green Gold, Jackfruit, and Karvanda.

Natural water streams flowing on both sides, enriching the forest ecosystem.

A thriving habitat for birds, insects, and native wildlife, making it a peaceful haven for nature lovers and conservationists.

As you walk through the forest, the soothing sounds of chirping birds and rustling leaves offer tranquility for the soul. It’s not just a forest—it’s a living, breathing sanctuary where modern minds reconnect with timeless nature.

Sitaram Forest is more than a destination — it's a journey back to the roots.
A place to slow down, breathe deeply, and rediscover the profound peace and purpose that only Mother Nature can provide.
Location: Sitaram Forest, At Post. Kondhari, Tal. Bhor, Dist. Pune, Maharashtra

Description: We own and operate the farm that's been in our family for over 200 years on almost 400 acres. We raise heritage breeds and grow timber for farming. Belties are the oldest domesticated beef cattle in the world and come from Scotland. Currently we're raising a Wagyu bull to cross with our Belties in 2023. Our pigs are Tamworths, a red breed from England and are known especially for their bacon.

SMADC’s purpose is to support farms and the future of agriculture in Southern Maryland. We are committed to expanding and promoting a viable and profitable agricultural farming community in Southern Maryland. While the primary focus is on the five southern Maryland counties of Anne Arundel, Calvert, Charles, Prince George’s and St. Mary’s, many of its initiatives reach statewide.

SMADC provides vision, support, grants, and marketing & promotion to area farmers. As new farm economies are being formed, SMADC helps to streamline regulations and reduce obstacles.

We believe in developing infrastructure that supports regional food systems where all members of the community can thrive. Our approach is rooted in a commitment to sustainability and environmental stewardship that creates economic opportunities for farmers and strengthens the health of our communities.

We are dedicated to cultivating a food system that is delicious and empowering, one that recognizes the power of agriculture to bring people together and to nourish both body and soul.

Name: NexifyPrime Enterprise
Description:
At NexifyPrime, we are dedicated to nurturing the land and cultivating excellence in agriculture. Our commitment to traditional farming practices is rooted in a deep respect for nature and a passion for producing the highest quality crops.

Our Mission
NexifyPrime aims to provide fresh, nutritious, and sustainably grown produce to our community. We believe in the power of natural farming methods to enhance soil health, protect biodiversity, and ensure the long-term viability of our agricultural ecosystems.

 Our Practices
- Sustainable Farming: We prioritize environmentally friendly practices that preserve the integrity of the land. Our methods include crop rotation, organic fertilization, and water conservation techniques.
- Quality Produce: By adhering to traditional farming techniques, we ensure that our produce is not only fresh and delicious but also rich in nutrients. From planting to harvest, every step is carefully managed to maintain the highest standards of quality.
- Community Engagement: We are committed to supporting our local community through education and outreach. We regularly host farm tours, workshops, and events to share our knowledge and passion for sustainable farming.

 Why Choose NexifyPrime?
- Freshness Guaranteed: Our produce is harvested at the peak of ripeness, ensuring maximum flavor and nutritional value.
- Eco-Friendly: We use natural farming methods that promote environmental health and sustainability.
- Community Focused: We believe in building strong relationships with our customers and contributing to the well-being of our community.

Join us at NexifyPrime, where we are not just growing crops—we are cultivating a sustainable future. Whether you're looking for fresh produce for your family or seeking to learn more about sustainable farming practices, NexifyPrime is your trusted partner.

The ranch consists of 17,500 acres. 6,600 acres are dryland wheat, corn, millet, and fallow. They also farm 900 acres of irrigated grass and alfalfa hay. Pastures account for another 10,000 acres of the ranch.  Their breeding program consists of an extensive artificial insemination (AI) and embryo transfer (ET) program. A group of heifer, steer and bull calves will be handpicked and sold private treaty through the year.

Katie’s first upper level mount, Digger, is now enjoying his retirement at the farm while Katie brings up the next string of stars.

Katie’s educational background in sports medicine has enabled her to better understand her horses and their training needs. Even when she went to college, Katie continued to train and teach. Our coffee is grown in harmony with the forest ecosystem and biodiversity, creating a unique taste and aroma. Our coffee beans are roasted to perfection and blended with various unique combinations to suit your preferences.

We are passionate about coffee and its culture, and we want to share our love for this beverage with everyone. Whether you prefer filter coffee, espresso, cappuccino or latte, we have a blend that suits your taste buds. Our coffee is low in acidity, rich in aroma and smooth in flavor.



At Canopy Kaapi, we believe in quality, sustainability and customer satisfaction. We deliver our products directly from our estates and planters to your doorstep, ensuring freshness and authenticity. We also offer trial packs, discounts and free shipping for our loyal customers.
We believe that coffee is more than just a beverage. It is a way to connect with people, to share stories, and to create memories. We are passionate about coffee, and we are committed to providing our customers with an exceptional coffee experience.
If you are looking for a coffee or tea brand that cares about nature, quality and you, look no further than Canopy Kaapi. Follow us on LinkedIn to get updates on our products, offers and events. You can also visit our website  or contact us at kaapitalks@canopykaapi.com for more information.

We hope you enjoy our products as much as we enjoy making them for you.

Name: Cooperativa HVSU
Description:
In our cooperative, a group of 15 founding members and 62 farmer members have come together with a common mission: to cultivate and promote the excellence of ginger and turmeric. With a strong agricultural tradition, we take pride in being part of the Rio Tambo community in Junín, where 50% of our members are natives of this rich and fertile region.
Our farmers manage extensive hectares dedicated to growing ginger and turmeric, products renowned for their exceptional quality and flavor. We strive to implement sustainable practices that benefit not only our crops but also our environment, strengthening the local economy.
In our cooperative, we aim not only to generate income but also to foster solidarity among our members. We share knowledge and resources to continuously improve our agricultural techniques. We are committed to the development of our community, ensuring that all our members have the opportunity to thrive.

Our mission is to strengthen and enrich the ginger and turmeric industry in the Río Tambo region of Junín by promoting the integral development of the value chain. We work closely with native communities, ensuring that more than 50% of our members are indigenous. We implement sustainable strategies that ensure the quality of our products and the well-being of our communities.

To be the leading cooperative in the production and marketing of ginger and turmeric, recognized for our commitment to quality, sustainability, and social development. We aspire to transform the industry through innovation, respect for the environment, and the inclusion of local communities in the production process.

Description:

Auf knapp 1.000 Metern Seehöhe in Kärnten bieten wir dir einen besonderen Ort, um loszulassen, durchzuatmen und neue Energie zu tanken. Unser liebevoll renovierter Bergbauernhof mit zwei Wohneinheiten für jeweils 1-2 Personen ist ein Ort zum Ankommen bei dir selbst.

 Natur & Stille: Alleinlage, unbewohnt mit Weitblick über das Tal und die Berge.
 Erholung & Balance: Sauna, Fitnessraum und gemütliche Rückzugsorte.
 Selfcare & Coaching: Auswahl an Selbsthilfebüchern. Optional begleiten wir dich mit Impulsen zu Stressmanagement, Achtsamkeit und Mental Health.
 Besonderes Extra: Musikinstrumente (ePiano, Gitarre und Cajon) in jeder Wohnung.
 Faire Preise: Eine Auszeit soll sich jeder leisten können. Ab 40€ pro Nacht.

Ob allein oder zu zweit – hier findest du die Freiheit, dich zurückzuziehen, dich selbst neu zu spüren und Kraft für dein Leben und Arbeiten zu sammeln. Nur für den Fall: Vierbeiner können bei uns leider keine Auszeit machen.

Name: EcoAgnov
Description:
EcoAgnov is a sustainability-focused and social impact-first enterprise committed to advancing food security and sustainability in Africa. As an impact venture of Threshold Travels and Investment Limited, we specialize in agroforestry, sustainable beekeeping, and tree value-chain development.
At the heart of our work is a strong belief in the power of nature-based solutions. Through our growing network of demonstration farms, we operate advanced tree nurseries with a capacity to raise over 500,000 native and economic tree species to support small and large-scale tree planting initiatives annually, alongside thriving agroforestry plots and eco-friendly beekeeping training and processing units. These hubs serve as innovation and learning centers for thousands of farmers, students, and community members.
We provide technical and business support to rural farmers to establish productive agroforestry systems Our beekeeping programs increase income through honey production an 
 educate farmers on sustainable honey harvesting methods that protect pollinators and prevent deforestation.
To date, in partnership with individuals, nonprofits, and development actors, we are supporting the growth and restoration of over one million trees, playing a vital role in land regeneration, biodiversity conservation, and climate resilience.
At EcoAgnov, we are always open to collaboration with local and international development organizations, foundations, and businesses to co-design and implement high-impact, socially responsible projects that align with our mission.
 To collaborate with us or learn more, email ecoagnov@gmail.com.

We are a customer-centric brand that provide exceptional customer experience and retain new clientele through our unique value proposition. 

our  process is creative and innovative on what we use to drive a wide range of products in our industry while creating employment opportunities for our young people. We operate with high level of integrity, and ensure our mode of operations are transparent and our product quality traceable to inspire trust and confidence. 

We have over the years supported companies, restaurants and cafes, Families and individuals with quality chicken and eggs that has helped them achieve their protein needs.

Our vision guides everything we do – to be the best and most respected company in our industry, creating the opportunity of a food secure society and better future.

Our mission statement is to become an impact driven Agri-food Company with a diverse portfolio of animal protein contributing to our food system and always striving to feed the future by creating an inclusive agribusiness ecosystem of nutritious food for all.

Name: Ibi Tech
Description:
BI TECH es una empresa peruana, con protocolos únicos consistente en formalismos de crecimiento acelerado de Caoba, Cedro, Palo Rosa y otras 30 especies nativas de alto valor maderable.
Contamos con el vivero de caoba más grande del mundo con una de producción anual de (1 millón de plantones).
Sómos una Organización 100% ecológica, nuestros principios se fundamentan en la protección del ambiente, los protocolos que formulamos y los insumos que aplicamos los respaldan. Por lo que, en el manejo de viveros para la germinación de los plantones, la plantación, y el control de plagas, utilizamos insumos 100% naturales libres de químicos.
La materia prima para la producción de nuestros árboles maderables son semillas seleccionadas, trabajamos en áreas de recolección debidamente establecidas, que son usuarias del patrimonio forestal y de fauna silvestre; promoviendo el manejo sostenible con suficiente variabilidad genética para ser consideradas como productoras de semilla de calidad.
Los protocolos utilizados por IBI TECH, son en absoluto respeto y en armonía con la naturaleza, por lo que no trabajamos con clones ya que utilizamos las semillas para no perder la variabilidad genética.

Name: AGROTEF                                                               Agropecuária Tocando em Frente
Description:
Somos uma empresa com mais de 100 anos de tradição agropecuária, passada de pai para filho, e, se há algo que aprendemos trabalhando duro nestas mais de três gerações no agronegócio, é que eficiência e sustentabilidade são pilares fundamentais para a construção de uma empresa de sucesso. Aliando tecnologia a raízes sólidas, contamos com uma equipe de consultores altamente especializados, além de parcerias estratégicas com grandes grupos do agronegócio afim de estimular o desenvolvimento tecnológico e sustentável do setor.
Temos uma visão consolidada a respeito da integração do meio-ambiente com a alta produtividade rural. Entendemos que a conservação ambiental é indispensável quando pensamos em eficiência a longo prazo.
Além disso, seguimos o lema “terra é sempre terra”. Em outras palavras, entendemos que o maior patrimônio do fazendeiro não são os animais que cria ou aquilo que planta, mas sim o que está debaixo de tudo isso, destacando em seu modus operandi o respeito ao ciclo de crescimento das forrageiras e a adoção das melhores práticas em correção de solo de modo a evitar o desgaste pelo uso continuado.
A AGROTEF, ou Agropecuária Tocando Em Frente, acredita num modelo de negócios dinâmico, disposto a absorver as constantes mudanças da modernização, sem perder os pilares fundamentais de antigamente.

Name: Bhagachasi Farmer Producer Company Lilited
Description:
Bhagachasi Farmer Producer Company Limited
Grow Pure • Eat Pure • Earn Pure

Bhagachasi FPC Ltd is building Odisha’s first complete farm-to-kitchen community farming ecosystem — a transparent, member-owned model where families regain control over their food, health, and land. We believe purity cannot be bought from markets; purity must be grown on your own land.

We help members purchase freehold farmland units and then manage 100% of the farming for them. Using natural, cow-based, chemical-free methods, Bhagachasi grows vegetables, fruits, spices, fish, eggs, and chicken — all delivered directly to member families with full traceability. Surplus harvest is sold through community, retail, and online channels, creating additional income for members.

Our vision is simple: restore pure food, sustainable farming, and land ownership to every family.
Supported by agencies like SFAC, NABARD, NCDC, APEDA, ICAR, and State Agriculture Departments, Bhagachasi operates with scientific guidance, transparency, and community-first values.

Current Projects:
• Sandal Nest (Phase 1 & 2) — 2000 sq.ft units with sandalwood trees, desi chicken, and haldi farming.
• Vegetable Village — 10,000 sq.ft vegetable units with multi-season natural farming.
• Fish Paradise — 1-acre scientific fish ponds with integrated duck farming.

Why Members Join:
• Pure vegetables, eggs, chicken, fish, rice, dal, spices
• Farmland legally registered in their name
• 0% tax on agricultural income
• Weekly member delivery (city activation at 200+ families)
• Dashboard monitoring, surplus income, and long-term agro-wealth
• Shareholding, dividend, and voting rights in the FPC

Bhagachasi is not a retail brand — it is a farming movement uniting families who value purity, nature, and community.
Our mission is to make pure food a daily reality and farming a respected, profitable, and sustainable lifestyle for generations.

Vi hjælper vores kunder med at identificere og implementere løsninger, der reducerer CO₂-udledningen og fremmer CO₂-neutralitet. Dette inkluderer rådgivning om energieffektivisering, anvendelse af vedvarende energikilder og optimering af processer for at minimere miljøpåvirkningen.

Inden for landbruget kombinerer vi kortlægning af markdrift, identifikation af ineffektive områder og implementering af vildtvenlige tiltag for at maksimere jagtlejeindtægterne. Vi assisterer med at kortlægge vildtagre, optimere jagtlejekontrakter og sikre, at GLM-arealer bidrager positivt til både biodiversitet og bundlinje.

Med en passion for naturen og en dyb forståelse for landbrugets udfordringer arbejder vi målrettet på at skabe løsninger, der gavner både miljøet og økonomien.

Name: CRODAROSSA
Description:
Tenuta Crodarossa deve il suo nome al tipico colore rosso della roccia che caratterizza la stratigrafia dei terreni delle Prealpi, in dialetto detta “Croda”.
Vini che parlano bellunese, della roccia rossa delle Prealpi e dello sguardo silente delle Dolomiti: questo è lo spirito che a Colderù di Borgo Valbelluna, a 468 metri sul livello del mare, si traduce in vini di eccellenza e che parlano di montagna.
Accoglienza e convivialità sono i valori di Paolo Remini il mastro vignaiolo di Tenuta Crodarossa che insieme a Martina, Nicole e Andrea ha deciso di intraprendere la strada della viticoltura di montagna.

Paolo e la sua famiglia hanno deciso di preservare il patrimonio ambientale che li circonda scegliendo l’impianto di vitigni resistenti e aderendo all’associazione PIWI INTERNATIONAL, ma anche supportando tra i primi l’associazione del territorio bellunese Consorzio Coste del Feltrino che con un’importante storicità documentata dallo statuto dei vignaioli indipendenti del 1517, tutt’oggi coltiva le pendici ghiaiose del Monte Aurin.

A Aliança Distribuidora iniciou suas atividades em 2004, no ramo de comércio de produtos agropecuários e animais de companhia. Com sede em Mato Grosso, e filial em Rondônia, a empresa conta com uma equipe de vendas externa fixadas nas mais estratégicas regiões e apoio do serviço de televendas.
A empresa tem como missão levar valores para seus clientes, por meio de produtos e atendimento de alta qualidade, com lucratividade e respeito ao meio ambiente. Name: Forest Lidar Ltd
Description:
Forest LiDAR Ltd – Smarter Forestry Through Data You Can Trust
About Us

Forestry is one of the most important industries on earth. It locks up carbon, supports wildlife, and underpins the future of farming, building, and climate resilience. Yet for all its importance, much of the data that drives forestry today still comes from people walking the ground with clipboards, counting trees by eye, and estimating what’s out there.

That worked for a long time. But the industry is changing fast. Pressure is growing to back up decisions with hard evidence – whether that’s proving carbon capture, measuring growth rates, or assessing how a restock is performing.

Forest LiDAR Ltd was set up to make that possible. We bring together drone technology, LiDAR scanning, multispectral and thermal imaging, and artificial intelligence to give forest owners, managers, and contractors clear, reliable data on what’s happening across their sites.

Our goal is simple: to help the forestry sector work smarter, safer, and faster – using accurate data that removes guesswork and supports better decisions on the ground.

 What We Do

Forest LiDAR provides a complete aerial analytics service for forestry and woodland projects across the UK.

We combine four different data sets in one flight:

LiDAR, which gives a 3D map of the ground and canopy

RGB imagery, which provides high-resolution visual mapping

Multispectral imaging, which measures plant health and growth

Thermal imaging, which highlights temperature and moisture variation

By combining these, we can produce an accurate digital model of a forest – from the ground surface right up through the canopy – and use AI to extract key metrics such as:

Stocking density

Tree counts and survival rates

Average height and canopy closure

Plant health (NDVI / NDRE indices)

Carbon and biomass estimates

Thermal anomalies and stress zones

This means a manager or estate forester can see exactly what’s happening across every compartment, with

Name: La Ferme
Description:
Depuis nos premiers pas, notre mission est claire : offrir bien plus que des produits biologiques d’exception. Nous accompagnons les agriculteurs, éleveurs et artisans du sol dans leur quête de sens, de prospérité et de durabilité.

Derrière chaque ferme, il y a des mains rugueuses, des cœurs dévoués, et des rêves parfois oubliés dans le tumulte des défis quotidiens. Alors, nous nous engageons à leur offrir les outils, le savoir-faire et l’accompagnement nécessaires pour transformer leurs efforts en succès durables.

Parce que pour nous, la réussite ne se mesure pas qu’en récoltes ou en chiffres. Elle se mesure au sourire de l’éleveur fier de son troupeau, à la paix intérieure du paysan qui sait qu’il travaille en harmonie avec la nature, et à l’espoir des générations futures.

Avec La Ferme, chaque acteur agricole peut s’épanouir sainement, grandir avec constance, et prospérer dans le respect de la nature.

Daarom stimuleren we activiteiten en projecten die mensen gezamenlijk uitvoeren, in wijken, buurten, op scholen of in projectteams. Natuurlijk speelt de productie en verkoop van gezond en lokaal voedsel een belangrijk rol.
We dragen er zorg voor dat al onze activiteiten bijdragen aan het vergroten van de biodiversiteit.

Hierbij is belangrijk dat iedereen toegang heeft tot gezondene en lokale voeding, al onze deelnemers mogen naar draagkracht bijdragen. Maar De Blije Bodem is meer dan een groentetuin; we zijn hard bezig om van deze plek een groene oase maken, vol van leven en openbaar voor iedereen. Een plek van rust, maar ook van inspiratie & educatie, voor onze nieuwe generaties.

Name: Big Tree Coffee
Description:

Nestled on Big Tree Farm in Kitale, our coffee grows at an altitude of 1,800 meters above sea level, benefiting from consistent rainfall and fertile, reddish-brown soils that make this region a haven for exceptional agriculture.

Name: Koa Timber and Cattle Company
Description:
Koa Timber & Cattle Company is a rugged luxury land, lifestyle, and product brand based in Sheridan, Wyoming, focused on transforming timbered ranches into enduring assets, experiences, and heirloom-quality goods. Koa stands for the grit, dependability, and work ethic of the working West, brought forward in a modern, design-led way across land, cattle, timber, and crafted products.

Who we are
Koa Timber & Cattle Company acquires and partners on timbered ranches and Western properties, combining thoughtful land stewardship with vertically integrated cattle and timber operations. From selective harvest and conservation to premium beef and timber-based products, Koa turns raw land into long-term value and generational legacy.

What we do
Develop and manage ranch, farm, and timberland holdings with a focus on stewardship, productivity, and appreciation.

Integrate cattle and timber into premium offerings, including limited-run beef and high-margin timber products such as furnishings and architectural elements.

Create branded retreats, compounds, and real-estate experiences that reflect Western authenticity and refined comfort.

Who we serve
Koa serves landowners, investors, and families navigating generational land transitions who want to preserve heritage while elevating performance and lifestyle. Koa also serves discerning customers seeking premium beef, timber goods, and Western-inspired spaces that connect them to the land in an intentional way.

Why it matters
As baby boomer landholders pass properties to the next generation, many heirs seek income, prestige, and responsible management without day-to-day operations. Koa provides a trusted, design-forward platform to protect these assets, unlock new value, and build a legacy rooted in land, craftsmanship, and the modern American West.

Name: Kale Pivot
Description:
1996 yılında, çiftçiye ve tarıma değer katma misyonuyla yola çıkan Kale Pivot, bugüne kadar sulama teknolojilerinde öncü bir marka haline gelmiştir. Kurulduğu günden bu yana kalite, dayanıklılık ve yenilikçiliği bir araya getiren Kale Pivot, tarımsal verimliliği artırmak ve çiftçilerin emeklerine güç katmak için çalışır.

Gelişmiş üretim hattı, güçlü mühendislik kadrosu ve Ar-Ge odaklı yapısıyla Kale Pivot, Türkiye’nin tarımsal üretim kapasitesine katkı sunarken, dünya tarımında da güvenle tercih edilen bir marka konumuna ulaşmıştır.

Ürün yelpazemizde;

Dairesel Pivot Sistemleri: Her araziye uyum sağlayan otomatik yapı, eşit su dağılımı ve yüksek verim sağlar.

Lineer Sulama Sistemleri: Geniş ve dikdörtgen tarlalarda suyun verimli kullanılmasını, zaman ve enerji tasarrufunu destekler.

Çok Merkezli Pivot Sistemleri: Geniş ve karmaşık arazilerde aynı anda birden fazla noktadan sulama yaparak maksimum performans sunar.

Her sistemimiz, galvanizli çelik konstrüksiyon yapısı, yüksek teknoloji kontrol panelleri ve otomatik yönetim özellikleriyle tarımsal süreçleri kolaylaştırır.
Kale Pivot sistemleri, suyu doğru yerde ve doğru miktarda kullanarak sürdürülebilir tarımın en önemli araçlarından biridir.

Bugün Türkiye’nin dört bir yanında ve yurt dışında yüzlerce çiftçi, verimliliğini Kale Pivot sistemleriyle artırmaktadır.
Bizim için başarı, yalnızca teknoloji üretmek değil; çiftçilerimizin emeğine destek olmak, her hasatta bereketi çoğaltmaktır.

 Kale Pivot – Emeğe Saygı, Teknolojiyle Verim.

Name: Pacha Nishi
Description:
Restoring Forests, Reviving Traditions, and Renewing Hope

In partnership with Shipibo-Konibo communities, Pacha Nishi is restoring the Amazon Rainforest, safeguarding sacred medicines for future generations, and supporting the ongoing transmission of ancient Indigenous wisdom through education, cultural exchange, and economic opportunity.

Reciprocity
Our work is rooted in the principle of giving back to the earth and the communities that sustain it.

Regeneration
We believe in reviving not only forests, but also cultural practices, traditions, and ecosystems.

Collaboration
Our diverse team unites ancestral knowledge, academic expertise, and community leadership.

Cultural Exchange and Academic Advancement
Pacha Nishi bridges generations and cultures. Shipibo-Konibo youth involved in our projects have the opportunity to pursue graduate degrees at Tarleton University under the mentorship of Dr. Michael Coe, fostering global collaboration and equipping them to lead the future of conservation.

The Amazon is not just the world’s lungs—it’s a living network of culture, medicine, and biodiversity essential to our planet’s survival. Supporting Pacha Nishi means restoring forests, empowering Indigenous communities, and preserving ancient wisdom for future generations.

Sağım Sistemleri ve Soğutma Tanklarında üstün kalite ve başarıya sahip FULLWOOD PACKO, yem karıştırma ve dağıtma vagonları konusunda lider olan FARESIN, gübre yönetimi alanındaki iddialı ürünleri olan JOZ ile yapılanmasını tamamlamıştır.
Fullwood_Packo: Otomatik sağım sistemleri ve süt soğutma tankları’nın imalatında 130 yıllık başarılı bir tarihi geçmişi sahiptir, 70 ülkenin üstünde dünya çapında ürün çeşitleriyle sektöre öncülük etmektedir.
Faresin: Yem karıştırma ve dağıtma vagonlarında Avrupa Birliği çelik standardı ST52’yi kullanır. Bu sebeple ürünleri çok sağlam ve uzun ömürlüdür. Yaptığı araştırma ve geliştirme çalışmaları sonucunda bilinen italyan tasarımlarındaki kusursuzluk Faresin’i konusunda lider yapmıştır.
Joz: Gübre yönetimi konusunda çiftliklerin ihtiyaçlarına kalıcı çözümler için geniş ürün yelpazesine sahiptir. 50 yıldır bu konuda faaliyet göstermektedir. 24 farklı ülkede çiftliklere özel en iyi çözümleri Joz üretmektedir. Bu sebeple sektörde Joz marka Sıyırıcı Sistemlerine büyük talep vardır. Hollanda da her iki çiftlikten biri Joz Gübre Sıyırma Sistemi kullanmaktadır.
Sözkonusu firmalar; ürünlerinin Ülkemiz şartlarına ve Türk çiftçisine en uygun, sorunsuz ve son teknoloji olmasına dikkat edilerek, titiz incelemeler sonucu seçilmiştir. Bu firmaların üstün özelliklere sahip ürünlerine, Türkiye’de özlenen kalite ve servis anlayışı ile Most Modern Süt Teknolojileri A.Ş. ile sahip olacaksanız.

We are proud of our achievements and we invite everyone to learn more and support our missions.

Do you know?
• The global cost of climate change due to natural disaster and disease has reached $300 billion per annum in 2021 and it will rapidly to $3 trillion by 2050.
• There are many entailing but intangible costs and risks on climate change, including loss of lives, famine, poverty and displacement, scarcity of resources and invasive viruses.
• Carbon Dioxide in the atmosphere is the highest in 800,000 years and the Earth is warming 1 degree per hundred years, this is more than 10x faster than its billion years of existence.
• Global temperature has increased 1.1 degree since industrialization (19th century), scientist estimate 1.5 degree of warming as a key tipping point, beyond which the occurrence of flooding, drought, wildfires and food shortage will increase dramatically.
• A 2.0 degree of warming is catastrophic for many species including human, therefore every country is racing toward net zero 2050.
• 42,100 (28%) species out of total 150,388 species are being categorized as endangered or extinct in the past 50 years due to climate change and human exploitation.
• Avoidance can only decelerate warming, but to achieve net zero and eventually reverse the warming temperature, the World needs to see more high quality carbon projects. 
• Investment in the global carbon credit projects is only amounting to $36 billion in the past 10 years, mainly because the myth that environmental-friendly movement are loss-making activities.

Name: Azienda Agricola La Guardia - Fam. Murgia-Garzoglio
Description:
L'idea nasce dalla volontà di mantenere in buono stato i terreni di famiglia da più di 50 anni. 
Il progetto prevede in futuro la produzione di olio extravergine di oliva e di miele millefiori.
Le attività si sono concentrate in progetti senza scopo di lucro per aumentare la consapevolezza della Città di Noli e dei territori circostanti sul mondo delle api e la natura in generale
Le principali iniziative sono:
- progetto “Dal fiore al miele” presso le scuole Bernardo Gandoglia di Noli che si articola in quattro lezioni in classe e una visita in aviario. Il progetto ha ricevuto il patrocinio della Città di Noli per l’anno 2023.
- manifestazione World Bee Day - la danza delle api insieme alla Pro Loco Noli. La manifestazione ha ricevuto il patrocinio della Città di Noli per l’anno 2023.
- progetto orto didattico con le scuole Bernardo Gandoglia, i partecipanti hanno seguito un orto dalla semina dei semi alla raccolta dei frutti, misuranti tempi di nascita dei germogli, altezza delle piante, quantità di acqua consumata. Il progetto ha ricevuto il patrocinio della Città di Noli per l’anno 2023.
- Lotta alla vespa velutina: reazione di una rete di persone per la messa in opera e la gestione di trappole per il contenimento della diffusione della vespa velutina. Il progetto è una partnership con Sfuso Diffuso di Calige Ligure e Pro Loco Noli.

Name: Evergreen Valley Acres
Description:
Evergreen Valley Acres is unlike many small farms. We are similar in the sense that we sustainably grow vegetables using organic practices, and we believe in reconnecting communities and their food system, but that is where the similarities end.We are a mobile farm, which means while we are currently based in NJ with operations in both South and North Jersey, we are set up to be able to move if and when necesarry; whether that is due to changing market demands, to provide education to other areas, or to set up in another community if the need arises. Our growing is split between indoor and outdoor growing, and we focus on nutrient dense specialty produce, including micro-greens, baby vegetables and heirlooms. In addition to this, we are expanding our capabilities, to be able to partner with other farms and local growers to bring other quality, local produce we do not grow (and maybe even meat!) to local markets and restaurants. for this, you will just have to stay tuned!

We are always experimenting with different methods of growing including in-field, greenhouse, mini-house and complete indoor growing. Evergreen Valley Acres is as much a commercial market garden as it is a passion project and an experiment in sustainable food production. 

We hope through our experimentation, and education, we can entice others to join the local agriculture movement, and help them along if necesarry. For right now, we are focusing on building our brand, expanding our knowledge base, bringing education to communites, and specialty produce to our markets and chefs, but who knows, maybe someday you will see us elsewhere! Down south, out west, up north? It all sounds good to us! 

Evergreen Valley Acres is a continually moving work in progress. We hope you will hop on with us and enjoy the ride!

Name: Natural Farming Life LLC
Description:
Welcome to Natural Farming Life LLC , where we champion a revolution in agriculture through #NaturalFarmingLife. Our core mission is to redefine farming by embracing nature’s rhythms, promoting permaculture, biodiversity, and regenerative practices that heal our planet.

 Embrace Nature's Wisdom
Facing environmental challenges from industrial agriculture, we advocate for natural farming. This approach enhances soil health, conserves water, and nurtures biodiversity, leading to a sustainable future under #EcoLiving and #SustainableAgriculture.

 Our Holistic Approach
Combining ancient wisdom with modern science, we push for productive agriculture in harmony with nature. Our initiatives include educational workshops, sharing resources, and collaborations with local farmers to implement sustainable practices.

 Join Our Community
Whether you're a farmer, gardener, or an environmental enthusiast, your involvement makes a difference. As part of our community, you'll learn sustainable living tips and see how collective action can impact our planet.

 Cultivate Change With Us
The path to sustainable agriculture is challenging yet hopeful. Aligning with us means joining a movement toward nurturing the earth. Every follow, share, and like expands our community and amplifies our impact.

Together, we can build a greener, healthier future, highlighting the importance of community and shared vision in driving change. Follow us for updates on our endeavors, success stories, and ways to contribute to the #NaturalFarmingLife revolution. Let’s make the dream of sustainable living a reality, nurturing a legacy of health and harmony for future generations.

#EcoLiving #SustainableAgriculture #RegenerativeFarming #Permaculture #Biodiversity

Name: A&H Fruits Group
Description: Agriculture is one of the key sectors within the Indonesian economy. In the last 50 years, the sector's share in national gross domestic product has decreased considerably, due to the rise of industrialisation and service sector. Nevertheless, for the majority of Indonesian households, farming and plantation remains as a vital income generator. In 2013, the agricultural sector contributed 14.43% to national GDP, a slight decline from 2003's contribution which was 15.19%.[1] In 2012, the agricultural sector provides jobs to approximately 49 million Indonesians, representing 41% of the country's total labor force*.

Name: Raj Estate's & Farm's
Description:
THE GREEN JOURNEY

What is known as Raj Estate's & Farm's today was once a barren land surrounded by dense forest and divided by a small stream.

We had a vision to create a self-sustainable community in this valley by restoring the native flora and fauna and creating an environment where they can thrive. 

The whole area was then developed with the guidance of environmentalists, landscapers, horticulturists to ensure everything is done in the least evasive way.

Today, we are an eco-resort hosting 1 cottage, 1 Sky Room and 1 luxury tents that promise to give you an up close experience of nature.
Perched right next to the Karinja Shiva temple with its rustic meets ravishing ambience blends subtly into its tranquil setting. You’re not just close to nature here – you are bang in the middle of it. The cleverly cantilevered deck on the Ulhas offers jaw-droppingly beautiful views across the forest around. The glamps at this Farm front location come with queen-sized beds, hammocks and a swing to dip your toes into the water. As if that wasn’t comfortable enough, Raj Estates also has a cottage with a cool collection of books, live band, movie nights under the stars and Karaoke.

Name: Salamis Farms
Description:
ABOUT US
Salamis Farms is a pioneer in the farm-to-table movement, dedicated to delivering the freshest, organic produce directly from our fields to your table. Situated in the heart of lush agricultural land, we embrace sustainable farming practices that prioritize the health of our consumers, our community, and our environment.

MISSION
Our mission is to cultivate high-quality, organic produce while promoting sustainable farming techniques that respect the natural ecosystem. We are committed to enhancing the farm-to-table experience by ensuring that every product we offer is fresh, nutritious, and responsibly grown.

What We Offer
FARM-TO-TABLE: Excellence: We bridge the gap between farm and table by delivering fresh, organic produce directly to local markets, restaurants, and consumers. Our commitment ensures you enjoy the best nature has to offer, straight from our fields.
CERTIFIED ORGANIC PRODUCE: All our products are certified organic, free from synthetic pesticides, herbicides, and genetically modified organisms (GMOs). We grow our crops using natural methods that enhance soil health and biodiversity.
COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT: We believe in fostering a strong connection with our community. Through educational programs, farm tours, and local partnerships, we aim to educate and inspire others about the benefits of organic farming and sustainable living.
SUSTAINABILITY: Environmental stewardship is at the core of our operations. We utilize renewable energy, practice water conservation, and employ crop rotation and cover cropping to maintain soil fertility and reduce our carbon footprint.
Website: http://www.salamisfarms.com

Visit Us: Experience the farm-to-table difference first-hand by visiting Salamis Farms. Our farm is open for tours and visits by appointment.

Our goats produce milk, excesses of which provide cheese, yogurt, butter, soap and so much more. Bees produce honey and honeycomb and help keep our gardens and orchards healthy. We plant using a combination of techniques that leverage indigenous practices and agroforestry concepts as understood from best practices by the USDA's local extension program.

Name: Toasty Float
Description:
We’re dedicated to solving the everyday challenges farmers and ranchers face, especially those they may not even realize exist. Based in the heart of an agricultural community, we understand the value of time, money, and safety. Our mission is to make life easier for the hardworking individuals who keep the world fed.

Our flagship product, the Toasty Float, eliminates the hassle of breaking ice in water tanks during the winter. With a simple design, it’s portable, affordable, and easy to set up—saving time and money so farmers and ranchers can focus on what matters most, like family, hobbies, or the work that drives their operation forward.

We’re not just about convenience—we’re also about safety and sustainability. By maintaining liquid water, the Toasty Float reduces the need for trips into cold, wet pastures, helping to prevent accidents. Plus, fewer trips mean lower carbon emissions, making our solution as good for the planet as it is for your operation.

Whether you’re a small family farm or a large dairy operation, we’re here to help you simplify your winter chores and focus on what really matters.

Name: IberOvino
Description:
Villalpando, 27 de diciembre 2022
● El Consorcio de Promoción del Ovino y Grupo Ibereólica Renovables, a través de 
su filial Ibereólica Solar Castilla, S.L , han anunciado hoy la firma de un acuerdo de 
colaboración para cooperaren el desarrollo del proyecto Iberovino.
«Estamos encantados de colaborar con el Consorcio de Promoción del Ovino en el 
desarrollo conjunto del proyecto Iberovino» ha dicho Gregorio Álvarez, presidente y 
fundador de Grupo Ibereólica Renovables. «Confío en que este acuerdo, ligado a 
nuestro proyecto híbrido eólico solar Villamayor, sirva igualmente para que ambos 
podamos concretar el futuro desarrollo de un Complejo Interprofesional ligado a las 
actividades del Ovino, una Smart Farm y un Centro de Revalorización del estiércol y la 
lana, que mejore las condiciones del sector del ovino en Tierra de Campos, además de 
impulsar la calidad de vida de los vecinos de Villamayor de Campos y Santa Eufemia del 
Arroyo. 
Para Benjamín Fernández Anta, presidente del Consejo Rector del Consorcio, “Iberovino 
está vinculado a la viabilidad del proyecto híbrido eólico solar Villamayor, define un 
marco de confianza y ayuda mutua entre Ibereólica y el Consorcio, y crea un modelo de 
colaboración que para nosotros debería contribuir al desarrollo de actividades en el 
ovino que nosotros consideramos esenciales para el futuro del sector”.
