Name: Biodistretto dei Laghi di Bracciano e Martignano
Description:
Il Biodistretto dei Laghi di Bracciano e Martignano è un'organizzazione dedicata alla promozione e alla valorizzazione delle attività agricole, artigianali e ambientali all'interno della zona dei Laghi di Bracciano e Martignano. Il comitato è costituito da rappresentanti di istituzioni locali, associazioni, produttori, artigiani e altre figure interessate allo sviluppo sostenibile del territorio.
 
Le sue principali attività includono la promozione dei prodotti locali attraverso la creazione di reti di distribuzione corta, la partecipazione a fiere e eventi, la collaborazione con ristoranti e attività commerciali per l'utilizzo dei prodotti del territorio, e l'organizzazione di mercati contadini. Il Biodistretto promuove inoltre l'educazione alimentare attraverso progetti nelle scuole e visite guidate alle aziende agricole.
 
Dal punto di vista ambientale, il comitato si impegna nella tutela dell'ambiente attraverso pratiche agricole sostenibili, la promozione dell'agricoltura biologica e la conservazione delle risorse naturali del territorio. Inoltre, promuove la salute attraverso la distribuzione di cibo locale biologico alle mense scolastiche ed ospedaliere, incoraggiando uno stile di vita salutare basato su prodotti freschi e di qualità.
 
In generale, il Biodistretto dei Laghi di Bracciano e Martignano svolge un ruolo chiave nella promozione e nella sostenibilità delle attività agricole, artigianali e ambientali nel territorio circostante i Laghi di Bracciano e Martignano, contribuendo alla crescita economica e al benessere della comunità locale.

Name: Healthy Cow
Description:
Healthy Cow Products Aps er et datterselskab til Dyrlæger & Ko. Dyrlæger & Ko er ejet af ca. 70 kvægdyrlæger fordelt på 23 dyrlægepraksis på tværs af Danmark. 
Dyrlæger & Kos praksisser beskæftiger mere end 130 kvægdyrlæger og besøger over 50% af de danske malkekvægsbedrifter. I 2023 besluttede ejerkredsen i Dyrlæger & Ko, at tiden var moden til at realisere visionen om dyrlæge-udviklede produkter. Derfor opstod Healthy Cow.
Healthy Cow er baseret i Agro Food Park sammen med mere end 100 andre ambitiøse virksomheder, der arbejder i landbrug- og fødevarebranchen. Du kan læse mere om vores vision herunder. 

Healthy Cow Products er skabt både for dyrlægens og landmandens skyld. 

For dyrlægen:
For at kunne yde effektfuld rådgivning, skal dyrlægerne have adgang til et produktsortiment der understøtter den.
Tidsbesparende: Dyrlægen skal ikke bruge tid på at undersøge alle tilgængelige produkter på markedet. Ved selv at være en del af produktudviklingen ved dyrlægen hvad der virker inden for diverse produktkategorier. 
Dyrlægen kan stå inde for produkternes kvalitet (faglighed) og sørger for de er i markedet til den rette pris (troværdighed).
Dyrlægens faglige niveau bliver højere af, at kende til de forskellige produkter og deres effekt.

For landmanden:
Landmanden kan være sikker på, at han får de produkter der virker. 
Ved tvivlsspørgsmål om hvilke produkter der skal købes kan man nu få rådgivning hos sin dyrlæge. 
I sidste ende betyder det, at den tid man før har brugt på at tvivle på hvilket produkt man skulle købe nu kan bruges på noget mere fornuftigt.
Store ambitioner: Vores dyrlæger vil blive ved med at udvikle produkter. Og selvfølgelig også holde vores eksisterende produkter opdaterede. 
Det er målet, at produkterne på sigt skal bruges aktivt i sundhedsrådgivningen. 
Vi sigter mod et bredere produktsortiment, så behøver DU nemlig kun at handle et sted.

Websted
www.healthycow.dk

La Société de Développement des Projets Communautaires(SODEPC) est une entreprise de développement des projets, de production et commercialisation des produits à grande échelle dans les secteurs de l'agriculture, de la pêche et de l'élevage. 
Le but de la SODEPC est d’œuvrer pour l’augmentation des capacités de production et la qualité des produits des secteurs de l’agriculture, de la pêche et de l’élevage à travers l’apport des moyens techniques et la facilitation de la commercialisation de ces produits à travers le monde. 

La SODEPC apporte une réponse aux besoins immenses des producteurs industriels en Afrique et dans le monde en matière de produits bruts issus des secteurs de l'agriculture, de la pisciculture et de l'élevage. 

Nous disposons des moyens logistiques et d'une capacité de production adaptative nous permettant de nous déployer et de pouvoir servir l'ensemble de nos clients et partenaires. 

La SODEPC a pour objectif :
•d'accroitre les réserves des produits agricoles, de la pêche et de l’élevage. 
•Contribuer à l’épanouissement individuel et collectif de tous ses partenaires nationaux ou internationaux ;
•Participer et promouvoir développement des projets communautaires 
•promouvoir le collectif de participation aux projets de développement 
•Promouvoir l’accompagnement technique participatif aux projets agropastoraux  
•Encourager ses partenaires à entretenir une atmosphère de franche collaboration;
•Œuvrer pour le développement de ses partenaires;
•Accompagner et développer les compétences des agriculteurs, éleveurs et pêcheurs.

Les valeurs de la SODEPC reposent sur la disponibilité permanente des ressources, la satisfaction de nos clients et l'impact positif apporté à nos partenaires.

Name: Romzelag
Description:
Romzelag SRL is an agricultural company based in Sibiu County, Romania, with farming operations located in Dealu Frumos and Veseud. With almost 25 years of experience, we specialize in sustainable livestock management and organic crop production.
Our activity focuses on raising certified Angus cattle and producing organic feed crops, ensuring a fully integrated and environmentally responsible farming system.

Certified by ECOINSPECT – RO-ECO-008, Romzelag follows the highest standards of organic agriculture, emphasizing animal welfare, soil health, and long-term sustainability.
Our farms operate within the Natura 2000 protected area, a region known for its rich biodiversity and ideal natural conditions for ecological farming.

Our mission is to combine tradition and innovation in agriculture, maintaining the authenticity of local farming practices while continuously improving efficiency and sustainability through modern technology and responsible resource management.

We collaborate with local and international partners in the food and agriculture sectors, promoting high-quality Angus beef, sustainable feed production, and environmentally friendly farming solutions.

At Romzelag, we believe that real quality begins in the field — with respect for nature, for our animals, and for the people who make it all possible.

At Old Three Wagyu, we are Striving for the Irreplaceable—raising 100% Fullblood Japanese Black Wagyu with a commitment to excellence rooted in our 5C values: Core Values, Competence, Character, Communication, and Community.

Our breeding program blends proven Japanese bloodlines, cutting-edge genetic science, and generations of ranching stewardship to produce cattle that stand among the finest in the world. We intentionally focus on premium Wagyu genetics—balancing pedigree, phenotype, and performance to achieve elite marbling, tenderness, and flavor.

From our home in the birthplace of Texas, we serve breeders, beef producers, and discerning buyers who value authenticity, traceability, and results. Whether you are expanding your herd, improving carcass quality, or sourcing premium beef, we deliver cattle that embody the word Irreplaceable.

Specialties:

Fullblood Wagyu Breeding & Genetics

Japanese Black Tajima Bloodlines

SCD & Tenderness Scoring, EBV & EPD Data

Premium Beef Production

Christian Values-Based Ranching

Washington County, Texas – Investing in the Irreplaceable for today, tomorrow, and generations to come.

Name: Pikho Farms
Description:
Pikho Farms is a leading tree nursery in Malawi with over 10 years of experience in producing high-quality fruit and non-fruit seedlings. We’ve earned a strong reputation for excellence, consistently exceeding customer expectations.

In 2024, Pikho Farms became the first nursery in Malawi to be subcontracted to supply two million Miombo tree seedlings—a major milestone in the country’s reforestation efforts. Our nurseries are located across Malawi, with the main site in Chitedze, Lilongwe. We grow key Miombo species like Brachystegia, Julbernardia, and Isoberlinia, along with agroforestry trees such as Gliricidia sepium, Faidherbia albida, and Albizia varieties.

We also operate Malawi’s largest fruit tree nursery, offering a wide range of species including mangoes, oranges, tangerines, peaches, grapes, plums, Hass avocados, apples, dwarf pawpaws, granadilla passion fruit, and more.

To scale sustainably, Pikho Farms partners with women and youth-led groups across the country. These farmers receive hands-on training in nursery management and quality control, guided by our founder, Ms. @Pilirani Khoza 

With a proven track record, scalable operations, and a community-driven model, Pikho Farms is well-positioned for investment in sustainable agriculture, climate resilience, and rural empowerment

Name: Sustainable Forestry and Land Retention Project

The SFLRP helps families in Roanoke Cooperative’s service territory and a growing number of other North Carolina counties increase the income and asset value of family-owned forestland. It also encourages forest health, land retention and the opportunity to create intergenerational wealth. The SFLRP is an equal opportunity provider and has broken historic barriers for African-American landowners, many of whom did not have prior access to knowledge of forestry, agriculture, conservation, technical assistance, capital through U.S. Department of Agriculture programs, and attorneys for estate planning.

Name: TEXAS AGRIFORESTRY SMALL FARMERS, RANCHERS, and Landowners (TASFRL)
Description:
Established in 2017, Texas AgriForestry Small Farmers, Ranchers, and Landowners (TASFRL) is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization rooted in East Texas’ verdant Piney Woods bioregion a region celebrated for its rich timber resources, fertile soils, and enduring agricultural traditions.

As a grassroots coalition of both new and seasoned farmers, ranchers, and landowners, TASFRL unites diverse perspectives and shared values to advance sustainable and regenerative land stewardship. Our community represents the heart of rural Texas — people who understand that caring for the land means investing in the future.

TASFRL is dedicated to empowering small producers, especially those from historically underserved communities, through practical education, access to essential resources, collaborative networks, and the promotion of environmentally responsible and economically resilient agricultural and forestry practices.

At TASFRL, we believe that true sustainability starts at the roots in the soil, in our people, and in our collective commitment to nurture the land that sustains us all. Together, we are cultivating environmental responsibility, economic opportunity, and thriving rural communities for generations to come.

Our team of experts uses the latest techniques in farming to produce high-quality crops with minimal environmental impact. From organic farming to hydroponics and vermicompost, we specialize in cultivating a variety of fruits and vegetables that are free from harmful chemicals and pesticides.

In addition to our farming expertise, we also help urban farmers in setting up terrace gardens for sustainable living. We believe that anyone, regardless of their location, can benefit from having access to fresh, healthy produce at their doorstep. Our team guides you right through the process of setting up a terrace garden, from choosing the right plants to maintaining them.

Our mission at Faguni Farms is to promote sustainable living by providing fresh, healthy food and promoting environmentally-friendly agricultural practices. Name: Geprocar
Description:
Este Grupo Operativo busca aportar soluciones a la problemática asociada a la actividad ganadera en cuanto a su alto impacto en la huella de carbono provocada por la gestión del ganado y la gestión agrícola en la producción de pastos. En la composición del grupo operativo participa CLAS (Central Lechera Asturiana) y COAPA (Unión de cooperativas agroalimentarias de Asturias) como representantes del sector lácteo y responsables de la difusión del proyecto. El consorcio se complementa y coordina por la Fundación CETEMAS (Centro Tecnológico y de la Madera), por su especialización en el desarrollo de herramientas de gestión del territorio, de aplicación en proyectos de sostenibilidad ambiental en el ámbito del sector primario. 

En este proyecto se desarrollarán diferentes algoritmos basados en datos de sensores remotos con el objetivo de obtener una base cartográfica sólida para la gestión sostenible de la propiedad agroforestal. De éste modo, se trabajará en la detección automática de tipologías de cobertura, deficiencias de nitrógeno y cuantificación del stock de carbono, que servirán de base para la toma de decisiones en materia de mitigación y adaptación al cambio climático, a través del manejo de los sistemas forestales, silvopastorales, pastizales y la dinamización de prácticas de gestión conjunta de la propiedad.

Name: Urban Family Farmers Group- UFC - SAF
Description:
KEY FACTS:
Family farms occupy around 70-80% of farmland worldwide.
Women hold only 15%.
More than 90% of farms are run by an individual or a family who rely primarily on family labor
# Family farmers are the agents of change we need to achieve Zero Hunger
# Concept of Family Farming -

Family Farming (including all family-based agricultural activities) is a means of organizing agricultural, forestry, fisheries, pastoral and aquaculture production that is managed and operated by a family, and is predominantly reliant on the family labour of both women and men. The family and the farm are linked, co-evolve and combine economic, environmental, social and cultural functions. "With the launch of the United Nations Decade of Family Farming (2019-2028), FAO and IFAD reiterate our determination and commitment to support concerted actions to fullfill the ambitions of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development, and to step up interventions for a healthy, resilient and sustainable food system."
DO YOUR BIT! BIG OR SMALL, EVERY BIT COUNTS!
Let us put family farming at the center to lead this transformation for this decade and beyond.

Family farmers play a critical role in making agri-food systems more inclusive, sustainable, resilient, and effective. According to the FAO (2014), family farming employs 30% of the global workforce and accounts for over 80% of global food production. They also serve as custodians of biodiversity, landscapes, and cultural heritage. According to Lowder, Sánchez, and Bertini (2019), there are more than 600 million family farms in the globe today, with more than 98 percent of them occupying less than 20 hectares (HLPE, 2013).

Family farmers are among those most impacted by poverty and vulnerability, despite playing a crucial role in reforming agri-food systems to feed the globe sustainably (FAO, 2020). Name: Rogue Reconnaissance
Description:
Rogue Reconnaissance is at the vanguard of environmental innovation, specializing in Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS) technology. Our mission is to harness the power of cutting-edge aerial solutions like LiDAR and multispectral imaging to address critical environmental challenges. With a focus on forestry management, conservation, and wildfire suppression, our technology provides unparalleled insights into natural landscapes and ecosystems.

We combine precision mapping, advanced data analysis, and real-time monitoring to deliver comprehensive solutions that aid in sustainable resource management, environmental impact assessments, and disaster response. Our commitment to sustainability is matched by our dedication to safety and efficiency, ensuring that our technology not only enhances environmental stewardship but also safeguards the communities and professionals working in these vital sectors.

At Rogue Reconnaissance, we’re more than just a tech company; we are a team of environmental advocates, innovators, and problem-solvers dedicated to making a tangible difference in the world. Join us as we continue to explore new horizons in environmental management and contribute to a healthier, more sustainable planet.

Name: Haleakalā Biochar

Located high on the slopes of Haleakalā, since 2020 our family-run business has committed to making the highest quality biochar and value added products to promote a circular economy on Maui.  We  provide Maui-made biochar for agricultural producers, home gardeners, land restoration projects, and stormwater filtration projects, and in the aftermath of the Maui wildfires, soil remediation. 

Long-time Upcountry residents, our professional background is in native habitat restoration, soil rehabilitation, and sustainable business strategy. 

We’ve learned over the years that restoration starts from the ground up. So, building healthy soil is the first step.

Learn more at www.haleakalabiochar.com

Name: Primar-IA
Description:
PrimarIA es tu lonja digital. Una plataforma creada para transformar la manera en que los productores del sector primario venden sus productos, conectándolos de forma directa con comercializadoras y distribuidores, y ayudándoles a tomar mejores decisiones de venta a través de datos.

En un sector que ha quedado rezagado tecnológicamente, los pequeños productores suelen depender de llamadas, contactos informales o negociaciones poco transparentes para colocar su producción. Esto genera pérdida de poder de negociación, bajos márgenes y una falta total de visibilidad del mercado.

Nuestra plataforma digital centraliza las ofertas de las distintas comercializadoras y, mediante un sistema de recomendaciones automatizadas, sugiere al productor a quién vender su producto en función de variables como precio, calibre, volumen y condiciones de venta. No hace falta tener conocimientos técnicos: el sistema es intuitivo, rápido y está pensado para facilitar el día a día del productor.

PrimarIA nace con una visión clara: empoderar al sector primario español —agrícola, ganadero y pesquero— para que sea más competitivo, rentable y sostenible. A largo plazo, queremos ser la plataforma de referencia en compraventa inteligente de productos primarios, y construir una comunidad digital donde los productores puedan acceder a mejores condiciones, compartir información y generar impacto real.

Lo que cultivas, crías o extraes merece el mejor valor. Nosotros te ayudamos a conseguirlo.

Description: We launched our cattle company in 2021 in the middle of the pandemic. We wanted to do something with purpose and something that filled a very basic need. We embrace the rhythms of nature, teaching time-honored skills in gardening, herbalism, crafting, and fiber arts, empowering you to live abundantly from the land. Our small farm and ranch principles equip you to build a thriving home-based business, selling homemade and homegrown products with integrity.

More than just imparting practical skills, we nurture the character qualities that fortify faith and forge an enduring legacy. As you home-educate your children through life skills training, we partner with you in instilling values that will bear fruit for generations to come.

At Prairie Dust Trail, we believe in the beauty of a life deeply rooted - in Scripture, in self-sufficiency, and in the rich soil that sustains us. Join us as we sow seeds of purposeful living, one season at a time.

Name: Bee Oasis Costa Rica
Description:
"Bee Oasis Costa Rica: A Haven for Melipona Bees and Organic Coffee"  

Nestled in Palmares, "Bee Oasis Costa Rica" is a sanctuary for "Melipona bees", stingless pollinators vital to local ecosystems. Their "medicinal honey", long valued for its antibacterial properties, thrives in this carefully cultivated environment.  

Part of "Torunes Farm", an "organic coffee plantation", Bee Oasis is dedicated to "sustainable agriculture and bee conservation". The farm meticulously maps the "bloom cycles" of trees, flowering plants, and vines, ensuring continuous nourishment for its expanding "Melipona colonies". Neighboring farms are encouraged to join the initiative, creating a "regional network of bee-friendly habitats".  

By integrating "regenerative farming practices", Torunes Farm enhances both "coffee quality and pollination", proving that agriculture and conservation can work hand in hand. Partnering with "SoulGives", Bee Oasis raises awareness about "pollinators’ crucial role" and the unique benefits of Melipona honey.  

Whether you’re a coffee lover, a nature enthusiast, or a bee advocate, **Bee Oasis Costa Rica offers a glimpse into the future of sustainable farming**—where biodiversity, community, and environmental stewardship thrive together.

Our goal is not limited to cultivating tree farms ponds,we are also taking useful trees from ecosystem with threatened biodiversity or that is going extinct in certain local or urban habitats and reintroducing them to that ecosystem and new locations across the world while also helping the community and promoting active participation in tree farming for climate change and the sdg.          

Also our interest is to get more people who loves trees and tree crop farmers to participate in this project,learn and grow has many trees has possible. 

Tree farm operations runs a program called tree crop diversity and mix crop culture which provides support and help to the ecosystem and local farmers in more ways you can think of through partnerships and volunteer.

Name: PoHu Agri Solution Lab
Description:
PoHu Agri-Solution Lab
We Learn | We Endure | We Deliver

For the first time, we the Agri science specialists, with diverse Agri competencies converge towards enabling an agricultural ecosystem specialised in figuring out step wise plan to enable Organic Farming Substainbility [We are not against chemical farming, BUT against Chemical usage beyond "Human Consumption Limits" or "Soil Consumption Limits"  . A platform created that sets the context for collaborations towards a common purpose of solving an identified problem of the stakeholder in the Indian Agriculture Value Chain.

 Why? and how? the PoHu Agri Solution Lab came into existence - Its a journey Not an overnight "Problem-Solution" - thus, our product is Indian Agriculture Value Chain systamically chisselled into 3 phases with each phase having both Online & Offline Milestones & goals integrated to achieve a common purpose of enabling a value chain that creates sustainability models for :-
1) Food Security & Safety for all Indian Consumers
2) Optimize Resource utilizations with AI-predictive generated models for reducing wastages
3) Deliver Technical & Executional Assistance in Organic Farming Sustainability 
4) Build a comprehensive "Sales Ecosystem"

 This much-needed cohesion provides a platform that enables Academicians, Agri-Input Stalwarts and infra stalwarts, government institutions, and non-profit FPOs, Leaders of the various parts of the value chain such as Farmers, Customers, Logistics, Mills, and Cold Storage & Pack-Houses to deliver cutting edge Solutions to the problems currently present in the Indian Agriculture Value chain

 
We stand by you in every step of our collective intent aimed at delivering towards PROACTIVE away from the conventional REACTIVE agricultural practices. The only certain way to experience the world of organic agriculture with precisions and no more excuses is to fuse professional service standards to the unconventional Indian agriculture ecosystem.

Name: LAB paysan
Description:
Paysans, nous vivons concrètement, le réchauffement climatique, nous le subissons. La nature souffre. L’avenir est incertain.

L’agroécologie, développée largement sur notre territoire est la seule perspective d’espoir. En effet, les exploitations en agroécologie sont plus résilientes pour faire face aux impacts du changement climatique. L’action collective est le seul moyen que nous avons à notre disposition.

C’est pourquoi nous avons créé ce « Farm Lab » : lieu d’échanges, de réflexions, d’expérimentations sur notre ferme, pour accueillir les acteurs de ce changement : citoyen-ne-s, agriculteur-trice-s, associations et institutions, afin d’expérimenter et de mettre en pratique le changement que nous voulons voir sur notre territoire pour répondre aux enjeux du climat et de la biodiversité.

Name: Agrotechnika Vaněk s.r.o.
Description:
AGROTECHNIKA Vaněk s.r.o. působí na trhu od roku 1994, kdy se její aktivity postupně profilovaly až do dnešní podoby. Dnes patří mezi významné prodejce zemědělské (ovíječky, lisy, přepravníky balíků, Cambridge válce, rotavátory, cisterny MEPROZET..atd) a lesní techniky (drapáky, klembanky, vyvážecí vleky, traktory..atd.) v České a Slovenské republice. Abychom byli schopni vyhovět, co nejširšímu okruhu zákazníků, neustále naše služby a sortiment zkvalitňujeme a rozšiřujeme. Našim klientům poskytujeme komplexní služby, včetně dopravy strojů, záručního i pozáručního servisu, prodej náhradních dílů námi dodávaných strojů, které máme ve většině skladem.

V případě potřeby klienta poskytujeme spolupráci a zajišťujeme financování nákupu zemědělské a lesní techniky formou úvěrů, leasingů apod.

Jsme schopni, mimo prodeje nových strojů, dodat i některou starší použitou lesní a zemědělskou techniku, případně odkoupit starší provozu schopnou techniku. V naší nabídce nezapomínáme ani na zahrádkáře a drobné zemědělce (rašlové pytle, folie, netkané textilie aj.)

Name: Estancia Tres Cruces
Description:
We are a family run business producing high quality beef in Argentina and Uruguay for over 25 year. We believe in team building thus, an interdisciplinary group of stockhandlers, veterinaries and agronomists produces grassfed livestock and industry-finished beef for export. The Ag business mainly varies between rice and soybeans, while pastures and forage crops suchs as sorghum is produced to help sustain the beef finishing operations.  Focused on long term environmental sustainability, vasts virgin, native, bush areas have been secured from production, while the whole farming operation is run on an overall rational rotation basis. 
Commercial forestry operations held mainly in Argentina, while developing "shade and protection" forests in our Uruguayan farm destined for cattle wellbeing and soil erosion avoidance.

Name: SilverLeaf Farm Park
Description:
SilverLeaf Farm Park is a visionary community owned 70-acre Farm Park and Nature Preserve bringing together over 30 Nonprofits, Farmers, and community Partners onto one campus and  blending sustainable farming, immersive education, and community experiences in a beautiful natural setting. Our unique model showcases traditional agriculture, innovative farming technologies, and dedicated wildlife conservation areas.

 Agriculture & Innovation: Explore field farming, greenhouses, vertical farming, aquaponics, and historic agriculture exhibits in "Forgotten Fields." Experience farm-to-table dining in our elegant greenhouse event space.

 Nature & Education: Visit butterfly habitats at Flutter Fields, bird sanctuaries at Featherview Point, bee conservation at The Honey Hut, and interactive geological adventures at Glitter Caverns. Wander along trails featuring nature-inspired art and storytelling.

 Community & Wellness: Enjoy family-friendly events at Everglow Barn, relax at the serene Mermaid Pool natural swimming pond, or explore zen gardens at Koi Moon and The Wishing Tree peace garden.

At Silverleaf Farm Park, we cultivate community, sustainability, and meaningful connections to nature.

Come grow with us!

Description:
At Agrowia Enterprises, we are dedicated to revolutionizing agriculture through innovative technology solutions. Established in 2020, we have been at the forefront of the farmtech industry, working tirelessly to empower farmers and agribusinesses with cutting-edge tools and systems that enhance productivity, sustainability, and profitability.

Our Mission
Our mission is simple yet profound: to harness the power of technology to feed the world sustainably. We believe that by providing farmers with the tools they need to make informed decisions, optimize their operations, and reduce environmental impact, we can contribute to a brighter and more food-secure future.

Join Us on the Farmtech Journey

Description:
Con más de dos décadas de experiencia, Frutas de la Costa San Isidro se ha consolidado como líder en la producción y comercialización de frutas y verduras tropicales de alta calidad. Fundada como una empresa familiar, nuestra sede se encuentra en el Ejido de Venustiano Carranza, Manzanillo, Colima, México, una región privilegiada por su clima y suelo fértil.

Nos especializamos en ofrecer productos agrícolas tanto para el mercado mexicano como para la exportación, garantizando siempre el cumplimiento de los más rigurosos estándares de inocuidad e higiene alimentaria. Nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la excelencia nos ha posicionado como el principal productor y procesador en el valle de Venustiano Carranza y uno de los actores más relevantes en el estado de Colima.

En Frutas de la Costa San Isidro, nos enorgullece cultivar frutas de excepcional sabor y calidad, asegurando que cada producto que llega a nuestros consumidores refleje nuestra dedicación y pasión por la agricultura.

From our poultry and pig farms to our growing food processing operations, we ensure that every step of production meets the highest standards of safety, sustainability, and innovation. Our mission is to create value for farmers, traders, and consumers while contributing to food security and economic growth in Ghana and beyond.

With a passionate team and a vision to expand nationwide, NASA Royale Enterprise is building the future of agriculture one farm, one product, and one innovation at a time.

Name: FarmVet Dx
Description:
FarmVet Dx is at the forefront of vet diagnostics, focusing on molecular- based technologies that bring major advances in all types of animal species. By adopting modern PCR diagnostics, our services provide fast and accurate diagnosis that is paramount in monitoring the livestock industry’s health. Besides the additional requirement of assuring sustainable and responsible use of antibiotics, FarmVet Dx is evident in making antibiotic stewardship a possibility by allowing accurate  detection of pathogens and their resistances profiles. This capacity also boosts the successful treatment of bird flu. It offers practical assistance to farmers and veterinarians in preventing various diseases in millions of birds, enhancing food safety, and reducing  the environmental impact. Our multifaceted diagnostics system aims to offer fast conclusions and ease decision making in cattle and livestock farm management.
Therefore, FarmVet Dx has become an invaluable partner in the livestock sector.

Name: GOOD OLD FARMS
Description:
Good Old Farms is a cluster of family owned farms located at Village Hazratganj in Uttar Pradesh, India. Our work is influenced by the principles of Natural Farming where we try to imitate Natural Eco-Systems to practice Sustainable Agriculture.  

We have been working on creating a self-sustaining food ecosystem by encouraging bio-diversity at our farms. We have so far planted over 10,000 trees on our farms and are on our way to plant another 20,000 by the year end 2022. 

We are an in-conversion organic farm. NO Chemical Fertilizers, Herbicides, Fungicides or Pesticides are used at our farms. We use composted Cow  Dung Manure, Vermicompost and Jeevamrut to enrich our soil and we use Panchagaya as foliage spray to promote plant growth. 

Currently we produce natural-residue free Mangoes and Guavas. We are in the process of expanding the basket of our produce to include Indian Gooseberry (Amla), Henna (Mehendi), Drumstick (Moringa/Shejan), Hibiscus Roselle Tea and Ashwagandha. 

Stay tuned for more.

Name: North American Organic Growers Alliance-North American Farmer
Description:
Welcome to The North American Organic Cultivation Association - Cannabis & Vegetable
This group is dedicated to promoting organic cultivation practices for cannabis and vegetable crops in North America. Whether you are a seasoned organic grower, a curious enthusiast, or someone interested in sustainable and eco-friendly cultivation methods, this is the perfect community for you.
Our group aims to foster knowledge sharing, discussions, and support among like-minded individuals passionate about organic cultivation. Share your experiences, tips, and techniques for growing organic cannabis and vegetables, and learn from others who share the same interest. From soil preparation and composting to pest management and companion planting, we cover a wide range of topics related to organic cultivation practices.
Feel free to ask questions, seek advice, and engage in meaningful conversations with fellow members. We encourage respectful and constructive discussions that contribute to the collective knowledge of organic cultivation. Let's inspire and empower each other to grow healthy, sustainable, and high-quality crops while minimizing our impact on the environment.
Please note that this group focuses specifically on organic cultivation methods for cannabis and vegetable crops in North America. We kindly request members to adhere to our guidelines and refrain from promoting or discussing non-organic practices or unrelated topics.
Thank you for joining The North American Organic Cultivation Association - Cannabis & Vegetable group. Let's cultivate a thriving community together!

Name: Centro de Bachillerato Tecnológico Agropecuario No. 69
Description:
CBTA es el acrónimo de Centro de Bachillerato Tecnológico Agropecuario, es una institución educativa de educación media superior que ofrece programas de educación técnica en áreas relacionadas con la agricultura y la ganadería. Los estudios en un CBTA preparan a los estudiantes para desempeñar tareas relacionadas con la agricultura y la ganadería, así como para continuar sus estudios universitarios en carreras relacionadas.

Los programas de estudio en un CBTA suelen incluir materias como agronomía, zootecnia, ecología, economía, y administración. Los estudiantes también tendrán la oportunidad de aprender sobre tecnologías y maquinaria relacionadas con la agricultura y la ganadería, así como para desarrollar habilidades prácticas a través de proyectos y estudios de casos.

Los CBTA, están enfocados en la formación de Técnicos agropecuarios y también pueden tener acuerdos con universidades y empresas para facilitar la transición al mundo laboral. Es una opción para aquellos estudiantes que desean una educación técnica y están interesados en trabajar en el campo agropecuario.

Name: Domaine La Vallėe Verte
Description:
Domaine La Vallée Verte is the brainchild of Paul & Yvonne, a Dutch couple (in our late 50’s) who will emigrate to the South of France late 2022, to get out of the corporate rat-race and become 100% self-sufficient in food, water and energy.

Surrounded by forests, in the South-West of France, close to Montauban (50 km north of Toulouse), all based on 100% renewable (solar) energy and near-to zero-waste!
 
Based on the concepts of Stefan Sobkowiak we are building a permaculture orchard and food-forest with a large variety of nut- and fruit-trees and various species of berries and herbs; all in a controlled forest environment. A part of the valley will be for an animal-friendly farm with rare breeds of pigs, some cows, hens, ducks, bees and our 2 dogs. 
 
After 30 years of contributing to CO2 emissions and pollution, we want to spend the next 30 years reversing that damage and become CO2 negative and waste-less; with our own solar farm, we will generate all our own energy.

Hope you will join us on this mission ! 
Paul & Yvonne

Name: Global Agri
Description:
Imagine uma plataforma inovadora que revoluciona a maneira como os produtores rurais adquirem seus insumos agrícolas. Global Agri é mais do que uma startup; é uma solução completa para eliminar a burocracia e facilitar as vendas diretas de insumos essenciais para o campo.
Com Global Agri os produtores rurais podem conectar-se diretamente com fornecedores verificados de sementes, fertilizantes, defensivos, equipamentos agrícolas e uma gama infinita de soluções, tudo em um único ambiente digital intuitivo. Nossa plataforma simplifica o processo de compra, oferecendo transparência nos preços, disponibilidade em tempo real e opções de entrega flexíveis.
Global Agri não apenas economiza tempo e recursos, mas também fortalece a relação entre produtores e fornecedores, promovendo uma agricultura mais eficiente e sustentável.
Junte-se a nós na Global Agri e seja parte da transformação digital no agronegócio, onde a tecnologia encontra a terra para cultivar novas oportunidades e colheitas de sucesso.

Description:

Actualmente, cuenta con dos cooperativas socias: Gallicum, SC y Transalfals, SCCL, que aportan su experiencia y capacidad productiva.

IberAlfa ofrece a sus clientes un producto de máxima calidad, con un exhaustivo control de todo el proceso de producción, desde el campo hasta la transformación industrial, garantizando así la máxima calidad. Para ello, dispone de dos fábricas situadas en La Vispesa y en Bellcaire.

Gracias a sus rigurosos estándares de calidad y seguridad, IberAlfa cuenta con la certificación GMP+, que asegura el cumplimiento de las normativas internacionales en materia de seguridad alimentaria de los productos destinados a la alimentación animal.

Los productos con los que trabajamos son: alfalfa deshidratada en paca y pellet en todas sus cualidades (extra, primera y segunda), festuca, raigrás, avena, paja y paja picada. Los principales formatos disponibles son: pacas con alambre, fleje o cuerda y pellets en sacos o a granel.

Con un equipo especializado, IberAlfa garantiza un producto de máxima calidad, consolidándose como un referente en el sector y distribuyendo forrajes en todo el mundo.

Name: Vanodesh - Rooted with Culture

Vanodesh – Rooted with Culture | Traditional Roots, Technology for Quality

At Vanodesh, we’re rooted in culture and committed to purity.
Our desi hens are raised the natural and traditional way — free-range, naturally nourished, and cared for with respect and balance.
We blend ancient Indian farming wisdom with modern hygiene and quality systems, ensuring every egg and product reflects purity, trust, and authenticity.

But Vanodesh is more than a brand — it’s a movement to preserve India’s traditional farming, food heritage, and cultural lifestyle.
From farmers to weavers, artisans to homemakers, we celebrate the hands that keep India’s timeless traditions alive.
Every product we create carries a story of authenticity, care, and community — connecting people back to their roots, one product at a time.

 Vision:
Authentic, Traditional, Affordable — made by Indians, for India, and shared with the world.

 Brand Promise:
With every purchase, you support farmers, artisans, and the heritage of our land — blending Traditional Roots with Technology for Quality.
We stand for a future where purity meets progress, and culture thrives alongside innovation.

 Our Movement:
Vanodesh is a platform that connects producers, creators, and consumers who believe in authenticity and sustainability.
It’s where farmers grow, weavers create, artisans craft, and communities thrive — together shaping an ecosystem that celebrates India’s cultural wealth and natural purity.

Our Offerings:
 Farm-Fresh Desi Eggs & Poultry
 Organic & Natural Foods
 Handcrafted Traditional Goods
 Cultural & Heritage-Inspired Creations

Each item reflects our belief in responsible living, ethical sourcing, and timeless Indian values.

et kabinet wil het aantal boeren in Nederland fors verminderen. De motieven hiervoor zijn zeer discutabel en roepen logischerwijs veel emoties op. Boeren lopen met een knoop in hun maag; zitten in zak en as. Dit heeft u ongetwijfeld gemerkt, getuige de vele boerendemonstraties.

Tot dusver blijft het kabinet doof voor de oproep om de dialoog aan te gaan over praktische en haalbare doelen om stikstofuitstoot te reduceren.

De vele acties hebben ook duidelijk gemaakt dat de meerderheid van Nederland de boeren steunt. Kom ook in actie: toon uw solidariteit met de boeren en het platteland!

Among our most appreciated products:
– Traditional Salami

We have direct sales points in Alba and Turin, where we share our philosophy based on authenticity, respect for animals, and a deep connection to the land.

We supply delicatessens, specialty shops, restaurants, and farm stays, and we collaborate with those who believe in good, clean, and fair food.

Name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE FARMLAND CERTIFICATION COMPANY
Description:
About SAFCC:
Welcome to SAFCC - a dedicated organization committed to promoting and advancing sustainable agriculture practices.  As an independent certification body, we collaborate with farmers and stakeholders, ensuring the implementation of sustainable farming methods and recognizing their invaluable efforts.
 Our Mission:
SAFCC addresses the pressing need for standardized assessment and certification of sustainable farming practices. We recognize their importance for environmental preservation, social well-being, and long-term economic viability.
 Our Services:
Creation of sustainable agriculture farmland
Certification Assessments
Certification Issuance
Training and Capacity Building on sustainable agriculture
Experienced Team:
Our team comprises experienced professionals in sustainable agriculture, environmental science, social responsibility, and certification processes. We adhere to internationally recognized standards and best practices, ensuring the integrity and credibility of our certification program.
 Certification Program:
Through our comprehensive certification program, we evaluate farms based on criteria encompassing environmental stewardship, social responsibility, economic viability, cultural preservation, and technological innovation. This thorough assessment helps farmers understand their sustainability performance and identify areas for improvement.
 Our Commitment:
Overall, SAFCC is committed to promoting sustainable farming practices, empowering farmers, and contributing to the well-being of agricultural ecosystems and communities. Our vision is to build a future where agriculture flourishes in harmony with nature, society, and the economy.  #SustainableAgriculture #Certification #EnvironmentalStewardship

Elle assure par ailleurs l’organisation des cacaoculteurs, le suivi des plantations, la collecte, le stockage et la commercialisation du cacao de qualité sur le marché national et international. L’entreprise s’investit dans la valorisation des productions locales dans le but de répondre aux attentes de ses partenaires. Notre modèle solidaire et efficient remet l’humain au cœur des préoccupations et agit dans l’intérêt de l’ensemble des membres de la communauté. Solidarité, responsabilité, pérennité, transparence et proximité sont des valeurs inhérentes à la coopération.

Notre client idéal est le chocolatier « Bean to Bar », l’artisan chocolatier ou l’industriel qui va de la fève de cacao à la tablette de chocolat. Nous sommes attachés aux entreprises qui ont une démarche éthique et qui sont économiquement responsables.

Nos valeurs respectives tournant autour de la Solidarité, la responsabilité, la pérennité , la transparence et la proximité, nous nous donnons les moyens techniques, matériels, humains et financiers pour être dans la toute la chaine de valeur du cacao : Production, collecte, stockage, trie, commercialisation.

Mijn droom is een toekomst waarin mens en natuur in harmonie samenleven. De weg daar naar toe? Met voedselbossen. Door kennis en ervaring te delen, maken we samen voedselbossen de norm. Een geweldige manier om de wereld mooier, gezonder en beter maken.

Voedselbossen bevorderen de biodiversiteit, leggen koolstof vast, verrijken de bodem en helpen de planeet af te koelen. Bovendien bieden ze een overvloed aan lokaal, biologisch en gezond voedsel.

Als voedselbosbouwer wil ik anderen inspireren en ondersteunen om zelf aan de slag te gaan met de eetbare natuur. Of je nu een klein stukje land hebt of een grotere ruimte, ik help je graag om jouw groene oase te laten bloeien en de connectie tussen mens en natuur te versterken. 

Ik ben jouw gids naar een bloeiend voedselbos.

This hybrid is considered the best of all time, resulting from the crossing of a South African introduction with Tifton 68. With Tifton 85 technology, we drive the sustainable livestock market, combined with the development of innovative planting methods via planter. This method is based on high productivity per hectare, always prioritizing environmental protection. Our mission is to deliver the best possible experience to our customers, understanding and aligning their expectations and needs. Using an innovative method of planting Tifton 85 grass, we offer a certified high-quality product. Our rustification processes ensure high rooting performance in the soil, ensuring success in the formation of planted areas. We aim to be the number one reference in seedling commercialization. We are committed to delivering high-level products with traceability, rooting quality, and ease of planting. Our core value is to maintain credibility and build strong partnerships with our customers, offering products that meet all expectations of quality and efficiency for their business. At Amazon Mudas, we believe that innovation and sustainability go hand in hand to promote a more prosperous and responsible agricultural future.

Name: F.A.R.M. Company
Description:
Project development: Agritourism Center

Our over-reliance on technology and industrial systems has led to a global crisis characterized by climate change, food insecurity, social isolation, a loss of biodiversity, and decimation of nature.

The digital age, while offering unprecedented technological connectivity and access to information, has also disconnected us from the very foundations of our existence: self, nature, and community.

To address these complex challenges, we must shift our focus from extraction and industrialization to regeneration and relationships. Regenerative agriculture and permaculture offer a path forward, creating resilient communities and restoring the health of people and the environment.

To re-establish and foster these relationships, I’m planning the development of an Agritourism center. A place where people connect to nature through stewardship, a place that cultivates healthy food, natural solutions, relationships, and meaningful experiences.

Name: SC BRAVCOD SRL
Description:
Peneș Curcanul este singura integrație de curcan din România , cu o experiență de 8 ani pe piață, timp în care a devenit un nume emblematic atât pe plan intern, cât și internațional, fiind un business 100% românesc.

În prezent, Peneș Curcanul numără peste 500 de angajați, operează o stație de incubație,  12 ferme de creștere ale păsărilor, un abator performant dotat la standarde europene și o fabrică de procesare a cărnii.

Statia de incubație este dotată cu 8 incubatoare Petersimedin Belgia, principalul jucător pe piața mondială de profil, iar producția noastră anuală numără cca 1.500.000 pui de curcă speciile But 6 și HybridConverter.

Puii de curcă sunt crescuți în 12 ferme de creștere cu o suprafață totală de 150.000 m2, într-un regim de creștere natural, cu un ciclu de creștere/producție de 6 luni. Densitatea de populare a fermelor nostre este în concordanță cu măsurile pentru asigurarea bunăstării păsărilor, iar producția anuală este de cca 20.000 tone.

Abatorul, cu o suprafață de aproximativ 6000mp, pe două niveluri, este realizat cu materiale de construcție pentru industria alimentară, respectând toate reglementările noului pachet de igiena al Consiliului Europei și este echipat cu utilaje tehnologice de abatorizare a produse de grupul germano-danez, Baader-Linco.

Linia de abatorizare a curcanilor este dotată cu sistem de asomare cu gaz, o metodă non-agresivă de sacrificare cu factorii pozitivi legați de bunăstarea păsărilor, care are un rol important  în asigurarea calității superioare a cărnii, deoarece ajută la eliminarea foarte bună a sângelui și conferă frăgezime cărnii, pentru că nu se elimina acid lactic, pasărea nefiind stresată.
Politica companiei noastre în domeniul calității și al siguranței alimentare este aceea de a  oferi carne de curcan și preparate din carne de curcano bținute într-un sistem integrat de la ferma la consumator, produse în conformitate cu normele și standardele internaționale de siguranță alimentară.

Name: Projeto de Urgência para Segurança Alimentar na Guiné-Bissau(PUSA GB)
Description:
En 2020, la Guinée-Bissau a été touchée par des chocs multiples et persistants. La propagation de la maladie à coronavirus 2019 (covid-19), les crises socio-économiques et les aléas climatiques ont perturbé les moyens de subsistance, et exacerbé la vulnérabilité et l’insécurité alimentaire des ménages.
Les mesures de restrictions liées à la covid-19 – fermeture des frontières et des commerces, limitation des transports inter-régionaux et internationaux –ont profondément impacté une partie des petits producteurs et les revenus de l’exportation du pays.
En effet, l’économie de la Guinée-Bissau est fondée majoritairement sur la production de noix de cajou destinée essentiellement à l’exportation (90 pour cent). Or, les opérateurs étrangers en charge de l’achat et de l’exportation des noix de cajou ne peuvent pas venir au moment de la campagne habituelle en avril/mai, ce qui compromet grandement toutes les projections économiques possibles des ménages, des communautés et du pays.
D’autre part, les perturbations du marché, de la chaîne d’approvisionnement et du commerce engendrées par ces-mêmes mesures risquent de restreindre l’accès des populations à des sources de nourriture suffisantes, diversifiées et nutritives, en particulier dans les zones déjà touchées par l’insécurité alimentaire.
Ainsi, face aux impacts négatifs de ces mesures, il est essentiel d’apporter une réponse urgente et durable à l’insécurité alimentaire en renforcant les capacités de production agricole des populations touchées par les effets de la covid-19.

Name: We-interACT.org
Description:
InterACT is a new way to move the rate of conversion to agroecology from incremental to exponential through Interactive Agri Connections for Transformation (InterACT).

InterACT will be an interactive, multi-directional solution that is both Web-based and people-based, focusing on Transition Catalysts.

Are you a Transition Catalyst?
- Do you work directly with farmers to support their transition to Agroecology?
- Do you connect farmers with resources related to knowledge, finance or policy?
- If you answered yes to both questions, then you are a Transition Catalyst!

A Transition Catalyst is an organisation or a person who: 
- Is deeply connected to farmers
- Is grounded in the local context
- Is a key conduit between farmers and resources in funding, knowledge, policy

How will it work?
interACT will connect Transition Catalysts with available resources across knowledge, finance, and policy, using a Web-based digital tool and in-person regional representatives interACTors). This will enable those resources to reach more farmers, faster and more efficiently.

At the same time, interACT will relay critical information from Transition Catalysts (and farmers) to those working in knowledge, finance and policy in order to increase support for agroecology.

interACT will not duplicate existing Web-based digital tools or in-person networks, but rather will serve as a reservoir that pools together these resources, include tools in order to make resources more accessible, and break down existing silos.

This will also highlight gaps, which the interactive tools, support services and in-person network can then fill.

Name: MILKBAR BRASIL
Description:
Quem somos
Na Milk Bar, estamos presentes no Brasil desde 2017, trazendo para o mercado nacional a expertise de uma empresa multinacional neozelandesa, com foco em tornar a criação de bezerros mais simples, prática e rentável. 

Nossa missão
Facilitar o dia-a-dia dos produtores e garantir animais mais saudáveis, com equipamentos e sistemas de alimentação inovadores que promovem ganho de peso, menor incidência de diarreia e aleitamento no tempo certo. 

O que fazemos

Desenvolvemos bicos para alimentadores e mamadeiras, alimentadores específicos e equipamentos da linha Antahi. 

Oferecemos suporte técnico nacional e uma rede de representantes para atendimento direto aos produtores. 

Compartilhamos conhecimento sobre sistema digestivo dos bezerros, práticas de limpeza, instalação e manutenção dos equipamentos. 

Diferenciais

Solução especializada para aleitamento: com fluxo de leite natural, sem estresse para o animal. 

Redução de custos operacionais com mão-de-obra e ganhos direcionados em saúde animal e produtividade.

Suporte técnico e presença local forte, mesmo sendo uma marca global.

Visão para o futuro
Desejamos ser a referência nacional em sistemas de alimentação de bezerras, conduzindo a indústria rumo a práticas mais sustentáveis, eficientes e que promovam o bem-estar animal — e, consequentemente, mais lucratividade para o produtor.

Como consultoría nuestro origen es el año 2018, fecha desde cual hemos guiado a productores y procesadores en cada etapa de sus actividades económicas y hasta donde nos han permitido, para desarrollar prácticas regenerativas adecuadas a sus unidades de producción que les permitan obtener un máximo rendimiento.

Además, comercializamos insumos agrícolas orgánicos para la nutrición y salud vegetal, café verde, entre otros productos.

Por otro lado, guiamos al productor o procesador de productos vegetales y agropecuarios para el cumplimiento de las reglamentaciones orgánicas de México (LPO), EE.UU. (NOP), y la Unión Europea (EU) para la certificación orgánica, o de productos cosméticos orgánicos/naturales, para el cumplimiento de la reglamentación COSMOS-standard.

Los servicios que actualmente ofertamos son:

- Asesoría profesional personalizada en agricultura
- Consultoría y capacitación en producción orgánica y sustentable
- Asistencia técnica en prácticas regenerativas
- Asesoría y evaluación para el cumplimiento de reglamentación orgánica o COSMOS-standard
- Asistencia técnica en el cultivo de café orgánico (cafeticultura)

Name: Coats Agri Aloe
Description:
Coats Agri-Aloe is a pioneering force in the agricultural industry, empowering farmers and growers with GroAloe, a biostimulant soil amendment derived from the Aloe Vera plant. With GroAloe we are redefining the way crops are cultivated, offering a sustainable and natural solution for enhanced agricultural productivity. 

Our innovative approach, backed by two awarded patents, enables us to concentrate the potent blend of compounds, macro, and micronutrients found within Aloe Vera, delivering unparalleled health and growth benefits to plants. 

Company founder Bill Coats is widely known as the "Father of Aloe Vera" and is globally recognized as the foremost authority on the aloe vera plant, having authored seven books and pioneered numerous aloe-infused products. Bill has dedicated over 60 years to extensive research on the many benefits this amazing plant has to offer and played a pivotal role in shaping the multi-billion dollar aloe vera industry, revolutionizing its applications across various sectors.

At Coats Agri-Aloe, we are committed to driving sustainable agriculture forward. Our focus on innovation, scientific excellence, and environmental consciousness sets us apart, as we strive to empower farmers with the tools and knowledge to cultivate crops efficiently and responsibly.

Nuestro objetivo es que la producción ganadera sea más rentable, resciliente y sostenible, generando beneficios económicos, sociales y ambientales medibles.

 Ofrecemos:

Datos y diagnóstico: herramientas digitales que permiten medir el estado inicial, proyectar escenarios y tomar decisiones con información confiable.

Capacitación y asistencia técnica: formación en ganadería regenerativa y gestión empresarial, adaptada a la realidad de cada productor.

Modelos financieros y acceso a capital: estructuramos soluciones que facilitan la inversión en mejoras productivas y ambientales, con esquemas que reducen el riesgo y maximizan el retorno.

En Sistemia entendemos que la competitividad del agro Paraguayo depende de innovar en cómo producimos y financiamos el sector. Por eso integramos datos, tecnología y finanzas en un modelo colaborativo, que no solo mejora el negocio del productor, sino que también fortalece el capital biológico a largo plazo.

Nuestra visión: un sector ganadero capaz de competir globalmente mientras restaura suelos, protege la biodiversidad y responde a las demandas de un mercado cada vez más exigente.

Name: Bull T Ranch LLC
Description:
We focus on pasture-based, encouraging biodiversity, healthy soil, and humane treatment of animals. Our priorities are pasture and restrictions on the use of antibiotics and hormones. Organic livestock are managed differently than conventional livestock. With an emphasis on pasture and restrictions on the use of antibiotics and hormones, organic livestock benefit people and the environment. Animals raised organically have a better quality of life than their conventional counterparts, too. Factory farming is a top contributor to climate change. On factory farms, thousands of animals are raised in confinement. Forest might be cleared to make space for feedlots, and that many animals quickly eliminate any pasture or ground cover, exposing soil to wind and water erosion. Manure collects in pits, releasing methane and nitrous oxide, potent greenhouse gases.

Factory-farmed animals are fed grain to encourage rapid weight gain. But cows in particular aren’t built to digest grain, leading to increased use of antibiotics and the threat of “superbug” outbreaks. Monocultures of corn and soy are required to keep up with feed demand, creating further emissions and worsening land degradation. Organic livestock management is pasture-based, encouraging biodiversity, healthy soil, and humane treatment of animals. Animal waste becomes a tool for fertility, not a hazard. The animals improve the health of the land. Of all farming practices, pasture-based livestock operations have the most potential to sequester carbon.
The key to regenerative agriculture is that it not only “does no harm” to the land but actually improves it, using technologies that regenerate and revitalize the soil and the environment. Regenerative agriculture leads to healthy soil, capable of producing high quality, nutrient dense food while simultaneously improving, rather than degrading land, and ultimately leading to productive farms and healthy communities and economies.

Inspired by 1 Thessalonians 4:11—“Aspire to live a quiet life, to work with your hands, and to mind your own affairs”—our mission is to create a space where both people and animals can grow, heal, and thrive.

Founded by J.T. Schaffhouser, a 12-year Navy veteran, Quiet Life Ranch is a family and faith-driven operation in Mitchellville-Portland, TN, offering quality equine boarding, training, and a strong sense of community.

Current Services:

 Equine Boarding – Providing a safe and well-maintained home for horses with quality care and support.
 Horse Care & Training Support – A space for riders and trainers to develop skills and strengthen their connection with their horses.
 Community Engagement – Bringing together fellow veterans, equestrians, and local families in a welcoming ranch environment.

Future Expansion & Vision:

 Rodeo Arena & Event Hosting – Building a dedicated space for rodeo events, riding clinics, and community gatherings.
 Veteran-Focused Programs – Developing initiatives to support fellow veterans through agriculture, horsemanship, and camaraderie.
 Equine Therapy (Long-Term Goal) – Working toward full certification to provide equine-assisted activities that promote healing and resilience.
 Trail Life USA Troop – Establishing a local troop to develop leadership and outdoor skills for young men.

At Quiet Life Ranch, we honor our faith, family, and the calling to serve others. As we grow, we remain dedicated to our mission: to live a quiet life, work with our hands, and build a place where both people and animals can flourish.

Join us as we build something truly special—one hoofprint at a time.

Name: Agrocultura Vizcaya SAS BIC
Description:
Regenerative tourism and sustainable production in Fredonia, Antioquia

Agrovizcaya is a BIC company (Benefit and Collective Interest) dedicated to regenerating the land and strengthening rural economies through integrated models of agriculture, tourism, and environmental education. Its purpose is to create social, economic, and ecological well-being by fostering a deeper connection between people and nature.

Located in the southwest of Antioquia, Agrovizcaya has developed a pioneering model of regenerative nature tourism, where each experience becomes an opportunity to restore ecosystems and reconnect with the rhythms of the land. Through the “Sendero Vivo” (Living Path) experience, visitors participate in practices such as agroforestry, beekeeping, composting, biodiversity restoration, and traditional rural cooking—living a form of tourism that leaves a positive footprint on both the earth and its people.

Beyond tourism, Agrovizcaya drives a diversified regenerative production system that includes organic mandarins, frozen natural mandarin juice, honey and apitoxin, free-range creole eggs, vegetables, and products from its biofactory. The biofactory develops vermicomposting and black soldier fly (BSF) larva cultivation processes to produce natural fertilizers, biofertilizers, frass, fats, and proteins that strengthen the farm’s circular life cycle.

Products are marketed through the CSA (Community Supported Agriculture) model, directly connecting conscious producers and consumers through agroecological baskets in Medellín and the southwestern region of Antioquia.

As a company, Agrovizcaya promotes alliances with institutions, universities, and sustainable tourism agencies to consolidate a living, profitable, and replicable rural model.
Its purpose is clear: to regenerate the land, inspire awareness, and offer experiences that transform the relationship between people and nature.

Name: Maan Zaad
Description:
Maan Zaad verbindt mensen met de fundamentele principes van natuurlijke groei en regeneratie. Vanuit onze locatie in Centraal-Limburg creëren we een unieke leeromgeving waar ecologische principes, persoonlijke ontwikkeling en authentieke natuurbeleving samenkomen.

Onze initiatieven omvatten:
- Ontwikkeling van een voedselbos als levend laboratorium voor biodiversiteit en duurzame voedselproductie
- Traditioneel heggenvlechten voor het versterken van natuurlijke habitats
-  Meerdaagse eco-kampeerprogramma's voor jonge avonturiers (18-30) die willen ervaren hoe ze kunnen bijdragen aan een regeneratieve toekomst

Bij Maan Zaad geloven we dat échte innovatie ontstaat door het combineren van oude wijsheid met nieuwe inzichten. We bieden een plek waar deelnemers kunnen experimenteren met regeneratieve principes, hun verbinding met de natuur kunnen versterken en concrete vaardigheden ontwikkelen voor een duurzame toekomst.

Onze aanpak is gebaseerd op:
- Praktijkgericht leren in een natuurlijke omgeving
- Het verbinden van ecologische principes met persoonlijke groei
- Het creëren van betekenisvolle ervaringen die inspireren tot duurzaam handelen

"Maan Zaad is meer dan een project - het is een uitnodiging om deel te worden van een beweging naar een regeneratieve toekomst, waar mensen en natuur elkaar versterken."

Name: Hofer Ranch
Description:
The Hofer Ranch is a historic ranch and ranch headquarters compound. As of 2024, The Hofer Ranch is still in operation, producing winegrapes. The family has lived and worked at the Ranch continuously since 1882. It is said to be the best-preserved ranch in Ontario, it is one of the area's few surviving remnants of a notable agricultural history. 

What stands today reflects our commitment to honoring the legacy of our family generations past. Our vineyards are a testament to the passion and hard work of our family.

As we look to the future, we remain dedicated to continuing our legacy of producing exceptional winegrapes while preserving the natural beauty and resources of our land.

Name: Vaughan Irrigators USA
Description:
Vaughan Irrigators USA builds low-pressure traveling irrigators that turn water into power—giving growers a 100% chance of rain on demand.  Proudly American-owned and operated since 2016, we design simple, rugged, factory-direct machines that boost yields while cutting water, fuel, and labor.
Our irrigators are engineered to run on low pressure and flow (ideal in the 30–90 PSI, 50–128 GPM range for VCI models & 20-90 PSI, 30-128 GPM for Standard models) through 2" lay-flat hose—no electronics, no headaches. Set it, anchor the guide cable, and let the water drive the machine. It’s portable, reliable, and sized for pastures, row crops, orchards, market gardens, and effluent reuse.
What we make
Standard & Standard Extended – Workhorse models for most fields (typical hose pull up to ~450 ft).
VCI-MK1 / VCI-MK2 – Wider throw and longer runs (up to ~600 ft pull) for bigger acreage.
Add-ons – Quick-release shut-off, steering arm tow bar, bolt-on hose reel, and a 2" fertilizer/chemigation manifold.
Why growers switch
Low pressure, high coverage – Efficient spray patterns without expensive high-pressure pumps.
Water & labor savings – Layout your hydrant in the middle of the run to cut hose and setup time.
Built for the field – Grease, go, and keep farming. Parts, manuals, and live support are a call away.
Portable demos & training – We’ll show it working on real ground and coach your crew to success.
 HQ: Henderson, NV
 www.vaughanirrigatorsusa.com

Name: Apicoltura "Cera una volta..."
Description:
Apicoltura "Cera una volta..." è l'azienda fondata da Matteo Spazzini a Lodi dedicata alla produzione di miele e prodotti dell’alveare, ispirata dalla passione per il mondo delle api e dalla sostenibilità.

 La nostra mission è produrre miele di alta qualità nel rispetto della natura e sensibilizzare il pubblico sull'importanza delle api. Crediamo che il nostro lavoro non solo offra prodotti genuini, ma contribuisca anche alla tutela dell'ambiente.

 Offriamo una vasta gamma di prodotti, tra cui: Miele di svariate fioriture, Pappa Reale, Dolciumi e Bevande a base di miele nonché confezioni regalo per ogni occasione ed evento. Diamo anche la possibilità di "adottare" i nostri alveari, sia per soddisfare le curiosità delle persone riguardanti il mondo delle api, sia per sostenere con più forza il lavoro degli apicoltori.

 Garantiamo un servizio di consegna a chilometro zero a Lodi e zone limitrofe, e spediamo in tutta Italia tramite corriere. Offriamo anche visite guidate ai nostri apiari per avvicinare il pubblico al mondo delle api. Inoltre offriamo servizi dedicati ai professionisti: vendita di Nuclei, Api Regine e Favi di Covata in Lombardia; impollinazione con Api per Frutteti e Coltivazioni; Gestione Alveari per gli Agriturismi.
Siamo aperti a partnership con negozi, ristoranti e altre attività commerciali interessate a promuovere alimenti naturali e di qualità.

Apicoltura "Cera una volta..." è più di un’azienda: è un progetto che unisce passione, sostenibilità e qualità, offrendo prodotti autentici e contribuendo a preservare l’importanza delle api nel nostro ecosistema.

Central Florida Lands and Timber Nursery, LLC is a wholesale tree nursery specializing in Florida native species and other regionally adapted trees. We proudly grow and ship across North America, supplying high-quality containerized trees for projects of every scale.

With approximately 90 varieties available in sizes from 1–15 gallon containers, we’re equipped to support:

Large-scale reforestation and restoration projects

Mitigation and conservation initiatives

Municipal, commercial, and wholesale landscaping needs

Beyond our current inventory, we also offer contract growing to meet specific project requirements. Our team is committed to delivering not only strong, healthy trees, but also the expertise and reliable service our partners depend on.

 Whether you’re restoring ecosystems, offsetting carbon footprints, or planning large-scale plantings, we’re here to help you grow.

Dank ein kleines motiviertes Team wird viel Flexibilität geboten.

Name: Asperdrones SAS
Description:
ASPERDRONES es una compañía que implementa el uso de tecnología agrícola, tiene como objetivo ayudar a los productores a planificar y optimizar sus procesos y tiempos de aplicación de agro insumos a través del empleo de herramientas de ultima generación en la agricultura.
Nacemos a partir de la necesidad de aportar esa tecnología al campo, posibilitando al agricultor ser mas eficiente en la aplicación de agro insumos y el uso del agua, así como facilitar la toma de decisiones para rápida respuesta, seguimiento y análisis de las plantaciones en diferentes etapas, obtener mediciones de áreas y focalización de situaciones dentro de sus campos.
Nos centramos en brindar servicios de aspersión agrícola, análisis de cultivos, topografía y agricultura de precisión para impulsar y aumentar la productividad agropecuaria.
ASPERDRONES busca cubrir esa necesidad de tecnificar la agricultura, a través de la teledetección para el análisis de cultivos, la aspersión de precisión y el uso de sistemas de información geográfica, proporcionando a los productores ventajas y competitividad en el mercado.

Nossa operação conta com a forrageira Krone 780, um equipamento moderno e eficiente, garantindo corte de alta precisão, menor consumo de combustível e melhor custo-benefício para o produtor rural. 

Nossos Serviços: 
 Corte de Silagem de Precisão – Maior eficiência e qualidade com tecnologia avançada.  Venda de Inoculantes – Em parceria com a Kera Nutrição Animal para melhor fermentação da silagem.
 Planejamento de Colheita – Estratégia e logística para maximizar a produtividade.
 Suporte Técnico Especializado – Acompanhamento em todas as etapas do processo. 

Atendemos produtores rurais de pequeno a grande porte em todo o Brasil, oferecendo soluções personalizadas para cada propriedade. Nosso compromisso é entregar silagem de alta qualidade com máxima eficiência.

A través de pastoreo planificado, restauración de suelos y uso de microorganismos benéficos, trabajamos para:
	•	Regenerar pastizales y aumentar la biodiversidad.
	•	Mejorar la fertilidad y la retención de agua en el suelo.
	•	Criar ganado en armonía con la naturaleza y las personas.

Estamos convencidos de que la ganadería puede ser parte de la solución ambiental, contribuyendo a ecosistemas más saludables y a una producción responsable de carne.

Name: Holland Lane Farm
Description:
Holland Lane Farm (HLF) has been family operated since 1972 and is the legacy of the former notable Harold F. Gilbert (P. Eng.), former Deputy Minister of Transportation for the Province of Ontario. 
 
With an eye toward the future, Holland Lane Farm is focused on redefining the commercial cattle market by acquiring some of the most impressive maternal sires in the Shorthorn breed. In short, HLF strives to produce the highest quality Shorthorn breeding stock available. HLF have built their herd carefully by keeping the genetics pure and avoiding many of the pitfalls of purebred cattle as a result. Significant research on provenance, lineage, and pedigree ensure the HLF lines are along the best world over.

Name: Farmers First USA
Description:
Farmers First is a grant writing consulting firm that helps farmers secure funding.
They recognize that there are millions of dollars available to agricultural producers through government programs, but many farmers are unaware of these opportunities or lack the time and resources to navigate the complex grant application process.
Farmers First bridges this gap by:
Identifying and researching relevant grant programs.
Assisting farmers in preparing competitive grant applications.
Guiding farmers through the grant application and funding process.
By helping farmers access these vital funds, Farmers First empowers them to:
Invest in their farms and improve their operations.
Increase their profitability and sustainability.
Ensure the long-term viability of American agriculture.
Essentially, Farmers First aims to "Keep Farmers Farming" by providing them with the resources and support they need to succeed.

Name: Hailin Biotechnology Limited
Description:
Hailin Biotechnology Limited is a national high-tech enterprise professionally engaged in research, production, sales, and service of fast protein. Since its establishment in 2014, the company has continuously deepened its work in the "fast protein" field, closely collaborating with the Tianjin Institute of Industrial Biotechnology, Chinese Academy of Sciences; the Institute of Animal Sciences, Chinese Academy of Agricultural Sciences; China Agricultural University, and other institutions to conduct in-depth research on fast protein. It has established an industrial pathway for the large-scale biosynthesis of fast protein from corn by-products, precisely addressing the pain point of high-quality protein shortage, creating a protein source better than soybean meal, providing users with an additional protein option, and accelerating the shift of animal farming towards sustainable health.
Currently, Hailin owns six production bases in Tongliao, Chifeng, Daqing, Longjiang, Hulunbuir, and Kazakhstan, with an annual production capacity of 600,000 tons. The company's multi-base production model of "unified management, localized production" helps save costs related to transportation, procurement, sales, and technical services, enabling rapid replication to achieve large-scale production of fast protein, promoting the transformation of scientific and technological achievements, and helping the farming industry improve quality and efficiency.

Name: Luz Nativa Films
Description:
En Luz Nativa Films creemos que cada historia tiene una luz propia y merece ser contada con autenticidad. Somos una productora audiovisual independiente en Yopal, especializada en crear proyectos que trascienden lo visual para convertirse en narrativas con sentido.

 Qué hacemos:

Producción audiovisual completa: desde la idea creativa hasta la entrega final.

Videoclips musicales y cine: damos vida a la música y a los relatos con imágenes poderosas.

Documentales de campo: contamos historias auténticas conectadas con la naturaleza, la sostenibilidad y el territorio.

Cobertura de eventos: registramos con calidad cinematográfica los momentos que definen a personas, instituciones y comunidades.

Fotografía profesional: retratos, paisajes, productos y fotografía documental.

Edición de video y fotografía: montaje, color, retoque y dirección de arte digital.

Diseños y montajes visuales: piezas gráficas, artes digitales y contenido multiplataforma.

Dirección de fotografía: planificación y ejecución de la luz, la cámara y la estética visual de cada proyecto.

 Nuestro enfoque:
Unimos lo técnico y lo artístico con una mirada sensible hacia la naturaleza y la sostenibilidad. Cada producción es una oportunidad para crear belleza, visibilizar realidades, inspirar cambios y dejar huella.

 Cómo trabajamos:
Con un equipo humano y técnico de calidad, nos movemos entre la creatividad, la innovación y la colaboración. Adaptamos nuestras producciones a cada cliente y proyecto, ya sea artístico, institucional o comunitario.

 En Luz Nativa Films no solo hacemos audiovisuales: contamos historias que iluminan y conectan.

Name: Chaudhary-Farms Okara
Description:
Welcome to Chaudhary Farms on LinkedIn! 

Nestled in Okara Punjab, Chaudhary Farms has been at the forefront of pioneering sustainable agriculture and providing communities with fresh, nutritious, and delicious produce since 1992. Our farm spans 250 acres, dedicated to cultivating a diverse range of vegetables, fruits, and grains using practices that enrich the soil, protect our ecosystems, and safeguard our planet for future generations.

Our Mission: At Chaudhary Farms, we believe in farming practices that not only yield high-quality produce but also contribute positively to our environment. Our mission is to nurture the land that feeds us, ensuring that we leave it healthier for the next generation. Through innovation, dedication, and a deep love for the earth, we're committed to being stewards of sustainable agriculture.

Our Produce: From the green vegies to the juicy sugarcane and other nutritious crops and produce, each product that leaves our farm is a testament to our commitment to excellence and sustainability. We take pride in offering a bountiful selection of produce, grown and harvested with care, to meet the culinary needs of individuals and businesses alike.

Why Follow Us? Stay connected with Chaudhary Farms on LinkedIn to get the latest updates on our harvests, innovative farming techniques, sustainability initiatives, and community events. Whether you're a culinary enthusiast, a fellow farmer, or someone passionate about sustainability, our page is a space to grow, learn, and be inspired.

Thank you for joining us on our journey to make a difference, one seed at a time. Let’s cultivate a sustainable future together!

Name: Hanging Wood
Description:
Hanging Wood is an off-grid woodland farm dedicated to self-sufficiency and traditional woodland practices.

We manage our woodland through coppicing and copparding of Hazel, Sycamore, Sweet Chestnut, and Beech, crafting practical and beautiful products for theatre, schools, home décor, and land management. We also mill our own Western Red Cedar, producing high-quality timber for a wide range of uses.

Alongside this, we grow vegetables and fruit using permaculture methods, ensuring a steady supply of fresh produce directly from the land.

Our apiary supports a thriving population of bees. From here, we produce nucleus colonies (nucs), run beekeeping courses, build handcrafted hives, and sell raw honey straight from the woodland.

The entire farm operates off-grid, powered by solar energy, rainwater harvesting, and wood fuel — making Hanging Wood fully self-reliant in both energy and water.

At Hanging Wood, we live and work with the land, combining traditional skills with modern approaches to create a diverse, productive, and truly self-sufficient woodland farm.
