Name: VICTU - NOA
Description:
Somos distribuidores of. Suplefeed. Sabemos que la implementación de productos orgánicos en la agricultura y la ganadería es el futuro, pero esto solo es posible si el el productor sabe que existen distintas alternativas fuera de lo convencional. 

Utilizando productos biológicos se permite que tanto los animales como las plantas se desarrollen y potencien su crecimiento de manera eficiente y natural, sin la necesidad de agregados químicos en el caso de los vegetales; 
ni el uso de antibióticos en el caso de los animales, como ser la Monensina y Virginiamicina, prohibidos por la Unión Europea en el año 2006. 
Sabemos que todo va a nuestros platos y al de nuestra familia.  
Te ofrecemos una alternativa distinta, brindándote asesoramiento profesional continuo en la implementación y el uso de nuestros productos, y de todos los insumos que impliquen este cambio, para lograr resultados eficientes.

Name: Paisana
Description:
Hola, ¿cómo andás?

Si sos productor, contratista o comerciante del agro, seguramente más de una vez perdiste horas buscando repuestos, servicios, precios o simplemente alguien que te dé una mano.
Y sí… todo está repartido por mil lugares: grupos de WhatsApp, conocidos, el que “tiene el dato”, o navegando en páginas que no terminan ayudando.

Por eso creamos Paisana.

Una app que no te hace perder tiempo. Que no te hace scrollear ni andar adivinando. Una app que te encuentra lo que buscás y te conecta con quien necesitás, sin que tengas que andar golpeando puertas.

No te queremos vender humo. No es magia. Es tecnología hecha para el campo, con inteligencia artificial que detecta, compara, busca y avisa cuando hay algo útil para vos.
A veces usamos APIs oficiales, otras veces tenemos que raspar datos de sitios públicos porque ni el gobierno ni las instituciones lo facilitan. Pero lo hacemos. Porque si vos lo necesitás, lo vamos a traer.

Paisana está pensada para avisarte si alguien busca justo lo que vos ofrecés.
Para mostrarte el clima de tu zona, el precio del dólar, las cotizaciones reales del día, sin tener que pedirlo.
Para conectar productores con contratistas, sin intermediarios ni vueltas.
Y para que no te pasen por arriba los datos, las oportunidades o los cambios de mercado.

No está todo listo todavía. Pero estamos cerca. Y queremos que vos estés desde el principio.
Por eso armamos una lista de espera en nuestra web. Si te interesa probarla antes que nadie y ayudarnos a mejorarla, dejá tu mail en www.paisana.com.ar.

Nos gustaría que formes parte.

Paisana – Hecha para el campo. Pensada para vos.

Name: NUANCE-Miami
Description:
NUANCE-Miami (New Urban Agriculture, Neighborhood, Community & Education) is a nonprofit initiative dedicated to reimagining how Miami-Dade uses its land, waste, and food systems. We transform underutilized spaces - school fields, vacant parcels, utility land, and rooftops - into productive farms, compost hubs, and educational sites that strengthen local food security and reduce dependence on imported produce.

Our model is rooted in circular economy principles:

Organic Waste Diversion – We collect food scraps and landscaping debris, turning them into nutrient-rich compost through vermiculture and low-cost micro-yards. This reduces landfill pressure, cuts methane emissions, and saves schools and communities on waste hauling costs.

Urban Farming – Using row cropping, greenhouses, and soil-based systems, we produce healthy, local fruits and vegetables year-round. Food is then sold at a discount to local schools and underserved communities; the rest is sold locally to help fund operations. 

Community Impact – We provide scholarships with proceeds from branded products like Brundibár Farms jams and create educational opportunities for students and residents through tours, workshops, and hands-on learning.

Partnerships – NUANCE collaborates with schools, universities, municipalities, utilities, and local organizations to unlock the hidden potential of land and resources across Miami-Dade.

Miami faces rising food costs, shrinking farmland, and increasing waste disposal challenges. NUANCE-Miami addresses all three with a scalable, community-first approach - creating jobs, improving soil health, and building resilience for future generations.

Together, we can transform waste into opportunity and land into lasting community benefit.

Wychodzimy naprzeciw wymaganiom ekologicznych upraw!

Name: Yahnai Kaduh
Description: At Yahnai Kaduh, we are dedicated to raising awareness about sustainability and conscious living, all while being in harmony with nature. Our community is completely off-grid, relying on sustainable energy sources like solar power, hydro power, and biogas plants to meet our energy needs. We maintain a coffee and fruit tree plantation, alongside small organic vegetable gardens, with all buildings and furniture crafted and maintained on-site by our skilled carpentry, engineering, and building departments. Inspired by the teachings of J. Krishnamurti, our residential school offers a unique educational experience where staff and students live and engage in community life together. We welcome volunteers to join us in various capacities, whether it be farming, carpentry, building, or assisting in the community kitchen. Your involvement can be tailored to your interests and abilities, contributing to our shared goal of sustainable living. Located in a valley next to an untouched reserve forest, Yahnai Kaduh offers an abundance of flora and fauna both around and on the campus. In your spare time, you can go for treks, attend nearby yoga classes, or engage in communal activities like playing football with the students. If you love to spend time in nature and within a community, this is the place for you.

Name: GA agricultura e pecuária
Description:
GA Agricultura e Pecuária
Sobre Nós
Com 35 anos de tradição e excelência, a GA Agricultura e Pecuária se orgulha de atuar no setor agropecuário em Uberlândia de forma íntegra e com qualidade. Nossa missão é alimentar o mundo de maneira sustentável, combinando práticas agrícolas tradicionais com inovações tecnológicas. Estamos comprometidos com a qualidade dos nossos produtos e com o impacto positivo na comunidade e no meio ambiente.
O que Fazemos
Na GA Agricultura e Pecuária, cultivamos e produzimos com paixão. Nossa gama de atividades abrange desde o cultivo de grãos até a criação de gado, sempre com foco na sustentabilidade e na eficiência. Acreditamos que o futuro da agricultura e pecuária passa pela inovação e pelo respeito aos recursos naturais.
Nossa Equipe
Nossa equipe é o coração da GA Agricultura e Pecuária. Valorizamos o desenvolvimento profissional e o bem-estar de nossos colaboradores. Juntos, enfrentamos os desafios do setor, celebramos as conquistas e trabalhamos constantemente para superar as expectativas de nossos clientes e parceiros.
Junte-se a Nós
Estamos sempre em busca de talentos que compartilhem de nossa paixão pelo agronegócio e que queiram fazer parte de uma história de sucesso. Na GA Agricultura e Pecuária, você encontrará oportunidades de crescimento, e a chance de contribuir para um futuro mais sustentável.
Nossos Valores
* Sustentabilidade: Compromisso com práticas que garantem a saúde do nosso planeta para as futuras gerações.
* Inovação: Busca constante por soluções criativas e eficientes em todos os processos.
* Integridade: Transparência e ética em todas as nossas ações.
* Qualidade: Excelência nos produtos e serviços que oferecemos.
Contato
Para saber mais sobre a GA Agricultura e Pecuária, nossos produtos e como podemos trabalhar juntos, siga-nos aqui no LinkedIn. Estamos ansiosos para conectar com profissionais, clientes e parceiros que compartilham de nossa visão para o futuro da agricultura e pecuária.

Name: GreenClinic LifeScience
Description:
GCLS is a smart component standing behind the success of large growers who feed and green the world, despite of locations and climate zones. We’re the only (as we know) commercial provider of Ecosystem Phytopathology as a Service. GreenClinic LifeScience (hereinafter also GCLS)* is an independent international competence center leading in the delivery of industrial value from the synergy of applied knowledge of ecosystems, biodiversity and plant pathology based on metagenomics and data science.

We are making agriculture less risky, more predictable, much more productive and sustainable. We help large crop growers and farmers to unveil and enable reserves of productivity. They come from regeneration of the soil and right use of agricultural ecosystem. We are helping to ensure continuity of private and municipal urban green areas, forests and valuable plants as an important part of human infrastructure and habitat for many species. 

Being headquartered in Ukraine and Estonia we are proud to contribute to elimination of hunger, coming from massive biodiversity loss, climate disadaptation and climate threat globally, with our know-how and two decades of experience. 

Now a part of GNerdiX.

Our mission is to promote sustainable and modern farming while empowering communities through education, innovation, and agribusiness opportunities.

---------------------------------

Kami adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang budidaya puyuh terpadu dengan lokasi utama di Bogor dan Malang, serta menjalin kerja sama strategis dengan dua institusi ternama: Institut Pertanian Bogor (IPB) dan Universitas Brawijaya (UB). Kolaborasi ini memperkuat komitmen kami dalam mengembangkan peternakan puyuh berbasis riset, inovasi, dan pemberdayaan masyarakat.

Selain memproduksi telur puyuh berkualitas tinggi untuk kebutuhan pasar domestik dan internasional (ekspor-impor), kami juga menyediakan layanan pelatihan dan pengembangan kompetensi di sektor peternakan melalui:

- Program pelatihan budidaya puyuh untuk pemula dan peternak berpengalaman
- Skema kemitraan bisnis yang menguntungkan dan berkelanjutan
- Layanan advisory dan konsultasi teknis bagi individu, kelompok tani, dan institusi

Distribusi telur puyuh segar dan olahan ke berbagai wilayah di Indonesia dan luar negeri

Dengan pendekatan terintegrasi dan berbasis pemberdayaan, kami hadir untuk menjadi bagian dari solusi ketahanan pangan nasional serta penciptaan peluang ekonomi baru, khususnya di sektor peternakan unggas kecil.

Name: Faid Al-Naam for Food Security Projects
Description:
فيض النعم هي شركة رائدة في قطاع الأمن الغذائي، متخصصة في إدارة وتطوير المشاريع الزراعية والحيوانية المتكاملة. تأسست الشركة كامتداد لخبرة ميدانية واسعة في السودان، وتواصل اليوم مسيرتها الطموحة من خلال مشروعها الاستراتيجي في مصر بداية من الفرافرة على مساحة 6,000 فدان.
نقدم نموذج عمل فريدًا يرتكز على التكامل الرأسي الكامل، حيث نتحكم في كل حلقة من حلقات سلسلة القيمة، من الحقل إلى السوق. هذا النموذج يضمن لشركائنا:
الجودة المضمونة: تتبع كامل للمنتج، من استصلاح الأرض وزراعتها، مرورًا بإنتاج الأعلاف وتسمين المواشي، وصولًا إلى التصنيع والتعبئة.
تقليل المخاطر: الحد من الاعتماد على سلاسل الإمداد الخارجية، مما يوفر استقرارًا في الإنتاج والأسعار.
الكفاءة التشغيلية: استخدام أحدث التقنيات في الري (محاور ري ذكية) والطاقة (منظومات طاقة شمسية) لتعظيم الاستفادة من الموارد.
نحن شريك استراتيجي جاهز للتعامل مع متطلبات القطاع الحكومي وقطاع الأعمال والمستثمرين. نلتزم بتقديم تقارير أداء شفافة، ومواصفات جودة عالمية، وقدرة على التوسع تلبي أهداف الأمن الغذائي الوطني والإقليمي.
   نسعى من خلال مشاريعنا إلى تحقيق أثر تنموي شامل، يتجاوز الإنتاج ليشمل خلق فرص عمل نوعية، دعم الاقتصاد المحلي، والمساهمة في بناء مستقبل مستدام.

Name: Carbon Fix Standard
Description:
Climate goals will not be achieved without robust carbon fixation in the widest landscape on Earth, the agroecosystem. Beyond climate, Carbon is deeply linked to the enhance of biodiversity and water retention in the agroecosystem. The modern agricultural unit must drive efforts to elevate its carbon stocks, through biorational inputs, regenerative agriculture, best agricultural and livestock practices, new landscape use design, etc. 
Establishing protocols of practice and monitoring of performance of inputs and practices is crucial for achieving carbon fix goals in the agroecosystem.

Name: Drone Vert
Description:
L’entreprise Drone Vert est spécialisée dans les travaux agricoles par drone.

Les drones révolutionnent l'agriculture moderne en offrant des solutions innovantes pour optimiser la gestion de vos cultures. Grâce à leurs capacités de cartographie, de largage et de semis, les drones deviennent des outils incontournables pour améliorer votre rendement tout en préservant l'environnement.


Semis sous couvert 
Les avantages du semis sous couvert avec l’utilisation d’un drone sont un gain de temps et un gain économique (non utilisation du tracteur), pas de compaction des sols, une meilleure implantation du couvert en optimisant l’humidité sous la culture.
Chargement maximal 10 kg. Pesée en temps réel du réservoir permet un contrôle continu et précis du semis.

Largage trichogrammes 
Le drone permet de larguer des capsules contenant des trichogrammes, un insecte prédateur de la pyrale du maïs. Cette méthode de lutte alternative permet de protéger efficacement les cultures.
Capacité du réservoir 5 à 600 capsules (densité conseillée 100 capsules / ha). Surface moyenne traitée par jour 70 à 100 ha (contre 10 à 12 ha à la main).

Cartographie pour estimer les dégâts (gibiers, intempéries)
Des cartes en quelques minutes, sans connexion internet, sur le terrain pour estimer les dégâts (gibiers, intempéries, problèmes de levée…) mais aussi compter les fruits et plantes ou encore mesurer l’indice de santé des plantes. 

Modulation de la fertilisation colza et céréales
La prestation que je propose avec exo.expert comprend un rapport certifié Comifer, les cartes de biomasse et les cartes de préconisation de la modulation d’azote. Celles-ci sont utilisées automatiquement ou manuellement via l’assistant inclus pour apporter la bonne dose au bon endroit sur chaque parcelle. Possibilité d’établir en plus une carte de détection du ray grass.  

N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour plus d'informations:
Pierre Defalque
pdefalque@gmail.com

Name: Woodford County Conservation District
Description:
Our mission is to promote the conservation of land and aquatic resources in a developed environment through stewardship, education, and technical assistance.

A growing nation such as ours puts strong demands on our natural resources.  With increasing markets for our raw materials, pressure is placed on our agricultural farmland to produce the crops necessary to meet these demands.  At the same time, other land uses are taking up large blocs of prime agricultural land each year removing this land from production forever.  Maintaining a sufficient amount of our natural resources for future generations, while providing the necessary elements for growth, places strong responsibilities on mankind.

It is with the realization of the needs and problems concerning our natural resources that the Woodford County Conservation District strives to educate the public on protecting our environment.  What we accomplish as individuals is minimal compared to what we have and can accomplish with united efforts.

The Board of Supervisors holds general meetings on the Third Monday of every month; at 6:30pm November-March, 7pm April-October.

Les chevaux/poneys sont nourris deux fois par jour en granulés et foin, adaptés selon les besoins de chacun. Ils ont un accès à l'eau, nettoyée au moins une fois par semaine.
La structure dispose d'une écurie composée de 7 boxes, utilisables pour les soins et la préparation des chevaux, ainsi que d'une sellerie, d'un club house et de toilettes. Vous trouverez sur place également une carrière (16m x 27m) et une station de douche.
Surveillance quotidienne, la maison d'habitation étant sur place, à proximité des paddocks.

Name: Angora Agri Group
Description:
Angora Agri Group, founded in 2018 in Sarıoba Village, Polatlı District, Ankara, provides innovative and sustainable solutions in agriculture and livestock. We aim to offer high-quality and reliable products both in Turkey and globally, using modern agricultural techniques and Good Agricultural Practices (GAP) to preserve nature.

We specialize in large and small livestock farming and produce high-quality dairy products under hygienic conditions. Our agricultural product range includes grain corn, malting barley, carrots, dry onions, tomatoes, potatoes, wheat, lavender, and canola. We supply these products to retail companies and have an extensive distribution network.

Sustainability is a core value at Angora Agri Group. We prioritize eco-friendly practices like organic fertilizers and natural farming techniques to preserve soil health and use water efficiently. Technological advancements help us improve production efficiency and sustainability.

Our goal is to lead the agricultural sector with high-quality, sustainable products. Today, we are proud to be one of Turkey's top agricultural producers and aim to grow into a globally recognized brand. With a focus on food safety and eco-friendly production, we ensure high-quality and safe products for consumers.

In summary, Angora Agri Group is committed to strengthening its position as a leader in agriculture and livestock, focusing on sustainability, quality, and technology. Our mission is to be a trusted global brand while contributing to a healthier, more sustainable future.

Name: EBB Farms
Description:
EBB Farms is a regional tree nursery and working chestnut orchard located in Western Kentucky, co-founded by Brad and Melanie Jones.  Powered by United Chestnuts!

We specialize in growing premium Chinese hybrid chestnut trees and select oak varieties—including Nuttall, Sawtooth, and Water oaks—grown with a regenerative approach that supports soil health, biodiversity, and long-term farm value.

Whether you’re restoring a pasture, diversifying your operation, or building a legacy for the next generation, we’re here to help you plant with purpose—and profit.

We offer:
 Chestnut seed nuts and seedlings
 Bare root chestnut trees and oaks
 Nationwide shipping and pre-order options
 Site selection advice and grower support

We believe tree crops are the future of farming—and chestnuts are leading the way. That’s why we’re proud to collaborate with the United Chestnuts network to make chestnut farming viable, visible, and collaborative—nationwide.

 Visit us at ebbfarms.com/store to explore current offerings and pre-order trees.
 And don’t miss Branching Out: Growing Together, our podcast sharing the stories and strategies behind the chestnut movement.

Let’s grow something that matters—together.

Name: Hampi Organic Farms (HOF)
Description:
Hampi Organic Farms | Naturally Grown. Honestly Made.

At Hampi Organic Farms (HOF), we believe that purity begins at the soil.
Located near the UNESCO World Heritage site of Hampi, our farm is a green oasis that celebrates traditional farming wisdom blended with mindful modern practices.

 What We Do

We grow and handcraft a variety of natural, chemical-free produce that reflects the rich biodiversity of our land. From fruit-bearing trees to medicinal herbs, every product is nurtured with care and harvested at its peak freshness.

Our Products Include:

Fresh seasonal fruits — Sapota, Mango, Custard Apple, Guava, and more

Farm-made health products — Hadjod Pickle, Danthapala Oil, and other herbal formulations sold on hampiorganicfarms.com

Value-added produce straight from our fields — hand-processed, sun-cured, and packed with authenticity

 Farm Fresh Fruit Baskets

We curate weekly and monthly fruit baskets that bring the taste of our orchards directly to your doorstep. Each basket is thoughtfully assembled based on what’s in season, ensuring freshness, flavor, and variety in every delivery.

 Farm Visits & Experiences

Hampi Organic Farms isn’t just a place — it’s an experience.
Visitors are welcome to walk through our 20-year-old sapota orchards, learn about organic farming, participate in hands-on harvesting, and enjoy authentic farm-to-table experiences.
We’re also developing our farmstay, where guests can slow down, reconnect with nature, and witness sustainable living up close.

 Our Philosophy

We stand for sustainability, transparency, and community — growing food the way nature intended and sharing it with those who value honesty over hype.

Name: Project M.A.R.S.
Description:
Project M.A.R.S. (Mitigation, Adaptation, Resilience, Space) is an educational food forest and community learning space located in Balik Pulau, Penang. What began as the restoration of an abandoned palm oil plantation has grown into a community-led initiative focused on self-sufficiency, sustainable living, and climate resilience.

At M.A.R.S., we believe learning happens through doing. Our space integrates ecological education, hands-on workshops, and real-world sustainability practices — from natural building and regenerative farming to renewable energy and local food systems. By nurturing both people and the land, we aim to inspire a new way of living in harmony with nature.

Our efforts have been recognized with the Penang Environmental Sustainable Award and the ESG Award – Unsung Hero, and we’ve shared our journey on international platforms including TEDx Sri Petaling, as well as at universities and organizations in Japan, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Thailand, promoting collaboration and knowledge exchange in sustainability.

Beyond a project, M.A.R.S. is a growing community ,  a space where ideas, skills, and actions come together to build a more resilient future for all.

Name: Little Wolf Ranch
Description:
Established in 2023, veteran owned and operated, Little Wolf Ranch is a small horse ranch located in Claremore, Oklahoma. While we specialize in taxidermy services for our fellow outdoorsmen and hunters, we are homesteaders and wear many different hats.

We sell consumable products from our small farm and consumable products from the animals we raise. All of our consumable products are based on a first-come, first-serve transaction, dependent on the current availability of stock at the time.

On occasion, some of our horses may be listed for sale/adoption and our studs may become available for services. Name: Dreamnature Organization
Description:
About Dreamnature

Dreamnature empowers communities to domesticate native trees for people and nature through integrated, science- and indigenous knowledge-based approaches. Our work is guided by five core pillars:

Ethnobotanical Research & Community Appraisal
We conduct participatory ethnobotanical research to understand community preferences, limitations, and indigenous knowledge systems that influence the domestication of native tree species. 

Native Tree Germplasm Production
We support the production of high-quality native tree seeds and seedlings through community-based systems. We work with the Tanzania Network of Tree Growers, a local community of practice that partners with Dreamnature in seed collection and establishment of community seedling source centers.

Food Forests for People and Nature
Through training and community empowerment, we promote the integration of native trees into farming systems using agroecology principles, combining food and cash crops to strengthen livelihoods while restoring ecosystems.

Land Restoration & Tree Planting
Through the My Dream Tree Campaign, we mobilize communities and resources to plant native trees in degraded landscapes, supporting soil protection, ecosystem recovery, and climate resilience.

Monitoring, Data, and Impact Validation
We apply GIS-based tools, Kobo Toolbox, and field monitoring systems to track impacts, validate results, and generate evidence for learning, reporting, and peer-reviewed research publications.

Dreamnature works at the intersection of community empowerment, biodiversity conservation, climate resilience, and sustainable livelihoods, ensuring that native tree domestication is locally owned, scientifically grounded, and socially inclusive.

Description:
At Westmeister Farm, we create extraordinary animal experiences that are private, personal, and educational. Located in Shelby, Ohio, we are the state’s first USDA-licensed private animal encounter facility, offering guests an alternative to crowded zoos and tourist attractions.

Our private appointment-only tours ensure your group enjoys undivided attention in a relaxed, welcoming environment. During your visit, you’ll meet our diverse animal family — from zebras and capybaras to otters and more — while learning about their care and conservation.

For those seeking something unforgettable, our Otter Swim Encounter invites guests ages 10+ to swim alongside Asian small-claw otters in their enclosure. Each interaction is designed to be fun, safe, and educational, sparking curiosity while fostering respect for the animals.

Why choose Westmeister Farm?

- USDA licensed with the highest standards in safety and animal welfare
- Small group experiences with no crowds or lines
- Focus on education, conservation, and connection with animals

Whether you’re planning a family outing, group experience, or educational visit, Westmeister Farm offers a one-of-a-kind opportunity to connect with animals in a way that’s both meaningful and memorable.

Description:
Free Radical Ranch is a charming 54-acre farm nestled in the rolling hills of Morning View, KY. Just minutes off of I-75 in southern Kenton County in northern Kentucky, our farm is home to a lively and diverse family of friendly animals.  From Alpacas and Llamas to Sheep, Goats, Pigs, Cattle, Donkeys, Horses, Chickens, Ducks, & Peacocks, we’ve got it all! We’re passionate about raising our animals humanely, with lots of love and care, to produce the highest quality Grassfed Beef & Lamb & nonGMO Pork.

At Free Radical Ranch, we take pride in raising registered Katahdin hair sheep breeding stock to ensure the best genetics and highest quality lambs. But that’s not all! We also offer unique and one-of-a-kind Fiber/Fabric Gifts & Art, featuring top-quality Suri & Huacaya Alpaca, Teeswater Wool, and Mohair Fleece & Fiber for purchase.

Our team has a diverse background in Farming, Biology, Genetics, Art & Education and we love sharing our knowledge with others. With our focus on science education, homesteading, and community building, there are countless ways to engage and connect with the natural world at Free Radical Ranch! We welcome you to join our community of like-minded individuals who share our passion for sustainable agriculture and animal welfare.

No matter what kind of experience you’re looking for – whether it’s a farm stay, a tour, a workshop, science support for your youngsters, or consulting services – we offer a wide variety of ways to engage with our animals and the land. Come and explore the many unique experiences that Free Radical Ranch has to offer! Let us inspire and empower you to live a more sustainable and fulfilling life! We can’t wait to meet you!

Name: Fazenda Beija-Flor
Description:
Tudo começou em 2013, quando visitamos a região de Ilhéus-Itacaré, conhecida como Costa do Cacau, em viagem de férias.

Essa parte do Sul da Bahia é muito especial, pois ainda é muito preservada com florestas de Mata Atlântica. Lá, tivemos a oportunidade de conhecer um sistema de produção de cacau chamado Cabruca, que usa e preserva as grandes árvores nativas da mata para sombrear o cacau. Foi amor à primeira vista. Nos anos seguintes, com muito esforço e procura encontramos a Fazenda Beija-Flor, uma antiga fazenda abandonada de cacau (leia mais em o Cacau Brasileiro), mas que ainda preservava muito desta característica. A Fazenda foi restaurada e voltou a ser produtiva. De seus frutos, nasceu a ORGÂNICOS DEORUM, que traz em seu DNA a preservação, a sustentabilidade e o desejo de oferecer produtos mais naturais e saudáveis.

Name: Tom Agarwood
Description:
Discover pure, true Agarwood—crafted safely for you and the environment. Did you know about 9 out of 10 Agarwood products on the market are made using harsh chemicals that harm your health and the planet? At Tom Agarwood, we’re determined to change that.

When we entered this business, all research said the Oud making process was a one-way ticket—the tree had to be cut down to harvest the Oud. It’s surprising that after 3,000 years since the Egyptian era, this ancient process remains unchanged despite technological advances. My parents planted 5,000 trees 25 years ago, imagine if I turn them into Oud, harvest within 1 year. Then plant again for 25 years and re-do the process. That’s not sustainable.

12 months of deep research and piling farm expenses, with no solution found, doubts crept in. Was I being relentless or stubborn? The chemical method was always there, ready to start anytime, only if i say "yes".

Just when I was about to quit, a visit to a Buddhist temple with my Grandma inspired me. I read, “If you keep asking the question long enough, the universe will answer. Everything starts with a quest and relentless effort.” That pushed me to try once more.

Then, on a rainy night, I discovered “Daisugi,” a 14th-century Japanese method from Kyoto’s Muromachi period. This technique harvests wood by pruning multiple straight branches from one tree without cutting it down. Combined with Dr. Pheeraphan Wijitphan’s natural Agarwood induction method, which uses organic inoculants from decayed leaves, fungi, and tree waste, we created a continuous agarwood growth process—chemical-free and tree-friendly.
Today, my farm produces amazing products honoring my parents’ legacy:
	•	Agarwood Chips: sustainably sourced with authentic, relaxing fragrance
	•	Agarwood Oil (Oudh Oil): pure, potent, and long-lasting

Join our community of conscious customers. Experience real purity and the therapeutic beauty of Agarwood. Help us lead the way to a safer, more sustainable future.

Name: Bunzing Project Wildlife Detection
Description:
Inzet speurhonden voor marterinventarisatie
Het gaat niet goed met de kleine marterachtigen (bunzing, hermelijn en wezel) in ons land. We weten dat de aantallen teruglopen en dat het verspreidingsgebied inkrimpt maar kunnen dit niet goed onderbouwen met de gangbare inventarisatiemethodiek (zoeken naar sporen, ontlasting en gebruik van cameravallen). De reden is dat de dieren erg verborgen leven en moeilijk zijn te detecteren.
Door het gebruik van hun superieure reukzintuigen kunnen honden soorten detecteren die moeilijk te zien of te lokaliseren zijn. Speurhonden kunnen zowel levende dieren als sporen optimaliseren, aan de hand van zowel uitwerpselen of holen. Bij het lokaliseren van hun doelwit waarschuwen de honden hun geleiders door bijvoorbeeld te gaan zitten en hun neus in de richting van het dier of het monster te richten. Voor het opsporen van marterachtigen wordt ervoor gekozen om de honden te gaan trainen om de uitwerpselen te gaan vinden.
De initiatiefnemers van dit project hebben een achtergrond in de biologie en ecologie van dieren in het wild, evenals in hondentraining, en zijn er sterk van overtuigd dat dierenwelzijn op de beste manier de hoogste prioriteit heeft, zowel voor onze honden als voor dieren in het wild. Door bijvoorbeeld aangelijnd te werken worden de eventueel aanwezige diersoorten in het zoekgebied zo min mogelijk verstoord.
De Marterstichting staat open voor nieuwe inventarisatiemethoden en wil graag verkennen of speurhonden kunnen gaan zorgen voor een efficiency slag m.b.t. de monitoring van kleine marterachtigen. Het project vindt plaats in samenwerking met meerdere partners, waaronder lokale terreinbeheerders, natuurbeschermings- en overheidsorganisaties en speurhondengroepen. Het onderzoek zal zich in eerste instantie richten op de bunzing in de provincie Flevoland.
Betrokkenen bij dit project:
Marterstichting, Edo van Uchelen
Jan Reuvenkamp https://despeurhond.nl/
Mariska Snelleman http://www.conservationdogservices.com/

The existing 8 hectares of virgin native bush will remain untouched for native fauna.

Name: SkyFarm Solutions
Description:
Welcome to SkyFarm Solutions - Your Premier UAV Agriculture Service in the Channel Islands!

At SkyFarm Solutions, we are committed to revolutionizing agriculture in the stunning Channel Islands through cutting-edge Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) technology. As a pioneering company, we harness the power of drones and advanced data analytics to elevate farming practices and maximize yields while promoting sustainability and environmental consciousness.

Our team of skilled agronomists, engineers, and drone pilots collaborates seamlessly to offer tailored solutions that cater to the unique needs of each farm. By deploying our state-of-the-art UAV fleet equipped with multispectral imaging and remote sensing capabilities, we provide comprehensive aerial surveys that unveil valuable insights into crop health, water usage, and soil conditions. This data-driven approach empowers farmers to make informed decisions, optimize resource allocation, and implement precision farming techniques, ultimately increasing productivity and profitability.

SkyFarm Solutions is not just about enhancing agricultural outcomes; we are deeply committed to promoting ecological balance and conservation. By leveraging UAV technology, we minimize the environmental impact of traditional farming practices, reduce chemical usage, and promote sustainable land management strategies.

Customer satisfaction lies at the core of our values, and we strive to build strong, long-lasting partnerships with our clients. Whether you are a small family farm or a large-scale agricultural enterprise, we are here to support you in your journey towards prosperity and sustainability.

Join us in cultivating a brighter future for the Channel Islands. Connect with us today and let's soar together towards a greener, more efficient, and prosperous agricultural landscape!

Name: JSM Farms, Inc
Description:
We are the Moody's—a family of five living on our family's fifth generation livestock and row crop farm in southwest Iowa. We love the farm life and the hard work it takes to maintain the land that sustains us. Farming is our full time job, the hours are highly variable, and no two workdays are ever the same.

Our foundation herd consists of Sawyer bloodline Spanish goats. Known for their hardiness, strong maternal traits, adaptability, and unique history, the Sawyer bloodline has been selectively bred for 80 years with a focus on meat production, while retaining the valuable traits of the Spanish goat.

Spanish goats were brought to the U.S. over 500 years ago, many becoming feral and adapting to the diverse southern environments. In the 1800s different ranches began keeping separate herds for land management and meat production. Numerous bloodlines developed, each unique to those ranches that held them, while the breed as a whole maintained the inherent characteristics of the Spanish goat. Our foundation herd came from the Neely-Sawyer ranch in southwest Texas, where they were bred for over 80 years with a focus on meat production. When we brought them to Iowa, they not only quickly adapted, but thrived in our Midwest climate. Today, we're proud to carry on the Neely-Sawyer legacy, owning one of the largest herds of Sawyer goats in the U.S. and offering their exceptional meat to our customers.

Name: Česká Správa Myslivosti
Description:
Naší hlavní myšlenkou je gentlemanský přístup k lovu zvěře v divoké přírodě. Zakládáme si na udržitelnosti, etice a tradici.

Udržitelnost:
Zajištění schopnosti ekosystému udržet procesy, funkce i biologickou rozmanitost a produktivitu do budoucnosti. Tento způsob hospodaření je postaven na základním cyklu: půda živí les a rostliny → rostliny vytváří biotop a živí živočichy → živočichové a rostliny živí člověka → člověk živí půdu. Tento elegantní cyklus se opakuje, udržitelně a donekonečna, a umožňuje lidskou existenci na této planetě.

Etika:
Zušlechťování respektu k přírodě a životu každého živočicha skrz morálku a charakter každého myslivce. Ten, kdo rozhoduje o životě a smrti, musí stát mravně vysoko. Je-li myslivec oprávněn zvěř usmrcovat, pak z tohoto práva mu plynou též povinnosti. Myslivec nesmí zvěř trýznit a je povinen o ni pečovat a chránit ji, protože nechová zvěř jen proto, aby ji usmrcoval, ale usmrcuje ji právě proto, aby ji choval. Ve kontaktu se zvěří si každý myslivec osvojuje humánnost, kulturnost, zdrženlivost, šlechetnost, a zároveň potlačuje svoji sobeckost, závist a nadřazenost.

Tradice:
Udržování jedinečných mysliveckých tradic. Žádný jiný národ či stát dosud nemá v lovectví a myslivosti zakořeněnou mysliveckou etiku, zvyky, tradice a kulturu. Česká myslivost je díky tomu povýšena na národní kulturní statek. Myslivecká etika, historie, zvyky, tradice, myslivecká kultura a umění je společenským, duchovním a filozofickým oborem, které se nejvíce přičinily tomu, že je myslivost zapsána jako nedílná součást Seznamu nemateriálních statků tradiční a lidové kultury České republiky.

Name: Zeidelweider Hof GbR
Description:
Vom Selbstversorger zum Lieferanten 

Was einst als Idee zur Selbstversorgung entstand, kann nun von uns - Markus & Sandra - belächelt werden. 

Angefangen hat es im April 2018: Es zogen die ersten 25 Hühner sowie Hahn Erich auf unseren Hof. Die Nachfrage bei Familie und Freunden nach dem täglich frischen Freilandei wurde stetig größer. Es war an der Zeit des Umdenkens, da unsere Kunden großen Wert auf regionale und artgerechte Tierhaltung legen. Neben unseren mittlerweile 350 Freilandhennen verschiedenster Rassen, haben auch zwei Katzen ihr Zuhause bei uns gefunden. Mit unseren knapp 600 Tieren leben wir auf elf Hektar am Rande von Rodewisch/Vogtl., einem idyllischen Grün auf der Zeidelweide. 

Wer bislang dachte, dass Hühner nur braune oder weiße Eier legen, hat weit gefehlt. Auf dem Zeidelweider Hof darf es auch gern ein grünes, cremefarbenes oder dunkelbraunes Ei im Karton sein.

Name: AKME Gardens
Description:
We are a family owned and operated nursery which specializes in diverse and rare varieties of temperate, sub-tropical and tropical plants and fruit trees.

Our exclusive service is custom built-to-order multi-grafted trees, where we provide customers around the country with Signature works of edible art for their landscape.

We are also known for having one of the largest selections and collections of mature species and cultivars of Eriobotrya trees, with E. japonica as our primary focus, and have developed over a dozen genetically improved varieties through careful and controlled cross-pollination of known cultivars over the years.

Our Alabama-based nursery is uniquely certified to ship to and receive from all States and Territories and most countries which allow germplasm trade with the USA within phytosanitary limitations. Due to rigorous inspections, quarantine practices, locality regulations, licensing, credentialing and preventative measures, we are also certified to ship plants in our soilless custom mixes and do not have to ship any plants as bare roots—allowing them to maintain a fully undisturbed root ball for year-round shipping with greatly reduced shock. As a result, we are also able to offer a Transshipping service as a liaison when online nurseries are not licensed to ship to certain states.

Os equipamentos Ioniza potencializam a qualidade do produto, reduzindo perdas parciais, como descarte de patas de frangos, minimizam o consumo de tratamentos químicos e eventual aplicação de antibióticos, que possibilita o agricultor criar impacto positivo nas frentes social e ambiental, já que nossos equipamentos não necessitam de produtos químicos para seu funcionamento, tampouco, não emitem nenhum resíduo. Todo processo é natural e sustentável.

Name: Little Oak Ranch
Description:
Mountain farm, Livestock, Artisan laboratory. 
Everything at the Little Oak Ranch is AUTHENTIC PASSION.

Love. Harmony. Empathy. Equilibrium. Passion. Respect. 
These are the ingredients of the philosophy at Little Oak, focal points of our daily actions that complement our entrepreneurial actions.

Each animal is loved, respected and fed properly. We recreate all the possible conditions to guarantee him maximum well-being and give him the opportunity to build bonds and express himself, leaving the freedom of choice and access to pastures. An atypical management method in which sometimes greater attention must be used, but the result of well-considered choices. Animals develop and / or fully recover their character, are less stressed, more balanced and more serene. This is what horses transmit to their foals, together with a correct and respectful interaction with humans, like cows to their calves, resulting in easier and more balanced management on our part. Not only. The resulting milk is also qualitatively better.

In the field of laboratory production, our philosophy is a combination of quality, genuineness and passion. The products that will be destined for customers are the same that the family uses for their own needs, created with the same care, safety and emotion that will also allow for further qualitative evolution in the company.

Finally, we are very keen to protect nature, adopting choices to minimize the environmental impact and give greater sustainability, both in laboratory work and in building works. Nature, above all, must be valued and respected for the future of our children.

Description:
Mayan Moon Permaculture is a food production company that grows vegetables and microgreens but has a particular focus on gourmet mushroom varietals, which also carry several medicinal benefits in addition to their delicious taste. We own and operate a gorgeous 7 acre slice of A1 zoned agricultural land on the banks Potomac River, just outside Washington DC.

Permaculture farming is an approach that integrates the principles of sustainability and self-sufficiency into agriculture. At the heart of the practice is the integration with natural ecosystems, where the farm is designed to work in harmony with the surrounding environment, adapting to local conditions and utilizing native plant species. We have a native heirloom pawpaw orchard, for example.

Mayan Moon also utilizes indoor controlled environments to produce a similar mix of foods in a more predictable and year-round manner. This method is a pilot for a restaurant concept being explored.

Name: Arrawatta Station
Description:
Our goal at Arrawatta Station is to produce the ultimate in grass fed and finished beef. 

For almost 200 years, moderately framed Native Angus have been producing beef of world renown eating quality.

Native Angus cattle can be continuously traced back to the origin of the Angus breed, with no imported bloodlines. The phenotype of the Angus was radically altered in the 1970s with the introduction of North American Angus, which had been infused with other breeds of cattle in response to changing economics that favoured larger framed cattle suited to grain finishing and feedlot production. By the mid 1990’s, there were fewer than 150 Native Angus breeding females remaining in existence. Only the efforts of the Rare Breed Survival Trust, the Aberdeen Angus Cattle Society and Geordie and Julia Soutar of Dunlouise Farm in Angus, Scotland have saved the Native Angus from likely extinction.

The lush grasslands of the Northern Tablelands of New South Wales are considered one of the premier grazing regions of Australia, on account of a reliable, temperate climate and highly mineralized soils. Arrawatta Station has some 1,800ha of rich red and black basalt soils, ideal for both native and improved pasture, with adequate gentle hilly country and an 8.5km stretch of the Macintyre River. The property uses a variety of regenerative management practices to build soil biome health, and to improve environmental biodiversity and water quality.

We run a closed herd currently comprised of some 800 breeding females (Angus, Australian Lowline Angus and Native Angus) and 30 Native Angus bulls. Our Native Angus genetics (embryos and semen) were originally imported from Angus in Scotland and we import the latest Native Angus genetics on a regular basis. 

We believe that by combining the best grass conversion cattle genetics with the best Australian grasslands and using the best grazing management techniques, we can produce the best grass-fed and finished beef in the world.

Located conveniently for those near Portland, Oregon, and Vancouver, Washington, RavenWyn Kennel and Farm is a place where passion meets purpose.

 Potatoes: From golden Yukon Golds to creamy Russets, our diverse potato varieties are nurtured to perfection. Grown with care, these nutrient-rich spuds are a staple for comforting meals and delightful culinary creations.

 Rice: With meticulous attention to detail, our rice paddies yield premium grains that are the essence of every wholesome meal. Whether it's fragrant jasmine rice or hearty basmati, our rice is a testament to traditional farming wisdom and sustainable practices.

At our farm, sustainability is more than a buzzword; it's a way of life. We employ eco-friendly methods, embracing water conservation, natural pest control, and responsible land management. Our commitment to preserving the environment ensures that future generations can savor the same abundance we enjoy today.

We believe in community, and our farm is a place where families come together to experience the joys of agriculture. From educational tours to seasonal events, we welcome you to be a part of our farm-to-table journey.

When you choose our produce, you're not just getting food; you're receiving the fruits of passion, dedication, and a genuine love for farming. From our fields to your plate, every bite is a celebration of wholesome goodness and the spirit of agriculture.

Join us on this flavorful adventure as we bring the finest potatoes, corn, and rice from our fields to your family. Come, taste the difference, and experience

 Ethical free-range farming

Maison Carrier is more than a condiment—it’s a return to truth in food.

Our goal is to assist you in creating a carefree place where rewarding and profitable land stewardship is practiced, and family and friends spend time working and enjoying the ranch together.

Faire de l’agriculture une priorité nationale et un levier de développement socio-économique.

L’augmentation de la productivité agricole

✓ Experience + Innovation: 20 years of consolidating excellence with cutting-edge technology
✓ Total Chain Control: Guaranteed traceability, from the moment we farm it to each bag.
✓ Local Commitment: A product from Spain (Castilla La Mancha) that transcends borders
✓ Product Versatility: Multiple varieties and formats for every need
✓ Global Vision: Presence in domestic and international markets, with projected growth in key regions like Germany and Egypt

We process over 700,000 kg of raw pistachios annually—sourced from both our own orchards and local farmers in Spain—guaranteeing full traceability and 100% Spanish origin. We combine certified organic and conventional production, ensuring sustainability, food safety, and innovation at every step.

A specialized team of 16 professionals drives our commitment to agricultural excellence and environmental responsibility.

Name: Zambelli Vivai
Description:
Dopo oltre vent’anni di esperienza, Zambelli Sergio fonda Zambelli Vivai nel 1995. Oggi, l’azienda continua a crescere con lo stesso spirito, portando avanti con orgoglio il lavoro e la passione tramandati, mantenendo viva la tradizione, con uno sguardo sempre rivolto al futuro.
La Ditta si trova nel distretto vivaistico di Canneto sull’Oglio, in provincia di Mantova, conosciuto in tutta Europa come la zona dove vengono prodotte le maggior quantità di latifoglie.

I vivai si sviluppano su una superficie di 85 ettari coltivati in pieno campo; negli anni l’azienda è sempre cresciuta in modo costante e cercando di migliorare ogni aspetto: partendo dalle Tecniche di coltivazione per arrivare ai servizi offerti alla clientela.

L’azienda si rivolge a tutti gli operatori del settore, dai piccoli giardinieri fino ai grandi rivenditori.

La lunga esperienza dedicata al vivaismo è una sicura premessa per offrire uno standard qualitativo molto elevato e un efficiente assistenza al cliente.

Description:
JIA RFID Livestock is a high-tech supplier at the forefront of the industry. We specialize in RFID animal and livestock tracking and identification. We have extensive professional experience and advanced technology. JIA Tech strives to produce precise and cost-effective RFID animal tracking products.

RFID livestock ear tags are also called radio frequency identification ear tags. They come in different frequencies from 125KHz, 134.2KHz, and 860Mhz~960Mhz. As a professional animal ear tag manufacturer, we provide various sizes of safe and harmless animal ear tags. These include RFID cattle ear tags, sheep ear tags, and pigeon foot rings. They are widely used in livestock tracking, livestock management, pet identification, animal breeding, and food safety management. 

JIA RFID Livestock is committed to customer service and keeps its clients informed about long-term product updates and market trends. This ensures they stay competitive in the evolving market.

Name: ScreFarm
Description:
Screfarm 

 Sobre a Screfarm

Somos uma empresa apaixonada por explorar os vastos recursos do oceano e da terra para criar produtos de alta qualidade e sustentáveis. Na Screfarm, exploramos a Agricultura industrial, bem como a produção de óleo de abacate e o processamento de grãos, combinando tradição com inovação para fornecer soluções alimentares que promovem a saúde e o bem-estar.

 Pesca Industrial Sustentável

Nosso compromisso com a pesca industrial sustentável é o cerne do nosso negócio. Utilizamos práticas responsáveis para garantir a preservação dos ecossistemas marinhos, ao mesmo tempo em que proporcionamos produtos da mais alta qualidade aos nossos clientes. Acreditamos que é possível conciliar o crescimento econômico com a proteção ambiental.

 Óleo de Abacate Premium

Na Screfarm, pretendemos iniciar com a produção de óleo de abacate , um ingrediente versátil e nutritivo. Nossa fabricação sera  cuidadosamente monitorada para manter a pureza e potencializar os benefícios para a saúde. Estamos comprometidos em oferecer um produto excepcional que enriqueça a culinária e promova estilos de vida saudáveis.

 Grãos de Qualidade Superior

Combinando tradição agrícola e técnicas modernas, cultivamos e processamos grãos de alta qualidade. Desde a plantação até o empacotamento, cada etapa é realizada com precisão para garantir a integridade nutricional e o sabor autêntico. Nossos grãos são a base para uma alimentação saudável e equilibrada.

 Promovendo a Sustentabilidade

Além de nossas operações, estamos comprometidos em liderar iniciativas sustentáveis na comunidade. Participamos ativamente de projetos de conservação marinha, educação ambiental e desenvolvimento local. Acreditamos no poder da colaboração para construir um futuro mais sustentável.

At MPTS, we don’t raise the animals — we equip the people who do.

American built. USDA ready.

At Bamboo Edge Export, we supply top-quality bamboo poles and canes to customers around the world. We grow our own bamboo and also work with trusted local farmers who care about the environment as much as we do. Our bamboo is strong, flexible, and perfect for building, furniture-making, crafts, and eco-friendly projects. Whether you need standard sizes or custom-cut bamboo, we provide reliable service, fair prices, and on-time delivery. We believe bamboo is the future—a renewable, earth-friendly material that can replace wood and plastic in many industries. When you choose Bamboo Edge Export, you get more than just bamboo.

We also sell Areca Leaf Cutlery. Sourced from naturally fallen Areca palm leaves, our biodegradable and compostable cutlery offers a sustainable alternative to plastic, helping businesses and consumers reduce their environmental footprint without compromising on quality or convenience. 100% Natural & Biodegradable, made from fallen Areca palm leaves. It is also Durable & Stylish,Heat-resistant, sturdy, and elegant, perfect for restaurants, catering, and events. It also Compostable Breaks down naturally within weeks, leaving zero waste behind. Contact us for getting Bulk order in cheapest price. 

Bamboo Edge Export is also an exporter of high-quality banana fiber yarn dedicated to promoting eco-friendly textiles and sustainable fashion. Sourced from the finest banana plant stems, our yarn is durable and we have different varieties of yarn. Banana fiber yarn is an innovative, eco-friendly textile material derived from the stems of banana plants a byproduct of banana cultivation that would otherwise go to waste. This natural fiber is getting popular for its strength, softness, and sustainability, making it a preferred choice for conscious designers, textile manufacturers, and eco-friendly brands worldwide.

We are located on the migratory route of the resplendent quetzal and positioned between two nature reserves. Our farm acts as a vital bridge for flora and fauna, and as such, we are dedicated to protecting wildlife, while reforesting and regenerating the land.

Além disso, a Pecplana oferece uma linha diversificada de produtos agropecuários, atendendo às necessidades diárias de quem vive e produz no campo.

Name: Plantation Club
Description:
We are a farm-eco tourism initiative that invites travelers, creators, and dreamers to be part of something deeper than just a destination. Set within a thriving forest and agricultural landscape, our space is a living experiment in sustainable land stewardship and community-led growth.

At the heart of our farm-eco tourism initiative is a simple but powerful vision:
To regenerate the land, empower the local community, and create a space where travel meets purpose.

This isn’t just a retreat, it’s a living, breathing project-in-progress. A place where travelers can stay for free, and in return, contribute their energy, creativity, and time toward building a shared future. Every stone laid, every seed planted, and every idea exchanged brings us one step closer to a model of tourism that gives back more than it takes.

We’re growing:
	•	A regenerative forest farm grounded in traditional knowledge and ecological wisdom
	•	A skill-building ecosystem for the local community where people learn by doing, from natural building to permaculture to digital tools
	•	A global community of conscious travelers who want to co-create, not just consume

This vision isn’t complete yet, but that’s the beauty of it. It’s something we build together, day by day.

We’re not in a rush. Nature isn’t either.
Join us in creating something real.

Name: ARGEVİAN ARGE DANIŞMANLIK Tic.Aş.
Description:
ARGEVİAN, hayvancılık sektörüne yönelik yenilikçi, çevre dostu ve ekonomik çözümler geliştiren bir araştırma ve ürün geliştirme şirketidir. TÜBİTAK BİGG desteğiyle kurulmuş olup, “Mükemmeliyet Mührü” ödüllü projeleriyle süt sığırcılığında verimliliği, hijyeni ve sürdürüleb  ne ilirliği artırmayı hedeflemektedir.

Şirketin başlıca faaliyet alanları arasında organik ve bitkisel bazlı dezenfektanlar, çiftlik hijyeni ürünleri, doğal hammaddelerden elde edilen bakım ve temizlik ürünleri ile hayvancılıkta Ar-Ge danışmanlığı yer almaktadır.

ARGEVİAN, bilimsel temelli ürün geliştirme yaklaşımını ticari ölçeğe taşıyarak, yerli hammaddelerle üretilen yüksek katma değerli ürünleri sektöre kazandırmayı amaçlar. Ürünlerinin tamamı, hayvan sağlığına duyarlı, sütte kalıntı bırakmayan ve çevresel sürdürülebilirlik kriterlerine uygun olarak formüle edilmektedir.

ARGEVİAN, güçlü Ar-Ge altyapısı, saha deneyimi ve profesyonel iş ortaklıklarıyla hayvancılıkta kalite, inovasyon ve güveni bir araya getirir

Description:

Committed to delivering innovative solutions, Ardhaya implements centralized information technology automation to enhance efficiency, quality, and sustainability across the food supply chain and agricultural sector.

As a technology-driven agribusiness company, Ardhaya develops systems that integrate digitalized farming, modern fisheries technology, and data-driven livestock management, providing maximum benefits to industry players, farmers, fishers, and livestock breeders. Through a technology-based approach, Ardhaya aims to create a more productive, transparent, and sustainable food ecosystem.

By combining innovation and sustainability, PT Arhta Pangan Digdaya strives to become a leader in technology-based food industries in Indonesia and contribute to strengthening national food security.

La nostra missione è trasformare ogni piatto in un’esperienza sensoriale attraverso il dettaglio vegetale che fa la differenza.
Collaboriamo con chef, catering e locali d’eccellenza per portare innovazione, freschezza e unicità direttamente dal nostro laboratorio verde al tavolo.

Il dettaglio che eleva il piatto!

Name: Seefra
Description:
Fundada em 12 de janeiro de 2000 por Valeria Elisa Rodrigues, a Brasil Rural dividiu suas áreas de negócios em subdepartamentos com o objetivo de aprimorar a eficácia e qualidade de seus produtos, desenvolver seu modelo de gestão e marketing, proporcionar qualidade de vida e plano de carreira para parceiros e colaboradores, além de decidir os melhores métodos de expansão. 
Em 2020, diante de uma crise global originada pelo Covid-19, um novo departamento de educação através da internet foi iniciado com o objetivo de levar conhecimento e informação através das redes sociais e plataformas digitais. 
O fruto deste trabalho gerou uma grande demanda por parcerias e propagou a marca de forma meteórica criando assim, a oportunidade do nascimento de uma nova marca: A SEEFRA.
A SEEFRA é o resultado de mais de 20 anos de trabalho constante na transformação do mercado agro no Brasil. Nascido dentro da Brasil Rural, uma das líderes no mercado nacional do agronegócio, somos a união deste know-how (conhecimento), processos e modelo de negócio, validado através dos resultados de décadas de transformações.
A proposta da SEEFRA é proporcionar a empreendedores que desejam investir em um negócio próprio, seguro, de grande aceitação e com um ótimo público consumidor, gerando, consequentemente, margens de lucros atraentes, por meio da compra da melhor Franquia no ramo do agronegócio.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

La coopérative a fait sa 101e récolte en 2022.

Les vocations de la coopérative sont multiples. 
Accompagner les adhérents coopérateurs par la trituration des olives récoltées, la garantie de la bonne organisation de la réception des olives, de la production dans le respect des règles de sécurité et de la mise en conditionnement et la transmission du savoir par l’organisation de journées techniques et/ou de la formation sont les vocations internes de la coopérative.
Promouvoir le patrimoine oléicole local, la pérennisation de la filière du territoire et la favorisation du développement durable sont les vocations externes de la coopérative.

Name: Frederiksdal Slot
Description:
Frederiksdal Skov og Slot er beskæftiget med økologisk landbrug, bæredygtigt PEFC certificeret skovbrug herunder dyrkning af økologiske juletræer, og kulturaktiviteter som musikfestivaler, koncerter, rundvisninger og foredrag. Frederiksdal Slot opføres i 1747 af Nicolai Eigtved på bestilling af Sigismund Schulin, der er udenrigsminister og rådgiver for Christian 6. Slottet er i dag en perle i dansk bygningskunst og et af de fineste eksempler på dansk rokoko, og havesalen med Eigtveds struktur og æstetik regnes blandt de skønneste rum i dansk interiørkunst.

Frederiksdal Skov og Slot is engaged in organic agriculture, sustainable PEFC certified forestry including the cultivation of organic Christmas trees, and cultural activities such as music festivals, concerts, tours and lectures. Frederiksdal Slot was built in 1747 by Nicolai Eigtved ordered by Sigismund Schulin, who was Minister of Foreign Affairs and advisor to Christian 6. Today, the castle is a precious gem in Danish architecture and one of the finest examples of Danish Rococo, and the garden hall with Eigtved's structure and aesthetics is considered among the most beautiful rooms in Danish interior art.

Walk the fields and find your perfect tree, then head on down to the big red barn to warm up with a complimentary homemade donut and delicious local hot cider! Our cozy gift shop is full of locally made goods, beautiful ornaments and Christmas cheer – plus a wide variety of handmade wreaths and centerpieces. 

Check our social media pages for updates on horse drawn carriage rides, food trucks, Santa visits and other fun additions for your holiday outing. Whether you’re new to Piper Mountain, or have been coming to see us for generations (as some of you have!), we can’t wait to see you at the farm this year.

Name: Apex pest solutions ltd
Description:
Residential and commercial pest management
With a range of pest control options we can ensure successful control any infestation you may have, there is also options for preventative pest control to ensure you remain pest free.
Want to save money and still get rid of pests? We aim to provide professional pest control without charging an arm and a leg .

With two locations we can swiftly be there to provide Upper Hutt Pest Control, Lower Hutt Pest Control and Wellington Pest Control. 
We offer Wellington Pest Control, Upper Hutt Pest Control and Lower Hutt Pest Control. Want more specifics? 

 Looking for a rural or residential service? We do it all, from insect control to deer control. Explore below to see. 
Pests Serviced
Ant control: We use specialized gel bait that is safe for family and pets alongside an exterior perimeter spray. Any specific problems you may have we can create a tailored solution.

Wasp control: We first suit up before applying a powder treatment around the entry point. When they come in contact with the treatment and fly back to the wasp nest they contaminate the whole hive. This treatment is safe for the family (including pets) and will control the wasp problem.

Cockroach control: Depending on the species of cockroach there is two different types of treatments. There is a gel bait (possible different spot treatments if needed), there is also a full interior and exterior spray. The choice of treatment will be be determined by the type of cockroaches.

Rodent control:  Our rodent plan provides continued control with a regular 3 month service for both rats and mice. For more plan options get a quote or make a call.

Fly control: We first inspect the property to establish any environmental factors that may be contributing to the fly problem. After addressing any external factors we will preform an interior and exterior spray.

Spider control: We offer an interior and exterior spray for spiders with specialized treatments depending on the species

Name: Liber Equus | Natural Paddock Paradise
Description:
En Liber Equus, nos apasiona el bienestar de los caballos y la preservación del medio ambiente. Somos una empresa dedicada a crear espacios de vida naturales y sostenibles para nuestros amigos equinos, implementando el innovador concepto de Paddock Paradise.

 ¿Qué es el Paddock Paradise? 

Nuestro enfoque se basa en el respeto por la naturaleza de los caballos. Mediante la creación de entornos similares a su hábitat natural, fomentamos el ejercicio, la socialización y la alimentación equilibrada, contribuyendo a la salud y felicidad de nuestros nobles compañeros.

Nuestro compromiso con el medio ambiente 

En Liber Equus, estamos comprometidos con la sostenibilidad y la preservación del ecosistema local. Nuestros Paddock Paradises se diseñan siguiendo prácticas agrícolas sostenibles y respetuosas con el entorno, promoviendo la biodiversidad y la regeneración natural del suelo a través del PRV

 Educación y formación 

Creemos en compartir nuestros conocimientos y experiencia. Ofrecemos programas de educación y formación en el cuidado responsable de caballos, destacando la importancia de un enfoque holístico para el bienestar animal. Síguenos en rrss (@liber_equus)!

 Turismo ecológico 

Además de nuestros servicios de bienestar equino, invitamos a los amantes de la naturaleza a sumergirse en la belleza de nuestros Paddock Paradises. Ofrecemos experiencias únicas, donde los visitantes pueden aprender sobre la vida de los caballos y su impacto positivo en el ecosistema.

Únete a nosotros en nuestra misión de crear un mundo más equitativo y sostenible para nuestros queridos caballos! Contáctanos para descubrir cómo Liber Equus Natural Paddock Paradise puede marcar la diferencia para tus equinos y el medio ambiente.

Name: Missouri Brush Control
Description:
At Missouri Brush Control, we're not just in the business of clearing land; we're in the business of transforming landscapes. Based in the scenic town of Eureka, MO, we specialize in forestry mulching, offering a sustainable and efficient solution to land clearing and vegetation management throughout eastern Missouri.

Our state-of-the-art equipment and experienced team are dedicated to preserving the natural beauty of your property while enhancing its functionality. Whether you're a landowner looking to reclaim your overgrown land, a developer preparing a site for construction, or a municipality seeking responsible land management, Missouri Brush Control is your trusted partner.

We take pride in our commitment to environmentally friendly practices. Forestry mulching not only clears unwanted vegetation but also promotes soil health by mulching organic matter back into the ground. This approach minimizes soil erosion, retains moisture, and reduces the need for chemical herbicides.

At the heart of our business is a passion for the environment and a dedication to providing top-notch service to our clients. We  tailor our solutions to meet the specific needs of each project.

Our mission is simple: restore the land, nourish people, and empower communities. We embrace sustainable, chemical-free farming, ensuring that every harvest supports both the soil’s vitality and the well-being of those who enjoy our produce. By working with nature rather than against it, we cultivate abundance in ways that regenerate the earth for future generations.

From seed to harvest, from farm to table, from soil to soul—we are committed to growing food with integrity, purpose, and heart.

Por meio da organização de agricultores familiares, garantimos a inserção da produção no mercado institucional, com destaque para a execução do Programa Nacional de Alimentação Escolar (PNAE), política pública do FNDE/MEC que assegura alimentação saudável aos estudantes da rede pública de ensino.

Missão
Promover o desenvolvimento sustentável da comunidade rural por meio da valorização da agricultura familiar, assegurando renda aos agricultores e alimentação de qualidade às escolas.

Visão
Ser referência regional em gestão comunitária e fornecimento agrícola, contribuindo para o fortalecimento das políticas públicas de segurança alimentar e nutricional.

Áreas de atuação

Organização e gestão de produção agrícola familiar.

Fornecimento de alimentos para escolas públicas via PNAE.

Apoio à geração de renda e inclusão produtiva rural.

Conexão entre agricultores, instituições de ensino e gestores públicos.

Projetos sociais voltados ao desenvolvimento comunitário.

Impacto
A Associação Comunitária Poço de Varas contribui para o desenvolvimento local, gera oportunidades para famílias agricultoras e assegura a oferta de alimentos frescos e saudáveis às crianças e adolescentes em idade escolar.

Name: F & T Global Services Ltd
Description:
F & T Global Services Limited was incorporated in Nigeria in 2020, with a mission to foster growth and sustainability in the palm oil industry and beyond. Our growth is built on the foundation of transparency and sustainability, motivated by a strong belief that we can contribute meaningfully to a circular economy.

Partnering with global leaders like Apical Group headquartered in Singapore, a major exporter of palm oil and its products in Indonesia, we are committed to delivering innovative solutions to our customers. Apical Group is a vertically integrated business that supports industries such as food, oleochemicals, renewable fuel, and more.

Our Core Business
One of the core focuses of F & T Global Services Limited is the purchase and processing of palm fruit using a modern modular refinery. This enables us to produce crude palm oil, palm kernel oil, vegetable oil, as well as a variety of other products such as soap, animal and fish feed, and charcoal. We are also involved in leasing palm fruit plantations and planting palm trees to ensure sustainable operations.

Our Commitment
At F & T Global Services, we believe in long-term growth and sustainability. Our land leasing model ranges from 75 to 90 years, with periodic reviews to maintain fairness for all stakeholders. Our leasing agreements are based on hectares, with a minimum of 100 hectares per lease, and payments structured to ensure security for both parties.

Partnership with Apical Group
Apical Group’s headquarters is located in Singapore at 80 Raffles Place. As a strategic partner, Apical Group provides us with unparalleled support in the global palm oil market. Their vertically integrated model ensures that we are able to meet the needs of various industries with efficiency and sustainability.

Description:
Welcome to Palomino Ranch - Where Serenity Meets Strength 

Nestled in the tranquility of Ferma village, just a short 30-minute drive from vibrant Tbilisi, Palomino Ranch is a haven of peace and equestrian beauty.

 Our Pride: Local Tushetian Horses

At the heart of our ranch are our cherished horses, exclusively of the local Tushetian breed. These magnificent creatures embody the perfect blend of grace and strength, making every interaction with them a truly magical experience.

 Equestrian Artistry: Lessons and Tours

Immerse yourself in the world of equestrian artistry at our riding school. Whether you're a novice or a seasoned rider, our innovative horse riding lessons and daily tours beckon you to explore the vast meadow landscapes in an unforgettable way.

 Inclusivity Matters: Accessible to All

We take pride in our commitment to inclusivity, ensuring that our environment is fully accessible to wheelchair users. Beyond traditional riding experiences, we offer hippotherapy – a transformative practice supporting post-traumatic rehabilitation, individuals on the autistic spectrum, and wheelchair users. Our specially crafted saddles ensure comfort and safety, marking us as pioneers in Georgia as the first to offer wheelchair-friendly hippotherapy.

 Beyond Riding: A Mission of Inclusivity and Connection

At Palomino Ranch, our mission goes beyond horseback riding; it's about crafting an inclusive and enriching experience for everyone. Join us on this remarkable journey where compassion, innovation, and the breathtaking Tushetian breed converge to create unforgettable moments of connection and healing.

 Come, be a part of the Palomino family, where every hoofbeat resonates with inclusivity, beauty, and the spirit of adventure!

cene, compleanni, cerimonie o team building.

Con lo sguardo rivolto alla piscina, uno splendido salone unisce elementi materici e tonalità naturali che rimandano alla ricca vegetazione esterna.

Un orto, l’uliveto e il frutteto regalano prodotti sani e puliti, trasformati in oli, marmellate e gustosi piatti.

All’ombra di aceri e betulle, è facile innamorarsi di questa quiete. Così, per chi volesse, è possibile pernottare nelle 2 mini-suite, arredate con gusto e minuzia nei dettagli, perfette anche per le famiglie.

Name: HydraTech Chile
Description:
HydraTech fue fundada en 1990 por Roberto Pezoa Muñoz, un visionario comprometido con la modernización de la agricultura en el árido norte de Chile. La empresa nació con el objetivo de transformar los desafíos hídricos de los valles de Copiapó, Vallenar y Huasco en oportunidades de desarrollo agrícola sostenible a través de soluciones de riego tecnificado.

Durante sus primeros 20 años, HydraTech se posicionó como líder en el sector, instalando más de 2000 hectáreas de riego tecnificado y colaborando con destacados clientes como Río Blanco, Prohens y Unifruti. Estos proyectos optimizaron el uso del agua y mejoraron la productividad agrícola, convirtiendo a la región en un referente en cultivos de exportación. Además, la empresa no solo implementó tecnologías innovadoras, sino que también capacitó a agricultores, dejando un legado de sostenibilidad y eficiencia hídrica.

Name: Tetrafert Tarım San. Tic. Ltd. Şti.

Description:
Hidden Leaves was a family owned and run farm in the Fraser Valley.  We were one of the first mushroom farms in BC (and Canada) to implement the European Phase 2/3 compost production methodology and the first commercial farm in BC to have organic certification.

We specialized in growing cremini and Portobello mushrooms for the wholesale market from British Columbia to California.  We worked with local wholesalers that sold our product into large chain stores in the Pacific Northwest, and we worked with private brokers to sell our mushrooms into California.

In 2010 our farm was bought by a large direct-to-retail operation to help expand their share of the market in British Columbia.

Name: The Farm at Baan Som Sanook
Description:
Immerse yourself in the verdant haven of The Farm Som Sanook, where nature's bounty flourishes in harmony with ethical principles. Our commitment to organic farming ensures that every crop nurtures the land while preserving its integrity. Beyond sustainability, we prioritize the welfare of our cherished animals, granting them ample space to roam and thrive. Nestled along the banks of our own meandering river, our picturesque landscape is a testament to the beauty of sustainable living.

Explore our diverse array of offerings, from the vibrant hues of jasmine rice fields to the lush foliage of sweet coconut palms. Wander through our cashew nut plantation, where each nut is nurtured to perfection. Savor the tangy zest of lemon and lime, plucked fresh from our orchards, or indulge in the succulent sweetness of ripe mangoes. And with every crack of a duck or chicken egg, taste the difference that genuine care and attention make in every bite. At The Farm Som Sanook, we invite you to join us on a journey where the flavors of nature and the warmth of ethical farming converge.

Name: Ifaji Farm
Description:
AbundanceMaxxing the Earth

At Ifaji Farm, our name is our mission. Faji is a Yoruba word that describes enjoyment and prosperity as a result of abundance. Ifaji Farm implements agricultural solutions that generate holistic abundance for local communities.

What We Do

At the heart of our operations is our premium vermicompost—nature's #1 soil vitalizer. Ifaji Farm provides a vital resource, especially in Ontario, where the population is burgeoning and urban sprawl is stretching the limits of logistics. Our vermicompost is crucial for achieving bountiful harvests, maintaining chemical-free soil, supporting diverse food sources and ecosystems, and aiding in carbon sequestration.


Our Philosophy

Believing deeply that agriculture is the foundation of strong communities, Ifaji Farm operates on the principle that by fulfilling the agricultural needs of our local communities, we can ignite a ripple effect of positive impacts. In Ontario, we are committed to nurturing the land and enriching the soil, enhancing the lives of those who depend on it.

Berawal dari keinginan untuk membantu para petani dan penghobi ternak di sekitar kami, Mitra Tani telah menjadi mitra yang terpercaya dalam menyediakan layanan pembibitan, penjualan barang pertanian, dan pakan ternak berkualitas. Dengan komitmen kami untuk memberikan pelayanan terbaik dan produk berkualitas, Mitra Tani telah berkembang pesat dan sukses.

Mitra Tani, percaya bahwa pertanian adalah tulang punggung masyarakat. Oleh karena itu, kami berkomitmen untuk terus memberikan dukungan, layanan, dan produk terbaik bagi para petani dan pecinta ternak di seluruh Indonesia.

Kelebihan kami bisa konsultasi secara langsung karena kami memiliki latar belakang yang mumpuni dan berpengalaman di bidang pertanian. Barang yang kami jual juga bisa diantar sampai ke lokasi pelanggan yang telah memesan melalui offline ataupun online. Mari bergabung dengan Mitra Tani dan menjadi bagian dari pertanian yang lebih baik untuk masa depan yang lebih baik!

Name: Quiet Life Holdings, LLC
Description:
Quiet Life Ranch – A Veteran-Owned Ranch Rooted in Faith, Community, and Horsemanship

At Quiet Life Ranch, we believe in the power of faith, hard work, and the simple joys of ranch life. Inspired by 1 Thessalonians 4:11—“Aspire to live a quiet life, to work with your hands, and to mind your own affairs”—our mission is to create a space where both people and animals can grow, heal, and thrive.

Founded by J.T. Schaffhouser, a 12-year Navy veteran, Quiet Life Ranch is a family and faith-driven operation in Mitchellville-Portland, TN, offering quality equine boarding, training, and a strong sense of community.

Current Services:

 Equine Boarding – Providing a safe and well-maintained home for horses with quality care and support.
 Horse Care & Training Support – A space for riders and trainers to develop skills and strengthen their connection with their horses.
 Community Engagement – Bringing together fellow veterans, equestrians, and local families in a welcoming ranch environment.

Future Expansion & Vision:

 Rodeo Arena & Event Hosting – Building a dedicated space for rodeo events, riding clinics, and community gatherings.
 Veteran-Focused Programs – Developing initiatives to support fellow veterans through agriculture, horsemanship, and camaraderie.
 Equine Therapy (Long-Term Goal) – Working toward full certification to provide equine-assisted activities that promote healing and resilience.
 Trail Life USA Troop – Establishing a local troop to develop leadership and outdoor skills for young men.

At Quiet Life Ranch, we honor our faith, family, and the calling to serve others. As we grow, we remain dedicated to our mission: to live a quiet life, work with our hands, and build a place where both people and animals can flourish.

Join us as we build something truly special—one hoofprint at a time.

We're facing a triple challenge in Africa - poverty, unemployment, and environmental damage are all taking a toll. But there's hope! By using regenerative agriculture and agroecological methods, we can create a sustainable future for farming that will help Africa thrive.

Imagine a world where farmers use natural processes to grow crops and care for the land. This type of farming not only helps the environment but also creates jobs and provides nutritious food for the community. MNS Farms is a family owned breeding farm located in Cave Creek, Arizona dedicated to the breeding and preservation of the Arabian Horse. Through years of practical experience and service to the horse industry, Michael and Shannon Upstone as well as Austin Garrett have prided themselves on their knowledge of the breed and the ability to produce horses of superior type coupled with the athleticism that is inherently present in the Arabian. In 2015, Shannon and Austin partnered on two mares and began to pursue a lifelong dream of adding their own contributions to the breed.

We breed for balance and conformation – maintaining strong and correct legs, charisma, traditional Arabian type, and to continue to contribute to the improvement of the all-around show horse. We look forward to sharing our passion with newcomers and industry veterans alike through the horses that we breed and through ongoing involvement outside of the show ring to the Arabian horse.

Name: Nexgarden Farms
Description: Nexgarden is a microgreens farm committed to producing high-quality, fresh, and sustainable greens. Located in Portland, Oregon, we specialize in growing a variety of nutrient-packed microgreens that are perfect for chefs, local markets, and health-conscious consumers. Our focus is on delivering fresh, flavorful greens that enhance every dish while maintaining a strong commitment to sustainable farming practices. Our greens boast a typical shelf life of upwards of three weeks, but we bet you’ll eat them long before that.

Name: Pugliarella
Description:
The family agricultural company, founded in 1985 by Michele Ciavarella, is now taking a step forward: the production of artisanal pasta and extra virgin olive oil, using raw materials grown on our land in San Severo, Apulia. For our pasta, we adopt traditional methods such as bronze die extrusion and slow drying at low temperatures, which give it a bold flavor and excellent cooking performance.

Our olive oil, on the other hand, is made exclusively from Peranzana olives, a typical local variety, cold-pressed just a few hours after harvest: an elegant monocultivar with a medium fruitiness and a harmonious taste.

We carefully follow every stage of the production process: from working the land, to caring for the crops, all the way to transformation.

Pugliarella is the result of a perfect balance between tradition and innovation: we remain faithful to ancient production techniques, while also committed to efficiency and sustainability.
